name: Kevin McCarthy
subject: Biden Investigation Update

body:
| |
---
| | | This is Speaker of the House Kevin McCarthy. When my Republican colleagues and I asked for your vote last fall, we made a Commitment to America of exactly what we would get done for you if entrusted with the majority.

The House is now spearheading the commitment to hold Joe Biden and his cronies accountable to you, and let me tell you - the Biden family corruption our investigations have uncovered in just a few short months is _**damning.**_

**But here 's the thing:**

When the Clintons went after Trump...
When Adam Schiff and Nancy Pelosi went after Trump...
When Merrick Garland and the FBI went after Trump...
And when Alvin Bragg went after Trump...

**They ALL had the media, Hollywood, Big Tech, and D.C. bureaucrats to peddle their LIES.**

Now, all those forces are converging all their resources to SHUT DOWN what my colleagues and I are uncovering about their puppet in the White House. Which is why I'm coming to you today, Friend. I need your help to keep the pressure on Joe Biden and fend off the attempts to undermine our investigations. _**[Can my colleagues and I count on you?](http://links.fighttheswamp.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=e182917cdb8a44eaae0bd02a839fcb1c&_e=q30RmlWDd99kNOcE7c9bl7_uc0A3yJjnZ8NNxLdC3HOtj8Xg27evIVVzF6JQCllvCyjiqs6NU_LWuwxdBZnTm_ttmCo8NLe0ylTh_ZxCCojcrOY8XyfE9dmYFCYZa2dC02LVPh4W-umjcHaMJL0lfwDHLQ3ipeRbaEkZuejr5YU5s5Herp1QYPI6P-z5-AS0jVwdPHjeg8WtSh9215BuKSUeYP8tFvRgj7US0X3J-9hi7qHCakFuIQIacJ7lrQ2cA8c4CZpC91P1GRvoOnpfkRutqs_cBiViK-PwbN2K7mqw3EU1LJLcfj3XODMMqupa90AKrqY_58acgzS8CPHvaxbzRHPbDWMG8r2J4QRJ-dbzoXzb3jfMvusxEDGsCoC9 "Can my colleagues and I count on you?")**_

| | |

| | FROM THE DESK OF ALAN DERSHOWITZ
---
| | Dear Sun Reader,
---
| | In over sixty years in the legal profession, I’ve experienced first hand the impact of both good journalism and bad journalism — mostly the latter — and just how important and rare it is to get things right.

In today’s media landscape there are far too many publications that get things wrong. Many are more concerned with the political implications of a story than the basic facts.

The New York Sun is different. It’s a paper that places principle over politics and people over party.

Its in-depth coverage of the legal challenges faced by President Trump serve as a case in point.

When I defended President Trump during his first impeachment, I faced an avalanche of criticism, but few papers made sufficient effort to fully appreciate the significance of the legal arguments.

The Sun’s deeply knowledgeable leadership, including its editor Seth Lipsky and associate editor A.R. Hoffman are themselves students of the Constitution. It shows in their coverage, which I find to be first rate.

It will be no secret to you that I don’t agree with everything that can be found in the Sun’s pages, but I can say with confidence that its re-emergence is among the most important recent developments in American journalism.

I’ve been impressed by the Sun’s growth so far, but I know it faces an uphill battle, one that I have pledged to join.

The Sun’s success will be a gift to the American people and to the cause of truth. But to succeed, we need you to join us. I highly encourage you to join the Sun today.

Every person matters in this effort.

Don’t wait. The battle to restore American journalism starts now.
---
| | [ Join the Sun Now → ](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=325cd0f07f974bdb88dd07becae8b534&_e=mES7Row3SapLlfTmuKSQPkctV3QHU6gWBXPxTeIVg7WglUkACl1_iKGPAum4dsleNa80mwrUCvfCj2FF1HBEm5fyZbHm3kWK7etfed4ho8L-qKD1bERjKNRq8RlK9W-bpXdGRwKu5MJOmIs5oXuJPzRHDGf6YoL0sjOLvOX8dsIKQfTtHvzfsWmF79KbiuaPJpH3ulhthhMEGkwB9DyMHsMlXuX8V-Uz1TWZjlp_Fy4ExOjYLXgfslR0Waq2DRLPxdbV3TLUS1HcpY8vHA3tqTWtWHphLCg1eSBenflesnGdhgRq5fuvmr8CgsQqI7Di)
---
| | |
---
Alan Dershowitz
Columnist,
The New York Sun

subject: What can $7 buy you these days?

body:

|
Peter,

It’s Sheriff Mark Lamb with an invitation to set a reminder in your phone for August 6th, 2024. It’s an important date not just for me personally, but also for the people of Arizona because next year on August 6th, Arizona voters will nominate one Democrat and one Republican to faceoff in our state’s upcoming Senate election.

I'm going to cut straight to the point: **[I am in sincere need of your help.](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=07833d88af0c4057a10961c9ae1e6e32&_e=2yH1JIvufLH8_yo2fXM0oJ2OYJjXDYb29Px1V_LoZokG2PPnZzMSH8IsEfwIVtYa9w19vczemyxWataKkTJTXy4h8DvVUOV4uC1P6LJCr7Es8GmEgwHvDJXSVUMKRgIU1nbuvy8ok0nWHSvEx_eIxX2mQ-XgY8gN30_-057r7Yxr12s2jZzzgcHl3q_O1_6oIgpjpnwSN18d8hzob9FdwtPbDl8h5G3IKqIr13_3CLaYarHLoE1ykMx3j06uZsWzRRy8DkAt8w-CxftyLSEGDJSQNsswo_oH7UGkmtviB60KN80URzd4XKvO0WcdZ6uaabZwZXPsOeLqUMAix3u5pmqszzf_4ld5OzDU2S6YbEAxoEE08HgHh03ZRfP3bzLhtwCqvRE5n5ApOt2yMOTY5A%3D%3D)** Polls have shown that Republicans CAN win back this Senate seat from Democrats, but only if we have the necessary resources to compete. **Meet Sheriff Lamb:** GOD. FAMILY. FREEDOM.

Sheriff Mark Lamb is a husband, father, grandfather, and God-fearing patriot. From Hawaii to Manila, Arizona, Mark Lamb's rich experirences inspired his life of service. As the 24th Sheriff of Pinal County, Arizona, he drives a powerful agenda to ensure community safety and prosperity.

Sheriff Lamb trained with the Maricopa County Sheriff's Office Deputy Academy and was named Valedictorian of his class. He was hired by the Salt River Pima-Maricopa Indian Community, where he excelled as a police officer and was named Rookie of the Year. The following year, he received the Officer of the Year award. He was later promoted as a Detective to the Gang Enforcement Unit and in his first year was named Detective of the Year.

clean_body: Let’s keep showing what’s possible when we work together for a better future. | | | | | | Folks, Thank you for being a part of our movement to build a better and brighter future for Alaska and for America. We want you to know how much we appreciate you being on our team. But we have to be upfront with you, friend. The last two months have been difficult for fundraising, and we fell short of our monthly goal in July. Contributions to Build Alaska’s Future Action Fund directly fund our work advocating for federal investments in Alaska, combating extremism, and supporting level-headed policies that will advance our state and our nation. Our work made an incredible difference in the 2022 election, and we’re relying on our supporters to help defend Alaskan values of fairness and independence again in 2024. That’s why we’re asking for your continued support as we tackle our state’s most pressing issues and make Alaska an example for the rest of the nation. We can be America’s north star, lighting the way and showing what’s possible when we work together for a better future. | | | | Thank you, friend! – Team BAFAF | | Help us continue to build Alaska's future by to support our work. | | | Copyright © 2022 Build Alaska's Future Action Fund, All rights reserved. Contributions are not tax deductible. Our mailing address is:** Build Alaska's Future Action Fund 645 G St., Ste 100-1122 Anchorage, AK 99501 Emails like this are the most effective way to grow our campaign and reach supporters like you. name: Sherrod Brown
subject: This is incredible news!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
Ohioans came out strong in this week’s special election
| This is incredible news, folks! Ohioans came out strong in yesterday’s special election to STOP an anti-democratic amendment and clear special interest power grab – which would’ve made it harder for us to enshrine reproductive rights in our state constitution this November.

Seeing Ohio voters turn out to the polls and decisively reject the GOP's proposal has me feeling more hopeful than ever about our ability to protect women’s health care.

This massive victory also makes clear that momentum is on our side heading into 2024 when I’ll be on the ballot. But we can’t take our foot off the gas. **So today, as we celebrate, I'm personally asking you to help me keep up our momentum:** [_Will you split $10 or more between myself and the Voter Protection Project to defend Ohio's Democratic seat and our pro-choice Senate majority?_](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/51211?t=6&akid=9779%2E878179%2EB2ZOk_) If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Sherrod Brown and VPP will go through immediately: | [CONTRIBUTE $10 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/51212?t=7&akid=9779%2E878179%2EB2ZOk_)
---
[CONTRIBUTE $25 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/51213?t=8&akid=9779%2E878179%2EB2ZOk_)
[CONTRIBUTE $50 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/51214?t=9&akid=9779%2E878179%2EB2ZOk_)
[CONTRIBUTE $100 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/51215?t=10&akid=9779%2E878179%2EB2ZOk_)
[Or a custom donation »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/51216?t=11&akid=9779%2E878179%2EB2ZOk_)
In solidarity,

Sherrod
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=9779%2E878179%2EB2ZOk_). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=9779%2E878179%2EB2ZOk_).**

[Click here](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=9779%2E878179%2EB2ZOk_) to request fewer emails. Click here to [unsubscribe](https://act.protectvoting.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=12&akid=9779%2E878179%2EB2ZOk_). | | [Please: Pitch In Once A Month To Protect Voting Rights »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/123?t=4&akid=9779%2E878179%2EB2ZOk_)
---

Peter,
With the support of local Democrats and fellow far-left radicals, do-nothing former representative Mondaire Jones wants to take back this seat in congress. The same one he abandoned less than two years ago.
You remember, right? Mondaire left NY-17 to run for a seat in Brooklyn - which he lost - and then closed his offices 4 months early despite still collecting his $174k salary.
You gotta give Mondaire credit for one thing - he has a lot of nerve!
Congressman Mike Lawler knows that serving the people of New York is an honor and a privilege given to him by voters – and he would never dream of not showing up to work just because he didn’t get his way.

clean_body: | | | | If you don’t show up, you’re fired | Peter, With the support of local Democrats and fellow far-left radicals, do-nothing former representative Mondaire Jones wants to take back this seat in congress. The same one he abandoned less than two years ago. You remember, right? Mondaire left NY-17 to run for a seat in Brooklyn - which he lost - and then closed his offices 4 months early despite still collecting his $174k salary. You gotta give Mondaire credit for one thing - he has a lot of nerve! Congressman Mike Lawler knows that serving the people of New York is an honor and a privilege given to him by voters – and he would never dream of not showing up to work just because he didn’t get his way. It’s up to us to keep Mike in Congress so that he can continue to prioritize transparency, accountability, and bipartisan legislation. | | | | | | Thank you for your commitment to New York’s 17th District. \- Team Lawler | | | | | | Mike Lawler is a Republican running for reelection in New York’s 17th Congressional District. He is passionate about standing with law enforcement and making our communities more safe, protecting Social Security and Medicare, fixing our crumbling roads and bridges, and restoring the SALT deduction to lower taxes and make New York more affordable. | | USE THE ADDRESS BELOW TO CONTRIBUTE BY CHECK LAWLER FOR CONGRESS PO BOX 87 SOUTH SALEM, NY 10590 GET YOUR MIKE LAWLER, NO CUOMO MERCH No New Yorker wants to call our Tappan Zee Bridge the “Governor Mario M. Cuomo Bridge”. Proudly send the message that you want the bridge restored as the Tappan Zee. | Are you interested in staying up-to-date on Mike Lawler's reelection battle? Don't miss out on the latest news and updates from his campaign! By texting "Lawler" to 85007, you can receive regular updates on Mike's campaign, upcoming events, and important news about the race. Text "Lawler" to 85007 today and join the fight for a brighter future for New York! Do you know someone who would be interested in supporting Mike Lawler’s reelection campaign for Congress? Don't keep it to yourself! Spread the word and remind your friends and family to join the fight for America’s future. Simply forward this message to five of your friends or family members who you think would be interested in staying up-to-date with Mike's campaign. FORWARD THIS EMAIL As we get closer to the 2024 election, Mike Lawler is more motivated than ever to continue our journey toward a better future for all New Yorkers. To stay up-to-date with our latest news and events, we encourage you to text "Lawler" to 85007 and follow us on social media, where we share updates, thoughts, and news about our progress. You can also opt others in by providing their email address and we will send them regular updates and important news about the campaign. | go.txting.io/7jAGfc Let's work together to ensure that Mike Lawler has the support he needs to make a real difference for New York! | | | | | = \- =

My name is Apoorva, I'm Vivek Ramaswamy's wife.

I am sending my first campaign email to you because there's something very special happening today - _**Vivek's birthday!**_

With the debate only a few weeks away and little time to celebrate I am hoping **[you will join us to wish Vivek a happy birthday and give him words of encouragement!](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=f5245c52d0104a40a84a51264a420bd7&_e=-R1AOD_omc_4ppR7g0I_FCowj0PybDze5Utv299AL0UDXclytfIWsthT9RlujOwDVITrcTc0Lrq25ymS6ZIdB0-BJ3Lt84umlK8KKx0_mMByKkEnb2pX7nn0ZSNCcXLTy72GF8Qolok1-Ss7zdCiaWnh_AUI54fvDDhir9wqT5NLBVxcP2csj7A9rZcS7saGB1t_G5zFKJ3iRmVosPjzvLb6IUNt4VHXeZCIrR5-VMFCewR3hnJ0htbH7CyjyW0Q5F6PymjoymQcdSXgpJRTs02HXqmNH7jUYzHhztFYPKGZ0dWrDQx5USQZswugwdgdk2KTMCCrn43cEc2LxjNSkQ0gXCs8tXeMCxFAxxPiOyDNX8J5A-HdP3B_VZL3Brk2EnQlcgEhbcGmz5JhYWaXq4DE2krp-bxmM7XKUW1LtIrfQyZDUCC8zIIyQDiG0BuCXaAqg4T8bDDFh3N0cReU19od6JmH7GOTCwks3eMu6XPpqnWoYyBcnWnU4YtpdtokVtMtIAUJTFppCxnVcsvysg%3D%3D)**

Next year's election isn't a normal election - it's a revolution for American unity. Vivek is working tirelessly to ensure that revolution is not in vain and built on a foundation of your support. That's why his birthday to-do list is very short but important:
1. Decisive win at the first Republican Presidential Debate
2. Restore value in TRUTH and an American Identity our country can be proud of
3. Defeat Joe Biden in the 2024 election for president

We're counting on you to help make Vivek's day a special one! **[Please take 30 seconds to sign his card, send birthday wishes, and help Team Vivek!](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=f5245c52d0104a40a84a51264a420bd7&_e=-R1AOD_omc_4ppR7g0I_FCowj0PybDze5Utv299AL0UDXclytfIWsthT9RlujOwDVITrcTc0Lrq25ymS6ZIdB0-BJ3Lt84umlK8KKx0_mMByKkEnb2pX7nn0ZSNCcXLTy72GF8Qolok1-Ss7zdCiaWnh_AUI54fvDDhir9wqT5NLBVxcP2csj7A9rZcS7saGB1t_G5zFKJ3iRmVosPjzvLb6IUNt4VHXeZCIrR5-VMFCewR3hnJ0htbH7CyjyW0Q5F6PymjoymQcdSXgpJRTs02HXqmNH7jUYzHhztFYPKGZ0dWrDQx5USQZswugwdgdk2KTMCCrn43cEc2LxjNSkQ0gXCs8tXeMCxFAxxPiOyDNX8J5A-HdP3B_VZL3Brk2cPYj4Jn4PDtbjmnsSUubuQMDU_UhJL53fmiZBinDnGY8vt7duvgL1jP-e4HbSRF1wQpEp1JCZiRYKayyoVn0eYvF-Uo0IVMigzsUS76xMZMpgmZ_5JyUVYaGwLm7XkzkWB6Lgj_G4iEQm4W_gwJbMg%3D%3D)**

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

[ ** STAND WITH VIVEK ➞ **](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=f5245c52d0104a40a84a51264a420bd7&_e=-R1AOD_omc_4ppR7g0I_FCowj0PybDze5Utv299AL0UDXclytfIWsthT9RlujOwDVITrcTc0Lrq25ymS6ZIdB0-BJ3Lt84umlK8KKx0_mMByKkEnb2pX7nn0ZSNCcXLTy72GF8Qolok1-Ss7zdCiaWnh_AUI54fvDDhir9wqT5NLBVxcP2csj7A9rZcS7saGB1t_G5zFKJ3iRmVosPjzvLb6IUNt4VHXeZCIrR5-VMFCewR3hnJ0htbH7CyjyW0Q5F6PymjoymQcdSXgpJRTs02HXqmNH7jUYzHhztFYPKGZ0dWrDQx5USQZswugwdgdk2KTMCCrn43cEc2LxjNSkQ0gXCs8tXeMCxFAxxPiOyDNX8J5A-HdP3B_VZL3Brk2QZbZiZ5wRTvetnzeEofBadszD98-QnFsfcneiilxJ4CgBxkpH9tAIvE36oH1IyadnokpGxMZCE4abwcPJC7e_2UF3156vlqhXH6wOnUVWxBbYBZIgL3HRg9sBPiRMc2x28PKRpH-bMVoP8eb59rZqQ%3D%3D)

## Why Chris Christie:

Chris Christie is a proven leader who fearlessly tells it like it is. As a successful governor in a blue state with a track record of real accomplishments, Christie has consistently confronted challenging issues head-on, making difficult decisions without hesitation. To ensure a conservative Republican victory in the 2024 presidential election, we deserve an open, honest debate that focuses on critical issues. Governor Christie's voice at the debates will ensure our party engages in the robust, direct, truth-telling conversation we need to start winning again. Join us in supporting Chris Christie's candidacy for president and ensuring his direct, no-nonsense agenda at the RNC-sponsored presidential debates. Your participation is vital in making this happen. Sign up today to "Tell It Like It Is" and help our party and country select a president we can all be proud of. Together, we can shape a brighter future for America.

name: =?utf-8?Q?Matthew=20Barton?=
subject: Thank You
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/bartonfordesoto/thank-you-again?e=3c5d31b5ad)
---
| |
---
| DeSoto County,

Thank you for your support, your prayers, and your vote of confidence in yesterday’s election. With overwhelming support, we ended the evening with a strong victory in the Republican Primary for DeSoto County District Attorney.

But our work is not yet over. We will work hard over the next few months to ensure DeSoto County remains red in November.

Cities, like Memphis, have imposed soft-on-crime policies that leaves communities like ours vulnerable. There MUST be a firewall at the state line to protect our families from the violent crime that is raging to our north.

At the same time, we know that we can’t rely on Washington and the federal government to protect our towns from the liberal policies that are destroying this country. We can – and must – take up the battle here at home. As your District Attorney, I look forward to working with law enforcement to implement a conservative agenda that places the safety of honest, hardworking citizens above criminals.

That includes: Defending our constitutional rights, punishing criminals, and combating human trafficking.

While Megan and I are truly humbled by DeSoto County’s support, I remain focused on the task ahead: Protecting the place we call home.
---
| [DONATE](https://bartonfordesoto.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0289922a9bceb4e2230228a3d&id=a748f13873&e=3c5d31b5ad)
---
| | |
---
| Matthew Barton
_Sent from my iPhone_

PS: _If you believe you’ve received this email message in error - or do not wish to receive future updates from me or my team for any reason - [you can click here to unsubscribe](https://bartonfordesoto.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0289922a9bceb4e2230228a3d&id=71151f2873&e=3c5d31b5ad)[.](https://bartonfordesoto.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0289922a9bceb4e2230228a3d&id=8fe0775512&e=3c5d31b5ad)_
---
| |
---

**Meet Matthew Barton**
---

Matthew Barton grew up in Petal, Mississippi in a blue-collar family. His mother was a director at Tupperware and his father owned the small, family business – Barton Fence Company – where Matthew worked growing up.
After attending public school, Matthew attended Pearl River Community College and Warner University, where he studied Business Administration. He holds a law degree from Ole Miss Law, where he graduated Cum Laude and received the interviewing and counseling award.
In 2011, Matthew married his high school sweetheart, Megan. After graduating from Ole Miss Law in 2015, they moved to DeSoto County where Matthew started a law firm and Megan continued working at the Desoto County Schools as a Certified Occupational Therapy Assistant.
During law school, Matthew served as an intern in the DeSoto County District Attorney’s Office where he presented cases to grand jury, tried cases to verdict, and performed all functions of a practicing attorney. He has served as a prosecutor for the City of Southaven and the City of Horn Lake and now serves as a special prosecutor for Southaven, Horn Lake, and DeSoto County Justice Courts – where he’s established a strict, tough on crime reputation.
As an attorney, Mathew has dealt with every type of criminal matter ranging from DUI to capital murder, in more than 37 courts across Mississippi.
Matthew is a member of the Federalist Society, a conservative legal association, an enhanced conceal carry permit holder, Krewe of Hernando member, NRA member, and donates his time serving as a pro bono attorney to Veterans every year.
Today, Matthew, his wife Megan, and their daughter Eleanor live in Hernando where Matthew owns his private law firm. Eleanor attends Pre-K at Hernando United Methodist Church and Megan is a stay at home mom after seven years with DeSoto County schools.
| | | | | | | [](https://bartonfordesoto.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0289922a9bceb4e2230228a3d&id=b4638520ca&e=3c5d31b5ad)
---
| | [](https://bartonfordesoto.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0289922a9bceb4e2230228a3d&id=a857f1dd4d&e=3c5d31b5ad)
---
| | [](https://bartonfordesoto.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0289922a9bceb4e2230228a3d&id=4feb866c8d&e=3c5d31b5ad)
---
|
---
| _Copyright © | Matthew Barton for District Attorney | All rights reserved._

**Our mailing address is:**
P.O. Box 48 Hernando, Mississippi 38632

You can [update your preferences](https://bartonfordesoto.us21.list-manage.com/profile?u=0289922a9bceb4e2230228a3d&id=869da23cb4&e=3c5d31b5ad&c=e2f3b875e4) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://bartonfordesoto.us21.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=0289922a9bceb4e2230228a3d&id=869da23cb4&e=3c5d31b5ad&c=e2f3b875e4).

Schools are starting back up and parents have 2 BIG questions:

**Are our kids going to be indoctrinated by woke ideology?**
**Do we as parents have the right to determine what our kids learn?**
If Mississippi were run by Brandon Presley or any other Democrat, the answer would be YES wokeness will be in our schools and NO parents won't have a say.
That is why this election is SO important. We MUST keep Mississippi RED.
This is their game plan, folks. The radical left has no plans of taking its foot off the brake. They’ll keep pushing a dangerous agenda until it's mandated in schools across America.
That means MORE far-left political bias and LESS learning about real subjects like math, history, and writing.

body:
please submit your input right away:
| | **BREAKING: Republicans Make Plans to Destroy Automatic Voter Registration in 2024** Mitch McConnell and MAGA GOP will stop at NOTHING to suppress Democratic votes.

Automatic voter registration is one of the _easiest_ ways to increase voter participation, **but Republicans in every level of government are hell-bent on shutting it DOWN.** [**With public opinion split, we need to know:**
**Do you Support Automatic Voter Registration?**](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/support_avr/?source=VPP_20230809_EMPOLL_E5_T0_AC&t=6&akid=9798%2E878179%2EYi7qLQ) | [YES, OF COURSE! »](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/support_avr/?source=VPP_20230809_EMPOLL_E5_T0_AC&t=7&akid=9798%2E878179%2EYi7qLQ)

[UNSURE »](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/support_avr/?source=VPP_20230809_EMPOLL_E5_T0_AC&t=9&akid=9798%2E878179%2EYi7qLQ)
* * *
_*YOU ARE**ONE OF 150 LOCAL DEMOCRATS** SELECTED FOR THIS VITAL ONE CLICK POLL. PLEASE, ANSWER HONESTLY BEFORE MIDNIGHT!*_
Automatic voter registration has been TREMENDOUSLY beneficial in increasing voter rolls and turnout in states across the country.

But the GOP knows higher voter participation means higher gains for Democrats — so they’ll do WHATEVER it takes to rig elections in their favor.

**_As one of our TOP 150 LOCAL Democrats, we need your input on this critical issue! Answer before MIDNIGHT:_**
[**With public opinion split, we need to know:**
**Do you Support Automatic Voter Registration?**](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/support_avr/?source=VPP_20230809_EMPOLL_E5_T0_AC&t=10&akid=9798%2E878179%2EYi7qLQ)
[YES, OF COURSE! »](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/support_avr/?source=VPP_20230809_EMPOLL_E5_T0_AC&t=11&akid=9798%2E878179%2EYi7qLQ)

Thank you,

_VPP Polling Team_
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

name: Your America
subject: Reverse ‘money machines’ popping up across America
body:
If you’ve been to a concert venue, stadium, or airport, you’ve almost certainly walked by one without knowing.

| **Reverse ‘money machines’ popping up across America** Machines like the ones in this picture are popping up all across America. [](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c20175%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=PRDaPWAR7PZufXvcLNq8iw&sysid=1) If you’ve been to a concert venue, stadium, or airport, you’ve almost certainly walked by one without knowing. The experts are calling it a **'Reverse ATM'** They’ve been installed at places like Citizen’s Bank Ballpark in Philadelphia... They’ve even been used at the Super Bowl. Why are these machines suddenly appearing out of nowhere? And what does it mean for your money? We’ve recently arranged an interview with former Goldman Sachs managing director, Dr. Nomi Prins, to get her take. There’s nobody in America who’s more aware of the inner workings of the banking system. In the interview, **[Dr. Prins explained these strange ‘reverse ATMs.’](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c20176%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Msz%2bhEXFo4GXjfQj3Z1ydA&sysid=1)** And she said she expects them to play a key role this Summer as our nation’s financial system is overhauled for the first time since 1971. According to her research, many Americans will be blindsided by what’s to come. BUT, folks who understand the ‘Reverse ATM’ phenomenon before it becomes obvious to the average American could actually profit in the weeks ahead. To help folks prepare, she’s recorded a briefing that explains exactly what she sees coming, how it will play out, and **how much time you have to prepare.** **[Click here now to see Dr. Prins’ free presentation.](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c20177%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=zSNNy6uPVVS1E8a7v1uQiw&sysid=1)**
---

Your America News
---

name: Candace Owens, Co-founder of BLEXIT
subject: The most personal email I’ve ever sent you
body:
I must share my story and tell you why I created the BLEXIT Foundation.

[](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zg8srntuo7mleo0vfbi5ernd3trldeoiphul3m18_rp22sh2s8i66p74cdhm8or2cdh2bs)

Friend,

This is the most personal and vulnerable email I have ever sent you... But I must share my story and tell you why I created the BLEXIT Foundation.

Before I share my story, allow me to introduce the BLEXIT Foundation.

**For too long, I have watched Black Americans force-fed a message of victimhood, fear, defeat, and dependence. And, this has to stop.** In 2019, with Brandon Tatum, we created BLEXIT Foundation - a nonprofit organization - dedicated to bringing traditional American principles and a message of empowerment to urban minority communities.

Our message to America's black and minority communities is that you are not a victim. We promote economic independence and individual freedom, strengthening the nuclear family, and fostering a deeper appreciation for patriotism in Black American culture.

[_**Please support the BLEXIT Foundation 's mission today by helping me reach our goal of raising $25,000 from new online donors. You can click here to donate.**_](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z6bi587ib6dhr4ragi1itf5lhoj6ls94ev7ma1og_rp22sh2s8i66p74cdhm8or2cdh2bs)

**_Now I 'll share my story_... racism, death threats, and empowering black communities.**

Growing up as a black woman, I can recall learning how "helpless" I was told I was. And this message - which the media forces Black Americans to listen to - is heartbreaking.

We're taught to believe we're victims, that nothing will ever change, the police are our enemies, and racism prevents us from ever achieving our goals.

This is WRONG.

I've dealt with racism... _**I 've even received death threats**_. Racism is an ugly form of collectivism and is unacceptable.

But the solution is NOT to become a victim and give up.

I created the BLEXIT Foundation to empower black communities, minorities, and the people in my life whom I love. Since our start in 2019, BLEXIT has grown substantially with over 41 grassroots chapter programs in 41 states, over 14,000 volunteer members and local community leaders, and nearly 60,000 grassroots supporters.

[_**Friend, I am inviting you to support the BLEXIT Foundation and help us spread our winning message of entrepreneurship, school choice, faith, and family. My goal is to raise $25,000 from online supporters to fund our mission. Please click here to donate $10, $50, $100, $250, $500, $1,000 or any amount. **_](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zpakunvrlsiei3tbf9u4n0lob9tt3ndrtm9i4ra0_rp22sh2s8i66p74cdhm8or2cdh2bs)

I am breaking the rules.

It seems like every email I receive in my inbox engages in fear-mongering, makes big promises, and demands you and I make a donation without any of the details... _I 'm not doing that_.

You should know the details, believe in our mission, and understand how BLEXIT is changing the direction of our urban communities and our country.

So I am taking a risk by sending you a long email with all the details to empower YOU to choose to support the BLEXIT Foundation.**Please read to the end of this email (I have an important message at the end you don 't want to miss).**

When I founded BLEXIT, I wanted to make sure above all else we were NOT just a "think tank", but rather we pride ourselves on being a thoughtful and quick acting "DO-tank". We're doing things no other organization in the country is doing.

Here are the BLEXIT Foundation's values, what we're doing to reach Black communities, and what we're fighting for:

* **School Choice:** Often, the people allegedly "fighting for minorities" are doing everything in their power to keep Black and Hispanic students locked into awful schools.

The ugly truth is that these schools are simply brainwashing centers attacking the nuclear family, creating victims, and teaching their twisted values. BLEXIT is fighting for School Choice to empower young Black and Hispanic students to learn real skills, have more opportunities, and escape poverty. [_**You can support BLEXIT 's efforts to fight for School Choice here >>>**_](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zjrf76pauqf2atpd3jvengs76ojhl254ojjameso_rp22sh2s8i66p74cdhm8or2cdh2bs)

* **Criminal Justice Reform:** The mainstream media wants urban communities to hate our law enforcement officers. This ugly message is setting Black Americans back. The BLEXIT Foundation supports our men and women who serve as police officers and defend our communities.

Yes, we do need criminal justice reform. But we believe cooperating with our police officers and connecting as a community is critical to creating justice. BLEXIT Foundation is starting conversations with police officers and urban communities. The media wants you to believe cops are evil! This is wrong. But people never hear this message.

[_**Help the BLEXIT Foundation change the narrative by making a donation here >>>**_](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zu8v8u0f9r99qpbp5ko7ccpg8adc7d90birolc0o_rp22sh2s8i66p74cdhm8or2cdh2bs)

* **Entrepreneurship:** I am passionate about empowering Black and Hispanic Americans. Free markets, responsibility, and advancing the careers of urban communities is the solution to poverty. The BLEXIT Foundation identifies young leaders in urban communities and helps them create resumes, practice interviews, and learn skills employers desire.

BLEXIT is not a book club or simply talking a big game... No, we're actually making an impact with real individuals committed to serving urban communities. [_**Please help the BLEXIT Foundation encourage entrepreneurship and empower Black and Hispanic communities by donating here >>>**_](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zk39r38h8inu2icr023p48mgj1du93mkcharldb8_rp22sh2s8i66p74cdhm8or2cdh2bs)

* **Teaching History: **Critical Race Theory has nothing to do with solving race relations in our country. This is about division and spreading a victimhood message.

The BLEXIT Foundation believes in teaching real American history. It is critical for our urban communities to learn about our Founding Fathers and the Constitution to become productive and educated citizens. [_**Please help the BLEXIT Foundation teach real American history by donating here >>>**_](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zfrsegkc18p1r52lirdsu3p10khkh3jdpb8aoho8_rp22sh2s8i66p74cdhm8or2cdh2bs)

* **Presenting Our Message: **We have failed to reach urban communities with our message and values. Instead, we've allowed the mainstream media to write the narrative. Not anymore.

The BLEXIT Foundation is going places where no one else goes. We're hosting events in Detroit, Baltimore, and Tampa and starting real conversations. We're not just preaching to the choir, and these aren't boring events. They have music, art, and real conversations, and they are fun! I am committed to reaching urban communities and spreading our message. [_**Please support BLEXIT 's events and help us spread our message by donating here >>>**_](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zvl71o1nnhlo6jeu44qklq1hi0noi6j98ki2cul0_rp22sh2s8i66p74cdhm8or2cdh2bs)

What does "BLEXIT" mean? BLEXIT is the Black exit from the culture of victimhood, fear, and dependence the media has forced on us. If you hold a permanent view of yourself as a victim you become your own oppressor.

This is personal to me.

I was once a slave to a culture of victimhood and became a proud Black patriot.

Friend, I am asking you to join the BLEXIT Foundation by making an investment in our organization. Please use one of the links I've copied below to donate today:

[_**Donate $10 >>>**_](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zf90h789ob4paq1kpdrecut5etr458jnbol83d4o_rp22sh2s8i66p74cdhm8or2cdh2bs)
[_**Donate $35 >>>**_](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zmkgp30qocaqvpdc5sfd85udl98uoj59422lss5g_rp22sh2s8i66p74cdhm8or2cdh2bs)
[_**Donate $50 >>>**_](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zhv4dk6tfv1ep0bknrtjdq8jjht23hidv7k52lk0_rp22sh2s8i66p74cdhm8or2cdh2bs)
[_**Donate $100 >>>**_](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z01ddln7uulno862kak21oqr58gavceukbve3fu8_rp22sh2s8i66p74cdhm8or2cdh2bs)
[_**Donate $250 >>>**_](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z8j5mdorje60jokf7cbavgs2o0ktu4hmoq7264r0_rp22sh2s8i66p74cdhm8or2cdh2bs)
[_**Donate $500 >>>**_](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z0aigvj4i1nvildcspd0dctvogkme21k57tnpfr8_rp22sh2s8i66p74cdhm8or2cdh2bs)
[_**Donate $1,000 >>>**_](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z1o31d8ed3p4uba26h3j5l3m9tco4skv1st00170_rp22sh2s8i66p74cdhm8or2cdh2bs)
[_**Donate $2,500 >>>**_](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z76cpif31t7cb6d21in39c0k2o9nhca9k6h3q1m0_rp22sh2s8i66p74cdhm8or2cdh2bs)
[_**Donate Any Amount >>>**_](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zecdtmk7nnh73j2t1oa8mhb788gpvojuu4rs79so_rp22sh2s8i66p74cdhm8or2cdh2bs)

This is my last message to you before you close this email.

The BLEXIT Foundation believes in faith, family, and freedom. At the end of the day, our message to urban communities is about love and empowerment.

My burning desire is to use my voice and change the direction of our urban communities and the country. The BLEXIT Foundation has a real impact, and I am inviting you to join our cause.

[_**Please consider making the most generous donation you can today by clicking here.**_](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zeif4pibgiam6v9h2asl12pdkfgtgvlc84ar6u50_rp22sh2s8i66p74cdhm8or2cdh2bs)

Thank you, Friend.

Candace Owens
President
BLEXIT Foundation

American Defense News
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_
_[**unsubscribe**](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zguuv8uv2g0dkia7u2vgsi56obuglir1nuivr2lo_rp22sh2s8i66p74cdhm8or2cdh238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kuo72ttle5pq8ddl69qbcd1jm4qj6d9jmpqj7d9neppqcdtlmuin7djle8r7ccjkm8qjf9v56ngj0trkm6or9djjctg1eddk6ior79hnmmpi9df4chgm9pb0c3h2bs)_ | _[manage data preferences](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z9e5mpl01lohrne2mo5pmqpo7nvbdok8gt2qbs70_rp22sh2s8i66p74cdhm8or2cdh2bs)_

We're not just preaching to the choir, and these aren't boring events. They have music, art, and real conversations, and they are fun! I am committed to reaching urban communities and spreading our message. What does "BLEXIT" mean? BLEXIT is the Black exit from the culture of victimhood, fear, and dependence the media has forced on us. If you hold a permanent view of yourself as a victim you become your own oppressor. This is personal to me. I was once a slave to a culture of victimhood and became a proud Black patriot. Friend, I am asking you to join the BLEXIT Foundation by making an investment in our organization. Please use one of the links I've copied below to donate today: This is my last message to you before you close this email. The BLEXIT Foundation believes in faith, family, and freedom. At the end of the day, our message to urban communities is about love and empowerment. My burning desire is to use my voice and change the direction of our urban communities and the country. The BLEXIT Foundation has a real impact, and I am inviting you to join our cause. Thank you, Friend. Candace Owens President BLEXIT Foundation American Defense News 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314 |

name: Vivek Ramaswamy
subject: I am CHARGED UP
disclaimer_text:
Paid for
by Vivek 2024
body:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/vWSUNPeDNR

Vivek 2024

I wanted to personally share some good news with you.

http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/oWSUNPeDNR

Fellow American,

Five months ago, I launched this
campaign & my polling numbers were at 0%. Now... I'm tied for
second place!

We're surging in the polls and we
haven't even had the first debate yet!

I AM CHARGED UP, but I need your
help to see this through. I am not beholden to the donor class -
I've invested my own money in this race & I am counting on
grassroots leaders like you! Will you help?

CHIP IN $5 ➔

CHIP IN $10 ➔

CHIP IN $20.24 ➔

CHIP IN $50 ➔

I am running to lead a national
revival and I'm ready to win this race with you in my corner!

Thanks,

Vivek

WATCH NOW →

GET TO KNOW VIVEK:

Vivek is an
American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and
New York Times bestselling author of Woke, Inc.: Inside
Corporate America's Social Justice Scam, along with his second
book, Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit,
and the Path Back to Excellence.

He has been a
prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory
practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he
calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes
with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do
through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a
first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he
often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that
"If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be
outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an
accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the
valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate
summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his
J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund,
then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where
his team developed five drugs that went on to become
FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded
Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct
aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and
others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth
of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the
voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading
companies to focus on excellence over politics.

STAND WITH VIVEK
➞

Paid for
by Vivek 2024

Contributions to Vivek 2024 are
not deductible as charitable contributions for Federal income tax
purposes.

Funds received in response to
this solicitation are subject to federal contribution limits.
Contributions from corporations, labor unions, foreign nationals
without green cards, and federal government contractors are
prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to
collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and
name of employer for individuals whose contributions exceed $200
in an election cycle.

with "Unsubscribe" as the subject line.

name: Kevin McCarthy
subject: Biden Investigation Update
disclaimer_text: Paid for by McCarthy for Congress
body:
This is Speaker of the House Kevin McCarthy.

| |
---
| | | This is Speaker of the House Kevin McCarthy. When my Republican colleagues and I asked for your vote last fall, we made a Commitment to America of exactly what we would get done for you if entrusted with the majority.

The House is now spearheading the commitment to hold Joe Biden and his cronies accountable to you, and let me tell you - the Biden family corruption our investigations have uncovered in just a few short months is _**damning**_.

**But here 's the thing:**

When the Clintons went after Trump...
When Adam Schiff and Nancy Pelosi went after Trump...
When Merrick Garland and the FBI went after Trump...
And when Alvin Bragg went after Trump...

**They ALL had the media, Hollywood, Big Tech, and D.C. bureaucrats to peddle their LIES.**

Now, all those forces are converging all their resources to SHUT DOWN what my colleagues and I are uncovering about their puppet in the White House. Which is why I'm coming to you today, Friend. I need your help to keep the pressure on Joe Biden and fend off the attempts to undermine our investigations. **[Can my colleagues and I count on you?](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zsrc5pshqmh0ieo3ght15uqlc9kqp9iupod9vc20_rp22sh2s8i66p74cdhmeo34c3h2bs "Can my colleagues and I count on you?")**

---
| | [HOLD JOE BIDEN ACCOUNTABLE](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z82uvqveotu82ocivh0m7qvkge0a4d13c7es1rho_rp22sh2s8i66p74cdhmeo34c3h2bs "HOLD JOE BIDEN ACCOUNTABLE")
---
Democrats' dark money dollars are _pouring in_ to distract voters and undermine our investigations. If we don't see some immediate backup from our grassroots supporters, I fear Joe Biden and his cronies will get off scot-free with their sketchy schemes. **[PLEASE: Support our efforts for accountability today:](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zlbemg5poco3mavfvr47qn6dko6b9c0tpti7j6k8_rp22sh2s8i66p74cdhmeo34c3h2bs "PLEASE: Support our efforts for accountability today:")**

---

---
Thank you for your time and support,

Kevin McCarthy
---

_I write to you with a heavy heart._

The Left is outraising and outspending us. Biden's cronies are raking in huge sums of cash and spending it on some of the most contentious issues facing Americans to ensure that middle class, red-blooded Americans drown.

**We must never give up on our crusade for freedom.**

I'm sending out a Hail Mary to the most loyal patriots because I know you won't let us down. Staying on pace with the Democrats is VITAL to protecting our Majority.

**[Can you rush $8, $15, or $25 by midnight to help us stand up for America and stop the Left in their tracks?](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zbatkqcjbgltv25g5hqsbdnutbumele10af94vog_rp22sh2s8i66p74cdhmeo34c3h2bs "Can you rush $8, $15, or $25 by midnight to help us stand up for America and stop the Left in their tracks?")**

name: 1600 Daily
subject: Our country is facing a constitutional crisis
body:
The Constitution established a limited government in which the people ruled through their elected officials.

| | |
---
| | This sponsored message from 1600 Daily is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z1bl97lb74fii3q1vlbs2iigndle5r5ij02gkr3g_rp22sh2s8i66p74cdhm1o71chh2bs)
---
| | | Dear Fellow American, Hillsdale College has selected you to participate in its [**National Referendum on the Administrative State**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z3onpp6u7dbva1ocnu0t7nekj2b8prvj5ut2shl8_rp22sh2s8i66p74cdhm1o71chh2bs).
## Do you agree that there is a double standard for members of the administrative state—that the ruling elite is not required to follow the same rules as other Americans?
[YES](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z3j6a49eg6r1rs4p98vknnq3mj4eu3m4pcco6ahg_rp22sh2s8i66p74cdhm1o71chh2bs) [NO](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zugfc43ud6e1ig72m634ii6pdad82atdqhbjmcf8_rp22sh2s8i66p74cdhm1o71chh2bs) Responding will only take a few minutes. Your input as an informed patriot is needed right away...because **our country is facing a constitutional crisis**.

It's a crisis that involves a fundamental political question: **who rules whom?**

The Constitution established a limited government in which the **people** ruled through their elected officials. Under this form of government, America became the freest and most prosperous nation in history.

Today, however, our constitutional system is one that increasingly exists in name only. **The Constitution of "We the People" is being replaced by an elite, out-of-touch, and unaccountable administrative state that rules without the consent of American citizens.** This means we live in an era of growing bureaucratic despotism, manifested in an administrative state that bypasses the Constitution, rejects the separation of powers, and replaces the rule of law with regulations.

**But we can 't just TALK about the problem. We also have to TAKE ACTION--to DO SOMETHING about it, while there's still time to save our country. **

That is why I'm writing to you today.

Hillsdale College is committed to returning to the Constitution of "We the People"--before it's too late.

To do that, I need your input. What are your opinions on this topic--knowing that we can propose SOLUTIONS that will restore liberty?

**Please let me know your thoughts today by answering the National Referendum on the Administrative State using this secure link:**

**[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/administrative-state-survey/](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zl3v6onngjlresbbjlk9dg1nmvr80sg427urv0o0_rp22sh2s8i66p74cdhm1o71chh2bs)**

Thank you for being on the side of the Constitution and liberty!

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---
| | Hillsdale College 33 East College St Hillsdale, MI 49242 USA

---

1600 Daily
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_
_[**unsubscribe**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z4jq45qmsinlk5gdm59c9r7klim5ul69c65338h0_rp22sh2s8i66p74cdhm1o71chh238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kuo72ttle5pq8or0c1gj8d5hmjpqcdtlmuin7djle8r7ccjkm8qjf9v56ngj0trkm6or9djjctg1eddk6ior79hnmmpi9df4chgm9pb2cdh2bs)_ | _[manage data preferences](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z9qaepj6oligokdhgd2ej0ardnnjfsi3ed7pei1g_rp22sh2s8i66p74cdhm1o71chh2bs)_

As a proud Republican,**you have no greater duty to your Party** than to help us TAKE BACK the White House in 2024.

[**Can I count on you to step up, Peter? Complete the 2024 Presidential Canvass IMMEDIATELY and make your voice HEARD.**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/62123649:s3E2MeDNC:m:1:2247059263:CC4EB04460CA9D6DF118770A9D20078D:r)

For freedom,

**About Jim Jordan:** Leading the fight to hold Washington accountable.

**
In Washington, Jim Jordan is focused on his oversight role, helping lead investigations into federal agencies

In Congress, Jim Jordan continued to fight for fiscal responsibility,and he offered the only balanced budget of any member of the House or Senate.

As a state legislator, he took on the powerful special interests and the leaders from both political parties who wanted to put Ohio on an unsustainable path of higher taxes and spending.

He built a conservative, pro-family voting record, and authored an alternative state budget that balanced without raising taxes. He became the only legislator in state history to win both the Defender of Life award from Ohio Right to Life and the Pro-Life Legislator of the Year award from the United Conservatives of Ohio.

name: Mark
subject: I’m a black man that isn’ta Democrat
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mark Robinson
body:
I’m not perfect- nobody is.

| |
---
| | | | | | | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zkmqltf9k9pma2lsium20bapnvub852o2mbe2on8_rp22sh2s8i66p74cdjm0or6cth2bs)
---
| **Friend,**

They've called on me to resign once already because I'm not one of them. I'm not a member of the political class & I don't play their games.

_**I 'm a black man that isn't a Democrat. **_

I grew up poor. My father was an alcoholic that beat my mother.

I've had to file for bankruptcy. I've lost my job, my car, my home. I'm not perfect. Nobody is.

Despite it all, I was elected to the highest office a black man has ever held in North Carolina.

And my story doesn't end there. In fact, it's just beginning as I'm now running for Governor.

Biden & the Democrats are raising millions to bankroll an onslaught of fabricated & disgusting attacks on me & the folks like you who support the America First agenda.

[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zetvi4v413pnsiu79ub20ud9moc4pc86o3d4fpro_rp22sh2s8i66p74cdjm0or6cth2bs) | [**STAND WITH MARK ROBINSON
⇨**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zhde11jomsbkfdr5ohjv2goals5nlnjah018pro8_rp22sh2s8i66p74cdjm0or6cth2bs)
---
Attacking me is one thing, but attacking working class Americans for who they are & what they believe in is way over the line.

As long as there is air in these lungs of mine, I will fight for what we believe in & I will stand up and defend those who cannot.

Can I count on you to do the same & stand with me today?
[**STAND WITH MARK ROBINSON
⇨**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zkruphnmog0ul31s0u3a25ta0094fpdluqs7n3lg_rp22sh2s8i66p74cdjm0or6cth2bs)
---
Thank you,

Mark Robinson
|

clean_body: I’m not perfect- nobody is. | | | | | | | | | | Friend, They've called on me to resign once already because I'm not one of them. I'm not a member of the political class & I don't play their games. I 'm a black man that isn't a Democrat. I grew up poor. My father was an alcoholic that beat my mother. I've had to file for bankruptcy. I've lost my job, my car, my home. I'm not perfect. Nobody is. Despite it all, I was elected to the highest office a black man has ever held in North Carolina. And my story doesn't end there. In fact, it's just beginning as I'm now running for Governor. Biden & the Democrats are raising millions to bankroll an onslaught of fabricated & disgusting attacks on me & the folks like you who support the America First agenda. | Attacking me is one thing, but attacking working class Americans for who they are & what they believe in is way over the line. As long as there is air in these lungs of mine, I will fight for what we believe in & I will stand up and defend those who cannot. Can I count on you to do the same & stand with me today? **Good morning!** Today marks the 20th anniversary of the first and only [marriage in outer space.](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxsz71urDAQQOGnsTsj_62BwsVt6Pa2KdEwHi-TGLwCa9G-fZTUqU9x9H3c5ztw4f3xHzaKLdcZsPGLZj0oo5V1s5UpZiJLTlI0YTQhBOOCXCOgNzoMS9ZjT2BT8N4s423BjIgEXnK02jo9GK1H1xvb6QHyckMgzDkABeE1JW716D4r722lXN71RUeHdZMlrq09T-H-CTsJO13X1R1LW3-isFPhTGd7FxJ2cs6bPqjMx9nURSnx_lDnE5DUBoV2XGn_qvKI6XlxKXyGXnj92IDL76r9Lf8OAAD__wt3W98) Russian cosmonaut Yuri Malenchnko was in orbit when he wed Ekaterina Dmitrieva in Texas via satellite link. ## 'Apocalyptic' Fires Sweep Across Maui
Hawaiian wildfires whipped by hurricane-level winds [have killed at least six people](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxsj7GOhCAQQL8GOg0MilhQXGO3115pxmFYuaBslFtzf3_Zq7d9L3nJ-7rNN0w57fdP3NjXWGakmp48K9do1YCZQQYfmYGNZK_tqK212li5-gEcAfT9iIHQwkiDo2iM7igAjFrJ5EGBUU4rNZpBQ6scxqUnZIrRIlvRKQ6plqP9LmmvK8f8W558tFQ2mf1a6-MU5kPAJGC6rqtdFno5AdPO1_mC5cih-Tkbwh0DNtZ2vXag5eHD40o5p9MOolP3DVP-z9b3l38BAAD___5-UjM) and sent others into the ocean for safety in Maui and the Big Island. Travel to Hawaii has been restricted, and the National Guard has been called out. Central Maui has been devastated as [fires roared through Lahaina Town](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskLGOqzAQAL8GOkf2LllM4eI16fLaK9Fir8OeDETgC7q_P-XqK0fTjObjPt5Zi66P_7xIqHkbOVZ9yWi9cdYAjtCmkEVAsJXgaHBE5JDaOfBASLbvUBDF5-s1ieusxwH61DuLrQawgNY7awfsHVys5zxdI0vMmVio6awkrdt--dx0rbPk8r29ZL_EbWlLmGt9Hg3-a-DWwI2fq5zHW71hrxqLNHCb-WRVc2pJWXcxC3-pSdvO5tQ1HUYiYHTEU55koonJD9nx4IGwB5umdg_peWopelDfdPaxsJbfgPr3j58AAAD__8BwYIQ) and Front Street, its popular shopping and dining zone. "Every significant thing I owned burned down today," said one Front Street shop owner. "I'll be OK. I got out safely."
## Secret Search Warrant Targeted Trump, Twitter
Special counsel Jack Smith used [a secret search warrant ](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskL1uxCAQhJ8Gd1j8nDEUFGncXdqU1h5ezkTYWHjvUN4-cuo008xo9On7us93SDntz0_Y0FMsMwRKb5yF5VJwpWfVLT4iKtQdemmcNMZIbbrVOzuOcokuPsKwjHZwVt8GDCD0MGinRJe8EkoLK4VwepSqFxbiYwiAIUYDaNhN4JKo1P67pJ1WjPmnvLH2oWxd9ivRcTL9wdTE1NRa68P-CFfJ1HRdMzUJe4VjajoPDAkyD-W1n5j5sxA_EWpYeYNaYSceS-VUX9vBqSUirBzCNad-pS131S9HSzmn04zsJp4bpPyHQv-b-Q0AAP__w5lldg)in January to obtain information from Donald Trump's Twitter account. Twitter was held in contempt by a federal judge for delaying its response while appealing the warrant.

The news came out Wednesday when [a redacted version](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxs0L2O4yAUQOGnwR0WPzF2Copt3GXbLS0Ml-RmMVj4OkzefjSppz7N0ffvttwcJsz3v24DS7EszhO-YBETl4Irvagu2AigQHdgpblKY4zUpnvYKYzyEvTg4aqNH6Y46nX1oIfB63H1okOrhNJikkJc9ShVLyYX18E78DEaB4ZdBASkUvtnwUwPiOldXlB7X7Yu2QfRfjD9h6mZqbm11sfylaEdP52peS8JCf3B1EwNiaDyA-oLAm-uVpeJUz23_eDO-3Jm4k-XT1ffPGKGwPUg_vMAyb25L2clHj8SXbVhb5gSHmZkF3HfHKbPEf0O9B0AAP__2itrdg) of the judge's decision was unsealed. Under the original court order, Twitter was prohibited from discussing the warrant with anyone, including Trump. Twitter [was fined $350,000 for its delay](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskD1vgzAUAH-NvTnyFwYGD13Y0rUjejHPwZXByH4E9d9X6dz5dNLpvu7zHVJO-_MTNvQUywyB0gtnOQglhTaz5ouPiBoNR6_cqJxzyji-eivjoB5jXGI3OOVMD-isGq0e-qWLIfDktdRGDkrK0fRK3-QA8dEFwBCjA3TMSlwSlXr7LmmnFWP-KS-st1A2nv1KdDRmPpiemJ5oxTXl_GZMTxWfZwZKZWd6CuWsJB5AlLExPVllO6dG0Q4MCbII5dwbZnGVXTQMFUk0hBpWcUGtsJOIpQqq53Y0QVciwiogvDVieuLVL8eVck7N9czK5wbpr4PT_8t-AwAA__-g1nBk) in producing the material and lost on appeal, despite claiming it wanted to give Trump a chance to fight the order. The court said that was the point: Prosecutors feared Trump might destroy his Twitter files.
## ESPN Jumps Into Betting Business
Penn Entertainment, owner of the Barstool sports-betting app, will pay ESPN $1.5 billion for rights to jointly relaunch the Penn app as ["ESPN Bet"](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskLGOozAQQL8GOkf2GAancHFNulx7JRrsmcQnYxCMEu3fr7L1lk-veXr_7vOdSi3t8ZdWjirbTEnLi2cbjLMG_Ax9jsIM7HuODq8OEZ3H_hkHByGI0MQhAyCLLBIC-EUQkxfpSwQL3gZn7dVPDi42kCxjIk4iSIzdYDkX3Y7L_600fbLUr-3FxyVta1_jU3U_O_-ng1sHN9obv8-P-sChJVXu4Mbn3sy5b4eeZmHV0h5m59YMN-VDqbSVm5o8IGWYYLQ4EqTRQl6sLImmaRzCFfoj5v1dai0nTt1gHyuV-tOhv2_5DgAA__8CkGSN) with promotional support across all ESPN platforms.

The deal also gives ESPN rights to purchase shares in Penn, valued at about $500 million. For its part, ESPN says it will use its platform to "educate sports fans on responsible gaming."

The news shook the sports betting business Wednesday, with leading rival DraftKings seeing [its stock drop nearly 11%.](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskLFutDAQhJ_GdItsw--DguJv6C5tSrSYNThnbMteHcrbR6ROM81Io_m-z-fyRB983D_wpIldWtCyf9MiB1ASdLfoZpsckaauoUmZURljVGeaY9KPcehNrzZHRNoOph_M6KxbyWCvTdf4SUvdyUFJOXYPpVs5oFv_WSTrnEEyope0eU6l_Uo-8kEufKc3ldamswnTwZyr6P4LPQs9X9fV2rjauxR6vqeFnuVwxyj0vBV0_PJxr-AwhApKZiqWIkOKEOkCPgohg0sFak6FK-x4rjc9nFhexFAPLASupBOo5giZYoSMhSOVevjcHnyGpkxbvnwIvpqH6OV-og-_l_lvgz8BAAD__4rNdNE) The Disney Co., owner of ESPN, also owns a stake in DraftKings.

clean_body: Hawaiian wildfires whipped by hurricane-level winds have killed at least six people and sent others into the ocean for safety in Maui and the Big Island. | | | | | | THURSday, August 10, 2023 ---|--- Good morning! Today marks the 20th anniversary of the first and only Russian cosmonaut Yuri Malenchnko was in orbit when he wed Ekaterina Dmitrieva in Texas via satellite link. Happy anniversary to the still-married couple! If this is your first time reading The Flyover , and make sure you don't miss our next edition. Want to follow along on Facebook? . Enjoying the Flyover? Take a moment to check out today's sponsor, | 'Apocalyptic' Fires Sweep Across Maui Hawaiian wildfires whipped by hurricane-level winds and sent others into the ocean for safety in Maui and the Big Island. Travel to Hawaii has been restricted, and the National Guard has been called out. Central Maui has been devastated as and Front Street, its popular shopping and dining zone. "Every significant thing I owned burned down today," said one Front Street shop owner. "I'll be OK. I got out safely." Secret Search Warrant Targeted Trump, Twitter Special counsel Jack Smith used January to obtain information from Donald Trump's Twitter account. Twitter was held in contempt by a federal judge for delaying its response while appealing the warrant. The news came out Wednesday when of the judge's decision was unsealed. Under the original court order, Twitter was prohibited from discussing the warrant with anyone, including Trump. Twitter in producing the material and lost on appeal, despite claiming it wanted to give Trump a chance to fight the order. The court said that was the point: Prosecutors feared Trump might destroy his Twitter files. ESPN Jumps Into Betting Business Penn Entertainment, owner of the Barstool sports-betting app, will pay ESPN $1.5 billion for rights to jointly relaunch the Penn app as with promotional support across all ESPN platforms. The deal also gives ESPN rights to purchase shares in Penn, valued at about $500 million. For its part, ESPN says it will use its platform to "educate sports fans on responsible gaming." The news shook the sports betting business Wednesday, with leading rival DraftKings seeing The Disney Co., owner of ESPN, also owns a stake in DraftKings. name: Al Franken via Blue Amp Action
subject: dirty diapers
body:
We can take this House seat
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[ unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T5ccb2578-1d34-4cf2-bb76-c2cf7bca7b28/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | Peter, A month or two ago I wrote to you with a big announcement: my friend and former Senate counsel Josh Riley is running for Congress in New York’s 19th District – one of the most competitive races in the country. Now I’m back with an even bigger announcement: Josh is running for Congress in one of the most competitive races in the country... AND his wife just had a baby! [While Josh is catching sleep in 30-minute increments and cleaning up spit-up, I’m pitching in to make sure his fundraising doesn’t look like a dirty diaper. So I have to ask, will you split a contribution between Blue Amp Action and Josh’s campaign today?](https://default.salsalabs.org/T264008f6-e2b2-4109-95cb-8d3dc9cba223/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
|
---
| | | | | | [DONATE NOW](https://default.salsalabs.org/T3f3637cc-c493-4f43-b9ec-75d1c69e4916/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| You know who’s probably getting a full night's sleep? Josh’s opponent, Marc Molinaro. In fact, he’s probably dreaming about taking away someone’s rights, rolling back gun safety legislation or blocking progress on clean energy – he’s only been in Congress a couple of months and he’s already done all that and more! We need someone like Josh in Congress – he’s the real deal. [](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tb0089b74-7705-4351-a159-19bba531fb18/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
(The really tall guy is Josh.) After graduating from Harvard Law School, Josh worked on a landmark civil rights lawsuit to help kids from low-income families get access to healthcare. When I was in the Senate, Josh and I passed bills expanding rights for survivors of domestic abuse and providing new funding for addiction treatment and mental health programs. And since then, Josh has fought in the Supreme Court to block the Trump Administration’s Muslim Ban and plans to deport Dreamers. Even before he was a dad, Josh was always looking out for the little guy. [So what do you say, Peter? Will you split $15 or whatever you can (or more than you can) between Blue Amp Action and my friend Josh Riley to help him win one of the most important races in the country in 2024?](https://default.salsalabs.org/T3420b1ad-94e5-49de-830f-82967d061f6d/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Thanks, Al
P.S. I like the P.S. because it’s one more opportunity to ask for a donation. [So donate now!](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tfc5b929c-4d28-4ac0-ba3b-9e613eb5cf64/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country.

* * *
---
Friend,

After we delivered the historic upset to Biden & Pelosi in the TX-34 special election last summer, the liberal media & woke Democrats immediately sunk to disgusting lows to defeat me in the November midterms.

My opponent hired a twisted left-wing pervert to attack me & sexually degrade me. The liberal journalists called me a "white nationalist Latina" and a "self-hating Latina."

To sum it up- the woke liberals in America showed their true colors.

They truly hate free-thinking Hispanic women who don't buy what their party is selling.

My existence, my story, and my firm adherence to the values of God, Family, Country drives them completely nuts.

But they'll spend, say, and do whatever it takes to punish me for not falling in line & they won't stop until they permanently destroy me. They're leaving no stone unturned in this election & the polls are already tied- making it the closest race in America right now & your support today will give us the extra inch to take the lead & never look back.

[**SUPPORT MAYRA FLORES**](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=6c90902196e5495698be4c9fc7ba555f&_e=4wTwGMyw7v68sk2jO0LCjZGmcYAkQvQV6I2UqvX7WtO0ld6fEXNN9JQ0LDtJsSj90E7BUPK3M2R4Al8l7ZfETv-m89_nO3ShQrzP29EVpDMF2uNXtP-swsVSsd2lHa6G65tXTCgiGGntolv3YFNjFCeLEMf3bKMW0tmUG7pWa-K3oKEB14mJt64MQmZ0FdFSYKkeKFl0Sxe9bPo-lEHuhYY3-kyi3l8ZCKuTROUJAH9CCzgz-x85BYMc-9DkhHULm5UHMSKUegFzOJt9GDny_Aw1cTVUFj8RMOgrPGz8jqUjbVDSCMj2wQDwsiwfgeClmgUESF_YSC_A34P-S-YHbYlLKrXQYjWRmH2nF5xj2po-oDBC93MOg9G_kK35NhKckF3x4oWJc-i7PhbYUuLt1WLzSwAurTAgM_MsnRQO7fQ%3D)
---

Look, I immigrated to America when I was 6 and grew up working in the fields. I know the value of a hard earned dollar so I wouldn't ask you to donate if it truly wasn't important.

_**But everything is on the line in this election & I mean EVERYTHING. **_

[**SUPPORT MAYRA FLORES**](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=6c90902196e5495698be4c9fc7ba555f&_e=4wTwGMyw7v68sk2jO0LCjZGmcYAkQvQV6I2UqvX7WtO0ld6fEXNN9JQ0LDtJsSj90E7BUPK3M2R4Al8l7ZfETv-m89_nO3ShQrzP29EVpDMF2uNXtP-swsVSsd2lHa6G65tXTCgiGGntolv3YFNjFCeLEMf3bKMW0tmUG7pWa-K3oKEB14mJt64MQmZ0FdFSYKkeKFl0Sxe9bPo-lEHuhYY3-kyi3l8ZCKuTROUJAH9CCzgz-x85BYMc-9DkhHULm5UHMSKUegFzOJt9GDny_LkkQ8JuXyQgD0wvWmJw5OMTiCK6oJhCifSd9eWRYaaRDijQS_1tg1kAG_Yu8Dq94ZHtLZfw8VUZy4ZpVOHA_K5emx509T3T3bZsjTywS4noBnBMVl_sB0nk-V6ykyPqZ09Df9rsHcvMLlRO0TzUh40%3D)

So if you can, and only if you can, please consider chipping in a few bucks today. I would be forever grateful to earn the backing & support of a great patriot like you!

With great respect & admiration,
Mayra Flores

Can I count on your DOUBLE-IMPACT gift today? Every dollar you give will go TWICE as far.**](http://trk.readactnews.)

They are LOSING the power to indoctrinate America's young people as TPUSA's 600,000+ student activists in ALL 50 STATES bring our exciting, inspiring message of patriotism and love of country directly to their generation. [**And with your support of Turning Point USA today, you can help me ensure they will KEEP LOSING their control of American culture through their toxic, racist, sexist, hateful "Woke" ideology.**](http://trk.readactnews.)

For over ten years, the generous support of Turning Point USA partners has ensured that we can always answer the call -- and lead the charge -- to defend FREEDOM, PATRIOTISM, and the TRUTH from the lies of the radical Left. I truly believe that, with your support, our grassroots movement is closer than EVER BEFORE to completely _ending_ "Woke" Culture in America and WINNING the American Culture War. I hope that you'll wear it proudly as a sign of your patriotism and your moral courage. [**I hope you'll grab yours before they're gone!**](http://trk.readactnews._B25AIJI3VQ) Thank you for your continued support. For America,

name: American Briefing
subject: Former Home Depot CEO issues dire warning for Americans
body:
Something strange is happening in our financial system.

| Dear Reader, Something strange is happening in our financial system. According to analysts at UBS, more than 50,000 retail locations could shut their doors in the months ahead. Already, Walmart, Foot Locker, Bed Bath & Beyond, and Macy’s are cutting stores. And former Home Depot CEO Bob Nardelli recently issued a grim warning:
> "We’re going to see a lot of bankruptcies. [This is] different than anything I have seen in my 52 years..."
What does it all mean for your family and your money? Dr. Nomi Prins has dug deeper into the research, and she’s found something startling. Amid all the turmoil predicted by Nardeni and UBS, Prins has found a single firm that could be the canary in the coal mine foreshadowing the next major crisis in America. All it takes is one look at this troubling chart to see why - [](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z7fnmumnqa1jdt6cc0m9pfhueli7u04371uct0s8_rp22sh2s8i66p74cdjm1pr2c9h2bs) Dr. Prins says:
> ** "This chart tells you everything you need to know about the next crisis in America. In short, what we’re about to see is a currency crisis - but not the kind of currency crisis most folks expect. This firm - along with many others - will almost certainly go bankrupt as a result." **
According to Dr. Prins, our money is about to change forever... and the overhaul is set to happen in just a few weeks. To help folks prepare, she’s recorded a briefing that explains all the details of what she calls a 'reset' to our financial system. In it, she lays out all the evidence of this currency crisis, and what you can do to prepare. [Click here now to see her full (and free) presentation.](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zr4rj3lgpter0kb8fg0j5sae2ft7474b377dinb8_rp22sh2s8i66p74cdjm1pr2c9h2bs) Regards, Maria Bonaventura
Senior Managing Editor, Rogue Economics **P.S.** The last time we saw a similar transformations to our money, folks who failed to prepare were blindsided. But those who moved their money beforehand had the opportunity to multiply their nest-egg as a result. [Click here to see why.](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zqvagiruujg54jst2btf4014u8v934o4iq3u8kvg_rp22sh2s8i66p74cdjm1pr2c9h2bs)
---

name: Elizabeth Warren
subject: Tommy Tuberville
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren for Senate
body:
This obstruction is leaving our national security at risk, leaving hundreds of military families in limbo, and leaving critical positions unfilled. | | | [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67872500/421159105/-1964596891?ms=em-header&refcode=EMZ15X_GOP_E_20230809_V1S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDgvMS84NzkzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZTFmMTcxMy04ZDM3LWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=glIWlh5eRvulGcER_jSMdYGxgFPqBD9FZ85tIEX0qSE=&emci=855ddf0b-8d37-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=2e1f1713-8d37-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=9027908)
---
The GOP likes to talk a big game about how much they support our military. But Senate Republicans have enabled one of their members, Tommy Tuberville, to block promotions and pay raises for hundreds of service members — for months. All because of a single Pentagon policy decision that he disagrees with. And his blockade is having real consequences:
* **Leaving our national security at risk:** the Secretary of Defense said so when I asked him, and former Secretaries of Defense from both parties have agreed with him.
* **Leaving hundreds of military families in limbo:** without formal assignments, they can’t make decisions about moving or enrolling their kids at new schools for the fall, which is coming up fast.
* **Leaving critical positions unfilled:** We don’t have a Chief of Staff of the Army or a Commandant of the Marine Corps because Senator Tuberville won’t let us confirm them. And if this keeps going until October, we won’t have a Chair of the Joint Chiefs of Staff.

All because of one senator who disagrees with one policy decision from the Defense Department to help service members and their families access needed health care. Specifically, to travel to access abortion care. So he’s trying to impose his out-of-touch anti-abortion rights views on our service members, just like Republican extremists want to impose a nationwide ban. Look: it’s no secret that I disagree with plenty of choices the Pentagon has made. And senators have tools we can use to help shape policy decisions, like writing legislation, holding oversight hearings, and meeting with administration officials. All part of how the system ought to work. But this type of blanket blockade is beyond irresponsible. Now, you may be wondering: how can one senator block all these nominees? Well, you know how the Senate has to confirm federal judges, ambassadors, cabinet members, and other top presidential nominees? The Senate also has to approve thousands of military promotions every year. Typically, those votes are just formalities. But Senator Tuberville is taking advantage of Senate procedural rules to hold all of them up. Indefinitely. It’s time for Senate Republicans to stop enabling this out-of-control obstruction. I won’t stop fighting to end this blockade, make sure our service members get the promotions and pay raises they’ve earned, and protect our national security. And here’s the way I see it: we cannot, cannot, cannot allow this tactic to become another tool the Senate GOP uses to obstruct our government. Republicans have already shown that they’re willing to leave a Supreme Court seat vacant if there’s a Democrat in the White House. Republicans have already wielded the filibuster to block Democratic Senate majorities from passing bills that vast majorities of Americans support. Republicans have already weaponized the debt ceiling to extract policy demands that they otherwise wouldn’t have enough votes to pass. It can’t become similarly routine for service members and their families to be used as pawns. Also, make no mistake: it’s no surprise that abortion rights are the underlying issue here. The American people support reproductive freedom, and Republican extremists know it, so they look for ways to enact their agenda without going through the ballot box. I’m going to stay on this. I’ll keep fighting to overcome any escalation of the GOP’s obstruction. I’ll keep working to get things done for the American people. I’ll keep pushing back as they try to rip away even more reproductive freedoms. And I’m always grateful to have your support. Thanks for being a part of this, Elizabeth | [**DONATE NOW**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67872501/421159106/442890331?refcode=EMZ15X_GOP_E_20230809_V1S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDgvMS84NzkzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZTFmMTcxMy04ZDM3LWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=glIWlh5eRvulGcER_jSMdYGxgFPqBD9FZ85tIEX0qSE=)
