But Senate Republicans have enabled one of their members, Tommy Tuberville, to block promotions and pay raises for hundreds of service members — for months. All because of a single Pentagon policy decision that he disagrees with. And his blockade is having real consequences: Leaving our national security at risk: the Secretary of Defense said so when I asked him, and former Secretaries of Defense from both parties have agreed with him. Leaving hundreds of military families in limbo: without formal assignments, they can’t make decisions about moving or enrolling their kids at new schools for the fall, which is coming up fast. Leaving critical positions unfilled:** We don’t have a Chief of Staff of the Army or a Commandant of the Marine Corps because Senator Tuberville won’t let us confirm them. And if this keeps going until October, we won’t have a Chair of the Joint Chiefs of Staff. All because of one senator who disagrees with one policy decision from the Defense Department to help service members and their families access needed health care. Specifically, to travel to access abortion care. So he’s trying to impose his out-of-touch anti-abortion rights views on our service members, just like Republican extremists want to impose a nationwide ban. Look: it’s no secret that I disagree with plenty of choices the Pentagon has made. And senators have tools we can use to help shape policy decisions, like writing legislation, holding oversight hearings, and meeting with administration officials. All part of how the system ought to work. But this type of blanket blockade is beyond irresponsible. Now, you may be wondering: how can one senator block all these nominees? Well, you know how the Senate has to confirm federal judges, ambassadors, cabinet members, and other top presidential nominees? The Senate also has to approve thousands of military promotions every year. Typically, those votes are just formalities. But Senator Tuberville is taking advantage of Senate procedural rules to hold all of them up. Indefinitely. It’s time for Senate Republicans to stop enabling this out-of-control obstruction. I won’t stop fighting to end this blockade, make sure our service members get the promotions and pay raises they’ve earned, and protect our national security. And here’s the way I see it: we cannot, cannot, cannot allow this tactic to become another tool the Senate GOP uses to obstruct our government. Republicans have already shown that they’re willing to leave a Supreme Court seat vacant if there’s a Democrat in the White House. Republicans have already wielded the filibuster to block Democratic Senate majorities from passing bills that vast majorities of Americans support. Republicans have already weaponized the debt ceiling to extract policy demands that they otherwise wouldn’t have enough votes to pass. It can’t become similarly routine for service members and their families to be used as pawns. Also, make no mistake: it’s no surprise that abortion rights are the underlying issue here. The American people support reproductive freedom, and Republican extremists know it, so they look for ways to enact their agenda without going through the ballot box. I’m going to stay on this. I’ll keep fighting to overcome any escalation of the GOP’s obstruction. I’ll keep working to get things done for the American people. I’ll keep pushing back as they try to rip away even more reproductive freedoms. And I’m always grateful to have your support. Thanks for being a part of this, Elizabeth | = | | | | | | ---|---|---|--- | Paid for by Warren for Senate All content © 2023 Warren for Senate, All Rights Reserved PO Box 171375, Boston, MA 02117

name: Friends of the Earth
subject: Your Signature is Needed: Undo Trump’s damage to the Endangered Species Act
body:
| | | | | [](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1921677?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---|---|---

| | Picture this: big, round eyes stare at you from a tree. Proud fluffy feathers dotted with white flecks cover the small body of a northern spotted owl, hoo-ing as it perches on a branch. But suddenly – **trees CRASH to the ground!** A mechanical screeching BOOMS through the air. Spinning metal machines have come to **clear-cut this poor owl’s forest.** It flies away from the wreckage of its home, lost and terrified. The _**T**rump** Administration rolled back Endangered Species Act rules**_ that protected critical habitat for vulnerable species like the northern spotted owl. President Biden has the power to restore these protections, _**but he hasn’t done it yet.**_ **We have just DAYS LEFT to submit comments** asking President Biden to strengthen the ESA before his new rules are finalized. [**Friend, please tell President Biden to RESTORE ALL PROTECTIONS to endangered species that Trump reversed! >>**](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1921678?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==) | [SIGN THE PETITION](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1921679?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
Many threatened animals rely on critical habitats that were once protected under the ESA – and these protections blocked greedy fossil fuel companies from exploiting the land for profit. But Trump’s rules opened it up to fracking, drilling, and mining that **creates pollution** and **harms nearby communities** in addition to the endangered animals.
**Contaminated** drinking water. **Climate-warming** emissions. **Destroyed** public lands. These are just a few of the impacts the ESA habitat protections has helped prevent. **Trump changed that – but President Biden could help change it back.** [**We need 3,872 more signatures to hit our goal and help PROTECT public lands, people, and endangered wildlife from corporate greed. Add your name now!**](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1921680?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
[SIGN THE PETITION](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1921679?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
**Standing with you,
Kendra Klein
Deputy director of science,
Friends of the Earth**
|

_**Her bias was so terrible that she was REMOVED from one part of this witch hunt because of a "political conflict of interest" of her own creation.**_
Do you think she's going to treat me fairly and put aside her extreme political biases? _Not a chance! _
This is yet another political persecution of the ONLY candidate who can beat Crooked Joe and restore power to YOU, the American people.
_As I 've always said, they're not after me. They're after YOU. I'm only standing in the way._
And even as a possible fourth indictment hangs over my head, I will continue to stand in their way, because the fate of our nation hangs in the balance in the 2024 election.
**It 's not just my freedom on the line, but yours as well - and I will _NEVER_ let them take it from you.**
_If you 're doing poorly due to the evil and corrupt people in Washington, D.C. who are destroying our country right now, then just hit the back button and go about your day._
But if not, I don't have to tell you that the stakes of this election have never been greater. Our Republic is hanging by a thread, and America needs you right now.

clean_body: Is this the beginning? | | | Friend, I've been briefed on reports that Atlanta has begun setting up security barricades, shutting down roads surrounding the courthouse, and the Grand Jury is expected to reconvene. All signs indicate that your favorite president - whose only offense is challenging the political ruling class - may be INDICTED yet again as an innocent man. | [SOURCE: WSB-TV Atlanta] The prosecutor leading the witch hunt is so corrupt that even CNN (!!!) has called her out after she "intermixed her political fortunes with this case." Her bias was so terrible that she was REMOVED from one part of this witch hunt because of a "political conflict of interest" of her own creation. Do you think she's going to treat me fairly and put aside her extreme political biases? Not a chance! This is yet another political persecution of the ONLY candidate who can beat Crooked Joe and restore power to YOU, the American people. As I 've always said, they're not after me. They're after YOU. I'm only standing in the way. And even as a possible fourth indictment hangs over my head, I will continue to stand in their way, because the fate of our nation hangs in the balance in the 2024 election. It 's not just my freedom on the line, but yours as well - and I will NEVER let them take it from you. If you 're doing poorly due to the evil and corrupt people in Washington, D.C. who are destroying our country right now, then just hit the back button and go about your day. But if not, I don't have to tell you that the stakes of this election have never been greater. Our Republic is hanging by a thread, and America needs you right now. | Thank you, | Donald J. name: Kash Patel
subject: J6 prisoners sing!
body:
Do you know what the Jan 6th detainees do every night from the confines of their jail cells?

[](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c20125%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=QVHjMO44CR%2bEQnVf1QnRwA&sysid=1)

Friend,

Do you know what the Jan 6th detainees do every night from the confines of their jail cells?

**They sing the national anthem.**

And they have sung this song proudly every night for _more than 700 straight nights_. This song is more than just a sign of their patriotism. It’s an exercise in their freedom of speech, even from the depths of the D.C. gulag.

We captured that audio and had the greatest President, Donald J. Trump, recite the Pledge of Allegiance. Then we combined those recordings to create a song you need to hear. All net proceeds from the song go to certain Jan 6 families in need.

**The song, Justice for All, is number 1 on the Billboard Digital Charts!**

[](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c20125%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=QVHjMO44CR%2bEQnVf1QnRwA&sysid=1)

[_**Please listen to this song and support our efforts to provide legal resources to some Jan 6 families. **_](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c20126%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=wYevBHe0owmO4Cio0XPeoA&sysid=1)

We all know the plight of the Jan 6th detainees and their families. Due process has been destroyed for so many of them.

But, with your help, I know we will get justice for them.

Instead of violence, we saw many patriots standing around, talking to police officers, and taking photos of the Capitol grounds. There was no _“deadly insurrection.”_ **The video evidence proves it for many!** This is evidence they and their families could have used last year or the year before.

It’s time to act and help to support these families.

My goal is to reach 1,000 new donors in the next 48 hours to fund their legal battles in court. **Will you stand up and help Jan 6 families?**

**Click below to show your support today!**

I don’t know about you, but I do some of my best, most productive work early in the morning. So today, I decided to check in on our campaign’s fundraising numbers first thing to see where we stood before next week’s critical Mid-Month deadline. And I don’t mean to start your day off with bad news, Peter—**but so far our August fundraising numbers are well behind where they need to be.** **[So, before you go on with the rest of your day and forget this email, will you do me a favor and chip in whatever you can to get our fundraising back on track before it’s too late?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67852879/421103870/-1230981346?refcode=EM_BS_SIG_230810_FR_UpEarly_A0_na_U1_X1_M1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDQyMzEiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYmYzM2JkZjgtNzEzNy1lZTExLWEzZjEtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=fXsmMe1uiGe-Em9H7Y76uc8l4PfT5Io4GAjmPF2jIZk=)** | | | [Donate Now!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67852880/421103871/-1230981346?refcode=EM_BS_SIG_230810_FR_UpEarly_A0_na_U1_X1_M1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDQyMzEiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYmYzM2JkZjgtNzEzNy1lZTExLWEzZjEtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=fXsmMe1uiGe-Em9H7Y76uc8l4PfT5Io4GAjmPF2jIZk=)

The truth is, our campaign here in New Jersey’s 7th District is going to have to raise _a lot_ of money between now and Election Day, Peter.
That’s just the reality of running for Congress in one of the nation’s most competitive swing districts. _And that’s to say nothing of competing against Kevin McCarthy and other far-right, GOP megadonors who will pour millions of dollars into this race to save Tom Kean’s job._
That’s why I’m up so early reviewing our campaign’s fundraising numbers. **Because if we want to help Democrats win back the House, protect reproductive rights, and defend our democracy, then we can’t afford to have our fundraising numbers fall behind this early.**

name: Craig Riedel
subject: Welcome to the team!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Craig Riedel For Ohio](craigriedelforcongress
body:
| | | [](http://links.craigriedelforcongress.com/u/click?_t=063960b10bde474cb034b193fc03c584&_m=31f6fd89d1d14f0bb72e4f1b13affe62&_e=OIB3Q9dGQTDwmcYQxlzDJu1Q5SEMRc-swHPbiKh1_YTWRcNtxd3X47OOu-BB52c1EaGIEsKpEHvbLCTTBW5RcqpS3mrFIOYPYBKakPTLSEmuzXuI8p0_IdvsIkYczG6Hvf184d1ZYHjRBLU4fxRR3sKeqTLxweaQQMc0zYhWcjfKcE8K6bxuHTmAGDlnEAXcnjuYnOXQlwMxDDWGwCMZesbGW8UqIFIltlERjcqIegc_Sapq4mRX45UBrcnVAy-Y)
---
Dear Friend, Thank you for joining our team; we are thrilled to have you on board! Our campaign is about bringing fresh new leadership to Washington, D.C., something that you and I both know it desperately needs. We are focused on putting the needs of the hardworking families and small businesses in Northwest Ohio first and foremost. We need a leader who will put the needs of our community first, and I'm ready to be that leader. With 27 years of business experience at Nucor Vulcraft Group and having served three terms as a state representative, I will bring a wealth of public service experience and a dedicated blue-collar attitude to Washington, D.C. As your Congressman, I will fight to create more good-paying jobs, protect our communities, and keep our families safe. I'll work tirelessly to ensure that our government is accountable to the people and that your voices are heard. Together, we will bring common-sense conservative solutions to Washington and make a real difference for the people of our district. Thank you for joining us on this journey. Faithfully,
---

### FAMILY SERVICE OF ROANOKE VALLEY FUNDRAISER

The Mission of Family Service of Roanoke Valley is to support individuals and families as they journey toward lives of emotional wellness, healthy relationships, and a future filled with hope. As they raise money for this fiscal year, their theme is mental health is everything. I am excited to be supporting them this summer by raising money to help them continue to serve our region.

### FEEDING SOUTHWEST VIRGINIA

It was great to visit Feeding Southwest Virginia for an update on their work providing healthy, nutritious meals to people across SWVA! They are one of the best organizations serving our community today, and I'm proud to support their efforts to end food insecurity in SWVA.

### [Danica Roem for SD-30](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001V2rRhJ-Emm36OqpliYma3y7BoAf35fSAMrkuwAFShSNOiB9ciYmG3txFkt717s95rRAYcXC2DabDy5hv1cNCQXVa-IEcGTLSukpAK8FUIW4_Vd0fOD3Hq2RpPOLRobE_3RL_4STyfCmogb_vTw7gD6vt6wS7ZjB-&c=waFIgS6OO6ojAn93vmJHNarsBZ7Dm-1oP_q_d7VKGTle8K7oz-rhNg==&ch=szz07LImnrr72tmKIo-1Eby6Pi1co9o4FV--hkWI1baL8SRgZZEvUw==)

Since Del. Roem was sworn in to the Virginia House of Delegates on January 10, 2018, she has heard from thousands of Virginians about what is most important to them and their families. She's running for the state Senate in 2023 to help improve our quality of life by working on the issues she spent nine years reporting about as a journalist.
She understands her number one job as an elected representative isn't to speak. It's to listen. To listen to residents, write down their concerns, ideas, and questions, follow up with them, and ensure what they tell her is part of her policy platform. That's how she took notes and wrote news stories, and that's how she crafts public policy: Research. Question. Listen. Report. That is how we make real change.
---

### Canvass for Lily Franklin!

On Sundays, join Team Lily at the South County Library Parking Lot from 12 - 12:30 pm for a Roanoke canvassing event!
Bring your walking shoes, a charged cell phone, and water. When you arrive to their launch location you will receive a brief training and literature before being sent out to turf. Questions? Email Beth at egunter3@gmail.com or call 540-353-3645.
South County Library Parking Lot, 6303 Merriman Rd, Roanoke, VA 24018

### Queenpin Acupuncture Wellness Wagon
---
Local organizations like Queenpin Acupuncture's Wellness Wagon are making less accessible therapy methods, like acupuncture, accessible for those across our community!
This week, they had a pop-up in SW Roanoke to highlight the different health and wellness benefits of their program.

There will be Indian cuisine and live performances.
Read more at www.vafestivalofindia.com

### Grandparents' Day - Aug. 19
---
The Virginia Museum of Transportation and AARP are thrilled to present a delightful Grandparent's Day Celebration on August 19th from 10 am to 4 pm at the museum.
Grandparents, when accompanied by their grandchildren, will enjoy complimentary entry to the museum!
Bring the family together for a delightful celebration while creating cherished memories. Let's make this Grandparents' Day an unforgettable experience!

### RRHA Walk & Talk - Aug. 22
---
Meet the Roanoke Redevelopment and Housing Authority at the EnVision Center on August 22nd from 3:30 - 4:30 pm for a Walk & Talk Event. Meet Lansdowne community members, enjoy a walk with other community partners, engage with residents and hear direct feedback from them, and build relationships within the community.

### [YOU WRITE THE BILL WORKSHOP - SEPT. ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001V2rRhJ-Emm36OqpliYma3y7BoAf35fSAMrkuwAFShSNOiB9ciYmG3q4ftjMTk-x1fnjXS04lgZMamypf91C5bNyOnVZWtsxxVuKyvZIX97AJby556IrMZ_6Y4FlXldnvLQw3ZbIGOMQIFPxXUmATC3HXSATJx1adRa92curOUz1_TAedufBrx8g6K8Q48WZsULXsHeXHHzJm_jh4gpGBNqKqxhKYe8LJdcbP6LLe8kjynFYa3q91di1CLwBKY4BDbQMcrcZeeYE=&c=waFIgS6OO6ojAn93vmJHNarsBZ7Dm-1oP_q_d7VKGTle8K7oz-rhNg==&ch=szz07LImnrr72tmKIo-1Eby6Pi1co9o4FV--hkWI1baL8SRgZZEvUw==)14

Ever thought about something that could be made better with appropriate legislation? Want more transparency in our government? Do you want to be heard?

Join us Thursday September 14th, 5:30 pm, at the Melrose Branch Library Community Room, for our annual "You Write the Bill Workshop". You'll be able to learn about how a bill becomes law here in the Commonwealth, as well as work with others that share your passion to draft bills.

All are welcome! Please share with anyone you think may be interested.

The Melrose Branch Library is located at 2502 Melrose Ave NW Suite D, Roanoke VA 24017.

We meet the 3rd Thursday of each month at a new location, Virginia Heights Community Church, 2014 Memorial Ave SW, beginning at 7 pm. clean_body: | | | | | | == | == | | | ACROSS THE COMMONWEALTH | | | | FAMILY SERVICE OF ROANOKE VALLEY FUNDRAISER The Mission of Family Service of Roanoke Valley is to support individuals and families as they journey toward lives of emotional wellness, healthy relationships, and a future filled with hope. As they raise money for this fiscal year, their theme is mental health is everything. I am excited to be supporting them this summer by raising money to help them continue to serve our region. | == | == | | == | == | FEEDING SOUTHWEST VIRGINIA It was great to visit Feeding Southwest Virginia for an update on their work providing healthy, nutritious meals to people across SWVA! They are one of the best organizations serving our community today, and I'm proud to support their efforts to end food insecurity in SWVA. | | | CANDIDATE SPOTLIGHT | | | | == | == | == Since Del. Roem was sworn in to the Virginia House of Delegates on January 10, 2018, she has heard from thousands of Virginians about what is most important to them and their families. She's running for the state Senate in 2023 to help improve our quality of life by working on the issues she spent nine years reporting about as a journalist. She understands her number one job as an elected representative isn't to speak. It's to listen. To listen to residents, write down their concerns, ideas, and questions, follow up with them, and ensure what they tell her is part of her policy platform. That's how she took notes and wrote news stories, and that's how she crafts public policy: Research. Question. Listen. Report. That is how we make real change. | | | REGIONAL CANDIDATE EVENTS | | | | | == Canvass for Lily Franklin! On Sundays, join Team Lily at the South County Library Parking Lot from 12 - 12:30 pm for a Roanoke canvassing event! Bring your walking shoes, a charged cell phone, and water. When you arrive to their launch location you will receive a brief training and literature before being sent out to turf. Questions? Email Beth at egunter3@gmail.com or call 540-353-3645. South County Library Parking Lot, 6303 Merriman Rd, Roanoke, VA 24018 | | | | | | == ---|--- == Please join Vice Mayor Joe Cobb & James Matthews at their home (address to be provided upon RSVP) on Friday, August 18th, at 5:30 pm for a reception in support of The Impact Center and Lily Franklin with Sam Rasoul! Please contact Zach Schenkman at (773) 852-5157 or info@sam4va.com with any questions or to RSVP More information: == | | | IN THE COMMUNITY | | | == PLAY-PALOOZA Back To School Event Families are invited to join PLAY Roanoke for a PLAY-PALOOZA back to school event! Discover after school care providers, athletic clubs, family services, recreation opportunities, and more! PLAY-PALOOZA will take place August 11th from 5 - 8 pm at Wasena Park. 1001 Winchester Ave SW, Roanoke, VA 24015. | == | == Queenpin Acupuncture Wellness Wagon Local organizations like Queenpin Acupuncture's Wellness Wagon are making less accessible therapy methods, like acupuncture, accessible for those across our community! This week, they had a pop-up in SW Roanoke to highlight the different health and wellness benefits of their program. | == | == Festival of India - Aug. 12 August 12th is the Festival of India here in Roanoke! Enjoy and experience India's vibrant and diverse culture at Elmwood Park from 4 to 8 pm! There will be Indian cuisine and live performances. Read more at www.vafestivalofindia.com | == | == RoCo Dems Summer Bash - Aug. 12 Get ready for an unforgettable evening of fun, friendship, and fundraising at the RoCo Dems Summer Bash! Spread the word and invite your friends, family, and fellow Democrats. Let's make this a night to remember and work towards a brighter future for Roanoke County! | == | == Grandparents' Day - Aug. 19 The Virginia Museum of Transportation and AARP are thrilled to present a delightful Grandparent's Day Celebration on August 19th from 10 am to 4 pm at the museum. Grandparents, when accompanied by their grandchildren, will enjoy complimentary entry to the museum! Bring the family together for a delightful celebration while creating cherished memories. Let's make this Grandparents' Day an unforgettable experience! | == | == RRHA Walk & Talk - Aug. 22 Meet the Roanoke Redevelopment and Housing Authority at the EnVision Center on August 22nd from 3:30 - 4:30 pm for a Walk & Talk Event. Meet Lansdowne community members, enjoy a walk with other community partners, engage with residents and hear direct feedback from them, and build relationships within the community. 2607 Salem Turnpike, Roanoke, VA 24017. | == | | | | | | == ---|--- Ever thought about something that could be made better with appropriate legislation? Want more transparency in our government? Do you want to be heard? Join us Thursday September 14th, 5:30 pm, at the Melrose Branch Library Community Room, for our annual "You Write the Bill Workshop". You'll be able to learn about how a bill becomes law here in the Commonwealth, as well as work with others that share your passion to draft bills. All are welcome! Please share with anyone you think may be interested. The Melrose Branch Library is located at 2502 Melrose Ave NW Suite D, Roanoke VA 24017. | | | | | == | Join the Roanoke City Democrats! name: Dr. Ben Carson
subject: What are your thoughts?
body:
There is a very concerning trend occurring in our country that has me worried

|
---
| | | [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2ztf5qutrtocm7u2ourfmshc93di4rau7qjihv638_rp22sh2s8i66p74cdgeao36cjh2bs)
---
| Fellow American,

There is a very concerning trend occurring in our country that has me worried for Americans who hold to biblical & faith-based values. [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z57klpgekkff4r9cplpguth7184nsommfmk3q88o_rp22sh2s8i66p74cdgeao36cjh2bs) After the _Respect for Marriage Act_ was passed by a bi-partisan effort and signed into law, I am fearful that legal persecution will only intensify against Americans holding to faith-based values and who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith.

[**Are you concerned that America is abandoning a basic tenet of our founding -_Religious Liberty?_**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zmqdbtsv94pbrkkn656p7stsiniagqcsbf6l9kp8_rp22sh2s8i66p74cdgeao36cjh2bs)

In addition to the passing of the _Respect for Marriage Act_ , numerous examples over the past decade have concerned me: KENNEDY v. BREMERTON SCHOOL DISTRICT, MASTERPIECE CAKESHOP v. COLORADO CIVIL RIGHTS COMMISSION, and 303 CREATIVE v. ELENIS are just a few examples of legal persecution against Americans holding to faith-based values who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith.

Furthermore, an amendment to the _Respect for Marriage Act_ , brought forth by Senator Mike Lee, prohibiting the Federal Government from retaliating against schools, businesses, and organizations because of their religious beliefs about same-sex marriage failed.

**This has the potential to only intensify legal persecution against individuals, businesses, churches, and nonprofits holding to faith-based values. **

The American Cornerstone Institute is a non-profit that I founded to preserve and promote the cornerstones that laid the foundation for the greatest nation the world has ever seen: Faith, Liberty, Community, and Life.

Whether it is a football coach losing his job for praying at midfield after a game, or a baker being sued for not wanting to bake a cake that violates his religious values, **are you concerned as I am with the increase in legal persecution against Americans who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith?**

Please share your thoughts in this quick 2-minute survey concerning religious liberty in America.

**[https://offers.americancornerstone.org/religious-liberty-survey/](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zvgj4t5f4rcrrhgi63s8cv9amqq273ncpp6ctdlg_rp22sh2s8i66p74cdgeao36cjh2bs)**

Thank you for your consideration.

Regards,

Dr. Ben Carson
Founder & Chairman American Cornerstone Institute
---
---
| |
---
---
Your donation to ACI helps us to focus on our mission of promoting and preserving individual and religious liberty, helping our country’s most vulnerable find new hope, and developing methods to decrease the federal government’s role in society and to improve efficiency to best serve ALL our nation’s citizens.
---
|
---
| _Copyright © 2023 American Cornerstone Institute, All rights reserved._

---

Last week we asked you to contact your Representative through our Align Act campaign to tell them to investigate and impeach Joe Biden. Now, we must ask them to officially launch an impeachment inquiry when they return in September, as they are on recess for this entire month. We updated our [**Impeach Biden Align Act campaign**](http://lnk.teapartypatriots._6j4_t-KAk7o6K9g) with a phone script, because we were told that phone calls are very important, especially for this issue. Please use the campaign to continue to put pressure on members over this August recess. **Also, watch for an email next week with a letter you can print out and deliver to their local offices.** Our call to action for the rest of the month will be to visit the Representatives’ local offices and deliver a letter that calls for the impeachment inquiry to begin as soon as they are back in session in September.

name: Ruben Gallego
subject: I was ready to fight on January 6th
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Gallego for Arizona
body:
I will always fight for our democracy.
#

See this? That's me on January 6:
[](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-aug23.NWxa9e&refcode=em230810-1-f&t=1&akid=907%2E734936%2EfHAkrI)
As a Marine Corps veteran, I never imagined having to use my training to protect myself and my colleagues on the House floor.
I never imagined teaching my House colleagues how to put on a gas mask and regulate their breathing.
I never imagined I’d be helping frightened colleagues move to safety as insurrectionists started streaming into the Capitol.
And I never imagined I’d have to urge members of the House NOT to evacuate from the Capitol, because if we left we’d lose the building to the coup.
I will always fight for our democracy. I'd have done it in the Capitol that day — and I will fight as hard as I can to win this race and keep GOP election-deniers out of the Senate.
Sadly the threat is still very real: Just last week, Kari Lake was pushing to decertify the 2020 election — the same rhetoric that led to January 6th. Still praising Trump, still defending the insurrectionists.
And she is the Republican frontrunner in Arizona.
That’s serious, and it’s an important reminder: Nothing less than our democracy is at stake in this election. If Republicans win Arizona, they win the presidency and they take control of the Senate. We can't let that happen, and I can't do it without you.
[**Can you please contribute $3 today to my campaign for United States Senate? Everything comes down to Arizona, and I cannot do this without you. Please, Peter.**](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-aug23.NWxa9e&refcode=em230810-1-f&t=2&akid=907%2E734936%2EfHAkrI)

| **[Donate $25](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1046?c0=ruben-em-aug23._xHikj&refcode=em230810-1-f&t=22&akid=907%2E734936%2EfHAkrI)**

| | **[Donate $50](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1039?c0=ruben-em-aug23.hNnBDZ&refcode=em230810-1-f&t=23&akid=907%2E734936%2EfHAkrI)**

| **[Donate $100](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1040?c0=ruben-em-aug23.Q6fKq6&refcode=em230810-1-f&t=24&akid=907%2E734936%2EfHAkrI)**

And as someone who joined the United States Marine Corps to defend this country and protect our democracy, you can always count on me to be on the front lines of this battle.
Thank you,
Ruben Gallego

name: Trump Train News
subject: The key to Lincoln’s rhetorical success
body:
Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills

| This sponsored message from Trump Train News is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zqljhib7ddm5ntomm9npogcco83j53rt0lcm6uq8_rp22sh2s8i66p74cdge6o76c1h2bs)
---
| | Dear fellow American,
Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Euclid.
While studying law in Springfield, Lincoln explained, he became convinced that the ability to demonstrate the truth of things was essential to the good practice of law.
Consequently, Lincoln left his job, retired to his father’s cabin, and did not return until he could “give any proposition in the six books of Euclid at sight.”
By studying Euclid, we improve our ability to reason soundly—plus, in my experience, the study of Euclid can be great fun.
That’s why Hillsdale College has produced a free online course on the topic **“Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry.”**
Through**“Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry,”** you will learn the importance of deductive reasoning as a foundation for pursuing knowledge in all fields of learning, as well as in everyday life.
---
| | **Now, the course is available in a beautiful DVD box set for viewing in your home or for use in a small group.** **** **You can receive the DVD box set as a thank-you for your tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty.**
Your tax-deductible gift will help promote our free online courses and other educational outreach efforts in this critical time for our nation. And your gift matters even more because...
Hillsdale accomplishes all its work while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.
---
| [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zn6ps9ofaatefeph5jn63t2qtbqv5vpddgncn8mo_rp22sh2s8i66p74cdge6o76c1h2bs)
---
| | That’s why we need the support of friends like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty.
Quantities of this special DVD box set are limited, so reserve your copy today. I’ve included a secure link for you to make your tax-deductible gift below:
[_**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/dvd-mathematics-and-logic-course**_](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zf45ptmh9tmg7r39dp0v9c1rnqnj9407k0aj6018_rp22sh2s8i66p74cdge6o76c1h2bs)
Thank you for partnering with Hillsdale in its mission on behalf of liberty.
Warm regards,
Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

---

By making a donation today, your money will go straight toward resources that will help elect state Dems who are laser-focused on improving our democracy. | | |

Here are just a few ways your gift could help expand Democratic power in our statehouses:
1. A gift of $7 could buy 30 new clipboards for organizers
2. A gift of $25 could pay for 3,000 people to see our digital ads
3. A gift of $50 could fund our candidates' phone banks
4. **And a gift of**$100 could make or break our chances of victory** in special elections across the map**

Every dollar you contribute fuels our efforts to elect state Democrats who will champion fundamental rights like abortion access, LGBTQ+ rights, access to affordable health care, and more, paving the way for transformative change in our statehouses. Every single grassroots supporter helps power our mission to elect state Democrats. That's why we’re calling on you to heed this call to action: Here are just a few ways your gift could help expand Democratic power in our statehouses: 1. A gift of $7 could buy 30 new clipboards for organizers 2. A gift of $25 could pay for 3,000 people to see our digital ads 3. A gift of $50 could fund our candidates' phone banks 4. And a gift of$100 could make or break our chances of victory in special elections across the map Every dollar you contribute fuels our efforts to elect state Democrats who will champion fundamental rights like abortion access, LGBTQ+ rights, access to affordable health care, and more, paving the way for transformative change in our statehouses. | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately. | | | | | Remember: The success of our movement depends on every person doing their part. name: John James
subject: I want to get something off my chest.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by John James for Michigan
body:
I need co-pilots if I’m going to stay airborne.
[View this message in your browser](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zvcgo1u526g5bcrac5f9g27jadqf729h4ieb7r30_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgeppef9t56ej3fctmekp76t1heipnacpne4pqcdtlmui34thgmipnadt4sbp65ttje2qead9h6mpn6tdmmjj78otie8pn5cjh6kpr9o9mcdieacjm64qecd1hmgo6fkjge9h6cs5icpoe9cr3c1rm2phh6sqj6ptncdj31c5icpge1db3c3gbac9hmkorash1k8gn48n24hhm9p33c3hm1pj4c8iv0)
| | | Fellow Patriot, I don't care what the Democrats think about this next sentence--it's true: **We MUST secure our elections before 2024.**

I want you to rest assured that I will use my voice in Congress to question **EVERYTHING** they tell me to believe and ensure that we have REAL election integrity in our nation. **_I will never stop fighting for free and fair elections in the United States of America._** That statement shouldn't be controversial, but it's the reason that the liberal billionaires pulling the strings have made me a **TOP TARGET** in 2024. I can't say that I blame them. **They don 't want to go up against an America-First veteran in Congress who listens to the American People. ** I served our nation on the frontlines as a Ranger-qualified combat Apache Helicopter pilot. Now, I'm running in one of the closest races in the entire country.
I'm always ready for a fight, but I'll level with you. Right now, the leftist attacks are out of control. **I 'm falling out of the sky and I need your help.** **[Could you contribute to my fight within the next hour?](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zgfav3tpoetlrtjd152nqlbfuvh27ksaa8dnph1o_)**
---
[**CONTRIBUTE ANY AMOUNT HERE**](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zo9qtk5pddbgvv7gjc2sr4h6lolgufdkd45c5th8_)
---
I need co-pilots if I'm going to stay airborne. I can't weather this storm alone.
**[So please, will you chip in today to help a veteran pilot fend off these attacks and keep our House Majority?](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2z4m194l8v2q05pc5rk1niv8pvgpj00oosbof8it0_)**
---
[**CONTRIBUTE ANY AMOUNT HERE**](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zn227b9232jnh0j44hpnu90avagh20o3ecd9m800_)
---
Thank you for your generous support,
---

---
John James

name: Lucas Kunce
subject: [NEW POLL] Josh Hawley is the most vulnerable Republican in the country
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lucas Kunce for Missouri
body:
Please let me explain what this means for our movement:
#
Peter — last week, a new _Morning Consult_ poll showed us that Josh Hawley has the lowest approval rating of any Senate GOP incumbent up for re-election in 2024.
Before I ask you to **[chip in toward my campaign to replace him,](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/35452?refcode=em20230810-3533&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=3533%2E614464%2EwXQl0N) please let me explain what this information means for our movement here in Missouri:**
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/35452?refcode=em20230810-3533&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=3533%2E614464%2EwXQl0N)
**[CHIP IN NOW: DEFEAT JOSH HAWLEY →](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/35452?refcode=em20230810-3533&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=3533%2E614464%2EwXQl0N)**
**Since Josh Hawley’s last election in 2018, he’s shown us he’s nothing more than a fraud and a coward.** We saw it on January 6th, 2021 — when he raised his fist outside the Capitol, then ran away from the rioters he raised his fist in support of just hours earlier when he thought it’d help his ambitions. And we’ve seen it in communities all across Missouri, as he votes time and time against investing in our state and uses his power to strip away the rights of everyday people.
But it isn’t just us taking notice. Some of Hawley’s long-time GOP mentors and mega-donors have already publicly abandoned his campaign. And a report earlier this year showed Hawley facing _“intensely negative sentiment”_ among Missouri voters.
**So this new poll confirms — Hawley is the least popular, most vulnerable Republican Senator up for re-election in 2024.**
**[CHIP IN NOW: DEFEAT JOSH HAWLEY →](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/35452?refcode=em20230810-3533&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=4&akid=3533%2E614464%2EwXQl0N)**
But I will not lie to you — this won’t be easy.
GOP insiders at the National Republican Senatorial Committee started attacking me on the first day I got into this race, and they haven’t let up. Now GOP mega-donors just put $1 million into a Super PAC to bail Hawley out with what will certainly be a wave of false and negative attack ads against me and our movement.
**They’re afraid. They know we can win this race. And so they’re going to try and stop us.**
That’s why I need your help today, Peter. This race in Missouri is our best chance to flip a U.S. Senate seat in 2024 + our only chance to defeat Josh Hawley — and we cannot afford to waste it.
**[Can you chip in $10 or more right now so we’ll be able to take advantage of this opportunity, fight back against the GOP insiders and mega-donors trying to tear down our campaign, and defeat Josh Hawley in 2024? I don’t take a single cent from corporate PACs, so you know I’ll always stand up and fight for real people like you.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/35452?refcode=em20230810-3533&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=5&akid=3533%2E614464%2EwXQl0N)**
If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly:
[Contribute $10](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/35453?refcode=em20230810-3533&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=10&t=6&akid=3533%2E614464%2EwXQl0N) [Contribute $25](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/35453?refcode=em20230810-3533&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=25&t=7&akid=3533%2E614464%2EwXQl0N) [Contribute $30](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/35453?refcode=em20230810-3533&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=30&t=8&akid=3533%2E614464%2EwXQl0N) [Contribute $50](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/35453?refcode=em20230810-3533&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=50&t=9&akid=3533%2E614464%2EwXQl0N) [Contribute $100](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/35453?refcode=em20230810-3533&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=100&t=10&akid=3533%2E614464%2EwXQl0N) [Contribute $250](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/35453?refcode=em20230810-3533&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=250&t=11&akid=3533%2E614464%2EwXQl0N) [Give another amount](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/35452?refcode=em20230810-3533&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=12&akid=3533%2E614464%2EwXQl0N)

Missouri voters already know how to take back their power at the ballot box from corrupt politicians like Josh Hawley. Over the last three election cycles, they’ve used their vote to reject anti-union “Right-to-Work” laws, raise the minimum wage, expand healthcare, and legalize weed with huge statewide margins.
And next year, we’re going to do it again by replacing Josh Hawley in the U.S. Senate.
Thanks for being on this team, Peter.
Let’s get moving,
— Lucas Kunce

## Healey’s MA Illegal Migrant Emergency Makes Waves in NH Gov.’s Race
---
| | By: Michael Graham[August 10, 2023](https://shoutout.wix.com/so/d9OdVLlSc/c?w=vVgMzLGk5RFRTY6ErqvGgSxd6_0oDLDhjbLutK39O78.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9uaGpvdXJuYWwuY29tL2hlYWxleXMtbWEtaWxsZWdhbC1taWdyYW50LWVtZXJnZW5jeS1tYWtlcy13YXZlcy1pbi1uaC1nb3ZzLXJhY2UvIiwiciI6IjY3ZWRmZmZiLWM3ZWMtNDlkOS1hMGQyLTJmOWRkZTcyMGM2ZSIsIm0iOiJtYWlsIiwiYyI6IjJiMDhlNzAzLWE2MjctNDZmMy1iZThhLTVkNTY1NDQyNjIwMiJ9)
---
| | Massachusetts Gov. Maura Healey (D), a supporter of sanctuary city laws, says the flood of illegal immigrants into her state has created a state of emergency, and she is urging Bay State citizens to consider housing an undocumented family in their home. Now Kelly Ayotte (R) wants to know if Healey’s pick for New Hampshire governor would ask Granite Staters to do the same. Manchester Mayor Joyce Craig (D) enthusiastically embraced Healey’s endorsement in the Democratic primary earlier this year, aligning herself with one of the most progressive governors in the U.S. On Tuesday, Healey issued a formal emergency declaration in response to undocumented migrants flocking to the Bay State. According to Healey, nearly 5,600 families, mostly undocumented immigrants, live in state shelters. That is up from around 3,100 families a year ago, Healey said. In a letter to Homeland Security Secretary Alejandro Mayorkas, Healey wrote, “Many of these families are migrants to Massachusetts, drawn here because we are and proudly have been a beacon to those in need.” Nearly all of those migrants were processed at the U.S.-Mexico border by the Biden administration and released into the United States with little or no oversight. In recent months, many have made their way to Democrat-run communities like New York City, Chicago, and the Boston area, all of which have long touted their status as “sanctuary cities” largely free of immigration enforcement. With shelters full, Healey and her administration are calling on private citizens in Massachusetts to open their homes to illegal immigrants as part of the solution. “If you have an extra room or suite in your home, please consider hosting a family,” added Lt. Gov. Kim Driscoll during Tuesday’s press conference in Boston. Like Healey, Craig is a supporter of sanctuary community policies. In May, for example, she issued a statement opposing a GOP-backed anti-sanctuary city bill. When news of Healey’s “open house” solution to the illegal immigrant emergency broke, Ayotte called Craig out on social media: “Update from Mayor Joyce Craig’s Massachusetts Mentor: Does Mayor Craig support asking New Hampshire residents to house illegal immigrants in their homes? This is what New Hampshire will look like under her leadership,” Ayotte tweeted. Asked by NHJournal if she supports the Healey policy or if the emergency in Massachusetts has impacted her support for sanctuary policies in New Hampshire, Craig declined to respond. Like most New England Democrats, Healey has long supported sanctuary policies. “There are a number of cities who’ve adapted the status of a ‘sanctuary city,’ and I think that’s working,” Healey said in a 2017 Boston Globe interview. Asked about making Massachusetts a “sanctuary state,” Healey said, “I’m not opposed to a statewide designation. I just take the view that it’s working well at the local level right now.” Last month, Healey celebrated Massachusetts’ new law giving drivers licenses to undocumented migrants, Jessica Vaughan, Director of Policy Studies at the Center for Immigration Studies, called Healey’s “alarm at the lack of state resources to support [an additional] 1,500 illegal alien families” the “ultimate hypocrisy.” “As Massachusetts attorney general, Healey filed lawsuits against the Trump administration’s efforts to rein in illegal immigration and reduce the number of immigrants who were dependent on welfare,” Vaughan said. “Thanks to the sanctuary policies she has been endorsing for years, she will have to find more than $10 million to house the new arrivals in hotels in the next year, not to mention budget for a similar amount to be spent on medical care, food assistance and support the cities and towns who must educate the children. “How typical of a Democrat to beg for money from the federal government, rather than examine the policies she could change to lower the cost of this disaster, or demand that her political ally in the White House change policies to cut off the inflow of people, which would help everyone,” Vaughan said. Craig is one of two declared candidates in the Democratic primary for governor, along with Executive Councilor Cinde Warmington. Ayotte is currently facing off with former state Senate President Chuck Morse in the GOP contest. The opening message of Ayotte’s campaign has been her pledge to keep the Granite State from morphing into Massachusetts. “I fear we are one election away from becoming Massachusetts, from becoming something that we are not,” Ayotte said at her formal campaign announcement. “We are different as a state.” She said Craig has a different agenda, one Ayotte intends to fight.“Our neighbors in Massachusetts have watched millions of their hard-earned tax dollars spent on services for illegal immigrants, and now they are in a state of emergency because their Democrat governor supports unfair and unfeasible policies such as sanctuary cities, drivers licenses for illegals, and right to shelter laws,” Ayotte told NHJournal. “We cannot elect Joyce Craig, who will support her Massachusetts mentor’s disastrous policies in New Hampshire. “When I’m governor, the only people who will call New Hampshire their ‘sanctuary’ are taxpaying, law-abiding citizens.”
---

name: Team Ilhan
subject: Solidarity wins: Add your name!

body:
# [](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/35?t=1&akid=407%2E791427%2Es0J6nR)

Friends -
We’re sure you saw the huge news that UPS workers, represented by the Teamsters union, have reached a “game-changing” contract deal with UPS management.
The deal will result in big raises for UPS workers across the board as well as more full-time jobs and much-needed workplace protections. And it wasn’t possible without over 340,000 UPS Teamsters members standing strong in solidarity with each other.
We are seeing a historic resurgence of the labor movement across our nation, from workers at UPS to Starbucks to Amazon. Simply put, this is a crucial time to support workers as they organize.
**[Sign our petition if you agree: every worker in this country deserves a union that fights for their rights in the workplace!](https://act.ilhanomar.com/signup/io-em-aug23-ups-petition/?source=em230810-1-t1&refcode2=407.791427.s0J6nR&akid=407%2E791427%2Es0J6nR)**
**[ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.ilhanomar.com/signup/io-em-aug23-ups-petition/?source=em230810-1-t1&refcode2=407.791427.s0J6nR&akid=407%2E791427%2Es0J6nR)**
Ilhan has always stood for the right of workers to form a union and bargain for the better wages and working conditions they need.
That’s why Ilhan supports the PRO Act — which would further workers’ right to organize more than ever before — and it’s why her congressional office staff was one of the very first in Congress to unionize.
UPS workers have shown us once again that organizing works and solidarity wins. We all play a part in pushing the movement forward so more workers can win, too.
**[So please, take just 30 seconds to sign our petition and show your support our efforts to protect and expand the fundamental right of workers to form a union:](https://act.ilhanomar.com/signup/io-em-aug23-ups-petition/?source=em230810-1-t1&refcode2=407.791427.s0J6nR&akid=407%2E791427%2Es0J6nR)**
**[SIGN THE PETITON](https://act.ilhanomar.com/signup/io-em-aug23-ups-petition/?source=em230810-1-t1&refcode2=407.791427.s0J6nR&akid=407%2E791427%2Es0J6nR)**
In solidarity,
\- Team Ilhan

name: American Defense News
subject: The key to Lincoln’s rhetorical success
body:
Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills

| This sponsored message from American Defense News is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | [](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zotufn9i7evl7eilvbr6qdjpp3l8edkt7vam67f8_rp22sh2s8i66p74cdie0ob6c3h2bs)
---
| | Dear fellow American,
Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Euclid.
While studying law in Springfield, Lincoln explained, he became convinced that the ability to demonstrate the truth of things was essential to the good practice of law.
Consequently, Lincoln left his job, retired to his father’s cabin, and did not return until he could “give any proposition in the six books of Euclid at sight.”
By studying Euclid, we improve our ability to reason soundly—plus, in my experience, the study of Euclid can be great fun.
That’s why Hillsdale College has produced a free online course on the topic **“Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry.”**
Through**“Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry,”** you will learn the importance of deductive reasoning as a foundation for pursuing knowledge in all fields of learning, as well as in everyday life.
---
| | **Now, the course is available in a beautiful DVD box set for viewing in your home or for use in a small group.** **** **You can receive the DVD box set as a thank-you for your tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty.**
Your tax-deductible gift will help promote our free online courses and other educational outreach efforts in this critical time for our nation. And your gift matters even more because...
Hillsdale accomplishes all its work while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.
---
| [](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zm1a8ddi26ra8hiebniv6qs5vpotdcr103n2har8_rp22sh2s8i66p74cdie0ob6c3h2bs)
---
| | That’s why we need the support of friends like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty.
Quantities of this special DVD box set are limited, so reserve your copy today. I’ve included a secure link for you to make your tax-deductible gift below:
[_**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/dvd-mathematics-and-logic-course**_](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zm2m5tp0ho8e971pobohrqa9qktik091oj4ep28o_rp22sh2s8i66p74cdie0ob6c3h2bs)
Thank you for partnering with Hillsdale in its mission on behalf of liberty.
Warm regards,
Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

name: Becky Wagner
subject: My police officer husband is facing ten years in prison
body:
I wish I were writing to you under happier circumstances...

Dear Friend,
I wish I were writing to you under happier circumstances...
...but my hero police officer husband, Mark Wagner, is the next big target of the radical anti-police movement and I urgently need your help before they make an example out of him.
That's Mark in the picture I sent you, along with our boys Nolan and Jacob and dog Kilo.
[](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z967tnt8a5fa02uv79p8hrqbafuivh6po8e7gip8_rp22sh2s8i66p74cdie0ob1c5h2bs)
Not only is Mark a highly respected officer, he's an incredibly supportive father, a loving husband, and a fierce friend.
He's dedicated his life to protecting others. But we live in far-Left Madison, Wisconsin - and the "defund the police" mob whipped up rage, LIED about what happened, and trashed Mark's reputation.
And now Mark faces 10 YEARS behind bars for doing exactly what he was trained to do in the line of duty - and I'm scared I might lose him. [**That 's why I wrote this letter to you, someone I've never met before, to ask for your help.**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zt39gdmg2paavi7o2bn38v18ag9p64ostv9qhun8_rp22sh2s8i66p74cdie0ob1c5h2bs)
But first, let me explain what happened...
On the morning of February 3, 2022, Mark and other officers tried to arrest a _violent_ _criminal_ named Quadren Wilson.
Wilson has a rap sheet a mile long with dozens of arrests for drug distribution, theft, witness intimidation, battery, eluding police, and more. He was wanted for allegedly dealing fentanyl to a man found dead in a restaurant bathroom.
Mark's arrest team planned to capture Wilson in his vehicle using a containment strategy. They pulled in their trucks to block his car on both ends. But Wilson floored the accelerator, spinning his wheels wildly in a desperate attempt to escape justice.
Mark and another officer exited their vehicle to make the arrest. Mark was holding one of those big POLICE shields and had his gun drawn. But Wilson refused Mark's commands to show his hands, continuing to spin his wheels and try to force his way out.
With the wheels screeching and smoking, Mark and the other officer saw Wilson reach into the center console and pull his hand up.
Mark thought Wilson had a gun. He heard what he thought was gunfire. Then Mark felt something hit the shield he was holding and push him backward.** **
**Both Mark and the other officer responded to this life-threatening situation by firing into the vehicle.**
Mark believed his life and his fellow officers' lives were in danger. He did what he was trained to do and stopped the threat.
Thankfully, Wilson survived and no one else was injured. But because Wilson is black and Mark is white - anti-police radicals jumped at the chance to target Mark.
Protesters drummed up a racial firestorm by spreading lies that Wilson "had his hands up" and that he "was shot five times in the back." The corrupt liberal media repeated these lies and painted my husband as a monster.
And on September 22, 2022, the liberal District Attorney caved to the mob and filed BOGUS felony charges against Mark. **Now Mark faces 10 YEARS in prison.**
[**_Now I hope you can see why I 'm turning to you for help today._**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zi3fnanotm8jqmk09f2fh4fnrkhet3eq4utjqb10_rp22sh2s8i66p74cdie0ob1c5h2bs)
Mark dedicated his life to helping others. He's spent 30 years in law enforcement, most of them with the Milwaukee Police Department (MPD).
We knew fighting alone against the anti-police movement here in Wisconsin would be impossible and our hope that justice would prevail was quickly fading when we received a call from **the Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund (LELDF)** offering to help Mark.
This incredible organization helps innocent officers, like my husband, who have been unfairly prosecuted for split-second, use-of-force decisions in the line of duty.
Law and justice experts like President Ronald Reagan's Attorney General Edwin Meese and former FBI Assistant Director Ronald Hosko serve on LELDF's Board. LELDF's president, Jason Johnson, served over 20 years as a police officer, including as Deputy Commissioner of the Baltimore Police Department.
In short, these are experts when it comes to policing. And they thoroughly vet cases to determine if an officer was wrongly accused or charged before deciding to help.
They provide legal counsel, expert witnesses, whatever is needed to make sure wrongly accused police officers get a fair shake in court. And they do it all free of charge!
But LELDF doesn't receive any money from the government to help police officers facing unjust charges. They're funded entirely by the generous support of folks like you who can recognize a miscarriage of justice and want to help fix it.
This is why I reached out to you today. I needed to ask you a very important question:
[**_Will you please help my husband Mark fight the unjust charges against him and clear his name by rushing a generous, tax-deductible donation to LELDF today?_**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zl25952bqr0ahrcij5ug58450fgsvc7fr4q8vkuo_rp22sh2s8i66p74cdie0ob1c5h2bs)
Your kind gift today of $35, $50, or $100 to help Mark will mean so much to my family.
Or, if you're blessed with the means to help with a gift of $250, $500, or even $1,000 or more, I pray you will so my husband doesn't spend 10 YEARS behind bars away from his family.
Right now, LELDF is preparing to ramp up legal action in Mark's case. [**So please follow this link to make your tax-deductible donation right away.**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zejc8qsl598mkhadq2q4sr2an02mpqnq54tqv268_rp22sh2s8i66p74cdie0ob1c5h2bs)
Any gift amount you can send today is truly a blessing. No matter what you're able to give, please say a prayer for Mark and our family.
Thank you in advance for your generous support of my family and LELDF.
With deepest gratitude,
Becky Wagner
P.S. Mark is the type of person who'd offer to donate a kidney to a friend in need just because it's the right thing to do. In fact, that's exactly what he did when he donated one of his kidneys to his former partner of more than a decade! Mark didn't even let his partner know he got checked out as a potential donor. He just said that his partner had young kids who needed him to be around and it was the right thing to do.
This is the type of man the anti-police mob is targeting and trying to destroy: a kidney donor, a youth football coach, a man who assists the elderly from our parish in running errands and doing handy-man projects. A man of faith who's always helping others.
Mark faces 10 years behind bars - simply for doing his job to serve and protect. [**_Will you help him clear his name by making a tax-deductible donation of $35, $50, $100, $250, $500, $1,000 or any amount to the Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund today?_** ](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zjc3nt7bg2k5hk8kma8du0735m91qhboe0apjo4g_rp22sh2s8i66p74cdie0ob1c5h2bs) Your generosity will help LELDF mount the strongest legal defenses for my husband and other wrongly accused officers. Thank you in advance for your prayers and support.

\----------------

_More such officers who sacrifice so much for will face similar fates unless we speak out and stand up for the brave men and women in blue. The next time you see a police officer in your community, please thank them for their service. To read more about our mission or the other Law Enforcement officers we 're defending, please visit **www.leldf.org**. And remember - Blue Lives Matter!_
_(C) Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund | www.PoliceDefense.org
2560 Huntington Ave. Suite 203, Alexandria, VA, 22303_

ICYMI News

name: NRSC HQ
subject: What's your pronoun, Patriot?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
What's your pronoun, Patriot?

Joe Biden has taken the most respected and feared military in the world and turned it into a college campus safe space.

The military is the absolute LAST place that should have anything to do with "woke." China is laughing at us!

We need to stop focusing on pronouns and start focusing on keeping our country safe and secure.

**[Will you take the Military Readiness Assessment to help us de-woke our military? Follow this link to take the assessment.>>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/63053475:J_ovo-IKN:m:1:3299561967:F41DBB497BDC1F62841D1EEC78213B6F:r)**

Thank you,

NRSC HQ

name: Courier Newsroom
subject: Fox News has been lying about this issue longer than any other
body:
While fossil fuel interests peddle their propaganda in online op-eds, mountains of rigorous scientific research conducted over a period of decades reveals the truth.
# [](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/go/83?t=1&akid=1367%2E120351%2E0M-SQQ)
We can see the evidence of the climate crisis with our own eyes, Peter.
Warmer temperatures are causing events like thunderstorms, tornados, hurricanes, floods, droughts, and wildfires to become more frequent and more extreme than before.
**We can all see and feel the effects, but at Fox News, they’re still running climate denying propaganda like this:**
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-courier-20230810?refcode=em20230810&amount=5&refcode2=1367_120351_0M-SQQ&akid=1367%2E120351%2E0M-SQQ)
**[Chip in $5 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-courier-20230810?refcode=em20230810&amount=5&refcode2=1367_120351_0M-SQQ&akid=1367%2E120351%2E0M-SQQ)**
Fox News has been a source for climate denial misinformation for decades. Despite this summer’s extreme weather, they’re running dangerous ads promoting Fox News contributor Mike Huckabee’s climate misinformation children’s book and have tried to convince their audience that the Canadian wildfires have nothing to do with a warming planet.
**At Courier, we are committed to correcting the record so our audiences know the truth about the climate crisis.** In Arizona, our reporters at The Copper Courier are covering the extreme heat wave gripping the state. And in Michigan, our team at The Gander addressed Michiganders’ concerns over poor air quality:
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-courier-20230810?refcode=em20230810&amount=5&refcode2=1367_120351_0M-SQQ&akid=1367%2E120351%2E0M-SQQ)
Our readers can rest assured that Courier’s newsrooms across 8 different battleground states will continue to report the truth and fight back against Fox News’ climate denying propaganda.
[**But because none of our reporting is locked behind paywalls, we rely on contributions from people like you to keep our newsrooms running. Will you pitch in $5 or anything you can today to help support responsible, fact-based journalism like ours?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-courier-20230810?refcode=em20230810&amount=5&refcode2=1367_120351_0M-SQQ&akid=1367%2E120351%2E0M-SQQ)
**[Chip in $5 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-courier-20230810?refcode=em20230810&amount=5&refcode2=1367_120351_0M-SQQ&akid=1367%2E120351%2E0M-SQQ)**
Thanks for supporting us,
The Courier Newsroom Team
**[DONATE »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-footer?refcode=em-footer&t=2&refcode2=1367_120351_0M-SQQ&akid=1367%2E120351%2E0M-SQQ)**
Email us: [**info@couriernewsroom.com**](mailto:info@couriernewsroom.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/signup/update-your-information)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=3&akid=1367%2E120351%2E0M-SQQ)

Courier Newsroom
Box 509
New York, NY 10032

name: Gabby Giffords
subject: I’m proud to announce the endorsement of my friend Joe Biden’s reelection campaign
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
We must do everything we can to ensure we have four more years of a Biden-Harris administration leading the charge on gun safety
#

Team -
Today, I’m happy to announce that GIFFORDS PAC is endorsing President Joe Biden’s reelection campaign.
**If you know already that you’d like to split a contribution between GIFFORDS PAC and President Biden’s campaign, please use the link below:**
[**https://go.giffords.org/go/Giffords-Biden**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-aug23-biden.2MOrGg&refcode=em230810-1-15&t=1&akid=6315%2E3935704%2EXDHFEp)
President Biden and Vice President Harris have long fought to address gun violence, and I’m so proud to have them with us in our movement to end our nation’s gun violence epidemic.
Joe Biden has spent his career cutting through the partisan divide in Washington to get things done. During his first term as president, he has shown he is a trustworthy leader who also backs up his words and promises with policy and change. **Last year, he signed the _Bipartisan Safer Communities Act_ into law—the most significant package of gun safety legislation enacted in nearly three decades.** Under President Biden, the ATF regulated ghost guns and stabilizing pistol braces. He also signed important executive actions to expand background checks, extreme risk protection orders (aka red flag laws), and safe storage.
On a personal level, I’m grateful to call President Biden a friend. He was there for me during the darkest days of my recovery, and he deeply understands the trauma that survivors of gun violence go through. That’s why he has made addressing our nation’s gun violence crisis a top priority.
[**We must do everything we can to ensure we have four more years of a Biden-Harris administration leading the charge on gun safety. Will you please join me today in supporting them by splitting a $5 contribution between President Biden’s reelection campaign and GIFFORDS PAC today?**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-aug23-biden.2MOrGg&refcode=em230810-1-15&t=2&akid=6315%2E3935704%2EXDHFEp)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your split contribution between Joe Biden and GIFFORDS PAC instantly:_
| | **[Donate $5](https://go.giffords.org/go/17015?c0=giffords-em-aug23-biden.3eB4IW&amount=5&t=21&akid=6315%2E3935704%2EXDHFEp)**
---
****
| **[Donate $25](https://go.giffords.org/go/17017?c0=giffords-em-aug23-biden.i_rlx1&refcode=em230810-1-15&t=22&akid=6315%2E3935704%2EXDHFEp)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $50](https://go.giffords.org/go/17010?c0=giffords-em-aug23-biden.8LtK1s&refcode=em230810-1-15&t=23&akid=6315%2E3935704%2EXDHFEp)**
---
****
| **[Donate $100](https://go.giffords.org/go/17011?c0=giffords-em-aug23-biden.-ZpaeM&refcode=em230810-1-15&t=24&akid=6315%2E3935704%2EXDHFEp)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $250](https://go.giffords.org/go/17012?c0=giffords-em-aug23-biden.IS0znt&refcode=em230810-1-15&t=25&akid=6315%2E3935704%2EXDHFEp)**
---
****
| **[Other Amount](https://go.giffords.org/go/17015?c0=giffords-em-aug23-biden.3eB4IW&refcode=em230810-1-15&t=26&akid=6315%2E3935704%2EXDHFEp)**
---
****
By reelecting Joe Biden and Kamala Harris, I am confident that we will continue to make progress in the fight to end gun violence. Thank you for joining me today in uplifting their reelection campaign.
Onward,
Gabby Giffords

Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. www.Giffords.org
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com . We try to send only the most important information and opportunities to participate via email, but click [here](https://go.giffords.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=27&akid=6315%2E3935704%2EXDHFEp) if you'd like to unsubscribe. Giffords PAC was started to support elected officials who step up to fight the gun violence epidemic. Thank you for standing with Gabby and the Giffords team.

name: Team Maria Salazar
subject: Official Invitation Attached
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Salazar for Congress
body:
| | | **STRIKE FORCE NEEDED:**
---

Bill grew up in Baton Rouge, Louisiana, and is a proud LSU graduate. He worked in Louisiana’s charity hospital system for over 25 years, ensuring that the less fortunate in our state were able to receive quality health care. Later, Bill co-founded the Greater Baton Rouge Community Clinic, providing free dental and health care to working families without insurance. In the wake of Hurricane Katrina, Bill led a group of volunteers to convert an abandoned K-Mart building into an emergency healthcare facility.
As a conservative in the Senate, he focuses on the issues Louisiana families care about the most. Bill is working to lower the cost of health care, make flood insurance affordable, and save Social Security from a 24% cut if Washington fails to act.
Bill, and his wife, Laura, live in Baton Rouge and attend church at the Chapel on the Campus. They are blessed with three children and one grandchild.

clean_body: | | | | your support keeps the light on at headquarters. Friend, All donations to my campaign are received with the utmost gratitude – but it truly is monthly recurring donors who keep the lights on at headquarters. I don’t think I’ve done enough lately to say thank you to those valued donors – so I’m having my team do something special. | But in this economy, even $100 a month is too much for some to spare. But since even just $50 a month makes such a big difference for us, we wanted to give anyone who makes a monthly recurring donation of just $50 or more special access to our team here at Cassidy for Senate. We hold strategy calls regularly to discuss important issues in the country and how we should address them, and we’d like to invite you to attend these calls for yourself, Friend. It just takes a $50 recurring monthly donation, and I’ll personally add you to the invite list. | I know I wouldn’t even have a team, let alone a job without supporters like you. I hope you’ll take the next step in supporting my campaign by becoming a monthly recurring donor. Thank you, | | Bill Cassidy United States Senator, Louisiana | | "Facebook" | "Twitter" | "Instagram" | "LinkedIn" ---|---|---|--- Bill grew up in Baton Rouge, Louisiana, and is a proud LSU graduate. He worked in Louisiana’s charity hospital system for over 25 years, ensuring that the less fortunate in our state were able to receive quality health care. Later, Bill co-founded the Greater Baton Rouge Community Clinic, providing free dental and health care to working families without insurance. In the wake of Hurricane Katrina, Bill led a group of volunteers to convert an abandoned K-Mart building into an emergency healthcare facility. As a conservative in the Senate, he focuses on the issues Louisiana families care about the most. Bill is working to lower the cost of health care, make flood insurance affordable, and save Social Security from a 24% cut if Washington fails to act. Bill, and his wife, Laura, live in Baton Rouge and attend church at the Chapel on the Campus. They are blessed with three children and one grandchild. | Bill is working for all of Louisiana | DONATE BY MAIL Bill Cassidy for US Senate PO BOX 80505 Baton Rouge, LA 70898 Can’t donate? Don’t worry - There are other ways you can help! | Bill Cassidy, U.S. Senator PO Box 80505, Baton Rouge, LA \- =

subject: Do YOU stand with our police officers?

body:
| | | Peter, we just need two minutes of your time.

Leftists across America are literally and metaphorically spitting in the faces of our brave law enforcement officers.

**Right now, our policemen and women need a MASSIVE show of support.**

Defeating the radical Left has never been more important and it will be no easy task. Peter, with your support, I can continue to protect our Conservative values. body:
My senior Senator and friend Bob Casey is running for re-election!!!
| | | Hey, I’ve got some biiiig news.

**🚨 My pal and senior Senator Bob Casey is *officially* running for re-election! 🚨**

| | [Donate](https://go.dscc.org/go/12724?amount=5&t=4&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-FM-20230810-JohnFetterman-FettermanSignedCaseyTandem-ETG-sl1&refcode=DPE-FM-20230810-JohnFetterman-FettermanSignedCaseyTandem-ETG-sl1&akid=11587%2E9716520%2Eiu6UET)
---
Your donation will be split between Bob Casey for Senate and the DSCC.
If you saw me on the campaign trail in 2022, then you probably saw Bob Casey too. NO ONE knows PA like Bob Casey, and no one stands up for PA’s families like him, either.

He’s spent his LIFE fighting the ultra-wealthy and special interests that threaten PA’s hardworking people — and that’s *exactly* why we need to send him back to DC to keep fighting for us.

[](https://go.dscc.org/go/12724?amount=5&t=5&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-FM-20230810-JohnFetterman-FettermanSignedCaseyTandem-ETG-sl1&refcode=DPE-FM-20230810-JohnFetterman-FettermanSignedCaseyTandem-ETG-sl1&akid=11587%2E9716520%2Eiu6UET)^Like seriously, we gotta keep this dude in the U.S. Senate.
Bob’s campaign is *already* being attacked by the Republicans, and we’re going to do EVERYthing we can to keep him in the Senate and fighting for working Pennsylvanians.

**[Do me a favor and split a few bucks between Bob Casey and the DSCC? Let’s keep PA 🔵 + our Senate out of Mitch McConnell’s hands — just like we did in 2022.](https://go.dscc.org/go/12724?amount=5&t=6&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-FM-20230810-JohnFetterman-FettermanSignedCaseyTandem-ETG-sl1&refcode=DPE-FM-20230810-JohnFetterman-FettermanSignedCaseyTandem-ETG-sl1&akid=11587%2E9716520%2Eiu6UET)**

body:
Black voters cannot be taken for granted.

[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/67872097/421157746/2096228750?refcode=EM_F_230810granted_N_TN_90DO_5_G_N_LOGO&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVjAwMS8xLzkwOTIwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjA2MGViMTgzLThjMzctZWUxMS1hM2YxLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=DL8WdRF6eF-mec6-N1vZwEeg0oKNVVrRetoMRUopIQg=)
| Hi team,

In a recent article published by _The Washington Post_ , they discuss how Democrats are concerned that Black voters won’t turn out for Biden next year. Malcolm Kenyatta, a Pennsylvania state representative, was quoted stating:

_“You have to spend just as much time, maybe even more time, on the people who show up for you every time as you do for the people who don’t. What Black folks care about is what everybody cares about, to be able to take care of their community, to be able to live in a community that is safe ... If the president is able to do what he is doing now, which is tout his record, I think we are going to be fine.”_

[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/67872099/421157749/2096228750?refcode=EM_F_230810granted_N_TN_90DO_5_G_N_P1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVjAwMS8xLzkwOTIwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjA2MGViMTgzLThjMzctZWUxMS1hM2YxLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=DL8WdRF6eF-mec6-N1vZwEeg0oKNVVrRetoMRUopIQg=)

Black voters cannot be taken for granted. _That is why we exist._ New Pennsylvania Project was founded to consistently engage Pennsylvanians year-round to expand the electorate centering Black, Indigenous, and other people of color, immigrant communities, and the youth. Through civic engagement, we ensure all eligible voters feel compelled to exercise their freedom to vote in the Commonwealth – and this work is going to be even more important as we near critical elections this year and next.

**We are out on the ground from McKeesport to Harrisburg, Chester City to Easton, Bensalem to Philadelphia, registering Black, Indigenous and other people of color, immigrant communities and the youth to vote and mobilizing these first-time voters to the polls this year and beyond. It is our theory of change that we hire from within these communities, as we know the most trusted messengers are trusted local leaders.**

[**Can you donate $5 right now to help us continue this critical work and register as many voters as possible?**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/67872102/421157752/2096228750?refcode=EM_F_230810granted_N_TN_90DO_5_G_N_L1&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVjAwMS8xLzkwOTIwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjA2MGViMTgzLThjMzctZWUxMS1hM2YxLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=DL8WdRF6eF-mec6-N1vZwEeg0oKNVVrRetoMRUopIQg=)
