clean_body: Black voters cannot be taken for granted. = | Hi team, In a recent article published by The Washington Post , they discuss how Democrats are concerned that Black voters won’t turn out for Biden next year. Malcolm Kenyatta, a Pennsylvania state representative, was quoted stating: “You have to spend just as much time, maybe even more time, on the people who show up for you every time as you do for the people who don’t. What Black folks care about is what everybody cares about, to be able to take care of their community, to be able to live in a community that is safe ... If the president is able to do what he is doing now, which is tout his record, I think we are going to be fine.” = Black voters cannot be taken for granted. That is why we exist. New Pennsylvania Project was founded to consistently engage Pennsylvanians year-round to expand the electorate centering Black, Indigenous, and other people of color, immigrant communities, and the youth. Through civic engagement, we ensure all eligible voters feel compelled to exercise their freedom to vote in the Commonwealth – and this work is going to be even more important as we near critical elections this year and next. We are out on the ground from McKeesport to Harrisburg, Chester City to Easton, Bensalem to Philadelphia, registering Black, Indigenous and other people of color, immigrant communities and the youth to vote and mobilizing these first-time voters to the polls this year and beyond. It is our theory of change that we hire from within these communities, as we know the most trusted messengers are trusted local leaders. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately. = = = = ** Onward, Team NPP | The New Pennsylvania Project (NPP) is a voting rights organization with a year-round primary focus on voter registration, civic education, and mobilization. NPP centers historically disenfranchised and often neglected Black, Indigenous and other people of color, immigrant communities and the youth in our work. Through civic engagement, we ensure all eligible voters feel compelled to exercise their freedom to vote in the Commonwealth. = PA ELECTION DATES : Municipal/Local/Judicial Election: November 7, 2023 Last day to : October 23, 2023 Last day to : October 31, 2023 || || || New Pennsylvania Project PO Box 443 West Chester, PA 19381 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please. to receive fewer emails from us. to stop receiving any fundraising emails from us. name: Dick Durbin
subject: July was the hottest month ever recorded in our planet’s history
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Dick Durbin
body:
Peter, climate action can’t wait.
#
**SCIENTIFIC AMERICAN: July 2023 Is Hottest Month Ever Recorded on Earth**
**BLOOMBERG: This Year Is Already on Track to Be the Hottest Ever Recorded**
**CNN: Global heat in ‘uncharted territory’ as scientists warn 2023 could be the hottest year on record**
These are not the kinds of headlines we want to see, Peter.
Last month was the hottest month that humans have recorded on this planet. Scientists warn of “uncharted territory” for the global heat index. The climate crisis is here and cannot be ignored. And while the Senate made progress last year in fighting climate change, Republicans are threatening to roll it all back.
**[Will you add your name now to oppose GOP attempts to roll back our progress addressing the climate crisis?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67872496/421159099/417284775?refcode=dd_em_230810_1&ms=dd_em_230810_1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Englewood&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODQ4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMWZmYTIzNC04ZDM3LWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MXnEPgIf_2yRdk78gkz76i78pv251ZQSaBBEUHjkMTI=&emci=9fe1a63b-8837-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=f1ffa234-8d37-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=2727974)**
I’m proud of the historic investments we made in Democrats’ _Inflation Reduction Act_ that are already taking steps to reduce greenhouse gas emissions and promote environmental justice.
Just last month, Senator Duckworth and I helped secure critical funding for Illinois’ regional climate centers, clean energy initiatives, and upgrades to the National Weather Service.
Meanwhile, right-wing policymakers are circulating a host of dangerous proposals that would wipe out the progress we’ve made on reducing emissions, putting our planet’s future in peril.
****[We can’t let climate deniers stand in the way of progress. Sign the petition right away to protect Democrats’ work to address the climate crisis.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67872497/421159100/417284775?refcode=dd_em_230810_1&ms=dd_em_230810_1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Englewood&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODQ4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMWZmYTIzNC04ZDM3LWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MXnEPgIf_2yRdk78gkz76i78pv251ZQSaBBEUHjkMTI=&emci=9fe1a63b-8837-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=f1ffa234-8d37-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=2727974)****

Dick Durbin

name: Katy Frisch
subject: Nate Silver got this one very wrong
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Adam for Colorado
body:
In 2022, no one gave my husband Adam Frisch a chance against Lauren Boebert. Nate Silver’s FiveThirtyEight only gave Adam a 3% chance of defeating Boebert. They projected he’d lose by over 45,000 votes!
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67873289/421162390/872526041?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjIxNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMzliZTk5OS04ZTM3LWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZaYBMlstH55dWP-vG47FPQibAvoN5HljvXskTz90APE=&emci=9e337efc-3336-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=d39be999-8e37-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=19445147)
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67873292/421162392/872526041?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjIxNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMzliZTk5OS04ZTM3LWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZaYBMlstH55dWP-vG47FPQibAvoN5HljvXskTz90APE=&emci=9e337efc-3336-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=d39be999-8e37-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=19445147)
Hello,
In 2022, no one gave my husband Adam Frisch a chance against Lauren Boebert.
Everywhere you looked, the political pundits were calling Colorado’s 3rd congressional district “Safe Republican” or “Solid R.”
Nate Silver’s FiveThirtyEight only gave Adam a 3% chance of defeating Boebert. They projected he’d lose by over 45,000 votes!
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67873293/421162393/1610638071?refcode=em20230810-wel-3b&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C35%2C50%2C100%2C250&refcode2=d39be999-8e37-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjIxNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMzliZTk5OS04ZTM3LWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZaYBMlstH55dWP-vG47FPQibAvoN5HljvXskTz90APE=)
In the end, though, the race went to a recount. **Lauren Boebert won by just 546 votes, and Adam lost the closest race in the entire country.**
Because here’s what their “models” and “forecasts” didn’t factor in: Adam put in the work. He traveled 24,000 miles in our red pickup truck to every corner of the district. He met thousands and thousands of voters – and he _listened_.
Now, my husband’s running again, and I’ll be honest: The first campaign was hard. But defeating Lauren Boebert is just too important to sit this out. **Adam’s all-in to finish the job in 2024. I’m all-in. Can we count on you?**
[**Please, if you can afford to, will you chip in $5 or more right now to Adam’s campaign and help him defeat Lauren Boebert? We were outspent in 2022 and just barely lost. Whatever you can afford to give today will help us invest early and win.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67873294/421162395/1610638071?refcode=em20230810-wel-3b&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C35%2C50%2C100%2C250&refcode2=d39be999-8e37-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjIxNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMzliZTk5OS04ZTM3LWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZaYBMlstH55dWP-vG47FPQibAvoN5HljvXskTz90APE=)

Dear Friend,
---
A spiritual war is being waged all around us. Don't believe me? Just look around at what is being pushed as "pop culture." Satanic imagery is everywhere in pop culture, and glorifying the devil is commonplace. It is IMPERATIVE that we as Believers stand up and fight back against the cultural rot that is marketed specifically for our children.

I sat down with OANN's Tipping Point to talk about what's at stake and how we fight back! _**WATCH BELOW ⬇︎⬇︎⬇︎**_

With just 13 days until my first Presidential Debate, my team is doing a massive push to recruit strong conservatives to join my Ambassador’s Circle. You’ve proven to be a freedom-loving conservative who is dedicated to fighting for our country’s future, and that's exactly the type of person I want on my side ahead of the first debate. So will you please do the honors and accept this invitation to join my Ambassador’s Circle? https://click.email.nikkihaley.com/?qs=536417f7de98c0fc7759d2c555241355a29d5f2f2f1385be5d4fb04f944576df51a01eca8155cf825d69a805ee4b0583bad1656e86485ee104db2f8f6820ad4b All it takes is $15 to activate your membership today and you’ll unlock all your Ambassador’s Circle membership benefits effective immediately. https://click.email.nikkihaley.com/?qs=536417f7de98c0fc7759d2c555241355a29d5f2f2f1385be5d4fb04f944576df51a01eca8155cf825d69a805ee4b0583bad1656e86485ee104db2f8f6820ad4b ACTIVATE YOUR MEMBERSHIP → Here’s a glance at what your membership privileges include: → Your very own personalized membership card → Access to exclusive news and updates → Special offers on discounted campaign merchandise → Insider glimpses with behind-the-scenes footage from the campaign trail → And much more... **But remember time is of the essence: this membership drive ends on August 23!** https://click.email.nikkihaley.com/?qs=536417f7de98c0fc7759d2c555241355a29d5f2f2f1385be5d4fb04f944576df51a01eca8155cf825d69a805ee4b0583bad1656e86485ee104db2f8f6820ad4b It would mean the world to know you are a part of my Ambassador’s Circle as I gear up for this debate. name: David Hogg
subject: Time to fix the system
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Their Future PAC
body:
| | | Hey, it’s David Hogg, gun safety advocate and co-founder of March For Our Lives.

Many of our elected officials can be described as one word: **_Cowards._**

Our kids, our planet, our freedoms, our democracy — are all under attack by far-right extremists, from the State House to the U.S. Senate, who are willing to let children be slaughtered at school and watch our planet burn for their own personal gain.

**We refuse to back down.**

There were many who said after Parkland that we couldn’t change anything because we were just a “bunch of kids.” But we proved them wrong — **we passed gun laws in a state owned by the NRA.**

There were many who said young people would never vote. But we proved them wrong in 2018 — _defeating more NRA backed politicians than ever before in U.S. history._ Then, in 2020, we defeated NRA puppet Donald Trump. **Both of these victories enabled us to pass the first federal gun law in 30 years.**

There were many who said Maxwell Frost, March For Our Lives' first National Organizing Director, could never be the first Gen Z Member of Congress. **But we proved them wrong, again.**

Badass young people have a habit of being underestimated — and I have a habit of scaring the shit out of Republicans by proving that, while we might be young, we are _powerful._

**That is why this week, myself and Kevin Lata, Maxwell Frost’s Campaign Manager and 2022 Campaign Manager of the Year, are launching Leaders We Deserve** — a grassroots organization dedicated to electing young leaders to Congress, and especially our State Legislatures, across the country to help defeat the far-right’s agenda and advance a progressive vision for the future. Leaders We Deserve will work in partnership with a stacked Advisory Board, including Maxwell Frost, Justin Jones, and other influential leaders.

**_[Are you in? Split a donation between Leaders We Deserve and Their Future PAC so we can win back our country and advance a progressive agenda.](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953yWqaAipSuLnSvVaNc1k1n-L5Q7FL_A_rYYIYrPP6hZKSpM1FZVLvn_mipnF5n7KFop44WSNEhTy-HQIR6YTcR5UBynsyKUtmcj0M2EynSjpwJevMpITx5OEJYFw0q8sw72p1OJZu8J5100FWeWJB7Yz6XDe-lsPsVaYjAoYgvg1vVURePs86DcPSV8lnBbV8jPSLLOyR574Dkq4EHsohS0mM2SAZyzpJFgBKIlBbOBsKqvKhL1Q2FlsaiulK7e80yQDLSB7thZjkkjdB_ZHy-dofo7nD8ThuF0Do2akSg-y6gBY9Q1d5F1hsvVMlVnCbqzdB4EFE8iyH1ghvci8h3_bjLLMgAh_SEiE1HxKIXLFMl1T_KuFFE5gO5vIoJr6IAajseAplvo2Fk1ECILutIy/3ym/BASgkagtTIWj028QsYhUxg/h0/0fmQPK1CkNS2hFdZeb58gRtloE3PrgJkcLLxfDn5k0Y)_**

| | [Donate >>](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953yWqaAipSuLnSvVaNc1k1n-L5Q7FL_A_rYYIYrPP6hZKSpM1FZVLvn_mipnF5n7KFop44WSNEhTy-HQIR6YTcR5UBynsyKUtmcj0M2EynSjpwJevMpITx5OEJYFw0q8sw6ZA3PxEYUxjVaJUoIlgP9jMD-MszhF6zZ6LYxJN74AbVrQKXkWgdFd1hyPS03CPUEAkD4_jNNZQY2wulU-7NiahXzmcB9xPxmvWt8NAPljrj8Whyucg57ULWFftSaZxmiNLhmuZtqwJI-QwAXfiCjShFh3R1PrHcXikhRJb8-Smkeb70FgnSwev2Y4VQq3G5w-dHFqsiqSB2rLO1ufeiRZSxQcQema6-QZ_OrdvWs3AeGbPNBFVAy9k-91SjXKmHwvH3aNt_owzg0FynrueISz/3ym/BASgkagtTIWj028QsYhUxg/h1/AMPltqsH3rP3uJQF7hRxGCX5aJePLISY4Vo3AdqR248)
---

Why is this important?

**Despite making up 45% of the electorate, Gen Z and Millennials only hold 21% of State Legislature seats.**

Conversely, Republicans have made significant investments in down-ballot races, leading to the absolute assault on our rights and freedoms that we’re seeing happen across states — from abortion bans to taking away LGBTQ+ rights to repealing life-saving common sense gun laws put into place after the Parkland shooting.

Our political system is stacked against us, but incredible young leaders have fought back and beat the odds to get elected to office. It’s time to take more young people from movements like March For Our Lives and elect them to office to be the leaders we deserve. **But grassroots support is what moves the needle, and it’s what we need from you.

_[Join us by splitting a donation of any amount between Leaders We Deserve and Their Future PAC this week.](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953yWqaAipSuLnSvVaNc1k1n-L5Q7FL_A_rYYIYrPP6hZKSpM1FZVLvn_mipnF5n7KFop44WSNEhTy-HQIR6YTcR5UBynsyKUtmcj0M2EynSjpwJevMpITx5OEJYFw0q8sw4bEG-nqr_gKD17RkhQ6itgHD_rWRFDTZmFWbuZbGK9rMQfeVt8Bwg0d_rf5GQruB_YYvM_EjCEPdWD2apAOSL5DPXZ0Ncv2tnRKyXKBfdwROUhwPBG8Y6efp4roAW143MImFMPZPfHDkqL_JkfcWDePCDbywcawBjlDPDjgRiDmIagu6kP5h2gjf8me1BtekGHeIJpK9C8uIsmNKXV6RM6SGddDbgUAPXpAk8tDXff0aSTQ0RbpOuhAkz_HMhb8EYZV_V_QxeqceedvoqZGHqG/3ym/BASgkagtTIWj028QsYhUxg/h2/UjeuMkD-rHEV0czir2Ow0TsiPeKzAGfEjOFn2GaQuPU)_**

So how are we going to fight back against the 50-year chess game conservative special interest groups have been manipulating?

**Leaders We Deserve will invest in young people, knock down barriers, and elect more young people to office. We’re doing this by:**
1. **Recruitment:** Identifying candidates who will have the biggest impact on their states (that's where the real work is happening).
2. **Providing Day-to-Day Support:** We’re helping campaigns build from the ground up and will work with them directly on fundraising, messaging, coalition building, voter contact, and volunteer recruitment.
3. **Volunteer Network:** Our grassroots volunteer army (that’s you) will have person-to-person conversations with voters all across a candidate’s district, advocating on their behalf.
4. **Running Paid Media Campaigns:** We’ll run well-funded independent expenditure programs.

But there’s a reason our political system favors those who are older, wealthier, and white — _running for office takes serious resources._

Which is one of the reasons I’m reaching out today. Young candidates aren’t seen as viable and often struggle to raise money. They have lower personal wealth and smaller donor networks.

**_[So I’m asking: Will you join our movement by splitting a donation between Leaders We Deserve and Their Future PAC this week?](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953yWqaAipSuLnSvVaNc1k1n-L5Q7FL_A_rYYIYrPP6hZKSpM1FZVLvn_mipnF5n7KFop44WSNEhTy-HQIR6YTcR5UBynsyKUtmcj0M2EynSjpwJevMpITx5OEJYFw0q8sw6ir6PdXiud_RgBNcVLq7pnTfw8M812UegXPP-zO2yiJa47CIPvpflAFsWpbB30p-Io0tP--WiAPROPsJPduF3y6NHRhvH20g5tsyKYG1bIswEIkLrd9AMJd52zAJlqNu0Hgo8I00tSxO7gnB91UBWwGtkNBHulGtAbXG4LdZQ_oKvdmZoE-ylH2qyPRjAbdnS7O5t4QHZQKx6mBuNeML676CX3wdwCFs8ZCqfFU9wz43xBYzcMIYkpUHtmb5ciTV4zWWmH17quXrQllSnhMSKg/3ym/BASgkagtTIWj028QsYhUxg/h3/jhT7vHbeLKRIgOagHy40EG_7325T5aCNyrZTVND04-A)_**

| [Donate >>](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953yWqaAipSuLnSvVaNc1k1n-L5Q7FL_A_rYYIYrPP6hZKSpM1FZVLvn_mipnF5n7KFop44WSNEhTy-HQIR6YTcR5UBynsyKUtmcj0M2EynSjpwJevMpITx5OEJYFw0q8sw5QXy6um_ZTw-pAwAHTH24oPUc9L3jIOUufz_qAv1L-xBuX_gTOjMEMYw9tt3XMChvkLJlywHj-ykmGbF4_gqKmY4oa0Sn7Qs1bkOzTa1tob4Iu3IkMCaA5F-yRRUtTEiDOG01xNKLbjkiCYQSHKXFpcLmbYXtYS0GERGYFv0ygA05CuUK2UiYv71NkcFC4DDQhXEGbKJSB5V749A7Iw1M_Z96n__IdiLQBF9KRB48_rSdLsCHXt_TdlrQSN-dka0ESGS8J_58vGMP5Ww0IaZzt/3ym/BASgkagtTIWj028QsYhUxg/h4/VjTXFHY5-leehAWeA1nKXA6075h_U9HawjHmtl0F-Lc)
---

There’s so much more I could say, but I’ll end with this — **we absolutely cannot do this work without you.

_[Please, consider joining us so we can defeat the far-right extremists who have taken over our communities and our nation — and elect the leaders we deserve.](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953yWqaAipSuLnSvVaNc1k1n-L5Q7FL_A_rYYIYrPP6hZKSpM1FZVLvn_mipnF5n7KFop44WSNEhTy-HQIR6YTcR5UBynsyKUtmcj0M2EynSjpwJevMpITx5OEJYFw0q8sw7EA0OJjRnA3ys-LsClvtkW5hyMuL1qviIQk5bzk1NYl-xVPH76rUaX3F2LNyCB4pMoVtT73O0QEU8skowsTbuPEckTlkz7rMLNgNlGWVKgrlMt5-HyAdLLFmCbl-rezQEa7wmdyxjueXPQ-Scjd_EcjHQzSZD2bOEinoI56_3NF0_Ans5q2P0k7u8ETonPRlXVkJmfJuzscGvxQ-ZHbhQSQVy73WNTQ_5ngW-0ArBkXTMVr6FvBQ4WlGdlYZ6VSsjJ6FWf0-hEEiov-OWB3lvn/3ym/BASgkagtTIWj028QsYhUxg/h5/koiruZ7Qxu7alerzyDMySSzdAwOqCGK31gYvzCNW4Ms)_**

Thank you.

More soon,

David Hogg
Co-founder
Leaders We Deserve

clean_body: | | | Hey, it’s David Hogg, gun safety advocate and co-founder of March For Our Lives. Many of our elected officials can be described as one word: Cowards. Our kids, our planet, our freedoms, our democracy — are all under attack by far-right extremists, from the State House to the U.S. Senate, who are willing to let children be slaughtered at school and watch our planet burn for their own personal gain. We refuse to back down. There were many who said after Parkland that we couldn’t change anything because we were just a “bunch of kids.” But we proved them wrong — we passed gun laws in a state owned by the NRA. There were many who said young people would never vote. But we proved them wrong in 2018 — defeating more NRA backed politicians than ever before in U.S. history. Then, in 2020, we defeated NRA puppet Donald Trump. Both of these victories enabled us to pass the first federal gun law in 30 years. There were many who said Maxwell Frost, March For Our Lives' first National Organizing Director, could never be the first Gen Z Member of Congress. But we proved them wrong, again. Badass young people have a habit of being underestimated — and I have a habit of scaring the shit out of Republicans by proving that, while we might be young, we are powerful. That is why this week, myself and Kevin Lata, Maxwell Frost’s Campaign Manager and 2022 Campaign Manager of the Year, are launching Leaders We Deserve — a grassroots organization dedicated to electing young leaders to Congress, and especially our State Legislatures, across the country to help defeat the far-right’s agenda and advance a progressive vision for the future. Leaders We Deserve will work in partnership with a stacked Advisory Board, including Maxwell Frost, Justin Jones, and other influential leaders. | | Why is this important? Despite making up 45% of the electorate, Gen Z and Millennials only hold 21% of State Legislature seats. Conversely, Republicans have made significant investments in down-ballot races, leading to the absolute assault on our rights and freedoms that we’re seeing happen across states — from abortion bans to taking away LGBTQ+ rights to repealing life-saving common sense gun laws put into place after the Parkland shooting. Our political system is stacked against us, but incredible young leaders have fought back and beat the odds to get elected to office. It’s time to take more young people from movements like March For Our Lives and elect them to office to be the leaders we deserve. But grassroots support is what moves the needle, and it’s what we need from you. So how are we going to fight back against the 50-year chess game conservative special interest groups have been manipulating? Leaders We Deserve will invest in young people, knock down barriers, and elect more young people to office. We’re doing this by: 1. Recruitment: Identifying candidates who will have the biggest impact on their states (that's where the real work is happening). 2. Providing Day-to-Day Support: We’re helping campaigns build from the ground up and will work with them directly on fundraising, messaging, coalition building, voter contact, and volunteer recruitment. 3. Volunteer Network: Our grassroots volunteer army (that’s you) will have person-to-person conversations with voters all across a candidate’s district, advocating on their behalf. 4. Running Paid Media Campaigns: We’ll run well-funded independent expenditure programs. But there’s a reason our political system favors those who are older, wealthier, and white — running for office takes serious resources. Which is one of the reasons I’m reaching out today. Young candidates aren’t seen as viable and often struggle to raise money. They have lower personal wealth and smaller donor networks. | There’s so much more I could say, but I’ll end with this — we absolutely cannot do this work without you. Thank you. More soon, David Hogg Co-founder Leaders We Deserve Their Future PAC is solely focused on mobilizing resources and support for leaders and lawmakers who pledge to put the needs of children first in policy decisions. Our focus areas are: → Climate action → Quality education → Affordable healthcare → Sensible gun legislation → Ending child hunger and poverty → Strengthening democracy by protecting voting rights We’re powered by grassroots donations from people like you, so ** | | Paid for by Their Future PAC | | Sent via . subject: NEW: Francis Suarez's Visit to the US Southern Border
disclaimer_text: Paid for by SOS America PAC
body:
Conservative Miami Mayor Francis Suarez will solve the Biden Border Crisis! | | | | | |
---
[](https://sosamericapac.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1a1f6b88a8616d1a2e3589575&id=06dc91296c&e=9562ca5d98)
|
---
Peter,
**Conservative Miami Mayor Francis Suarez, will solve the Biden Border Crisis!** Our country needs leaders who are both serious and committed to fixing this problem. As President Francis Suarez will shut down the drug cartels, crack down on human trafficking, and finish the border wall!
| [SECURE THE BORDER!](https://sosamericapac.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1a1f6b88a8616d1a2e3589575&id=7d7701a92d&e=9562ca5d98)
---
Last year U.S. Customs and Border Protection encountered [**2.4 million unauthorized**](https://sosamericapac.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1a1f6b88a8616d1a2e3589575&id=4c3aa77f0f&e=9562ca5d98) migrants at our Southwest border, almost five times the approximately 450,000 encountered during 2020. **Who’s responsible for this BORDER CRISIS? The Biden Administration! **Immigration to the United States should be legal, orderly, and compatible with our economy. It’s time for an American President to communicate this to our citizens and to our neighbors in the Americas — in English — and in Spanish.
[](https://sosamericapac.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1a1f6b88a8616d1a2e3589575&id=cedfef0a0d&e=9562ca5d98)
**America needs help NOW at the Southern Border, and that’s why Conservative Miami Mayor Francis Suarez is running for President.** SOS America Pac will be hosting Mayor Suarez at a series of grassroots events at the U.S. Southern Border in Texas TODAY, Thursday, August 10th. These interactions will provide valuable insights and help shape his understanding of the border issues.
For more information, please visit: [www.sosamericapac.org](https://sosamericapac.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1a1f6b88a8616d1a2e3589575&id=64e0e285ec&e=9562ca5d98)
| [DONATE $25](https://sosamericapac.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1a1f6b88a8616d1a2e3589575&id=8e79c266e1&e=9562ca5d98)
---
[](https://sosamericapac.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1a1f6b88a8616d1a2e3589575&id=50f6959611&e=9562ca5d98)
Conservative Miami Mayor Francis Suarez is the son of Cuban immigrants who fled Communist Cuba for a better life in America.
After serving as a Miami City Commissioner, he became the first Miami-born Mayor of the city in 2017.
Mayor Suarez is a fierce advocate for law and order, fiscal responsibility, and pro-business policies. He upholds conservative principles and advocates for the well-being of his constituents. Under his leadership, Miami has undergone a significant transformation, serving as a model for the rest of the country.

| [DONATE NOW!](https://sosamericapac.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1a1f6b88a8616d1a2e3589575&id=f816d1e82b&e=9562ca5d98)

name: Tom Fitton
subject: We Are Fighting for You!
body:
We forced the release of stunning records from the U.S. Air Force Academy that address Critical Race Theory, as well as "white privilege" and Black Lives Matter.

| | |
---
|
---
|
---
| Dear Fellow American,

I just love telling our members what their contributions to Judicial Watch do for America.
And believe me, [if you will give us your support today](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=64545&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPU1heSZ1dG1fdGVybT1Ob24tRG9ub3Jz&hash=a27e3dffa06e173a0004e320eb691911825abcdbc43a80e551b7336d53a8f580), we can accomplish even more!
| [Contribute](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=64545&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPU1heSZ1dG1fdGVybT1Ob24tRG9ub3Jz&hash=a27e3dffa06e173a0004e320eb691911825abcdbc43a80e551b7336d53a8f580)
---

Thanks to our faithful members, we are fighting successfully for the rule of law. Here are some recent examples of how we put our members’ contributions to work:

* **We keep digging to get to _all_ the facts about _all_ aspects of Biden family corruption.**

Judicial Watch has been "on the case" about Biden family corruption since 2020, and we are currently pursuing multiple lawsuits on corruption-related issues ranging from influence-peddling in China and Ukraine, to Joe Biden's secret U.S. Senate records. _We_ _will continue to uncover the rot of corruption in the Biden presidency_!

* **We continue to successfully use federal courts to help keep our elections honest**.

We settled our federal election integrity lawsuit on behalf of the **Illinois Conservative Union** against the **Illinois State Board of****Elections** to now grant public access to the list of the state's registered voters for the past 15 elections...a critically important step toward ensuring its accuracy. Cleaner voter rolls mean cleaner elections, and **_Illinois_** _voters now have the needed transparency to ensure their elections are cleaner and more honest_...

...while in **Maine** , we filed an _amicus curiae_ ("friend of the court") brief supporting a U.S. district court decision that struck down the state's policy restricting the use and distribution of **Maine 's **voter registration list. _Just as we did in**Illinois** , we assert that federal law mandates voter roll transparency_!

No other group matches Judicial Watch's track record and expertise when it comes to bringing pressure on states to conform to do what federal law requires to keep our elections honest. And right now, our election integrity team are pouring through new electoral data, and preparing new "warning" notices to states that appear not to be in compliance with federal election law... _stay tuned_!

[Contribute](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=64545&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPU1heSZ1dG1fdGVybT1Ob24tRG9ub3Jz&hash=a27e3dffa06e173a0004e320eb691911825abcdbc43a80e551b7336d53a8f580)
---

* **We continue to fight to uncover the full truth about U.S. taxpayer dollars being used to support work in China that may have fueled the Covid pandemic.**

We sued the Department of Homeland Security for records and communications related to a $2 million grant awarded by DHS's Ground Truth Network to EcoHealth Alliance, a company which is implicated in "gain-of-function" coronavirus research at the infamous Wuhan Institute for Virology and elsewhere in China, the source of the Covid pandemic.

You can rely on Judicial Watch to keep fighting **_against_** U.S. government secrecy and **_for_** the American people's "right to know!"

Whether it is our **election integrity work** ...our **exposing Biden family corruption** ...or getting to the truth about **U.S. government funding of disastrous "research" in****China** ...**[it is the commitment](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=64545&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPU1heSZ1dG1fdGVybT1Ob24tRG9ub3Jz&hash=a27e3dffa06e173a0004e320eb691911825abcdbc43a80e551b7336d53a8f580)** of patriotic Americans that enables us to better dig in for the long haul!

[Contribute](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=64545&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPU1heSZ1dG1fdGVybT1Ob24tRG9ub3Jz&hash=a27e3dffa06e173a0004e320eb691911825abcdbc43a80e551b7336d53a8f580)
---

During this summer season, I hope you will considersupporting us with [a special tax-deductible donation](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=64545&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPU1heSZ1dG1fdGVybT1Ob24tRG9ub3Jz&hash=a27e3dffa06e173a0004e320eb691911825abcdbc43a80e551b7336d53a8f580). Your gift now will help us stay on track with all our research and litigation...** _at a time when we are carrying perhaps the most important largest caseload in our 29-year history_!**

**Thank you in adavance** , Judicial Watch in the fight for the rule of law and battling public corruption and government secrecy. [Your decision today to join with us will help us increase our impact in the future.](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=64545&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPU1heSZ1dG1fdGVybT1Ob24tRG9ub3Jz&hash=a27e3dffa06e173a0004e320eb691911825abcdbc43a80e551b7336d53a8f580)

Sincerely,

Thomas Fitton
President

[Contribute](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=64545&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPU1heSZ1dG1fdGVybT1Ob24tRG9ub3Jz&hash=a27e3dffa06e173a0004e320eb691911825abcdbc43a80e551b7336d53a8f580)

## Why Chris Christie:

Chris Christie is a proven leader who fearlessly tells it like it is. As a successful governor in a blue state with a track record of real accomplishments, Christie has consistently confronted challenging issues head-on, making difficult decisions without hesitation. To ensure a conservative Republican victory in the 2024 presidential election, we deserve an open, honest debate that focuses on critical issues. Governor Christie's voice at the debates will ensure our party engages in the robust, direct, truth-telling conversation we need to start winning again. Join us in supporting Chris Christie's candidacy for president and ensuring his direct, no-nonsense agenda at the RNC-sponsored presidential debates. Your participation is vital in making this happen. Sign up today to "Tell It Like It Is" and help our party and country select a president we can all be proud of. Together, we can shape a brighter future for America.

name: GA House Democrats
subject: Firing teachers for reading books.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Georgia Blue PAC
body:
Peter,

A Georgia teacher was faced with a public termination hearing for reading a book to her class. You can hear in her own words why she read My Shadow is Purple to her classroom:

https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=NtSc6vXr9A0&t=8s [https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=NtSc6vXr9A0&t=8s]

In 2022, the GOP-lead legislature passed three censorship laws designed to shut down diversity in learning. The law being used to fire Katie Rinderle is the so-called “divisive concepts” ban, formally known as the Protect Students’ Rights Act. Yet even the school district trying to fire her admits that they have no definition of what a “divisive concept” represents.

You can help stop this infuriating destruction of our education system. How? By chipping in $25 to support our efforts to restore a blue majority to the Georgia House, as we recruit the best candidates to run in 2024.

Donate today: [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/teachertribunal?refcode=080223_TeacherTrib_link]

Let’s make sure no Georgia student is left behind and no teacher is fired for reading a book.

Give $25 today [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/teachertribunal?refcode=080223_TeacherTrib_button1]

Onwards,
Georgia House Democrats

The Georgia House Democratic Caucus is Georgia’s most diverse group of leaders working on the ground in Georgia every day to flip the State House and secure a blue Georgia. To create the change we need, we’ll need all the help we can get. Will you join the movement for a blue Georgia by donating today?

DONATE TODAY! [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/teachertribunal?refcode=080223_TeacherTrib_button2]

Paid for by Georgia Blue PAC

PO Box 18622
Atlanta, GA 31126
United States

Fellow Conservative,

It’s Sheriff Mark Lamb with an invitation to set a reminder in your phone for August 6th, 2024. It’s an important date not just for me personally, but also for the people of Arizona because next year on August 6th, Arizona voters will nominate one Democrat and one Republican to faceoff in our state’s upcoming Senate election.

name: David Hogg
subject: Announcing Leaders We Deserve:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Democrats Win Seats PAC
body:
| Hey Peter, it’s David Hogg, gun safety advocate and co-founder of March For Our Lives.

Many of our elected officials can be described as one word: **_Cowards._**

Our kids, our planet, our freedoms, our democracy — are all under attack by far-right extremists, from the State House to the U.S. Senate, who are willing to let children be slaughtered at school and watch our planet burn for their own personal gain.

**We refuse to back down.**

There were many who said after Parkland that we couldn’t change anything because we were just a “bunch of kids.” But we proved them wrong — **we passed gun laws in a state owned by the NRA.**

There were many who said young people would never vote. But we proved them wrong in 2018 — _defeating more NRA backed politicians than ever before in U.S. history._ Then, in 2020, we defeated NRA puppet Donald Trump. **Both of these victories enabled us to pass the first federal gun law in 30 years.**

There were many who said Maxwell Frost, March For Our Lives' first National Organizing Director, could never be the first Gen Z Member of Congress. **But we proved them wrong, again.**

Badass young people have a habit of being underestimated — and I have a habit of scaring the shit out of Republicans by proving that, while we might be young, we are _powerful._

**That is why today, myself and Kevin Lata, Maxwell Frost’s Campaign Manager and 2022 Campaign Manager of the Year, are launching Leaders We Deserve** — a grassroots organization dedicated to electing young leaders to Congress, and especially our State Legislatures, across the country to help defeat the far-right’s agenda and advance a progressive vision for the future. Leaders We Deserve will work in partnership with a stacked Advisory Board, including Maxwell Frost, Justin Jones, and other influential leaders.

**_[Are you in? Split a donation between Leaders We Deserve and Democrats Win Seats so we can win back our country and advance a progressive agenda.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67875819/421171491/-1896636305?amount=25&refcode=EM_NBI_DWSPAC_20230810_FR_1.1_0_WL_hogg_NA_NA_hoggsplit.rs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzkvMS84ODcwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZTJkN2NjYS05MjM3LWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-kCvBNY3L4viu6oO8lu8Rh3IQ-bajY48CB5PHFxFHn0=)_** | | **[Donate>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67875822/421171495/-1896636305?amount=25&refcode=EM_NBI_DWSPAC_20230810_FR_1.1_0_WL_hogg_NA_NA_hoggsplit.rs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzkvMS84ODcwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZTJkN2NjYS05MjM3LWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-kCvBNY3L4viu6oO8lu8Rh3IQ-bajY48CB5PHFxFHn0=)**
---
Why is this important?

**Despite making up 45% of the electorate, Gen Z and Millennials only hold 21% of State Legislature seats.**

Conversely, Republicans have made significant investments in down-ballot races, leading to the absolute assault on our rights and freedoms that we’re seeing happen across states — from abortion bans to taking away LGBTQ+ rights to repealing life-saving common sense gun laws put into place after the Parkland shooting.

Our political system is stacked against us, but incredible young leaders have fought back and beat the odds to get elected to office. It’s time to take more young people from movements like March For Our Lives and elect them to office to be the leaders we deserve. **But grassroots support is what moves the needle, and it’s what we need from you today.**

**_[Join us by splitting a donation of any amount between Leaders We Deserve and Democrats Win Seats today.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67875825/421171498/-1896636305?amount=25&refcode=EM_NBI_DWSPAC_20230810_FR_1.1_0_WL_hogg_NA_NA_hoggsplit.rs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzkvMS84ODcwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZTJkN2NjYS05MjM3LWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-kCvBNY3L4viu6oO8lu8Rh3IQ-bajY48CB5PHFxFHn0=)_**

So how are we going to fight back against the 50-year chess game conservative special interest groups have been manipulating?

**Leaders We Deserve will invest in young people, knock down barriers, and elect more young people to office. We’re doing this by:**
1. **Recruitment:** Identifying candidates who will have the biggest impact on their states (that's where the real work is happening).
2. **Providing Day-to-Day Support:** We’re helping campaigns build from the ground up and will work with them directly on fundraising, messaging, coalition building, voter contact, and volunteer recruitment.
3. **Volunteer Network:** Our grassroots volunteer army (that’s you, team) will have person-to-person conversations with voters all across a candidate’s district, advocating on their behalf.
4. **Running Paid Media Campaigns:** We’ll run well-funded independent expenditure programs.

But there’s a reason our political system favors those who are older, wealthier, and white — _running for office takes serious resources._

Which is one of the reasons I’m reaching out today. Young candidates aren’t seen as viable and often struggle to raise money. They have lower personal wealth and smaller donor networks.

**_[So I’m asking: Will you join our movement by splitting a donation between Leaders We Deserve and Democrats Win Seats today?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67875828/421171501/-1896636305?amount=25&refcode=EM_NBI_DWSPAC_20230810_FR_1.1_0_WL_hogg_NA_NA_hoggsplit.rs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzkvMS84ODcwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZTJkN2NjYS05MjM3LWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-kCvBNY3L4viu6oO8lu8Rh3IQ-bajY48CB5PHFxFHn0=)_**
| **[DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67875832/421171504/-1896636305?amount=25&refcode=EM_NBI_DWSPAC_20230810_FR_1.1_0_WL_hogg_NA_NA_hoggsplit.rs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzkvMS84ODcwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZTJkN2NjYS05MjM3LWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-kCvBNY3L4viu6oO8lu8Rh3IQ-bajY48CB5PHFxFHn0=)**
---
There’s so much more I could say, but I’ll end with this — **we absolutely cannot do this work without you.**

**_[Please, consider joining us so we can defeat the far-right extremists who have taken over our communities and our nation — and elect the leaders we deserve.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67875836/421171509/-1896636305?amount=25&refcode=EM_NBI_DWSPAC_20230810_FR_1.1_0_WL_hogg_NA_NA_hoggsplit.rs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzkvMS84ODcwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZTJkN2NjYS05MjM3LWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-kCvBNY3L4viu6oO8lu8Rh3IQ-bajY48CB5PHFxFHn0=)_**

Thank you.

More soon,

David Hogg
Co-founder

clean_body: | Hey Peter, it’s David Hogg, gun safety advocate and co-founder of March For Our Lives. Many of our elected officials can be described as one word: Cowards. Our kids, our planet, our freedoms, our democracy — are all under attack by far-right extremists, from the State House to the U.S. Senate, who are willing to let children be slaughtered at school and watch our planet burn for their own personal gain. We refuse to back down. There were many who said after Parkland that we couldn’t change anything because we were just a “bunch of kids.” But we proved them wrong — we passed gun laws in a state owned by the NRA. There were many who said young people would never vote. But we proved them wrong in 2018 — defeating more NRA backed politicians than ever before in U.S. history. Then, in 2020, we defeated NRA puppet Donald Trump. Both of these victories enabled us to pass the first federal gun law in 30 years. There were many who said Maxwell Frost, March For Our Lives' first National Organizing Director, could never be the first Gen Z Member of Congress. But we proved them wrong, again. Badass young people have a habit of being underestimated — and I have a habit of scaring the shit out of Republicans by proving that, while we might be young, we are powerful. That is why today, myself and Kevin Lata, Maxwell Frost’s Campaign Manager and 2022 Campaign Manager of the Year, are launching Leaders We Deserve — a grassroots organization dedicated to electing young leaders to Congress, and especially our State Legislatures, across the country to help defeat the far-right’s agenda and advance a progressive vision for the future. Leaders We Deserve will work in partnership with a stacked Advisory Board, including Maxwell Frost, Justin Jones, and other influential leaders. = | | = Why is this important? Despite making up 45% of the electorate, Gen Z and Millennials only hold 21% of State Legislature seats. Conversely, Republicans have made significant investments in down-ballot races, leading to the absolute assault on our rights and freedoms that we’re seeing happen across states — from abortion bans to taking away LGBTQ+ rights to repealing life-saving common sense gun laws put into place after the Parkland shooting. Our political system is stacked against us, but incredible young leaders have fought back and beat the odds to get elected to office. It’s time to take more young people from movements like March For Our Lives and elect them to office to be the leaders we deserve. But grassroots support is what moves the needle, and it’s what we need from you today. = So how are we going to fight back against the 50-year chess game conservative special interest groups have been manipulating? Leaders We Deserve will invest in young people, knock down barriers, and elect more young people to office. We’re doing this by: 1. Recruitment: Identifying candidates who will have the biggest impact on their states (that's where the real work is happening). 2. Providing Day-to-Day Support: We’re helping campaigns build from the ground up and will work with them directly on fundraising, messaging, coalition building, voter contact, and volunteer recruitment. 3. Volunteer Network: Our grassroots volunteer army (that’s you, team) will have person-to-person conversations with voters all across a candidate’s district, advocating on their behalf. 4. Running Paid Media Campaigns: We’ll run well-funded independent expenditure programs. But there’s a reason our political system favors those who are older, wealthier, and white — running for office takes serious resources. Which is one of the reasons I’m reaching out today. Young candidates aren’t seen as viable and often struggle to raise money. They have lower personal wealth and smaller donor networks. = | = There’s so much more I could say, but I’ll end with this — we absolutely cannot do this work without you. = Thank you. More soon, David Hogg Co-founder Leaders We Deserve | = | = Paid for by Democrats Win Seats PAC Democrats Win Seats PAC 315 INSPIRATION LANE GAITHERSBURG, MD 20878 United States **

name: Jason Crow
subject: Time and time again
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jason Crow for Congress

#

Team, Exactly one year ago today, President Biden signed the PACT Act into law. This was a historic step toward supporting our servicemembers. The PACT Act marks the largest expansion of benefits and services for veterans exposed to toxins in more than 30 years — which the DOD says could help as many as **_3.5 million people._** I have seen the effects of being exposed to burn pits and toxic chemicals. Soldiers I served alongside in Iraq and Afghanistan need care — which is why I pushed hard to pass this legislation. Unfortunately, not everyone agrees. Extremist Republicans, including Lauren Boebert and Marjorie Taylor Greene, refused to vote for the PACT Act — _even while they praise our veterans on Twitter._ It’s not just this legislation either. MAGA Republicans have shown time and time again that they’re willing to put party over people — even at the expense of our veterans. Donald Trump calling servicemembers who’ve died in war “suckers'' and “losers.” House Republicans hijacking a bipartisan defense bill to insert their right-wing agenda. **Our servicemembers deserve better than to be used as political pawns.** **[I'm ready to continue working to give my fellow veterans the respect, care, and benefits they fought for. name: Nirali, Deputy Finance Director
subject: Do you have a moment for me to introduce myself?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY LATEEFAH FOR CONGRESS
body:
I know, it’s easy to forget real people are behind our campaign work. That’s why I wanted to take a moment to introduce myself.
# [](https://act.lateefahsimon.com/go/39?t=1&akid=85%2E1163%2ELUVZes)
Hey my name is Nirali and I’m the Deputy Finance Director on Lateefah Simon’s campaign for Congress. 👋🏽👋🏽👋🏽
You’ve probably heard from me before as I’ve talked through just how important grassroots donations are to our campaign, broken down our fundraising deadlines, and explained, through the numbers, exactly where our campaign stands.
Now, I figured it’s about time you learned a little bit more about the person crunching the numbers. But I wouldn’t be the Deputy Finance Director if I didn’t quickly tell you about our fundraising and [**ask you to chip in (****_sorry not sorry_****🤷 🏽♀️)**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/20230810?amount=10&refcode=em20230810&refcode2=85_1163_LUVZes&akid=85%2E1163%2ELUVZes)[.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/20230810?amount=10&refcode=em20230810&refcode2=85_1163_LUVZes&akid=85%2E1163%2ELUVZes)
I’m always looking at the entire picture. I see the numbers, the projections, and the donations coming into our campaign in real time. Here’s what the numbers are telling me today: **it’s no exaggeration to say** **we’re in a summer slump.**
**The dreaded “summer slump” happens to all campaigns.** Folks don’t give as often because they are spending time outside, taking time off — generally paying a little less attention to emails like this one and campaigns like Lateefah’s.
I get it! **But the** **summer slump has the potential to stifle our momentum and we can’t afford that****. Trust me, it’s my job to manage what we can and can’t afford...**
[**So that’s why I’m asking if you can donate $15 right now. A contribution of any amount today will help ensure that we have the resources we need to take us through our summer slump and to make our campaign ambitions a reality.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/20230810?amount=10&refcode=em20230810&refcode2=85_1163_LUVZes&akid=85%2E1163%2ELUVZes)
**[Donate $15 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/20230810?amount=10&refcode=em20230810&refcode2=85_1163_LUVZes&akid=85%2E1163%2ELUVZes)**
Now that I’ve told you about where we stand (_that’s my job!_), let me tell you a little bit about me!
* I'm a child of two Indian immigrants, and a proud first generation Indian-American. ❤️
* In college, I majored in Computer Science & Economics — although I spent most of my time distracted as Student Body President. 😅
* I was born in Texas, but my heart has belonged to California since the moment I stepped foot in the state. And I _love_ the East Bay — its progressive mindset, empathetic commitment to its communities, and beautiful weather (even when it’s foggy) have totally captured my heart.

**You may be wondering, how I — a Texas girl by birth — end up in California politics?**
The answer is simple: **Lateefah**. Her story is one of perseverance — the grit and determination she shows in the face of adversity is genuinely inspiring.
_In fact, I actually left my corporate job to work for Lateefah_ because I **KNOW** she is the next face of CA politics: a progressive voice who has proven her ability to rise to the challenge of leadership.
**That’s how passionate I am about Lateefah and this campaign.** I’m betting on her because of her groundbreaking ideas and her track record of winning change for the communities that others overlook. I don’t say this lightly but — Lateefah is a visionary when it comes to creating policy that actually changes lives.
I love being able to champion Lateefah and I am so excited to see her change the world — and with people like you and me behind her, I know that she’ll win this race, and have the chance to make real, earth shattering change!
I hope that my story resonates with you. And I hope you believe in Lateefah like I do.
[**If you want to see Lateefah create transformative change in Congress, please consider donating****$15 or anything you can to our campaign today. It’s no exaggeration to say we’re people-powered and in times like this where our fundraising is down, donations of any amount make a real difference in turning the tide.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/20230810?amount=10&refcode=em20230810&refcode2=85_1163_LUVZes&akid=85%2E1163%2ELUVZes)
**[Donate $15 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/20230810?amount=10&refcode=em20230810&refcode2=85_1163_LUVZes&akid=85%2E1163%2ELUVZes)**
Thank you,
Nirali
Deputy Finance Director
Lateefah for Congress
* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ls-em-wrapper?refcode=em20230810&t=2&refcode2=85_1163_LUVZes&akid=85%2E1163%2ELUVZes)**

* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.lateefahsimon.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=85%2E1163%2ELUVZes)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.lateefahsimon.com/signup/update-your-information/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.lateefahsimon.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=4&akid=85%2E1163%2ELUVZes)

Lateefah for Congress
1714 Franklin St #100 - 438,
Oakland, CA, 94612
Email us: [info@lateefahsimon.com](mailto:info@lateefahsimon.com)
PAID FOR BY LATEEFAH FOR CONGRESS
clean_body: I know, it’s easy to forget real people are behind our campaign work. That’s why I wanted to take a moment to introduce myself. Hey my name is Nirali and I’m the Deputy Finance Director on Lateefah Simon’s campaign for Congress. 👋🏽👋🏽👋🏽 You’ve probably heard from me before as I’ve talked through just how important grassroots donations are to our campaign, broken down our fundraising deadlines, and explained, through the numbers, exactly where our campaign stands. Now, I figured it’s about time you learned a little bit more about the person crunching the numbers. But I wouldn’t be the Deputy Finance Director if I didn’t quickly tell you about our fundraising and I’m always looking at the entire picture. I see the numbers, the projections, and the donations coming into our campaign in real time. Here’s what the numbers are telling me today: it’s no exaggeration to say we’re in a summer slump. The dreaded “summer slump” happens to all campaigns. Folks don’t give as often because they are spending time outside, taking time off — generally paying a little less attention to emails like this one and campaigns like Lateefah’s. I get it! But the summer slump has the potential to stifle our momentum and we can’t afford that. Trust me, it’s my job to manage what we can and can’t afford... Now that I’ve told you about where we stand (that’s my job!), let me tell you a little bit about me! I'm a child of two Indian immigrants, and a proud first generation Indian-American. ❤️ In college, I majored in Computer Science & Economics — although I spent most of my time distracted as Student Body President. 😅 I was born in Texas, but my heart has belonged to California since the moment I stepped foot in the state. And I love the East Bay — its progressive mindset, empathetic commitment to its communities, and beautiful weather (even when it’s foggy) have totally captured my heart. You may be wondering, how I — a Texas girl by birth — end up in California politics? The answer is simple: Lateefah. Her story is one of perseverance — the grit and determination she shows in the face of adversity is genuinely inspiring. In fact, I actually left my corporate job to work for Lateefah because I KNOW she is the next face of CA politics: a progressive voice who has proven her ability to rise to the challenge of leadership. That’s how passionate I am about Lateefah and this campaign. I’m betting on her because of her groundbreaking ideas and her track record of winning change for the communities that others overlook. I don’t say this lightly but — Lateefah is a visionary when it comes to creating policy that actually changes lives. I love being able to champion Lateefah and I am so excited to see her change the world — and with people like you and me behind her, I know that she’ll win this race, and have the chance to make real, earth shattering change! I hope that my story resonates with you. And I hope you believe in Lateefah like I do. Thank you, Nirali Deputy Finance Director Lateefah for Congress

# Dean Carucci, CEO of the Portsmouth Regional Hospital and Market President, HCA New England
---
In this episode, Dr. Mansharamani speaks with Dean Carucci, Market President for HCA New England and CEO of the Portsmouth Regional Hospital, about his career path from an internal auditor in Nashville to the head of a major healthcare operation. Dean shares his love of ostrich and redwine as well as the Lenox Hill miniseries. And of course, he reflects on how he navigated the uncertainty of running a hospital through COVID. His advice for navigating uncertainty: slow the field of play down to gain perspective.
Tune in to the conversation via the links below!
---
---
|
---
PRIOR EPISODES ALL AVAILABLE ON DEMAND!
For those who missed the prior episodes of NAVIGATING UNCERTAINTY, have no fear! They're all available on demand via the links below. As you sit in traffic during your weekend trips, tune in and use the opportunity to learn about some fascinating people as well as some of the most important topics of our times!
You'll find my conversations with GOP Presidential Candidate Doug Burgum, Jack Heath, Host of Good Morning New Hampshire, John Formella, Attorney General of New Hampshire, Dean Kamen, Founder of DEKA Research, Donald Kreis, Consumer Advocate for the State of NH, Jeremy Hitchcock, Founder of Dyn and Executive Chairman of Minim, Phil Taub, Partner at NixonPeabody and Co-Founder of SWIM WITH A MISSION, Morgan Ortagus, Former Spokesperson for the State Department, David Jordan, Founder of Seven Hills Foundation, John Avlon, Senior Political Analyst at CNN, Derek Leathers, Chairman & CEO of Werner Enterprises, Rudy Glocker, Founder of Burgeon Outdoor, former US Senator Kelly Ayotte, NCUA Vice Chair Kyle Hauptman, Miami Mayor Francis Suarez, NH Governor Chris Sununu, NH Education Czar Frank Edelblut, Commissioner of Business and Economic Affairs Taylor Caswell, GOP Presidential Candidate Vivek Ramaswamy, former Commander of NORAD and Retired Four Star General Lori Robinson, and former Chair of House Permanent Select Committee on Intelligence Mike Rogers.

Navigating Uncertainty is a show in which acclaimed global trend-watcher and futurist [Vikram Mansharamani](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0016K7ohtQ8UyR0DFaNyO9UAZbwWUJs5PBHbrT2CIL-Ia_airLvxwULJMHl-BDzGde4cF89h2A8RYYw_2M56_L4GlgNMR7y374fwc34C--7ewKrE9zVpsYnQXDnBCYnP_AODhO9KQfNtF4CAqOhYB-QBw==&c=SCb9kY9zFVpaFyxeW5hn2XbmhMx4YGZOVl1olPDrRL3_jdq2hQrPtA==&ch=uiNgNJ6bzD45SEk3eAAvPcoD0atyhooGuHdQqXpiCfD7rjyYJiQ0iA==) dives into how leaders make decisions. Through long-form conversations that move beyond sound-bites, Dr. Mansharamani explores how some of the most successful people think about tough choices. Serious, irreverent, entertaining, heart-warming, and occasionally tear-jerking, Navigating Uncertainty offers listeners bite-sized authentic biographies of high-impact leaders from all walks of life.Weekly episodes are released every Thursday via Apple Podcast, Spotify and everywhere podcasts are generally available!

To learn more about Dr. Mansharamani, please visit his website at [www.mansharamani.com](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0016K7ohtQ8UyR0DFaNyO9UAZbwWUJs5PBHbrT2CIL-Ia_airLvxwULJMHl-BDzGde4cF89h2A8RYYw_2M56_L4GlgNMR7y374fwc34C--7ewKrE9zVpsYnQXDnBCYnP_AODhO9KQfNtF4CAqOhYB-QBw==&c=SCb9kY9zFVpaFyxeW5hn2XbmhMx4YGZOVl1olPDrRL3_jdq2hQrPtA==&ch=uiNgNJ6bzD45SEk3eAAvPcoD0atyhooGuHdQqXpiCfD7rjyYJiQ0iA==).
Dr. Mansharamani is also planning to launch an occasional newsletter this summer. name: Shamaine Daniels
subject: It's your turn
body:
Can you take a minute to complete our online survey? I want to hear about the issues that matter to you!
https://docs.google.com/forms/d/1OM6UOiuiFlY9FETJ_1nWwP9r-3psF1YrMjz4LDFdOGU/viewform?pli=1&chromeless=1&pli=1&edit_requested=true [https://docs.google.com/forms/d/1OM6UOiuiFlY9FETJ_1nWwP9r-3psF1YrMjz4LDFdOGU/viewform?pli=1&chromeless=1&pli=1&edit_requested=true]
Dear Friend,
My campaign has been working hard to tell you about me, our race in, and my opponent, Scott Perry. Now, it's YOUR turn. We're asking you to take a moment to complete our online survey so we can learn more about the issues that matter to you .
Being a member of Congress is about representing my district, and the American people. In fact, my opponent may be surprised to learn that is isn't about him (or me), it's about YOU.
Whether you live in PA-10 or not, you are a member of our team, and your life will be impacted by the decisions made in the U.S. House of Representatives. Your opinion matters to me, and I really hope you'll take the time to complete out survey!
You can access the survey by clicking here. [https://docs.google.com/forms/d/1OM6UOiuiFlY9FETJ_1nWwP9r-3psF1YrMjz4LDFdOGU/viewform?pli=1&chromeless=1&pli=1&edit_requested=true]
Don't worry, this is NOT a trick. The link takes you to a survey and not a donation page.
Thank you in advance for taking the survey, I look forward to receiving the results and learning more about what matters most to my constituents and supporters!
Thank you!
Shamaine
If you would like to make a contribution to support the campaign, you can do so using the button below
DONATE NOW [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sdemail2023]
P.S. If you missed my announcement video, you can check it out below.
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=lQXcyDlej8Y [https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=lQXcyDlej8Y]
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP33/1/99379/images/PaidForByDanielsForCongressB.jpg]
Daniels For Congress
P.O. Box 60654
Harrisburg, PA 17106

Exactly one year ago today, President Biden signed the PACT Act into law.

This was a historic step toward supporting our servicemembers. The PACT Act marks the largest expansion of benefits and services for veterans exposed to toxins in more than 30 years — which the DOD says could help as many as **_3.5 million people_**.

I have seen the effects of being exposed to burn pits and toxic chemicals. Soldiers I served alongside in Iraq and Afghanistan need care — which is why I pushed hard to pass this legislation.

Unfortunately, not everyone agrees.

Extremist Republicans, including Lauren Boebert and Marjorie Taylor Greene, refused to vote for the PACT Act — _even while they praise our veterans on Twitter._

It’s not just this legislation either, Peter. MAGA Republicans have shown time and time again that they’re willing to put party over people — even at the expense of our veterans.

Donald Trump calling servicemembers who’ve died in war “suckers'' and “losers.” House Republicans hijacking a bipartisan defense bill to insert their right-wing agenda.

**Our servicemembers deserve better than to be used as political pawns.**

**[I'm ready to continue working with Yadira Caraveo to give our fellow veterans the respect, care, and benefits they fought for. name: Team Kennedy
subject: Invitation: Uncensored - A virtual conversation with leading experts on censorship and the First Amendment
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM KENNEDY
body:
The July 20 Congressional hearing on censorship exposed the war on the First Amendment at the highest level of the U.S. government.

| [ ](https://www.kennedy24.com/?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=censorship3&n=1)
---
Dear Peter, [](https://www.kennedy24.com/censorship_roundtable?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=censorship3&n=2) The July 20 Congressional hearing on censorship exposed the war on the First Amendment at the highest level of the U.S. government. Mr. Kennedy showcased his unwavering support for free speech and forceful condemnation of censorship, all while calling on Congress to lead by example in healing the partisan divide.

Reinvigorating the First Amendment is at the heart of this Presidential campaign. Please join us for a virtual discussion with Mr. Kennedy to examine how free speech became so embattled and how we restore our most hallowed Constitutional rights.
Join Mr. Kennedy along with many leading staunch advocates for the First Amendment for a virtual conversation on**Thursday, August 17 at 8 pm Eastern / 5 pm Pacific**. | [](https://www.kennedy24.com/censorship_roundtable?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=censorship3&n=3 "RSVP NOW") [RSVP NOW](https://www.kennedy24.com/censorship_roundtable?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=censorship3&n=3)
---
Journalist Sharyl Attkisson will moderate the conversation between Mr. Kennedy and journalist Glenn Greenwald, attorney Jenin Younes, and former New Jersey Assemblyman Jamel Holley.
Each of these participants has been a steadfast supporter of the First Amendment — Greenwald broke the Edward Snowden story; Attkisson stood up to government intimidation; Younes has represented plaintiffs in _Missouri v. Biden_ ; and Holley has stood for the free exercise of religion in his state, even against the wrath of his political party.

**[Please mark your calendars and join us LIVE on Thursday, August 17 at 8 pm Eastern / 5 pm Pacific for this inspiring event!](https://www.kennedy24.com/censorship_roundtable?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=censorship3&n=4)**
**If you know someone passionate about the First Amendment and free speech, please share this email with them and encourage them to attend the online event!**
All the best,
Team Kennedy
[https://www.kennedy24.com/](https://www.kennedy24.com/?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=censorship3&n=5)
[Donate today](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=censorship3&n=6) to put a Kennedy back in the White House — Elect Robert F. Kennedy, Jr. as President to unite America in 2024! Make sure to join us on Social Media to help spread our campaign's message and put Robert F. Kennedy, Jr. in the White House! [ ](https://www.kennedy24.com/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6nQ2OSzJvbzn8H14UVJyZeU&e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=censorship3&n=7) [ ](https://www.kennedy24.com/r?u=YqgukYA3Mrlri-dqG7I8TvJMDEmDChn4crVEdym-uYEvPdkFBV9SaYXx39MwIdLI&e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=censorship3&n=8) [ ](https://www.kennedy24.com/r?u=6hyvAYXBs1PELL28GD73y2F3NBqF5BJJJ4dLoTp9j7umB4CtvDL9QcHxwZkP_0TO&e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=censorship3&n=9)

clean_body: | | | Peter, Since we’ve launched Hung’s U.S. Senate campaign, we’ve seen an incredible rush of supporters and contributions from grassroots patriots like you. Your work has been incredible so far, but right now, we’re not the only ones building our war chest. Tim Kaine’s donations have SURGED since Hung announced, FirstName. The Democrats are absolutely terrified - and that means they’ve had a MASSIVE fundraising push. We’re not oblivious, Peter. We know that Tim Kaine is an entrenched Washington insider with connections to some of the biggest money in the swamp. That means that we need even more grassroots donors to step up if we’re going to catch up with his numbers. We don’t rely on the custom-made suit and tie wearing political elite - we’re counting on patriots like you. It just takes a few minutes. Thank you for your support, Morgan Digital Director Hung Cao for Virginia | Hung knows the American Dream is worth saving - because he’s lived it. Now, he’s running for Senate to defend it for the next generation. Hung Cao came to America with little besides the clothes on his back, and after his 25-year career in the Navy, he’s not done fighting for our future. name: Lynn Peterson
subject: Listening to. Learning from. Fighting for.

body:
Why me and why Congress?
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67878205/421180151/-2024045026?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84MzU0NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMTcyNDA5Yy05NzM3LWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nn5LW2Cg8lf32yeLl-aV_VjZ_WK06UZMKl7Bq2Em0Ik=&emci=33c44380-5e35-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=e172409c-9737-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=29359352)
---

| | I've never been afraid to do things differently, Peter. **Early on, I knew I couldn't take the predictable path.** Whether it was in high school, when I was expected to enroll in home economics classes and opted for technical courses instead, or when I landed my first job in transportation and repeatedly found myself as the only woman in a roomful of other engineers. **_Just because something has always been done a certain way doesn't mean it's the best way._** [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67878210/421180152/974409837?refcode=peterson-welcome-1&recurring=&amount=4&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=e172409c-9737-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84MzU0NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMTcyNDA5Yy05NzM3LWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nn5LW2Cg8lf32yeLl-aV_VjZ_WK06UZMKl7Bq2Em0Ik=) _Who remembers these desktops?_ So, while I'm an engineer by trade, I never wanted to spend my day at a desk, designing bridges in a vacuum. Instead, I fought to work with the people who would actually use the bridge, scheduling town halls and making sure that any solutions I offered would make lives better. I've gotten to spend my time asking questions, like '_Where do we need to alleviate traffic?,' 'What gaps are in your TriMet route?,' 'How can we get you home or to the market or the park quickly and safely?,'_ and _'How can we make it accessible for everyone?'_ When I served as State Transportation Secretary, I traveled to every corner of the state, reaching out to communities and becoming a trusted advocate for folks in underrepresented areas that had lost faith in our government. And when disaster struck and the I-5 bridge collapsed, my focus was on keeping people safe. **Working for and**** _with_****our community is my greatest passion and my #1 priority.** [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67878214/421180157/974409837?refcode=peterson-welcome-1&recurring=&amount=4&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=e172409c-9737-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84MzU0NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMTcyNDA5Yy05NzM3LWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nn5LW2Cg8lf32yeLl-aV_VjZ_WK06UZMKl7Bq2Em0Ik=) Now as Metro president, you won't find me in my office waiting for community members to come to me — I meet people where they are. That means being in the community, whether it's standing in the rain with workers trying to resolve an infrastructure issue or chatting with folks at a community event. **I firmly believe that the best way to start solving any problem is by listening.** I know the hardworking people in the Fifth District need a leader that will take the time to actually listen to their concerns, not someone who just shows up for a photo op — because my own community is suffering. A leader whose _only_ agenda is to improve the lives of Oregonians. **That's why I'm running for Congress.** I'm committed to listening to, learning from, and fighting for Oregonians in the Fifth District. I'm not here to climb the ranks or become a big name in DC. I'm here to serve Oregon, Peter. **My path has not been typical, but one thing that's been consistent throughout is that people are the center of everything I do. I hope you'll join me on this journey.** _Lynn_ | Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly:

**Meet Ron DeSantis**
---
| | | | [](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=1bb283edd41c4838b74fd31ec4bb9bde&_e=yJEbnnV1gbMNY46gObOnNL1HmLwDqO7UAIjBXFGHcLBHYDyb5csEToI-4M8-TNc0A5sENBrn8CWA52wuNgxgKpjZmv5Wsag8yVleALIFPH3gtUUTWFRKqebJV2V9RoGb2V31GLIGEAsNR99RnLgmDdj5d4uYsdmrtNbwQUnyYh2EnZIJC_xd5R090-f6somfFEiRF1ikjxcPuINqL7NdDtTaVY_6NP_h2m5zoP2nqbfUK3tfA3A5JzcXnhTAzTVRCYq0sjCAkRBJriJCDvZb7cq7xTgNwIEpIC-QnG0TmwDjnp8nqohne5RCNpRMaeobkDQrxiKs3q6CXQvU3leJJpTvo20hT3twXYXvFW-Q8tM8T6tPMMNjNsQaOgjGQC1Sr0zQ3eF-eQQoxyf4iPWWYQ%3D%3D)
---
| A native Floridian with blue-collar roots, Ron was raised in Dunedin by his mother, a nurse, and father, who installed cable boxes. He attended Dunedin High School and worked his way through Yale University, where he was the captain of the varsity baseball team. He also graduated with honors from Harvard Law School, where he earned a commission in the U.S. Navy as a JAG officer.

During his active-duty service, Ron deployed to Iraq in support of the SEAL mission in Fallujah, Ramadi and the rest of Al Anbar province. His military decorations include the Bronze Star Medal for Meritorious Service and the Iraq Campaign Medal.
---
Ron also served as a prosecutor in Florida, where he put child predators behind bars. He was elected to Congress in 2012 on a platform of government accountability, advocating for term limits and a balanced budget amendment.

In Congress, DeSantis spearheaded the fight to expose the weaponization of the IRS against conservatives. He also fought to hold accountable the rogue federal agencies involved in manufacturing the "Russia collusion" conspiracy theory. As a veteran, DeSantis was a champion for those who have served our country, pushing for reforms to the VA to better serve veterans and expand support for mental health.

In 2018, Ron DeSantis was elected the 46th Governor of Florida. As governor, he has fought for what's right and taken the arrows for the people he represents. During the darkest days of 2020, when the corrupt establishment, bureaucracy, and corporate media united to force lockdowns and mandates on Americans, DeSantis stood up for freedom - even when it wasn't popular.

Grounded in his unshakeable belief in America's founding principles, Governor DeSantis has enacted a bold agenda to transform Florida into a blueprint for the Nation's revival. Governor DeSantis has delivered win after win on conservative priorities:
* Saving livelihoods from job-killing lockdowns and vaccine mandates,

* Protecting citizens from the harmful impacts of Biden's border crisis by enacting E-Verify and other bold policies against illegal immigration, such as banning sanctuary cities,

* Defending parental rights and eliminating CRT,

* Defunding DEI bureaucracy in higher ed and holding tenured professors accountable,

* Waging war on woke power-grabs like ESG and central bank digital currency,

* Enacting the strongest medical freedom laws in the nation,

* Turning Florida into a model for election integrity,

* Protecting the unborn,

* Standing up for the 2nd Amendment by making Florida a constitutional carry state,

* Expanding education freedom,

* Prohibiting land purchases by the CCP and related individuals and entities,

* Lowering prescription drug costs,

* Holding woke corporations and school unions accountable,

* Creating a universal school choice program,

* Delivering record-breaking tax relief,

* Helping families achieve the American dream of homeownership,

* Supporting law enforcement and our veterans,

* Enacting tougher penalties for drug dealers and sex offenders,

* Appointing seven conservative justices to the Florida Supreme Court,

* ...and so much more.

After leading Florida with common sense and conviction throughout his first term, DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory of nearly 20 points in 2022. He earned his second term by the largest raw vote margin in state history, winning by more than 1.5 million votes.

But history didn't stop there:

Governor DeSantis flipped Miami-Dade County red, winning the majority-Hispanic urban county by double digits. Conventional wisdom assumed this was impossible for a Republican - as recently as 2016, Hillary Clinton won Miami-Dade County by nearly 30 points.

Governor DeSantis flipped several other blue counties red, including Palm Beach County. He won 62 out of 67 counties overall.

Compared to his first statewide election in 2018, Governor DeSantis was up +19% with Independents, up +30% with Hispanics, and up +9% with women.

Governor DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory with battle-tested leadership, a bold policy agenda, and never backing down to corporate media or special interests. As he said at his inauguration: "When the world lost its mind - when common sense suddenly became an uncommon virtue - Florida was a refuge of sanity, a citadel of freedom for our fellow Americans and even for people around the world. In captaining the ship of state, we choose to navigate the boisterous sea of liberty rather than cower in the calm docks of despotism."

Governor DeSantis has ensured that Florida is a free and safe place to raise a family. Thanks to the governor's leadership, Floridians enjoy a low tax burden, quality education opportunities, and a bulwark in place against the Biden Administration's overreach and various elite power grabs that seek to force people to adopt a particular ideology. Thanks to the governor's vision, this year's legislative session delivered the most ambitious conservative policy victories in Florida's history.

This year, Governor DeSantis signed:
* Record tax relief

* ESG prohibitions

* Measures counteracting the influence of the CCP

* The strongest medical freedom protections in the nation.

* Reforms reducing the costs of medications by delivering transparency

* Bold higher education reforms; defunding DEI

* Improvements to our state's infrastructure

* Tough-on-crime, law and order measures, including the death penalty for child rapists

* The strongest measures protecting Florida from Biden's border crisis

* Reforms for paycheck protection , holding accountable wayward school unions

* Prohibitions on centralized digital currencies in Florida

No leader has accomplished more for his state than Governor DeSantis. He is now sharing his bold vision with the country, leading a movement to deliver the Great American Comeback.

Ron is married to Casey DeSantis, an Emmy Award- winning television anchor. Together, they're the proud parents of their daughters, Madison and Mamie, and their son, Mason.
---
|
---
