Contributions from corporations, foreign nationals (without "green cards"), federal government contractors, and national banks are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer for each individual whose aggregate contributions exceed $200 in an election cycle. The maximum that an individual may contribute is $6,600 ($3,300/primary & $3,300/general). The maximum that a couple using a joint account may contribute is $13,200 ($6,600/primary & $6,600/general). A federal multi-candidate PAC may contribute $10,000 ($5,000/primary & $5,000/general). Contribution rules
* I am a U.S. citizen or lawfully admitted permanent resident (i.e., green card holder).
* This contribution is made from my own funds, and funds are not being provided to me by another person or entity for the purpose of making this contribution.
* I am making this contribution with my own personal credit card and not with a corporate or business credit card or a card issued to another person.
* I am at least eighteen years old. I am not, nor am I making this contribution on behalf of, a corporation, labor organization, national bank, foreign national without a green card, a federal contractor, or any other federally impermissible source.

Ron DeSantis was a member of the United States Navy. Use of his military rank, job titles and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.

| Fellow American,

There is a very concerning trend occurring in our country that has me worried for Americans who hold to biblical & faith-based values. [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=ddb59702194041909c0e186995f95105&_e=9ploXK65xNKevX5o0Q8LLhMiCjrLzDvGWAwomNe50HLmR_otnwIxfQ0zLUgNniDgNbKs7rAzrKlO45U-6Dr7gCml5nOL2pphyRSiZTY0R6MkqmaSra1PKdxRXoteJL5ylm8CSYdSHh9NsQtE3wAOlAskLlufgUpQxMhi74_6AV5CQaO6X41UL_gUD8KY0BCUO0u6R2kE3ANTrWeut-EEXXbwNDNG7DXE8Bf5yqJMRQef6uh5UJLER_gOb9AGF6agd8-PRIaeltqnL3RpXEpGF8quzVqjsxnHzt1DlwzXR7b5djQoCNaW1TQbwEujrTiv1LNunJ1WY1i9mtZLGL1P3OMWaIeRz5ezE8_8AZ0kV1GaHjHrV0EvMzBtpT1LuZJ_sAuOxa7rxpbhoHSeEZcAmfRZTzRSBCvL67kPlGEVgkw%3D) After the _Respect for Marriage Act_ was passed by a bi-partisan effort and signed into law, I am fearful that legal persecution will only intensify against Americans holding to faith-based values and who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith.

[**Are you concerned that America is abandoning a basic tenet of our founding -_Religious Liberty?_**](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=ddb59702194041909c0e186995f95105&_e=9ploXK65xNKevX5o0Q8LLhMiCjrLzDvGWAwomNe50HLmR_otnwIxfQ0zLUgNniDgNbKs7rAzrKlO45U-6Dr7gCml5nOL2pphyRSiZTY0R6MkqmaSra1PKdxRXoteJL5ylm8CSYdSHh9NsQtE3wAOlAskLlufgUpQxMhi74_6AV5CQaO6X41UL_gUD8KY0BCUO0u6R2kE3ANTrWeut-EEXXbwNDNG7DXE8Bf5yqJMRQef6uh5UJLER_gOb9AGF6agd8-PRIaeltqnL3RpXEpGF7cMq_yHItMuUwlG9uV0NnRM9V4S-K6E122eMoFfk7nQ8rZe-4Qy_RH6_zK3q-QjcXWIO97nYp7EKKXENlbrBOb1zED4k4lkgAUVpUzlV1JfpbiWrQWp_a-35lAQvfj-fmAYB-bgRVevt2qvsmLwmmY%3D)

In addition to the passing of the _Respect for Marriage Act_ , numerous examples over the past decade have concerned me: KENNEDY v. BREMERTON SCHOOL DISTRICT, MASTERPIECE CAKESHOP v. COLORADO CIVIL RIGHTS COMMISSION, and 303 CREATIVE v. ELENIS are just a few examples of legal persecution against Americans holding to faith-based values who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith.

Furthermore, an amendment to the _Respect for Marriage Act_ , brought forth by Senator Mike Lee, prohibiting the Federal Government from retaliating against schools, businesses, and organizations because of their religious beliefs about same-sex marriage failed.

**This has the potential to only intensify legal persecution against individuals, businesses, churches, and nonprofits holding to faith-based values. **

The American Cornerstone Institute is a non-profit that I founded to preserve and promote the cornerstones that laid the foundation for the greatest nation the world has ever seen: Faith, Liberty, Community, and Life.

Whether it is a football coach losing his job for praying at midfield after a game, or a baker being sued for not wanting to bake a cake that violates his religious values, **are you concerned as I am with the increase in legal persecution against Americans who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith?**

Please share your thoughts in this quick 2-minute survey concerning religious liberty in America.

**[https://offers.americancornerstone.org/religious-liberty-survey/](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=ddb59702194041909c0e186995f95105&_e=9ploXK65xNKevX5o0Q8LLhMiCjrLzDvGWAwomNe50HLmR_otnwIxfQ0zLUgNniDgNbKs7rAzrKlO45U-6Dr7gCml5nOL2pphyRSiZTY0R6MkqmaSra1PKdxRXoteJL5ylm8CSYdSHh9NsQtE3wAOlAskLlufgUpQxMhi74_6AV5CQaO6X41UL_gUD8KY0BCUO0u6R2kE3ANTrWeut-EEXXbwNDNG7DXE8Bf5yqJMRQef6uh5UJLER_gOb9AGF6agd8-PRIaeltqnL3RpXEpGFy5A2gSHrS2814DVwQD0_69k4A48n8SYnYZs0_Sg6Ge3z9_by_OhEDTEf1toSGV5SAM0PLwuwO5nrzkBzh9ajzbvc-yQ9YQyAiO60-RtrnXyFO0xW1uoU1JaxlkNt0tZOAdvXafgVw4NBFQW_JivajI%3D)**

Thank you for your consideration.

Regards,

Dr. Ben Carson
Founder & Chairman American Cornerstone Institute

name: Bill Spadea
subject: [JOIN US SOON] Common Ground Podcast
body:
Peter, While Bill continues to be out on the trail, fighting the good fight to restore common sense to New Jersey and beyond,
| [](https://xtz223.keap-link020.com/v2/click/906dd1385561a54ba1504a7044545d3d/eJyNj0ELgkAQhf_LnCVTy4M3ERHRPESdY1uHWtJ1WUfJxP_eWlGXgq4z3_sebwRCySSlJQRwpZvremCBRi6UQElRI4nxx9ddrxzPsaAS8pLoplMQjF_Db2A-O57rW0CDQoPstmGUpUVyyNMiM6Ri2nT851n6H0-8CdMcpumnGGtBcW_cLQSkO5wXlcKsor2uDH8mUm1g27yp60aeTIksF7zqjnYlejQCphTK8rU-w-Gpme4YN2Ld)
---
| Peter, While Bill continues to be out on the trail, working to restore common sense to New Jersey and beyond, we will be airing an encore episode of the Common Ground Podcast at 4:30PM ET this afternoon.
Today's stream will cover **how common sense is on its way to the New Jersey Senate.** Common sense beliefs include limited government, personal responsibility, and free enterprise. They involve cutting taxes, reducing regulations, and investing in infrastructure to promote a strong economy that creates jobs and opportunities. They mean supporting law enforcement, as well as valuing the sanctity of life, family, and hard work.

---
| | [CLICK HERE TO WATCH AN ENCORE SHOWING OF THE COMMON GROUND PODCAST (STARTS AT 4:30PM ET)](https://xtz223.keap-link020.com/v2/click/3fff417bcc1743a11349223d8c787a37/eJyNj00LgkAURf_LW0vmRy7ciYSI5iJqHdP4qCEdh_EpmfjfGytcFbR979xzuSMQSiYpLSGEOz1c1wMLNHKhBEqKG0mMv77uxnc8x4JKyFuim05BOH4NL8B8djzXt4AGhQY57KM4S4vklKdFZkjFtOn4z7MOgsWz3UVpDtP0U4y1oG1v3C2EpDucF5XCrKKjrgx_JVJtaNu8qetGXkyJLFe86s52JXo0AqYUyvKzPsPhrZmeFqFi2w==)
---
|
---
| The episode being streamed today features the following special guests: **Patricia (Pat) Johnson,** successful small businesswoman and entrepreneur, is a conservative New Jersey Senate Candidate in District 14. Known as a candidate for the people, Pat believes in our Constitutional rights and will fight to protect them. She's tired of the empty promises, is a strong advocate for small businesses, and is committed to bringing a hard working honest, citizenry government back to politics in New Jersey. **Mike Pappas,** a former Member of Congress, is seeking a seat in the New Jersey State legislature in the 16th District to address the struggles the people of New Jersey face each day. Pappas' campaign is based on fighting inflation, challenging unfunded state mandates that result in increased property taxes, increasing school security, and fighting state directives that “shift educational instruction in favor of philosophical indoctrination of value systems that parents may not support” in New Jersey public schools. **Fred Rubino** is a stand up comic from Brooklyn New York who has been called the voice of American Italians and the voice of reason. He has previously headlined The Common Sense Comedy Show, and is a major proponent of bringing common sense back to The Garden State and beyond. Building a better America starts with giving logic and common sense a real voice in the Senate. **Let's embrace our values, stand up for what we believe in, and work to make our nation the best it can be.** Make sure you [**click here to join us now (our stream will go live right at 4:30PM EDT),**](https://xtz223.keap-link020.com/v2/click/1daf2e1b92afcba24749ee0b06ec7d50/eJyNj0ELgkAQhf_LnCVzLQ97ExERzUPUOUyHWtJ1WUfJxP_eWuGpoOvM977HG4FQ5pLiEjjc6cGYCxZoLIQSKCloJOXF68u2G8d1LKiEvEW66RTw8Wt4Aeaz4zJmAQ0KDXLY-0ESZ9EpjbPEkCrXpuM_z9rzFk-48-MUpumnGGtBYW_cLXDSHc6LSmFW0VFXhr8SqZbbdtHUdSMvpkSWq6LqznYlejSCXCmU5Wd9gsNbMz0BFQti2Q==)
Common Sense Team
---
|
---
| It’s time for Common Sense ideas and policies to dominate the landscape instead of the vicious and totally counter-productive partisan attacks that only serve to embolden the elite power brokers.You’re a part of the Common Sense Club because you know that we need RESULTS from our government, NOT RHETORIC. Many arrogant, elitist elected officials crushed our way of life during the misguided, unnecessary and deadly lockdowns. Now it’s time to hold them accountable for their actions, ignorance and negligence. The tide is turning, and today is only STEP ONE!

This year’s elections provide a can’t-miss opportunity to support small businesses and families with fiscally responsible policies, restore an education system that puts students and parents over the radical agenda of the NJEA elites, and protect and preserve our civil, economic, and medical liberty.
We believe that our government should serve the people and provide the expected services that we’re paying for! It’s time for government to function as a public service, not a propaganda tool for radicals.
We believe in REDUCING tax burdens on working families AND empowering the skilled trades and small businesses.
We believe our schools should reject Critical Race Theory and the sexualized curricula. It’s time to empower parents and stop the NJEA once and for all.
I hope you’ll join me TODAY as we discuss the results of this year’s critical elections.
If you want to stand with me against the out-of-touch career politicians who are taking New Jersey down the wrong path and help restore Common Sense, you’re in the right place!Please join me during my show tonight, call in to share your thoughts, and watch the results of this year’s elections live as they come in!
Together, we can keep working to restore Common Sense and save New Jersey and America.
Thank you,Bill Spadea
---
| [Unsubscribe](https://xtz223.infusionsoft.com/app/optOut/0/4fd6eb57577aacb0/11786038/5c20648d1537d87f) Common Sense Club 165 Route 35 Red Bank, New Jersey 07701 United States
---

name: The Team at the Long Run
subject: Did you see this message from Mandela?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Long Run PAC, P
body:
Huge news for Wisconsin
Friends, did you see this message from Mandela?
He just launched a special fund to flip Wisconsin’s State legislature blue! Read his original message below and if you can, **[use this link to contribute $5 and help turn Wisconsin blue up and down the ballot!**](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1212?c0=longrunpac-em-ssdc-adcc-split.K6b7aP&refcode=em230810-1-t1&t=1&akid=4723%2E196590%2ECtZgEM)
_If you 've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will be split between the Wisconsin State Senate Democratic Committee, the Wisconsin Assembly Democrats, and The Long Run:_
| | **[DONATE $5](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1271?c0=longrunpac-em-ssdc-adcc-split.XUoIRY&amount=5&refcode=em230810-1-t1&t=2&akid=4723%2E196590%2ECtZgEM)**
---
****
| **[OTHER](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1271?c0=longrunpac-em-ssdc-adcc-split.XUoIRY&refcode=em230810-1-t1&t=3&akid=4723%2E196590%2ECtZgEM)**
---
****
\- The team at the Long Run
* * *

This is huge, friends.
Last Monday, liberals regained control of the Wisconsin Supreme Court for the first time in nearly two decades.
Soon after, a lawsuit was filed to challenge Wisconsin’s heavily gerrymandered legislative maps. That means there is a chance fair maps and competitive races will return to Wisconsin in 2024.
Today, I’m setting up a special fund to help flip these legislative seats the moment we get fair maps in Wisconsin.
This is just the beginning of our battle for change and the Wisconsin State Senate Democratic Committee and Wisconsin Assembly Democrats need our continued support to turn Wisconsin blue up and down the ballot.
**[So please, can you contribute $5 to our fund to flip the legislative majority in Wisconsin? Your contribution will help us turn Wisconsin blue up and down the ballot.**](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1212?c0=longrunpac-em-ssdc-adcc-split.K6b7aP&refcode=em230810-1-t1&t=5&akid=4723%2E196590%2ECtZgEM)
_If you 've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will be split between the Wisconsin State Senate Democratic Committee, the Wisconsin Assembly Democrats, and The Long Run:_
[Express Donate: $5](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1272?c0=longrunpac-em-ssdc-adcc-split.3dNr2f&refcode=em230810-1-t1&t=24&akid=4723%2E196590%2ECtZgEM)
[Express Donate: $25](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1273?c0=longrunpac-em-ssdc-adcc-split.Y4XBgr&refcode=em230810-1-t1&t=25&akid=4723%2E196590%2ECtZgEM)
[Express Donate: $50](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1274?c0=longrunpac-em-ssdc-adcc-split.0NVALl&refcode=em230810-1-t1&t=26&akid=4723%2E196590%2ECtZgEM)
[Express Donate: $100](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1275?c0=longrunpac-em-ssdc-adcc-split.K0olN4&refcode=em230810-1-t1&t=27&akid=4723%2E196590%2ECtZgEM)
[Express Donate: $250](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1266?c0=longrunpac-em-ssdc-adcc-split.CcLfzi&refcode=em230810-1-t1&t=28&akid=4723%2E196590%2ECtZgEM)
[Or donate another amount](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1212?c0=longrunpac-em-ssdc-adcc-split.K6b7aP&refcode=em230810-1-t1&t=29&akid=4723%2E196590%2ECtZgEM)
For 12 years, Republicans in the Wisconsin State Legislature have abused their power to silence the voice of Wisconsinites.
They’ve forced through voter suppression laws, attacks on unions and collective bargaining, and kept in place Wisconsin’s draconian 1849 ban on abortion.
**Now, with the potential for fair maps on the horizon, we _finally_ have the opportunity to win a legislative majority and undo the damage they’ve caused.**
Wisconsin is a battleground state and with critical policy decisions like climate protection, voting rights, and reproductive freedom on the line, we _must_ help voters regain trust in our democracy and show out to the polls to vote for Democrats up and down the ballot. But I can’t win this fight alone.
So I am asking you to join me to flip Wisconsin’s state legislature.
**[If you can, please contribute $5, or whatever you can afford, to our fund to win Wisconsin and take back the legislative majority.**](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1212?c0=longrunpac-em-ssdc-adcc-split.K6b7aP&refcode=em230810-1-t1&t=30&akid=4723%2E196590%2ECtZgEM)
Thank you in advance for your contribution. Change is on the horizon.
Mandela
[CONTRIBUTE](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1212?c0=longrunpac-em-ssdc-adcc-split.K6b7aP&refcode=em230810-1-t1&t=31&akid=4723%2E196590%2ECtZgEM)

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you. We'd hate to see you go, but if you'd like you can [**unsubscribe here**](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=32&akid=4723%2E196590%2ECtZgEM). You can also [**sign up to receive fewer emails.**](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/signup/fewer-emails/?source=em-footer&t=33&akid=4723%2E196590%2ECtZgEM)
The Long Run PAC is funded by grassroots donors giving what they can, when they can. [**Make a contribution to The Long Run PAC today.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/longrunpac-em-footer?refcode=em-footer&t=34&refcode2=4723_196590_CtZgEM&akid=4723%2E196590%2ECtZgEM)
Submit this form to [**update your contact information.**](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/signup/update-contact-info/?source=em-footer&t=35&akid=4723%2E196590%2ECtZgEM)

| | | Trump is throwing a temper tantrum over the federal judge assigned to oversee proceedings in the 2020 election case. He’s demanding that Judge Tanya Chutkan recuse herself and is hurling insults at her on social media. Why? Because she’s doing her job. Trump is terrified because this highly qualified judge has followed the law, and handed down serious (but wholly appropriate) penalties on January 6th insurrectionists. Trump knows he could finally get what’s coming to him. We want Judge Chutkan to know we stand with her against Trump’s attacks and she has our full support to finally bring him to justice. name: Liz
subject: restoring the VRA’s full protections
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY LIZ FOR NY
body:
Liz Gereghty is a community leader, small businesswoman, and mom who is running for Congress in New York's 17th congressional district. If you'd like to unsubscribe, [click here.](https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/MYVOZ4KcDEWY9i98RJm9xg2?unsubscribedata=CXINLRsXwEZa%2BLISR3H79iFBiFI9p1h9WRjxW%2BsuWs2mGdUTGOomJ2cEU%2BaNYNXGhcQTenT5po%2Bgpn%2B7Sw9H6Qe0HNpfuZo%2FZIc4he9yAs%2FgAdZg%2FL6efTaHrbICosS2o0iczRbwoNUYQl0%2B6pyVJIwiD7LVsaDa6zrH54GJ2yP6gCmojHHvN655ANeKKS%2F6rGtDAxV7%2BKxu%2FgmF4Q7GUytW%2F7mIFzFmcw050Z83T3bm5frlIX4TfdYDzKTMAzkgpJNmmYrOoCeR2cwAF3p3BIapFZpNIt8NPhL6GC%2FqA6cYB%2FiN%2BhAloKa4J6PtGuabteRUbF5RCI55Irqukk4jhq9MCn%2FX8lk9f66BMqns7sC4LwfIm6Nb65Pph%2FbhpuFG0%2FTn4esarZ1YHHeld9axYgm2opV7voPFXFvYr9TESXBUAIehqZZUw6BXakRXTz86)
---
| |
---
Peter,

This month we mark the 58th anniversary of the Voting Rights Act, a huge victory in tearing down the obstacles to casting a ballot.

But since the Supreme Court gutted its protections with _Shelby vs Holder_ , we have seen so many instances of voter suppression across our country. Voting rights are still under attack for so many as the GOP works to pass gerrymandering laws and other voting restrictions.

Voting is one of the most powerful tools we can use to create real change – and if we want to protect our democracy we need to fight against disenfranchisement. Peter, we can’t afford to wait any longer for our current lawmakers to act. We must continue to push against extremism and toward progress, electing leaders dedicated to restoring the VRA and protecting the right to vote from all forms of suppression.

Thank you,

Liz

name: Dr. Ben Carson
subject: Can I get your thoughts on religious liberty in America?
body:
There is a very concerning trend occurring in our country that has me worried

|
---
| | | [](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=61e0bc1b84c648b4a51c38407783c663&_e=Lj-TlMJk1292u6XU3HBKnjNSQ-a0--qfGqY3ourBPiAY7GGfw6RSxIia86BWMtkWWHdoVispFujiI8BEtoUzWUw7UuMXG2uufx3aHXqgLerl5VB_gD7rnFUYjOU1HwEhW8cSA13d5hLtV7ay6rLi4SEuBCrkagS8tETbUek9D9yWOYrh9q-kFToo8hbxaATpFLOedhYVYVuW4VtOlhtGQ-DdItCegh_Qu8b5I9I_AotdIqOQEL4cgt4FhJ-cuPoxoT4MOfQGrwJPV9_eGqwcTTCdbkwpvmSWH7SBusrQgIUl7VKoP-WOSgwjUBVaRA66TDL4XpncHTZRcCxqQYyDlNWZGRd6akzFT9XvfQhKjlVd2Ce24pzCg6j5EfwICwG9tXj8UI4VaO5vsuOOCc4C3ezUIEmpT5UY0ec_89LqRIo%3D)
---
| Fellow American,

There is a very concerning trend occurring in our country that has me worried for Americans who hold to biblical & faith-based values. [](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=61e0bc1b84c648b4a51c38407783c663&_e=Lj-TlMJk1292u6XU3HBKnjNSQ-a0--qfGqY3ourBPiAY7GGfw6RSxIia86BWMtkWWHdoVispFujiI8BEtoUzWUw7UuMXG2uufx3aHXqgLerl5VB_gD7rnFUYjOU1HwEhW8cSA13d5hLtV7ay6rLi4SEuBCrkagS8tETbUek9D9yWOYrh9q-kFToo8hbxaATpFLOedhYVYVuW4VtOlhtGQ-DdItCegh_Qu8b5I9I_AotdIqOQEL4cgt4FhJ-cuPoxoT4MOfQGrwJPV9_eGqwcTZK7KfpwiOk6ju0XQ7ID6U4iHXWuOjC3qxQL9uL-bC0MNklqPvLC36C2mc2YGrb43kDH8JAFnUk0MANjYC1OneTBiJ03o81LcJBacK-zP9_bnGcs1qjvozovCMgYbqXYZFYHJfk8GXkIiKVdOvbWiP8%3D) After the _Respect for Marriage Act_ was passed by a bi-partisan effort and signed into law, I am fearful that legal persecution will only intensify against Americans holding to faith-based values and who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith.

[**Are you concerned that America is abandoning a basic tenet of our founding -_Religious Liberty?_**](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=61e0bc1b84c648b4a51c38407783c663&_e=Lj-TlMJk1292u6XU3HBKnjNSQ-a0--qfGqY3ourBPiAY7GGfw6RSxIia86BWMtkWWHdoVispFujiI8BEtoUzWUw7UuMXG2uufx3aHXqgLerl5VB_gD7rnFUYjOU1HwEhW8cSA13d5hLtV7ay6rLi4SEuBCrkagS8tETbUek9D9yWOYrh9q-kFToo8hbxaATpFLOedhYVYVuW4VtOlhtGQ-DdItCegh_Qu8b5I9I_AotdIqOQEL4cgt4FhJ-cuPoxoT4MOfQGrwJPV9_eGqwcTSRH9VChKP1LYYkhJavlRVP8ghO6GxrnXZVLXKIu4FNVey_LYFD2_oRXNuxL1eeeohMvXfyA9sAz4zuoLZVpbBz3dy9j18aJ2yxyEy30k0zIRelkxH-w7cX05WdNuOZhIgdatDDXGvezOQONrn3BsIw%3D)

In addition to the passing of the _Respect for Marriage Act_ , numerous examples over the past decade have concerned me: KENNEDY v. BREMERTON SCHOOL DISTRICT, MASTERPIECE CAKESHOP v. COLORADO CIVIL RIGHTS COMMISSION, and 303 CREATIVE v. ELENIS are just a few examples of legal persecution against Americans holding to faith-based values who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith.

Furthermore, an amendment to the _Respect for Marriage Act_ , brought forth by Senator Mike Lee, prohibiting the Federal Government from retaliating against schools, businesses, and organizations because of their religious beliefs about same-sex marriage failed.

**This has the potential to only intensify legal persecution against individuals, businesses, churches, and nonprofits holding to faith-based values. **

The American Cornerstone Institute is a non-profit that I founded to preserve and promote the cornerstones that laid the foundation for the greatest nation the world has ever seen: Faith, Liberty, Community, and Life.

Whether it is a football coach losing his job for praying at midfield after a game, or a baker being sued for not wanting to bake a cake that violates his religious values, **are you concerned as I am with the increase in legal persecution against Americans who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith?**

Please share your thoughts in this quick 2-minute survey concerning religious liberty in America.

**[https://offers.americancornerstone.org/religious-liberty-survey/](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=61e0bc1b84c648b4a51c38407783c663&_e=Lj-TlMJk1292u6XU3HBKnjNSQ-a0--qfGqY3ourBPiAY7GGfw6RSxIia86BWMtkWWHdoVispFujiI8BEtoUzWUw7UuMXG2uufx3aHXqgLerl5VB_gD7rnFUYjOU1HwEhW8cSA13d5hLtV7ay6rLi4SEuBCrkagS8tETbUek9D9yWOYrh9q-kFToo8hbxaATpFLOedhYVYVuW4VtOlhtGQ-DdItCegh_Qu8b5I9I_AotdIqOQEL4cgt4FhJ-cuPoxoT4MOfQGrwJPV9_eGqwcTfDDQeYZ4Yv_QIE2wZ6ag6CM_N3zARSV1NvQvSEbk0v4cq5cSEZQhrPN5BInPeXAFWAY5UnsnCP2jwhUwYuAe4J0AFnZrGyLibHHcBBZjO_JuBGtIpR0qBKtkOe08n27LbI_SE4n4-hNbI2T78wCmhQ%3D)**

Thank you for your consideration.

Regards,

Dr. Ben Carson
Founder & Chairman American Cornerstone Institute
---

| |
---
---
Your donation to ACI helps us to focus on our mission of promoting and preserving individual and religious liberty, helping our country's most vulnerable find new hope, and developing methods to decrease the federal government's role in society and to improve efficiency to best serve ALL our nation's citizens.

ELENIS are just a few examples of legal persecution against Americans holding to faith-based values who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith. Furthermore, an amendment to the Respect for Marriage Act , brought forth by Senator Mike Lee, prohibiting the Federal Government from retaliating against schools, businesses, and organizations because of their religious beliefs about same-sex marriage failed. This has the potential to only intensify legal persecution against individuals, businesses, churches, and nonprofits holding to faith-based values. The American Cornerstone Institute is a non-profit that I founded to preserve and promote the cornerstones that laid the foundation for the greatest nation the world has ever seen: Faith, Liberty, Community, and Life. Whether it is a football coach losing his job for praying at midfield after a game, or a baker being sued for not wanting to bake a cake that violates his religious values, are you concerned as I am with the increase in legal persecution against Americans who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith? Please share your thoughts in this quick 2-minute survey concerning religious liberty in America. Thank you for your consideration. Regards, Dr. Ben Carson Founder & Chairman American Cornerstone Institute | | Your donation to ACI helps us to focus on our mission of promoting and preserving individual and religious liberty, helping our country's most vulnerable find new hope, and developing methods to decrease the federal government's role in society and to improve efficiency to best serve ALL our nation's citizens. | | Copyright(C) 2023 American Cornerstone Institute, All rights reserved. Full Mag News 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314 |

name: Dr. Ben Carson
subject: Can I get your thoughts on religious liberty in America?
body:
There is a very concerning trend occurring in our country that has me worried

|
---
| | | [](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=795e8fd4ba014f319b844641c2df8471&_e=dKdsnTJjZFDkBdKWd2qwLXzDn6KZ5gHTIO6A_nhdYDC1Lw3lSom1bxstCDph6dvtTGb3Hxb4xxohsGq8TkdYo3EKTOMNpfxU4L3a8L7-_-V8zwtj_B11OcqdsSlHqEZwureDTtJxvCP6f2Y6Ahd3OC6ASlo8633IPF2ebzuV7lq8N13VPCa9EvYzNZsf6FY3dBo_Z3Mi8pVXD62M-n2bQAYAxcB6NTrgyQ7uJwmt0LpJjG6M3tnMoA6OVAX5JEyiRCG2-7X9qSgsOby3N5zulRijAGGjq_uN-8VodVlkoS-ap-pLDSlXty157wywUPZkvxRh-5p0284IapQNHQZ9ayWH3eNcVTDkvHs5KTytYyfqXItR7g_bTWkfOmCfFJAGxtD2WHs5Ds9aednfuUwjl-GT5athRUw06zYWt2kpopA%3D)
---
| Fellow American,

There is a very concerning trend occurring in our country that has me worried for Americans who hold to biblical & faith-based values. [](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=795e8fd4ba014f319b844641c2df8471&_e=dKdsnTJjZFDkBdKWd2qwLXzDn6KZ5gHTIO6A_nhdYDC1Lw3lSom1bxstCDph6dvtTGb3Hxb4xxohsGq8TkdYo3EKTOMNpfxU4L3a8L7-_-V8zwtj_B11OcqdsSlHqEZwureDTtJxvCP6f2Y6Ahd3OC6ASlo8633IPF2ebzuV7lq8N13VPCa9EvYzNZsf6FY3dBo_Z3Mi8pVXD62M-n2bQAYAxcB6NTrgyQ7uJwmt0LpJjG6M3tnMoA6OVAX5JEyiRCG2-7X9qSgsOby3N5zulaai5kdYO7yBY6rugRudUMmYvcp0sEwClcdeV0F0ROiELZIaX5IzL9hTH54LOOnk3wQXZq0mOKO_kgthB_CxHJS8oM1DxxTg85GixZ3GV0QAyq2xnrPqd6jlF1Ml6qrRPmeeTuTzGsntvrZk9Ww0scY%3D) After the _Respect for Marriage Act_ was passed by a bi-partisan effort and signed into law, I am fearful that legal persecution will only intensify against Americans holding to faith-based values and who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith.

[**Are you concerned that America is abandoning a basic tenet of our founding -_Religious Liberty?_**](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=795e8fd4ba014f319b844641c2df8471&_e=dKdsnTJjZFDkBdKWd2qwLXzDn6KZ5gHTIO6A_nhdYDC1Lw3lSom1bxstCDph6dvtTGb3Hxb4xxohsGq8TkdYo3EKTOMNpfxU4L3a8L7-_-V8zwtj_B11OcqdsSlHqEZwureDTtJxvCP6f2Y6Ahd3OC6ASlo8633IPF2ebzuV7lq8N13VPCa9EvYzNZsf6FY3dBo_Z3Mi8pVXD62M-n2bQAYAxcB6NTrgyQ7uJwmt0LpJjG6M3tnMoA6OVAX5JEyiRCG2-7X9qSgsOby3N5zuleuTGLbJBUYi_7jKFXOcJbrgXOdS35EKkW4-tW5SPV6SFqQC8tZn4wDuuAmvbjmTk50ujBE9jGTCNz-qFFSEgxcS0-4KFjPqysj9XQewB9G6KY2m9w_IoY8zy6DbffWnE33GPIsjuUjqQK9NqxIWmV4%3D)

In addition to the passing of the _Respect for Marriage Act_ , numerous examples over the past decade have concerned me: KENNEDY v. BREMERTON SCHOOL DISTRICT, MASTERPIECE CAKESHOP v. COLORADO CIVIL RIGHTS COMMISSION, and 303 CREATIVE v. ELENIS are just a few examples of legal persecution against Americans holding to faith-based values who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith.

Furthermore, an amendment to the _Respect for Marriage Act_ , brought forth by Senator Mike Lee, prohibiting the Federal Government from retaliating against schools, businesses, and organizations because of their religious beliefs about same-sex marriage failed.

**This has the potential to only intensify legal persecution against individuals, businesses, churches, and nonprofits holding to faith-based values. **

The American Cornerstone Institute is a non-profit that I founded to preserve and promote the cornerstones that laid the foundation for the greatest nation the world has ever seen: Faith, Liberty, Community, and Life.

Whether it is a football coach losing his job for praying at midfield after a game, or a baker being sued for not wanting to bake a cake that violates his religious values, **are you concerned as I am with the increase in legal persecution against Americans who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith?**

Please share your thoughts in this quick 2-minute survey concerning religious liberty in America.

**[https://offers.americancornerstone.org/religious-liberty-survey/](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=795e8fd4ba014f319b844641c2df8471&_e=dKdsnTJjZFDkBdKWd2qwLXzDn6KZ5gHTIO6A_nhdYDC1Lw3lSom1bxstCDph6dvtTGb3Hxb4xxohsGq8TkdYo3EKTOMNpfxU4L3a8L7-_-V8zwtj_B11OcqdsSlHqEZwureDTtJxvCP6f2Y6Ahd3OC6ASlo8633IPF2ebzuV7lq8N13VPCa9EvYzNZsf6FY3dBo_Z3Mi8pVXD62M-n2bQAYAxcB6NTrgyQ7uJwmt0LpJjG6M3tnMoA6OVAX5JEyiRCG2-7X9qSgsOby3N5zuldgEecNnEnCrDirFe3IpUtVoEGrf0yRH1fOx0zAPQe2rEoMlTlAlL2fzlN85dz6v9iMc9BosWsVwpS3zgaGIN7hiXWvVQSajdUcIrxgLeIvmX-KdJCA89XIOsGQ-6ZDSRvSg8TGWDta9gxBj-B0wkgs%3D)**

Thank you for your consideration.

Regards,

Dr. Ben Carson
Founder & Chairman American Cornerstone Institute
---

| |
---
---

clean_body: | | | Fellow American, I know I can trust you, so I will be honest with you. Our fundraising has slowed down quite a bit this summer. It’s not unexpected - contributions slow down a bit this season. But that means we need our most dedicated patriots to pull a little extra weight. I understand wanting to check out of politics for a little bit during the summer months. Fewer people are tuning into the news, opening emails, and thinking about the election. But we can’t afford to slow down. Missouri could be one of the closest races in America, and Josh is a top target for the Democrats. If we hold back even a little, we can fall seriously behind. It’s up to us to do our part to take the Senate no matter the season, and we’re counting on you. Thank you, Tyler Team Hawley | | Paid for by Josh Hawley Victory Committee | |

body:
Donations to my campaign have plunged more than 40% since August 2021.
[Unsubscribe](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_s=fa95be8c07fb4939b089dae916cbc232&_t=nG8OkYtjHzLOwxc8wZumD9tIafeyqINaQOlhAgHjATsO2VT1GT2_qqfWBY6V2f_3wVGpoB7X91mfKdW4ju5OBEwyVJJ67rzxqp5ic3-85qk%3D) | [Mark as Junk](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_s=fa95be8c07fb4939b089dae916cbc232&_t=nG8OkYtjHzLOwxc8wZumD9tIafeyqINaQOlhAgHjATsO2VT1GT2_qqfWBY6V2f_3wVGpoB7X91mfKdW4ju5OBEwyVJJ67rzxqp5ic3-85qk%3D)

[](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=fa95be8c07fb4939b089dae916cbc232&_e=zs9YZkTa9J5Uqa6vCSuEaPPERbS_k44v8N2_JfpDFFPpvgM_ZAmEuPHWz-DHx8ytF3vO5uMxpgIyRKYRt7-0o5vcNIO8VrcYJu9mP2LebNMENHdzL-ErhzeRACOxQduDXk7NoOrj3-uLTGIEQUWDGWhk-H7_x3t0QMqEWD77W3bkidfNVkKVhezn827mYpX7kLQA7m6ouQcOc0Dw-HNIkGOkBV0JGLIDVPb07V3VgdR1EVudVLknxe1O2Igv4QCN8ALug16Bd7gaVti_kBWTZeO1cwSRFXQ_PPyrqyWherwEpS_cVymhzAyAGKEMJ8b66yR1nHMudB_z9z5p0Rtomkh1jzqpX28hneQhlcNE-vTnvJr7jlhtwllxhiKWxPE4Z4JXlrH0vc9ube13uV-b8vKz00fVAnz0J7fG8cLWnqI%3D)
| **$23**

More than 10,119 donations were made to my campaign in July with **an average gift of $23**. And let me tell you that while $23 goes a long way in helping us to reach the voters we need to continue winning elections - not as many people are donating to campaigns like mine as they once did.**In fact, our fundraising numbers have dropped 40% from this time in August 2021**.

This email is on the longer side, so if you don't want to read to the end, **[would you be able to make a contribution of $23](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=fa95be8c07fb4939b089dae916cbc232&_e=zs9YZkTa9J5Uqa6vCSuEaPPERbS_k44v8N2_JfpDFFPpvgM_ZAmEuPHWz-DHx8ytF3vO5uMxpgIyRKYRt7-0o5vcNIO8VrcYJu9mP2LebNMENHdzL-ErhzeRACOxQduDXk7NoOrj3-uLTGIEQUWDGWhk-H7_x3t0QMqEWD77W3bkidfNVkKVhezn827mYpX7kLQA7m6ouQcOc0Dw-HNIkGOkBV0JGLIDVPb07V3VgdR1EVudVLknxe1O2Igv4QCN8ALug16Bd7gaVti_kBWTZZ2XOikkeUSxBreb2TgHqBxeq-m5EJuOR_kGS--O0uRNM00EXJmoK0CnAVgAnLt_-VHSzcmnQQFUuEnwfGrXvkqJsz-MSXe9Mi5h3xHDfeyPdLj_maXHGpNtzCDvitawDYbbNOoayl6-AMe3eGxr9I8%3D)** , our average July donation, to help us get a head start on our August fundraising?

[**CHIP IN $23
**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=fa95be8c07fb4939b089dae916cbc232&_e=zs9YZkTa9J5Uqa6vCSuEaPPERbS_k44v8N2_JfpDFFPpvgM_ZAmEuPHWz-DHx8ytF3vO5uMxpgIyRKYRt7-0o5vcNIO8VrcYJu9mP2LebNMENHdzL-ErhzeRACOxQduDXk7NoOrj3-uLTGIEQUWDGWhk-H7_x3t0QMqEWD77W3bkidfNVkKVhezn827mYpX7kLQA7m6ouQcOc0Dw-HNIkGOkBV0JGLIDVPb07V3VgdR1EVudVLknxe1O2Igv4QCN8ALug16Bd7gaVti_kBWTZXL7FcMwmZtzEC4DSzgDKC6YxaWmFOBjzXgb7WFolK8JvGfj0W61Lo2N8GT9x22ojrrJHkyA97cdf5neOdmuzK7tdX0exHAwBVHLwRT08O6SOcdOSi3RN9AeILPqDl20YRFvgyMKtX6ceVpZZ8cl-BA%3D)
Some political pundits have written articles that spell doom for Republican candidates, opining that conservative candidates/causes have inundated you with too many texts and too much email to sift through in a day. While It’s true that nearly every congressional campaign in the 2024 cycle will attempt to utilize online fundraising to propel them into the House/Senate, not every email or text is created equal; and **not every email or text will deliver the entirety of your donation to the candidate you think you’re donating to.**

Bad actors and political grifters have figured out that online fundraising is a good way to make a quick buck off your generosity. **Not me. Not now, not ever.**

I know a couple of things to be true:
* We must do everything within our power to hold onto the U.S. House – the future of our country absolutely depends on it

* **Democrats are outraising Republicans 2-1 most months, sometimes it can even be as high as 3-1**

That’s why I’m reaching out today. The stakes are as high now as they were in 2021, **[yet 40% of our supporters who gave then aren’t giving now](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=fa95be8c07fb4939b089dae916cbc232&_e=zs9YZkTa9J5Uqa6vCSuEaPPERbS_k44v8N2_JfpDFFPpvgM_ZAmEuPHWz-DHx8ytF3vO5uMxpgIyRKYRt7-0o5vcNIO8VrcYJu9mP2LebNMENHdzL-ErhzeRACOxQduDXk7NoOrj3-uLTGIEQUWDGWhk-H7_x3t0QMqEWD77W3bkidfNVkKVhezn827mYpX7kLQA7m6ouQcOc0Dw-HNIkGOkBV0JGLIDVPb07V3VgdR1EVudVLknxe1O2Igv4QCN8ALug16Bd7gaVti_kBWTZUXbkycQF9a840RhsKsls73KeoewQSxSLKdRrwkpxoUZXWUx_XrYTXqMQgiEN2w1e9E3NOrYLMq3yZ1XCJgVJLE44NGcbukqXXsi1cbGAiu21PD2bF8TKOp1MgpV1K-3D3dkK93I2PXMijzQqV47U2E%3D)**. If you can, would you please help us close the donation gap by **[chipping in $23](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=fa95be8c07fb4939b089dae916cbc232&_e=zs9YZkTa9J5Uqa6vCSuEaPPERbS_k44v8N2_JfpDFFPpvgM_ZAmEuPHWz-DHx8ytF3vO5uMxpgIyRKYRt7-0o5vcNIO8VrcYJu9mP2LebNMENHdzL-ErhzeRACOxQduDXk7NoOrj3-uLTGIEQUWDGWhk-H7_x3t0QMqEWD77W3bkidfNVkKVhezn827mYpX7kLQA7m6ouQcOc0Dw-HNIkGOkBV0JGLIDVPb07V3VgdR1EVudVLknxe1O2Igv4QCN8ALug16Bd7gaVti_kBWTZWLt8x1reYOaHknznX5mDdINifJeIcNiyv1E9BJFebcGIvTw2-ptXLgqRrIoFOlfVDhyFukiQMiKxRfJ2PNQI4Ip024C1zuHA4BYU6y5RKpXcr9G5hIFW9W70ANXOO4qlFeTHeLyfm9ZeEjFIdsGlpw%3D)** or another amount today?

[**CHIP IN $23
**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=fa95be8c07fb4939b089dae916cbc232&_e=zs9YZkTa9J5Uqa6vCSuEaPPERbS_k44v8N2_JfpDFFPpvgM_ZAmEuPHWz-DHx8ytF3vO5uMxpgIyRKYRt7-0o5vcNIO8VrcYJu9mP2LebNMENHdzL-ErhzeRACOxQduDXk7NoOrj3-uLTGIEQUWDGWhk-H7_x3t0QMqEWD77W3bkidfNVkKVhezn827mYpX7kLQA7m6ouQcOc0Dw-HNIkGOkBV0JGLIDVPb07V3VgdR1EVudVLknxe1O2Igv4QCN8ALug16Bd7gaVti_kBWTZV6KzrJtRczhRgQ4AA3z4DvVGE6Ylk2mzZ563o4vBg0589eWctobfK4GUjmL2qvKKFIYM_PPS9FSrKHJyO414icFCZTuo-eFtJjF1Z1ubshoXJSXFNW1IBOvM5W0N5KgYgFy62BkFQPSjX__5oPuolI%3D)
When considering whether to donate to campaign contribution requests like this one, I urge you to look at the paid for language at the bottom of the email. _**Do you know who you’re giving money to? It may not be the person asking for it**_.

With so much competition for your hard-earned dollars, campaigns like mine have seen a dramatic shift in the donations we’re able to bring in every month, **putting a damper on our efforts to keep our 5-seat House majority**. But as one of the President's biggest supporters, we were surprised to see you had yet to accept YOUR Gold Card Membership, Friend. body:
It’s my job to make sure the campaign’s message is reaching voters across the country. | | |
---
Hi Peter -- I’m Michael Tyler, Communications Director for the Biden-Harris campaign.
It’s my job to make sure the campaign’s message is reaching voters across the country, and I’ll be upfront with you: **Our ability to do that depends on grassroots********supporters********like you.** That’s why I want to make sure you know this, Peter: Donald Trump and Ron DeSantis raised millions of dollars for their presidential bids last quarter -- they have big money, super PACs, and outside groups willing to spend millions to get their messages out online and on the airwaves. **It’s not going to be easy to compete with that, but we have something even more powerful:****_this grassroots team._** One grassroots supporter, one $25 contribution at a time, we’re building a strong team ready to defeat Trump, DeSantis, or _any_ Republican candidate who wants to take us backward and undo the progress we’ve made. **We're building a true grassroots movement, and we're counting on supporters like you to join this fight.** [**I hope you’ll pitch in $25 now to help:**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953yEOQgSlkg29MQMFLkzVkhZYkdlHOguMgWJrszGBn8qLxLkfYLwz2cdJV5uRpTK41-mf13WqZmXN6P8GETcgngvYv-xMEtnrgCU2WZC2ZCsoPtXMWCf9C3S02isS_h0W51hUMyEKYfs6r2eXavT3n2lNH_QHZAJbSoErX-t2of5ZyKT0zIYj7rikO5s695OVkasLQFeKsSXX3V8EJ0bl3nhNuHbSDm2lQcopdhsXfhJLMwptQ1P6geDgXogFWKW7lLKstRy9kEqIz0iBw2T2ZC8_dyPOTQTqWsv0eM4W1_HPSmDTuQgqyfs4IyUisymg4xarc6lJlIkDBVOnsnsQBRfpH-LTSNf6x0iSdbgcMUUi_mLA4aqR5DQVqDhr8OcBRECOC081LWlRwtEpyeb1x9JZT7Q8jrvAtrdIO3rjwdl06R4vGzcjWOEH4SFDBAYTRm9LwR5-6YyiafDtpgEUSRjcOT7d7ikdfE_8zT6BkMhZzcp4w_4bepiJMtgsNaOUUvJo8lPAiCwXY7rdaZABvdm45D0dzHp_XdYPoYBI5l8Yw/3ym/i2Nn44QRTQOIR5H3Vc7HUQ/h0/L8ETaKjg-76so5QMhkf2rp2MytKwx13EfnLZ1z_a-j0)

clean_body: It’s my job to make sure the campaign’s message is reaching voters across the country. | | | Hi Peter -- I’m Michael Tyler, Communications Director for the Biden-Harris campaign. It’s my job to make sure the campaign’s message is reaching voters across the country, and I’ll be upfront with you: Our ability to do that depends on grassroots****supporters****like you. That’s why I want to make sure you know this, Peter: Donald Trump and Ron DeSantis raised millions of dollars for their presidential bids last quarter -- they have big money, super PACs, and outside groups willing to spend millions to get their messages out online and on the airwaves. It’s not going to be easy to compete with that, but we have something even more powerful:this grassroots team. One grassroots supporter, one $25 contribution at a time, we’re building a strong team ready to defeat Trump, DeSantis, or any Republican candidate who wants to take us backward and undo the progress we’ve made. We're building a true grassroots movement, and we're counting on supporters like you to join this fight. | If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | Thanks for being a part of this work, Peter. It means a lot to our whole team to know that you’re with us. Michael Michael Tyler Communications Director Biden-Harris 2024

name: Andy Beshear for Governor
subject: This race is about Kentucky.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ANDY BESHEAR FOR GOVERNOR
body:
Andy and Daniel Cameron's speeches couldn't have been more different. **"Kentucky Republicans seek to nationalize gubernatorial race as state Democrats keep focus local"**
_– CNN_
Peter,

Last weekend, Andy and his opponent both attended Fancy Farm, and their speeches couldn't be any more different. While Andy focused on what he's accomplished for people in every corner of the Commonwealth and the issues at the top of Kentuckians' minds — Daniel Cameron was more interested in mud-slinging and national politics.

We knew this would happen. Cameron and his allies are hoping to turn the governor's race into a national show to distract voters from the record progress Andy's administration has made. **They know it's the only way they can win.**

name: Team Chrissy
subject: Can you stand with Chrissy against GOP bigotry and hate?
body:
| | |
---
Derek – So many critical issues facing Americans can be solved by level-minded, bipartisan compromise.
**But when it comes to the GOP’s incredibly hateful attacks on the LGBTQ community, there’s no compromise to be made. They erase and threaten millions of Americans just for living their lives authentically. **
Now, Republicans cut almost _$4 million_ in funding for vital social services – including housing and community resources – that would benefit LGBTQ Americans.
**This is unprecedented, unjust, and just plain bigoted.**
**Chrissy is committed to resisting any and all hateful anti-LGBTQ attacks. But the GOP’s tactics are escalating daily, and to stand up to Republicans, she needs to know you’re standing with her. So, please:**
**[_Will you sign Chrissy’s petition and stand against this latest anti-LGBTQ attack? It’s critical this movement shows its strength in the face of increasing bigotry and hate._](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67881429/421192359/-1663935338?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk859-su-nd&recurring=0&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fcontribute%2Fpage%2Fhoulahan-digital&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NDkxMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkY2MwNTk1Zi05ZjM3LWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=41a_H4xAoH5dwoUIqZybT5TWPSLU2SFBMW_wrxzdmCQ=&emci=d35af679-eb32-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=dcc0595f-9f37-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=21278485)**
First, Republicans attacked LGBTQ youth in schools across the country. Now, they’re taking aim at the lifesaving services thousands of LGBTQ Americans depend on to live, work, and stay healthy.
We didn’t think they’d do something like this – but we were wrong. And their attacks will likely only get worse as they’re empowered by far-right extremists in Congress and across the country.
**[_So please, Derek: Will you sign your name and join Chrissy in resisting anti-LGBTQ hate wherever it arises?_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67881432/421192362/-1663935338?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk859-su-nd&recurring=0&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fcontribute%2Fpage%2Fhoulahan-digital&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NDkxMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkY2MwNTk1Zi05ZjM3LWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=41a_H4xAoH5dwoUIqZybT5TWPSLU2SFBMW_wrxzdmCQ=&emci=d35af679-eb32-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=dcc0595f-9f37-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=21278485)**
Thank you,

Team Chrissy

Devon, PA 19333

body:

| | | [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=099efcce8e3847368c2fbae7a7175c5c&_e=dasdxDBWzAW9oGEFH70uZ484BstTqkxYk1IVUNpgnOoOofNhvvTuevnw1MGCv0Sw2kBGDe9DiMz0J-udepm-m7xKK8S8Z6ld_2gv4jUO5L0bwpl31Zq5JKgixZ6DTzdGsEcS7pA1g1adZb40mmra5eXqmN6GaxtRA5jzkLWJCxDn4P7BHTG2njPafdlNk1H3JRhUs8fi4mZRAL20yey77P-AFsb4UT7dbp_RINzXtBcAR6_WbtgDYadhTxFlKqSYYNzhcI9_0Jf6Gmkl7PqCizYITFmlm079CDtwvrhAJSv6QNf_mU8NBNDxbBG5hxWY9i9rES2IlOkn3r9yvPAzh04kOJccsjHtKz6B5nHTqlQHqvu9fajeg151U72nrvPSge07xNIeeFyIkrO-deqMP3gwvRRmX-WY0Nl4fVOgsnU%3D)

| Fellow American,

There is a very concerning trend occurring in our country that has me worried for Americans who hold to biblical & faith-based values. [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=099efcce8e3847368c2fbae7a7175c5c&_e=dasdxDBWzAW9oGEFH70uZ484BstTqkxYk1IVUNpgnOoOofNhvvTuevnw1MGCv0Sw2kBGDe9DiMz0J-udepm-m7xKK8S8Z6ld_2gv4jUO5L0bwpl31Zq5JKgixZ6DTzdGsEcS7pA1g1adZb40mmra5eXqmN6GaxtRA5jzkLWJCxDn4P7BHTG2njPafdlNk1H3JRhUs8fi4mZRAL20yey77P-AFsb4UT7dbp_RINzXtBcAR6_WbtgDYadhTxFlKqSYYNzhcI9_0Jf6Gmkl7PqCiyWWVAg0N0B8MpzVCd-jfVCAM93MT-ZQ9ZcvKj0AZrBQ1tPmARlh5mgBQ98qk0Gyn9wO7_bs3klI7AhBWzNOIZwrLub5IdEG9sEaWDSH2u1TnPlSHREgcafonBVOWaCitOo9-oDRufMaKH8w_elBhaU%3D) After the _Respect for Marriage Act_ was passed by a bi-partisan effort and signed into law, I am fearful that legal persecution will only intensify against Americans holding to faith-based values and who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith.

[**Are you concerned that America is abandoning a basic tenet of our founding -_Religious Liberty?_**](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=099efcce8e3847368c2fbae7a7175c5c&_e=dasdxDBWzAW9oGEFH70uZ484BstTqkxYk1IVUNpgnOoOofNhvvTuevnw1MGCv0Sw2kBGDe9DiMz0J-udepm-m7xKK8S8Z6ld_2gv4jUO5L0bwpl31Zq5JKgixZ6DTzdGsEcS7pA1g1adZb40mmra5eXqmN6GaxtRA5jzkLWJCxDn4P7BHTG2njPafdlNk1H3JRhUs8fi4mZRAL20yey77P-AFsb4UT7dbp_RINzXtBcAR6_WbtgDYadhTxFlKqSYYNzhcI9_0Jf6Gmkl7PqCiw1rmPcksnkjP74iACk1tp1Fk7zArpxB-WO00jOi4BmhVJC-F0UocQrUIQ3OD1p4WeJ3NjS4b8JjBOA8i66XwQFtXaNp1J2-UZVXP2qXpMa4Jvl55OOXwUYQHclT0l6shcoXlbsrDk6cLf2ud1luNCk%3D)

In addition to the passing of the _Respect for Marriage Act_ , numerous examples over the past decade have concerned me: KENNEDY v. BREMERTON SCHOOL DISTRICT, MASTERPIECE CAKESHOP v. COLORADO CIVIL RIGHTS COMMISSION, and 303 CREATIVE v. ELENIS are just a few examples of legal persecution against Americans holding to faith-based values who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith.

Furthermore, an amendment to the _Respect for Marriage Act_ , brought forth by Senator Mike Lee, prohibiting the Federal Government from retaliating against schools, businesses, and organizations because of their religious beliefs about same-sex marriage failed.

**This has the potential to only intensify legal persecution against individuals, businesses, churches, and nonprofits holding to faith-based values. **

The American Cornerstone Institute is a non-profit that I founded to preserve and promote the cornerstones that laid the foundation for the greatest nation the world has ever seen: Faith, Liberty, Community, and Life.

Whether it is a football coach losing his job for praying at midfield after a game, or a baker being sued for not wanting to bake a cake that violates his religious values, **are you concerned as I am with the increase in legal persecution against Americans who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith?**

Please share your thoughts in this quick 2-minute survey concerning religious liberty in America.

**[https://offers.americancornerstone.org/religious-liberty-survey/](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=099efcce8e3847368c2fbae7a7175c5c&_e=dasdxDBWzAW9oGEFH70uZ484BstTqkxYk1IVUNpgnOoOofNhvvTuevnw1MGCv0Sw2kBGDe9DiMz0J-udepm-m7xKK8S8Z6ld_2gv4jUO5L0bwpl31Zq5JKgixZ6DTzdGsEcS7pA1g1adZb40mmra5eXqmN6GaxtRA5jzkLWJCxDn4P7BHTG2njPafdlNk1H3JRhUs8fi4mZRAL20yey77P-AFsb4UT7dbp_RINzXtBcAR6_WbtgDYadhTxFlKqSYYNzhcI9_0Jf6Gmkl7PqCi8nNBYDOvFdml_bm1jhc5sN8Yh0phmi331ciO_Lf0N7AdiTTS2KRS-KrfHYiQgC3D0uK79Qy7kXJ5sa7dwb8zZeHz3DKHq6V6RXDL8D_2vCztka_zVl9hkVWx7CS25MVHGe8AQvpmomOUGk1Q70wono%3D)**

Thank you for your consideration.

Regards,

Dr. Ben Carson
Founder & Chairman American Cornerstone Institute

subject: Our troops can’t access food benefits
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jimmy Panetta for Congress 2024, FEC ID# C00592154
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67881936/421193972/-2113420158?source=EM_NBI_JP_20230814_PT_troops_0_3MO_TeamPanetta_NA_NA_troops&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTkwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYTBjNTI2ZC05ZjM3LWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SmQRcCZBhHPksDG-d-Y0NlBltvhRhGCTbUb6Rp5-R64=&emci=3f85d3a4-0b36-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=da0c526d-9f37-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=6108787) | Peter,

Currently, **there are men and women in uniform who rely on food stamps to feed their families.**

As shameful as that is, it is also shocking to know that some of those same service members don’t qualify for food assistance due to a bureaucratic calculation.

One of Jimmy’s main priorities is supporting our men and women in uniform. As a means to further help them, **Jimmy wrote and introduced legislation to ensure that the military doesn’t let any of our service members and their families go hungry.**

Jimmy’s bill revamps the calculations to ensure that those service members get the benefits that they deserve!

That is the least we can do for our men and women in uniform.

Currently, Jimmy’s bill is in the National Defense Authorization Act that is being negotiated with the Senate.

[Peter, sign your name today if you support Jimmy and his work to ensure our troops and their families don’t go hungry.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67881937/421193973/-106825417?source=EM_NBI_JP_20230814_PT_troops_0_3MO_TeamPanetta_NA_NA_troops&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTkwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYTBjNTI2ZC05ZjM3LWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SmQRcCZBhHPksDG-d-Y0NlBltvhRhGCTbUb6Rp5-R64=&emci=3f85d3a4-0b36-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=da0c526d-9f37-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=6108787)

Thank you,

Team Panetta

disclaimer_text: Paid for by Brittany Pettersen for Colorado
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67882288/421195245/915037627?refcode=email_081023_Pettersen-crow-split&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MDIyOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZjhlZGYxMi1hMDM3LWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zs60JfQSjL7UDSIhDKCbUM6KoDNUTvXJp1fdFHmnX4o=) Team, Exactly one year ago today, President Biden signed the PACT Act into law. This was a historic step toward supporting our servicemembers. The PACT Act marks the largest expansion of benefits and services for veterans exposed to toxins in more than 30 years — which the DOD says could help as many as _**3.5 million people.**_ I have seen the effects of being exposed to burn pits and toxic chemicals. Soldiers I served alongside in Iraq and Afghanistan need care — which is why I pushed hard to pass this legislation. Unfortunately, not everyone agrees. Extremist Republicans, including Lauren Boebert and Marjorie Taylor Greene, refused to vote for the PACT Act — _even while they praise our veterans on Twitter._ It’s not just this legislation either. MAGA Republicans have shown time and time again that they’re willing to put party over people — even at the expense of our veterans. Donald Trump calling servicemembers who’ve died in war “suckers'' and “losers.” House Republicans hijacking a bipartisan defense bill to insert their right-wing agenda. **Our servicemembers deserve better than to be used as political pawns.** [_**I'm ready to continue working with Brittany Pettersen to give our fellow veterans the respect, care, and benefits they fought for. Will you split $10 between our campaigns to help us continue this work in Congress?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67882289/421195246/-1777122001?refcode=email_081023_Pettersen-crow-split&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MDIyOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZjhlZGYxMi1hMDM3LWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zs60JfQSjL7UDSIhDKCbUM6KoDNUTvXJp1fdFHmnX4o=) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | | [Donate $10 →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67882290/421195247/-1777122001?refcode=email_081023_Pettersen-crow-split&amount=10&express_lane=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MDIyOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZjhlZGYxMi1hMDM3LWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zs60JfQSjL7UDSIhDKCbUM6KoDNUTvXJp1fdFHmnX4o=)

In DeSantis’s attack on our freedom of education, he has: **banned books, rejected the teaching of an Advanced Placement African American studies course, barred teachers from asking students their preferred pronouns, and prohibited any kind of material that could cause “guilt, anguish or any form of psychological stress.”**

And at a recent campaign event, he claimed that in January 2025, _“we leave woke ideology in the dustbin of history where it belongs.”_

This is happening all over the nation, and we can’t let it touch New Jersey. Extremism is a danger to not only students, teachers, and parents, but to our democracy. We need to combat the grasp political culture wars have on our classrooms and stop extremists like Ron DeSantis in their tracks before he infiltrates schools in New Jersey and across the nation.

name: Jon Tester
subject: I’m the most vulnerable Democrat running for reelection
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Booker for Kentucky
body:
Folks, it's official.

Roll Call just ranked me as the most vulnerable Democratic Senator running
for reelection in 2024.

That’s why Mitch McConnell has made this race his top target and national
Republicans are already hammering me with attacks. I know we can win in
Montana, but it won’t be easy.

Look—I’m not panicking, but I am sounding the alarm. A wave of outside
money and attacks are about to flood into Montana. This will be the most
important Senate election in the country, and it’s up to us to build a
team strong enough to win.

Montana is a top battleground and could decide whether or not Democrats
hold our narrow majority. That’s why I’m personally counting on you to
make a donation today.

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/18983?t=1001&akid=3482%2E346206%2E85fJUl ]Split a donation of $25 or more between Charles Booker and my campaign
to help my team respond to future attacks and ensure we have the resources
to reach voters and keep Mitch McConnell from taking back the Senate
majority.

CHIP IN →

So much is on the line: building an economy that works for all of us,
getting dark money out of politics, protecting a woman’s right to make her
own health care decisions, and much more.

With your help, we can get it done.

— Jon

name: VoteVets HQ
subject: Alabama has turned against Tommy Tuberville
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY VOTEVETS, VOTEVETS
body:
That’s huge. Really. And it’s because of you.
#
Derek,
When we first started talking about Tommy Tuberville and his hold on promotions it wasn’t a big story. National news wasn’t covering it much, and it wasn’t getting much attention in the Capitol.
But we kept at it, because we knew it was important.
Didn’t matter that Tommy Tuberville represented Alabama in the Senate, and that we’d probably never seriously contest his seat.
We did it because it’s critical to our National Security. That’s one of the reasons we started VoteVets all those years ago: To make sure Democrats started to show that they care about our Veterans and our Military just as much as the GOP does.
But now, months later, months of pushing on Capitol Hill, countless meetings, dozens of petitions, thousands of dollars on digital ads, and thousands more dollars advertising on TV in Alabama, look at where we are.
**Alabama has turned against Tommy Tuberville.** 58% of Alabama voters — a majority of Trump supporters and Republicans — think Tuberville needs to stand down.
That’s huge. Really. And it’s because of you.

name: Becky Wagner
subject: My husband is facing 10 years in prison for defending himself
body:
I wish I were writing to you under happier circumstances...

Dear Friend,
I wish I were writing to you under happier circumstances...
...but my hero police officer husband, Mark Wagner, is the next big target of the radical anti-police movement and I urgently need your help before they make an example out of him.
That's Mark in the picture I sent you, along with our boys Nolan and Jacob and dog Kilo.
[](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=44a7f4287f9b42a8800e5d18f26dfd6a&_e=qU02w5sXi3w1ZFhaJvvcxv_3JSHpoyhuefm1lR-xd2g24s3gMOi0IBQgI-CzJtiuV6Pq2PsrUSZcHGHjm2Mwq9w-kx_Z7nsR2XxG20Zr4Fv1IXpn4eAuZDW7ueysGOr1K503BKocJAhBOvnz-prUAPoTVwBbi4TQnIwGm9FFK6obzc-iEtuwNgttJewA0B77Xf8vd1rNPYerJPRYSdcY9OSoZ_9_k_QOKoBhYOEMYSRQXTGocHcRNxdZLNCFlMxfqhuJ2EOV07Efi3gKnWMPafFHTapDDvogN4Ml23jDY9Piym1J3c5xMEKjKZeaItDuSz7-7RUt7JTPwfh6K4g6ANbTiPb9Lm9Esdp2O79bKKw%3D)
Not only is Mark a highly respected officer, he's an incredibly supportive father, a loving husband, and a fierce friend.
He's dedicated his life to protecting others. But we live in far-Left Madison, Wisconsin - and the "defund the police" mob whipped up rage, LIED about what happened, and trashed Mark's reputation.
And now Mark faces 10 YEARS behind bars for doing exactly what he was trained to do in the line of duty - and I'm scared I might lose him. [**That 's why I wrote this letter to you, someone I've never met before, to ask for your help.**](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=44a7f4287f9b42a8800e5d18f26dfd6a&_e=qU02w5sXi3w1ZFhaJvvcxv_3JSHpoyhuefm1lR-xd2g24s3gMOi0IBQgI-CzJtiuV6Pq2PsrUSZcHGHjm2Mwq9w-kx_Z7nsR2XxG20Zr4Fv1IXpn4eAuZDW7ueysGOr1K503BKocJAhBOvnz-prUAPoTVwBbi4TQnIwGm9FFK6obzc-iEtuwNgttJewA0B777S7ocMcVFgUB_8zj0chxsqUzJhzRsKc-K2Zo7pIb0a34QvNY42Vw-Xm2O6VEJrdQn_jk8vNaxYOXnuWMw42JgX8QU730dgILtWkMYIRsLBtANcSk0_H6mk-tEa9uwRRuVUz1Y-nbGoOURPBAXQfyB6KnULAQFznHepPpEmLRWiM%3D)
But first, let me explain what happened...
On the morning of February 3, 2022, Mark and other officers tried to arrest a _violent_ _criminal_ named Quadren Wilson.
Wilson has a rap sheet a mile long with dozens of arrests for drug distribution, theft, witness intimidation, battery, eluding police, and more. He was wanted for allegedly dealing fentanyl to a man found dead in a restaurant bathroom.
Mark's arrest team planned to capture Wilson in his vehicle using a containment strategy. They pulled in their trucks to block his car on both ends. But Wilson floored the accelerator, spinning his wheels wildly in a desperate attempt to escape justice.
Mark and another officer exited their vehicle to make the arrest. Mark was holding one of those big POLICE shields and had his gun drawn. But Wilson refused Mark's commands to show his hands, continuing to spin his wheels and try to force his way out.
With the wheels screeching and smoking, Mark and the other officer saw Wilson reach into the center console and pull his hand up.
Mark thought Wilson had a gun. He heard what he thought was gunfire. Then Mark felt something hit the shield he was holding and push him backward.** **
**Both Mark and the other officer responded to this life-threatening situation by firing into the vehicle.**
Mark believed his life and his fellow officers' lives were in danger. He did what he was trained to do and stopped the threat.
Thankfully, Wilson survived and no one else was injured. But because Wilson is black and Mark is white - anti-police radicals jumped at the chance to target Mark.
Protesters drummed up a racial firestorm by spreading lies that Wilson "had his hands up" and that he "was shot five times in the back." The corrupt liberal media repeated these lies and painted my husband as a monster.
And on September 22, 2022, the liberal District Attorney caved to the mob and filed BOGUS felony charges against Mark. **Now Mark faces 10 YEARS in prison.**
[**_Now I hope you can see why I 'm turning to you for help today._**](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=44a7f4287f9b42a8800e5d18f26dfd6a&_e=qU02w5sXi3w1ZFhaJvvcxv_3JSHpoyhuefm1lR-xd2g24s3gMOi0IBQgI-CzJtiuV6Pq2PsrUSZcHGHjm2Mwq9w-kx_Z7nsR2XxG20Zr4Fv1IXpn4eAuZDW7ueysGOr1K503BKocJAhBOvnz-prUAPoTVwBbi4TQnIwGm9FFK6obzc-iEtuwNgttJewA0B77_mNAkC2a8XDuh6KZ_QnJRd0Cc6h61r38HCXWuV4i1d4-gpC_5p5RtBbcsz2bAFmshiaeIEq4WhZfUH6ZZapmXc_TkuZsQP4TFyd3v32wMVI-R9nuOe5rXQkzjM__-yKOySEqZnZTTvyA3l7OcoThelOUux8g442J58KMBgWfy5g%3D)
Mark dedicated his life to helping others. He's spent 30 years in law enforcement, most of them with the Milwaukee Police Department (MPD).
We knew fighting alone against the anti-police movement here in Wisconsin would be impossible and our hope that justice would prevail was quickly fading when we received a call from **the Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund (LELDF)** offering to help Mark.
This incredible organization helps innocent officers, like my husband, who have been unfairly prosecuted for split-second, use-of-force decisions in the line of duty.
Law and justice experts like President Ronald Reagan's Attorney General Edwin Meese and former FBI Assistant Director Ronald Hosko serve on LELDF's Board. LELDF's president, Jason Johnson, served over 20 years as a police officer, including as Deputy Commissioner of the Baltimore Police Department.
In short, these are experts when it comes to policing. And they thoroughly vet cases to determine if an officer was wrongly accused or charged before deciding to help.
They provide legal counsel, expert witnesses, whatever is needed to make sure wrongly accused police officers get a fair shake in court. And they do it all free of charge!
But LELDF doesn't receive any money from the government to help police officers facing unjust charges. They're funded entirely by the generous support of folks like you who can recognize a miscarriage of justice and want to help fix it.
This is why I reached out to you today. I needed to ask you a very important question:
[**_Will you please help my husband Mark fight the unjust charges against him and clear his name by rushing a generous, tax-deductible donation to LELDF today?_**](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=44a7f4287f9b42a8800e5d18f26dfd6a&_e=qU02w5sXi3w1ZFhaJvvcxv_3JSHpoyhuefm1lR-xd2g24s3gMOi0IBQgI-CzJtiuV6Pq2PsrUSZcHGHjm2Mwq9w-kx_Z7nsR2XxG20Zr4Fv1IXpn4eAuZDW7ueysGOr1K503BKocJAhBOvnz-prUAPoTVwBbi4TQnIwGm9FFK6obzc-iEtuwNgttJewA0B77W5zaTEgCtKKIvIT1ZtQeqpjuKUt8Yd9GKVrAvqs2EswqvOZpFcrZ2i9QwzZLTgGgQ1ppb13fdY758EH0GQFErZujmNl8-ztA6ZCWWBjcvviknuOQoblfhZ0530HYYx6ev9Pb2EuAGM9YiwMDHyutTDxziKeODsAgclA17S69Qac%3D)
Your kind gift today of $35, $50, or $100 to help Mark will mean so much to my family.
Or, if you're blessed with the means to help with a gift of $250, $500, or even $1,000 or more, I pray you will so my husband doesn't spend 10 YEARS behind bars away from his family.
Right now, LELDF is preparing to ramp up legal action in Mark's case. [**So please follow this link to make your tax-deductible donation right away.**](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=44a7f4287f9b42a8800e5d18f26dfd6a&_e=qU02w5sXi3w1ZFhaJvvcxv_3JSHpoyhuefm1lR-xd2g24s3gMOi0IBQgI-CzJtiuV6Pq2PsrUSZcHGHjm2Mwq9w-kx_Z7nsR2XxG20Zr4Fv1IXpn4eAuZDW7ueysGOr1K503BKocJAhBOvnz-prUAPoTVwBbi4TQnIwGm9FFK6obzc-iEtuwNgttJewA0B77Vt26i3ISWZJ6NL8y3Xp_8CvI-mZIp23e38gb-9Q0tIph-EUiiEyQrhWiF5Sz33hkTbkUbX4X8dVhDSr5TNibtszNFBwkUuAGKGtd7Den_tyQ1s13-RUzUEjyvdwB294rgaQ_ug5thcY7IB1lbKMFVXNsUlDb30DWAMNFFOWquEM%3D)
Any gift amount you can send today is truly a blessing. No matter what you're able to give, please say a prayer for Mark and our family.
Thank you in advance for your generous support of my family and LELDF.
With deepest gratitude,
Becky Wagner
P.S. Mark is the type of person who'd offer to donate a kidney to a friend in need just because it's the right thing to do. In fact, that's exactly what he did when he donated one of his kidneys to his former partner of more than a decade! Mark didn't even let his partner know he got checked out as a potential donor. He just said that his partner had young kids who needed him to be around and it was the right thing to do.
This is the type of man the anti-police mob is targeting and trying to destroy: a kidney donor, a youth football coach, a man who assists the elderly from our parish in running errands and doing handy-man projects. A man of faith who's always helping others.
Mark faces 10 years behind bars - simply for doing his job to serve and protect. [**_Will you help him clear his name by making a tax-deductible donation of $35, $50, $100, $250, $500, $1,000 or any amount to the Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund today?_** ](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=44a7f4287f9b42a8800e5d18f26dfd6a&_e=qU02w5sXi3w1ZFhaJvvcxv_3JSHpoyhuefm1lR-xd2g24s3gMOi0IBQgI-CzJtiuV6Pq2PsrUSZcHGHjm2Mwq9w-kx_Z7nsR2XxG20Zr4Fv1IXpn4eAuZDW7ueysGOr1K503BKocJAhBOvnz-prUAPoTVwBbi4TQnIwGm9FFK6obzc-iEtuwNgttJewA0B77mFq4ubN2jRvTphDWH5U4w2b3Oz_UExkE8laPctRAKTXWwT794t-fNkWdkOJJxi6rGtd7htQoezc5g8MUTGHye5a4XjwGga7DEANO3uRkHwH-vbtxWtBfPKgsuy92IAA6lTl9RZtA2q1RutFKsinzN8QdcNLf7jE1zb-YoXX3bL8%3D) Your generosity will help LELDF mount the strongest legal defenses for my husband and other wrongly accused officers. Thank you in advance for your prayers and support.

\----------------

_More such officers who sacrifice so much for will face similar fates unless we speak out and stand up for the brave men and women in blue. The next time you see a police officer in your community, please thank them for their service. To read more about our mission or the other Law Enforcement officers we 're defending, please visit **www.leldf.org**. And remember - Blue Lives Matter!_
_(C) Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund | www.PoliceDefense.org
2560 Huntington Ave. Suite 203, Alexandria, VA, 22303_

Defend the Constitution
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_
[](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_s=44a7f4287f9b42a8800e5d18f26dfd6a&_t=NvmD3z_puQM3RmhI-OHF-CJh8Dr2-2YcuUajemGWp1dylKXdKa0OV18r93HLshUQEzTjHAqqFMGWx1Fh3tUcHzerfe-2wXDXBDexQyrdhX9yBoBJqaFoyvZrBBs15LBWVBdOQiEtOgxpOIQeub4rbqLILJF1vU99GnzKykJ_Ct0%3D)

name: Sheriff Mark Lamb
subject: What can $7 buy you these days?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mark Lamb for Senate
body:
$7 GOES A LONG WAY, especially when it comes to U.S. elections
[Unsubscribe](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_s=02ff656465f4450282a7597494d76150&_t=F8s6ZG-JunThoqwXus_1zLfUdcHFCczVLPN56SOH4H_HOrT6D92Ne0gyb7qwIAJsZN67SDv0cRYc__6OQ564CG8bngZcw7C10ItFEBgv_Ac%3D) | [Mark as Junk](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_s=02ff656465f4450282a7597494d76150&_t=F8s6ZG-JunThoqwXus_1zLfUdcHFCczVLPN56SOH4H_HOrT6D92Ne0gyb7qwIAJsZN67SDv0cRYc__6OQ564CG8bngZcw7C10ItFEBgv_Ac%3D)

|
Fellow Conservative,

It’s Sheriff Mark Lamb with an invitation to set a reminder in your phone for August 6th, 2024. It’s an important date not just for me personally, but also for the people of Arizona because next year on August 6th, Arizona voters will nominate one Democrat and one Republican to faceoff in our state’s upcoming Senate election.

I'm going to cut straight to the point: **[I am in sincere need of your help.](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=02ff656465f4450282a7597494d76150&_e=OQ-5bAlN9Gdj_O5sC9118HTMMkL43OmP7iOtaXQemRlE5JoLiHoeCuJbug_oALw-OAIkODv3YqvmsgcWPMUvpqcNI4ajjOIVkVV0BaRMiRcpBEpGZdG_C3dDAzqL2zudC3OXco9_8T1y0r9JIxN8A_DKDk_4QLc7Xnb-EqnmlkHFeCap7mLOJAgXMjpIBd_xZ0jOHGMvXXsDJ_aWbxw8AF4ZbwPS-LAeYn4BIqXQ4z-wXTGY1HqwO4cRS5wfrYIOONUdZYDAqIhQkl5Xiyk72UJ45jLLuymI8aMj-UiMr8HCsr60kcZF3l8ZYrCo-Bn6G5O2gfdZRnqWxX7aVAVJfycN5D_tw8HcLYMrCpp_GrWVDBmNKqHoWtZv_wViGhSgfS5vyXRzw0s4BQbrdoIuhbbJkRgnhcVmbnsZz6jgjjY%3D)** Polls have shown that Republicans CAN win back this Senate seat from Democrats, but only if we have the necessary resources to compete. I've made a list below of items that need to be addressed in the short term.**[For the price of a quarter pounder and cheese from McDonalds, $7, you can help me and my team get started _today._](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=02ff656465f4450282a7597494d76150&_e=OQ-5bAlN9Gdj_O5sC9118HTMMkL43OmP7iOtaXQemRlE5JoLiHoeCuJbug_oALw-OAIkODv3YqvmsgcWPMUvpqcNI4ajjOIVkVV0BaRMiRcpBEpGZdG_C3dDAzqL2zudC3OXco9_8T1y0r9JIxN8A_DKDk_4QLc7Xnb-EqnmlkHFeCap7mLOJAgXMjpIBd_xZ0jOHGMvXXsDJ_aWbxw8AF4ZbwPS-LAeYn4BIqXQ4z-wXTGY1HqwO4cRS5wfrYIOmqdt520VPX54vbUpAgpLqpZqu9K8JEYicqsc_E0nQL_fjaWPwxoznEpaCc08yYXSIG_0ir0wKjEdRzM3hCZuhBrKtE6up4iGs8re3hQOAmPuMy8PpRoYJgCN9QidXM7MwHdjeL8KntVDBWUgQKeNNy51WSva4V_aZUUKwg7LvuE%3D) **

[**CHIP IN $7.00**](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=02ff656465f4450282a7597494d76150&_e=OQ-5bAlN9Gdj_O5sC9118HTMMkL43OmP7iOtaXQemRlE5JoLiHoeCuJbug_oALw-OAIkODv3YqvmsgcWPMUvpqcNI4ajjOIVkVV0BaRMiRcpBEpGZdG_C3dDAzqL2zudC3OXco9_8T1y0r9JIxN8A_DKDk_4QLc7Xnb-EqnmlkHFeCap7mLOJAgXMjpIBd_xZ0jOHGMvXXsDJ_aWbxw8AF4ZbwPS-LAeYn4BIqXQ4z-wXTGY1HqwO4cRS5wfrYIOEPxH0WXjiUYI03E5e-xSncLDnk4MmMbQDJnMtvFuVMZHV1-V_rF8Fx1p5mZc-DJ5SCLXO1mXGyJkAqpX93nVoWHZIl4YxUCU54YkEP4CLoVbcNObRtPyKSJ9zEhHrgpyDgTEZXF49HaLwMORq-0bj62cSRqYBhH0Cybz5C00Mxc%3D)
There is a lot that needs to be done in the next year to shore up support with voters across the state, which include:

1. Identifying and contacting primary voters
2. **Holding town hall meetings and other meet-n-greet opportunities**
3. Build out our campaign from the bottom up
4. Contact every winnable vote in Arizona before my opponents do
5. **Hire staff to help me accomplish everything in the bullet points above**

I know that right now most eyes are on the Republican Presidential Primary, but we simply cannot forget that races like mine here in Arizona are just as important. **Without a Republican Senate, a future Republican president would have one hand tied behind his back**.

**If we want to get on with taking our country back from progressive daydreamers, we MUST flip Senate seats like the one I’m running for in Arizona.**

**I’m hoping that you’ll see this email and understand that our need is real.** Having the support of grassroots donors such as yourself is one of the most critical pieces of the puzzle in any campaign. I hope you’ll do me the honor of **[chipping in a few dollars](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=02ff656465f4450282a7597494d76150&_e=OQ-5bAlN9Gdj_O5sC9118HTMMkL43OmP7iOtaXQemRlE5JoLiHoeCuJbug_oALw-OAIkODv3YqvmsgcWPMUvpqcNI4ajjOIVkVV0BaRMiRcpBEpGZdG_C3dDAzqL2zudC3OXco9_8T1y0r9JIxN8A_DKDk_4QLc7Xnb-EqnmlkHFeCap7mLOJAgXMjpIBd_xZ0jOHGMvXXsDJ_aWbxw8AF4ZbwPS-LAeYn4BIqXQ4z-wXTGY1HqwO4cRS5wfrYIOWi6-We1f3CR9zfc4ok9Sw8M5pVpT6_KPyhLIYD_PqZ2KTIBSphaUP4h7kAQRjuVxkrW_3ShAXMomCiJEq8S3xM32oSYDtJ0RL8U7g6c4nCkKXVFyTgdTTUMvlBxh5lck_84o8VfqWLM50cPwIjLEFlBJ-XphcKalFXJOZ7vsL9M%3D)** to help our chances today.

**Meet Sheriff Lamb:** GOD. FAMILY. FREEDOM.

Sheriff Mark Lamb is a husband, father, grandfather, and God-fearing patriot. From Hawaii to Manila, Arizona, Mark Lamb's rich experirences inspired his life of service. As the 24th Sheriff of Pinal County, Arizona, he drives a powerful agenda to ensure community safety and prosperity.

Sheriff Lamb trained with the Maricopa County Sheriff's Office Deputy Academy and was named Valedictorian of his class. He was hired by the Salt River Pima-Maricopa Indian Community, where he excelled as a police officer and was named Rookie of the Year. The following year, he received the Officer of the Year award. He was later promoted as a Detective to the Gang Enforcement Unit and in his first year was named Detective of the Year.

body:
#
$3.
It may not seem like a lot of money compared to Republican corporate mega-donors and super PACs, but **when we put all of our grassroots donations together, it amounts to a really powerful movement.**
[Please, will you make a donation today to power our campaign to make Alexandria the representative for NY-14 in the next Congress? $3 goes a long way when everyone is chipping in.](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-2023810-1.SWiJkU&refcode=em20230810-4783-P_FND_EGR_GFM&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=4783%2E2526796%2EqRli8S)
**[Contribute $3](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-2023810-1.SWiJkU&refcode=em20230810-4783-P_FND_EGR_GFM&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=4783%2E2526796%2EqRli8S)**
For years, we’ve been the #1 small-dollar funded campaign in Congress. And those small dollars add up to a lot of influence.
$3 donations let us beat a Republican who raised $10 million against us.
$3 donations allowed us to deliver 80,000 meals to our neighbors in the depths of the pandemic, and provide 100,000 masks to teachers, small businesses, and essential workers.
$3 donations have helped us bring 6,000 hours of free, virtual tutoring to under-resourced families with our Homework Helpers program.
[What do you say? Your donation today will go directly toward re-electing Alexandria and defeating right-wing fascists in NY-14 once and for all.](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-2023810-1.SWiJkU&refcode=em20230810-4783-P_FND_EGR_GFM&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=4783%2E2526796%2EqRli8S)
**[Contribute $3 today →](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-2023810-1.SWiJkU&refcode=em20230810-4783-P_FND_EGR_GFM&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=4&akid=4783%2E2526796%2EqRli8S)**
Thank you in advance,
Team AOC

body:
please don’t let us down!
| **🚨 BREAKING 🚨
Trump Escalates Attacks on Special Counsel Jack Smith** Donald Trump has been threatening and attacking Special Counsel Jack Smith for indicting him for his crimes — even calling Smith _“deranged!”_

**We _refuse_ to sit by while Trump spouts his nonsense, so we’re sending Jack Smith a MASSIVE letter thanking him for all his amazing work!**

[**You’ve been PERSONALLY selected to sign, friend, so please don’t let us down: Add your name to thank Jack Smith now! »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/51234?t=6&akid=9807%2E878179%2ESetdvz) | [Donate $3 to sign the letter now »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/51234?t=7&akid=9807%2E878179%2ESetdvz)
---
TO: Special Counsel Jack Smith
FROM: A grateful Democrat
Subject: Thank you. **Dear Special Counsel Jack Smith,**

**_Thank you for all your hard work defending our democracy!_**

After Trump tried to OVERTURN President Biden’s victory and incited the deadly January 6th insurrection, we feared he would NEVER be held accountable.

Thanks to you, we’re one step closer to finally booting Trump out of politics for good. **_IT’S ABOUT TIME!_**

I know it isn’t easy fighting off Trump and the GOP’s escalating threats to take you down, so please know that Democrats across the country stand with you.

[**I can’t thank you enough for indicting Donald Trump for his treasonous crimes! So I’m signing this letter and chipping in $3 to the Voter Protection Project to show my gratitude and to keep electing incredible Democrats who will save our democracy from MAGA extremism »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/51234?t=8&akid=9807%2E878179%2ESetdvz) | [Donate $3 to sign now »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/51234?t=9&akid=9807%2E878179%2ESetdvz)
---
**_X A grateful Democrat_**
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=9807%2E878179%2ESetdvz). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=9807%2E878179%2ESetdvz).**

[Click here](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=9807%2E878179%2ESetdvz) to request fewer emails. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps. Please, consider making a . Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a. to request fewer emails. name: Wesley Bell
subject: Missouri isn’t immune to gun violence
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BELL FOR MISSOURI
body:
Join me as I demand Congress act to keep our communities safe. Peter, America has a gun violence epidemic, and our government is failing to address it. This year, there have been 430 mass shootings. **And Missouri isn't immune.** Last year, Missouri ranked _fourth_ for the highest gun death rate in the nation. On average, 1,288 people die yearly from gun violence in Missouri. **This violence is unsustainable, and it's heartbreaking for the thousands of families forced to lose a loved one every year, Peter.** Earlier this year, Democrats tried to pass meaningful gun reforms but were met with obstruction from Josh Hawley and other extremist Republicans. **[Solving gun violence shouldn't be a partisan issue – it's common sense. Now we just need to demand our government act. Join me as I demand Congress act to keep our communities safe from preventable gun violence. Add your name today.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67884428/421202350/1124181056?ms=em23_230809_gunpet_engg_gq_act___WB_ettx&refcode=em23_230809_gunpet_engg_gq_act___WB_ettx&source=em23_230809_gunpet_engg_gq_act___WB_ettx&utm_campaign=em23_230809_gunpet_engg_gq_act___WB_ettx&utm_medium=email&contactdata=2D24GEfGV/f5pvcUzPL7G0wC0E3+Kg9uOca+JinF5k/xnZJ7YANF/88gVaEKsuVsILbj/RtqIVj//cjgEoBcheJfEs6wAaevZNlU5oHLpThec5Jek0OY1Hm2lNZDucz59rJSzSz1RM87lWNZqX2uge+080XcdnvlrK2UTpt7wwM=&refcode2=8eb6cbeb-a537-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDYzODkiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOGViNmNiZWItYTUzNy1lZTExLWEzZjEtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=q-vkE0vl68WM2KZceEo_d1ei8IHZTqczCJMSnKwEfkM=&emci=29fa6639-fc32-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=8eb6cbeb-a537-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=1020964)** Thank you,
