subject: What They Are Saying: Hundreds Cheered Governor Christie At Tell It Like It Is PAC Town Hall
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Tell It Like It Is PAC
body:
What They Are Saying: Hundreds Cheered Governor Christie At Tell It Like It Is PAC Town Hall | | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/0b81f9ab665a/what-they-are-saying-about-chris-christie-13559900?e=d0a9afa930)
---
|
---
|
---
|
---
**What They Are Saying: Hundreds Cheered Governor Christie At Tell It Like It Is PAC Town Hall
** _Governor Chris Sununu: “[Christie’s] Crushing It Here.”_

[Governor Chris Sununu](https://tellitlikeitispac.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=104ed976cff8130153157fdb8&id=ea7b042d88&e=d0a9afa930): “He did an _**incredible job in New Jersey**_ , He has walked in this state, _**campaigned in this state, more than I think any other non-New Hampshire human alive**_ – he was here over 100 days back in 2016. _**He’s crushing it here**_ , putting all his time, all his efforts, because he knows the value of New Hampshire citizens and he’s really knowing, and learning, and now preaching what live free or die is all about.”
[NH Journal Headline](https://tellitlikeitispac.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=104ed976cff8130153157fdb8&id=4f169a7113&e=d0a9afa930): **Christie And Sununu Clap Back At Trump In Salem Town Hall**
* “The one-time Trump ally _**touched on many issues**_ – government spending, inflation, the war in Ukraine, school shootings, and more – but there was no mistaking who was at the center of Christie’s remarks.”

* “To close his remarks, Christie returned to another central theme throughout the town hall: _**New Hampshire’s all-important role as the First-in-the-Nation**_ primary state in choosing the Republican nominee. The former governor outlined what would happen if New Hampshire voters choose him over Trump. ‘The day after, that rotted building with the nice facade that is Donald Trump, _**when that facade gets broken through by the people of New Hampshire, the building will collapse**_ , ’Christie predicted.”

[The Eagle Tribune](https://tellitlikeitispac.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=104ed976cff8130153157fdb8&id=36eeaec202&e=d0a9afa930): “A _**few hundred people listened and cheered**_ as Republican presidential hopeful and former New Jersey Gov. Chris Christie spoke and answered questions at a town hall meeting Wednesday at the Derry-Salem Elks Lodge.”
[Lanson Simmons, Merrimack, NH](https://tellitlikeitispac.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=104ed976cff8130153157fdb8&id=cb31fcdb0f&e=d0a9afa930): “What brought me here tonight to see Chris Christie in person is _**his candor and his forthright honesty and truth**_ of what this nation needs to hear, and I find it very refreshing.”
[Paula, Raymond, NH](https://tellitlikeitispac.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=104ed976cff8130153157fdb8&id=d63a96b754&e=d0a9afa930): “I think Trump can be a big bully, and you got to deal with bullies sometimes... You can’t just ignore them sometimes, and that’s what he’s doing. _**He’s manning up**_ , so I don’t have a problem with that.”
[James Major, Wilmington, MA](https://tellitlikeitispac.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=104ed976cff8130153157fdb8&id=9523634c95&e=d0a9afa930): “ _**He’s straightforward. I feel he’s honest**_ and he’s always done a good job for the state of New Jersey... He seems to be in the game for the right reason.”
[Grant Cornell, Manchester, NH](https://tellitlikeitispac.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=104ed976cff8130153157fdb8&id=4af8858816&e=d0a9afa930): “I’m kind of a constitutionalist and the first time I voted in 2020 it was for a third party but this time I’m going to play in this primary... To me _**character and humanity means a lot and I think Christie seems to have both.**_ ”
[Lynne Snierson, Hampstead, NH](https://tellitlikeitispac.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=104ed976cff8130153157fdb8&id=3a8fde90a3&e=d0a9afa930): “I really appreciate that _**he’s willing to take on Trump**_ and thought it was worth checking out his approach.”
[Jeff Upton, Groton, MA](https://tellitlikeitispac.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=104ed976cff8130153157fdb8&id=61aaa61551&e=d0a9afa930): “He seems sane. There is rational thought going on and a lot of people would disagree with that but he makes sense to me... _**He’s about middle-minded**_ in my view and I’m not over there on the far right myself.”

| [DONATE](https://tellitlikeitispac.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=104ed976cff8130153157fdb8&id=1fbff122f1&e=d0a9afa930)

name: Laura Friedman
subject: re: Major victory for abortion rights in Ohio
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Laura Friedman for Congress
body:
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67890816/421209890/62647395?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDM1MzYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMDhjODMxYjktYWEzNy1lZTExLWEzZjEtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=9PgEfiCl7zNJWk11v8uN9RG3sxlFE7urRYCgTnxSV3Q=) Team, this is a different email than we usually send.

Today, I want to talk to you about what happened in Ohio on Tuesday. On the heels of the reversal of _Roe v. Wade_ last year, Ohio Republicans jammed through a devastating six-week abortion ban -- such a short amount of time that most women won’t even know they are pregnant.

**But Ohioans fought back.** They organized amidst their anger, and collected enough signatures for an amendment to appear on the ballot to safeguard abortion access in their state constitution.

Republicans would not let their activism slide. They tried to cheat the system, and that’s what Tuesday’s vote was about. Republicans put up an undemocratic ballot measure that would have raised the threshold needed to pass an amendment from 50% to 60%.

**Thanks to the efforts of pro-choice folks and organizers everywhere, Republicans’ last-ditch effort failed, clearing the way for an amendment that would protect Ohioans’ right to an abortion.**

This incident reminds us of the importance of winning the House for Democrats next November. Republicans in Congress have already threatened to pass a nation-wide abortion ban. **Democrats need to win control of Congress to enshrine the protections of Roe into federal law to stop these undemocratic, right-wing schemes and ensure that abortion access is available regardless of the state a person lives in.**

**[I know how important abortion rights are to you, and I’d love to hear more about what matters most. So as our team strategizes for August and the critical fall months ahead, will you take a minute to fill out our campaign priorities survey? Nothing is more important to me than listening to voters in CA-30.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67890817/421209893/-374593769?refcode=em-8.10.23-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDM1MzYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMDhjODMxYjktYWEzNy1lZTExLWEzZjEtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=9PgEfiCl7zNJWk11v8uN9RG3sxlFE7urRYCgTnxSV3Q=&emci=fbc731b9-aa37-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=08c831b9-aa37-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=8447100)**

clean_body: | = Team, this is a different email than we usually send. Today, I want to talk to you about what happened in Ohio on Tuesday. On the heels of the reversal of Roe v. Wade last year, Ohio Republicans jammed through a devastating six-week abortion ban -- such a short amount of time that most women won’t even know they are pregnant. But Ohioans fought back. They organized amidst their anger, and collected enough signatures for an amendment to appear on the ballot to safeguard abortion access in their state constitution. Republicans would not let their activism slide. They tried to cheat the system, and that’s what Tuesday’s vote was about. Republicans put up an undemocratic ballot measure that would have raised the threshold needed to pass an amendment from 50% to 60%. Thanks to the efforts of pro-choice folks and organizers everywhere, Republicans’ last-ditch effort failed, clearing the way for an amendment that would protect Ohioans’ right to an abortion. This incident reminds us of the importance of winning the House for Democrats next November. Republicans in Congress have already threatened to pass a nation-wide abortion ban. Democrats need to win control of Congress to enshrine the protections of Roe into federal law to stop these undemocratic, right-wing schemes and ensure that abortion access is available regardless of the state a person lives in. | ** Thank you, Laura P.S. Voters have a once-in-a-generation opportunity to elect the first woman (me!) to ever represent CA-30 in Congress. = =** | | Paid for by Laura Friedman for Congress Laura's campaign doesn't take a dime from corporate PACs and completely relies on grassroots supporters like you! To chip in to Laura's campaign = To learn more about Laura's progressive record of supporting our working families, please visit: We'd hate to see you go, but you can click here if you'd like to . Laura Friedman for Congress PO Box 27296 Los Angeles, CA 90027 United States

Right now, Congress is crafting the latest Farm Bill and Florida’s farmers and ranchers have the most to lose. As the only Florida Republican serving on the House Agriculture Committee, I take this responsibility very seriously. _Florida is one of the last Republican strongholds and if WE don't support our farms...we could lose Florida._ Unfair trade deals have flooded America’s markets with poor quality foreign produce while Florida’s farmers and ranchers continue to struggle. That is why, I have opposed measures which make the United States reliant on foreign supply chains and I have fought to make fresh, healthy Florida foods available to all Americans. clean_body: | | | | I stand with Florida’s farmers... Fellow American, What are the Democrats doing... Right now, Congress is crafting the latest Farm Bill and Florida’s farmers and ranchers have the most to lose. As the only Florida Republican serving on the House Agriculture Committee, I take this responsibility very seriously. Florida is one of the last Republican strongholds and if WE don't support our farms...we could lose Florida. Unfair trade deals have flooded America’s markets with poor quality foreign produce while Florida’s farmers and ranchers continue to struggle. That is why, I have opposed measures which make the United States reliant on foreign supply chains and I have fought to make fresh, healthy Florida foods available to all Americans. | With your help, we will ensure thatFlorida’s agricultural producers receive the support they neednot just this year, butfor generations to come. | | Florida’s agricultural producers deserve our support! As the sole Florida Republican representative at the negotiating table, I will not back down. "I will Fight for Our Farmers!") ? Thank you, | | Rep. Kat Cammack Congresswoman FL-3 | | | [PAID FOR BY KAT FOR CONGRESS]() Kat Cammack 5200 NW 43rd st, suite 102-180, Gainesville, FL 32606 \- =

If we haven’t met before, let me quickly introduce myself. I’m a 5th generation Texan, where I was raised on a horse ranch. It was there that I learned the importance of discipline and hard work. After graduating from college, I enlisted in the U.S. Navy. I spent most of my adult life in combat zones in Iraq and Afghanistan. By the grace of God, I survived a deadly helicopter crash in 2009. When I joined the military, I took an oath to defend America. Now, I’m taking on a different type of battle - I’m fighting to protect our conservative values as a Congressman from my home state of Texas. We have a real fight on our hands to stand up to the Biden Administration and hold the Democrats accountable. That’s why I’m reaching out today to see if you can help us fight for our country's future. I’m proud to serve alongside many other tough, strong conservative veterans in Congress, like my friend Jen Kiggans. https://click.contact.jenforcongress.com/?qs=3c5ebeaf0dfd3a3ab81f4a1e42ec580500eb08056cf88d10071608d884c1f4e7e5bf86625361fec7ad7b67552ce495bf63feac103d5a4d61384f35c69fb143c7 Jen comes from a family of veterans. She’s the daughter of a veteran, the wife of a veteran, the mother of a future veteran, and a veteran herself. But now Jen is one of the top targets of the national Democrats. They are already spending big money to attack Jen and lie about her record. That’s why I hope you will join me in supporting this tough veteran to ensure we protect our GOP House Majority. https://click.contact.jenforcongress.com/?qs=3c5ebeaf0dfd3a3ab81f4a1e42ec580500eb08056cf88d10071608d884c1f4e7e5bf86625361fec7ad7b67552ce495bf63feac103d5a4d61384f35c69fb143c7 Support Jen Kiggans https://click.contact.jenforcongress.com/?qs=3c5ebeaf0dfd3a3ab81f4a1e42ec580500eb08056cf88d10071608d884c1f4e7e5bf86625361fec7ad7b67552ce495bf63feac103d5a4d61384f35c69fb143c7 By making a donation of any size today, you can play a direct role in protecting the America we love from the radical Democrats. I'm not the kind of person who usually asks like this, but if we don't do this now, the House could go blue, and so will all of America. The Democrats must be defeated, end of story. If we haven’t met before, let me quickly introduce myself. I’m a 5th generation Texan, where I was raised on a horse ranch. It was there that I learned the importance of discipline and hard work. After graduating from college, I enlisted in the U.S. Navy. I spent most of my adult life in combat zones in Iraq and Afghanistan. By the grace of God, I survived a deadly helicopter crash in 2009. When I joined the military, I took an oath to defend America. Now, I’m taking on a different type of battle - I’m fighting to protect our conservative values as a Congressman from my home state of Texas. We have a real fight on our hands to stand up to the Biden Administration and hold the Democrats accountable. Peter, here is where things stand: The GOP has identified Tammy Baldwin as one of their top targets in 2024 — and this race could determine control of the Senate majority. name: JD Vance
subject: Allow me to introduce myself
disclaimer_text: Paid for by House Conservative Victory Fund
body:
| [ ](http://links.houseconservatives.org/u/click?_t=a828c22267f2452d9c778060a3aea04e&_m=eac292bedc3448a5a35ffeebd7d448c9&_e=t73LUvYuR5vwWeJYslx9U4a-GPVt8WLNhV2ARfhqt9j2zOejRQhrKI8xc7ZQNz8dWk4nEQelbUrHcLA1dLg4aMV67mMCcd_dHKM712hUulrWGLLNbe6iQAkupR6dBDzAT3_D2hcPyQB3EujlCzwSUfXCB0ZWECmKSFlgaCh_nuhB3CvWlVN2KldF4AEpzR8x_ydUFFLcTSlzFe4rDTcOxQTbfJQ5HP0OMUfi17fMiK4kPNICvAIdvaYpHuDP5Z2IJUEPAHUDPMAv4_Lraxa0pFPRx4xb2J4EUba6ShJBQykIXDNj3r-0Tqj3s-Hx0ni8PPYKkUyRMHyg0xy--7Cgcw%3D%3D)
---

Before we get started, and I go any further, I'd just like to take a moment to introduce myself and thank you for your dedication to preserving the America we all know and love.

**[**It powers me and Conservatives like Congressman Kevin Hern to fight for hard-working Americans nationwide. You can support us here. >>**](http://links.houseconservatives.org/u/click?_t=a828c22267f2452d9c778060a3aea04e&_m=eac292bedc3448a5a35ffeebd7d448c9&_e=t73LUvYuR5vwWeJYslx9U4a-GPVt8WLNhV2ARfhqt9j2zOejRQhrKI8xc7ZQNz8dWk4nEQelbUrHcLA1dLg4aMV67mMCcd_dHKM712hUulrWGLLNbe6iQAkupR6dBDzAT3_D2hcPyQB3EujlCzwSUQRqPL7tZHhPFz8ZWUbJeYjMJqJUNkNbZwO4uGz85l0i7uOe1Xoi0sQYnZy782J-Bpzwef9EsobESc9IBVgzfwZd9ZK05NVHUwOegFYaeCm4GJZLkN4_nfliChkTSgo9YxXGmml-6rikW_V1Hv_CNMiIiromE0U7jh2DACCkvU3JisakZDeK55plSv5l1z4EjA%3D%3D)**

I grew up in a Rust Belt town, a community where people worked hard and played by the rules. That used to be enough to mean a middle class life. As I got older, I realized that the jobs and economic opportunities that built the great American middle class were fading away, and it left the community around me grasping for hope.

I won't sugarcoat it. My home life had challenges. There was a fair share of turbulence in my home as a kid, with my dad leaving home when I was young and my mother struggling with drug addiction her entire life. Fortunately, I had someone who helped me turn everything around and keep me in line. That person was my Mamaw (my grandmother).

Mamaw taught me tough love, discipline, and that the world wouldn't just hand you what you wanted. She kept me on the straight and narrow and focused through her dedication to faith, family, and the hope of a better life that lay ahead.

I went on to serve my country in the Iraq War as a proud Marine, graduated from The Ohio State University, received my law degree from Yale Law School, and wrote a bestselling book, _Hillbilly Elegy_. I started a business and was lucky enough to help put a lot of people to work.

**I wanted to do more. I wanted to give back to my state and my country. It 's an honor to serve and it's so important that we keep like-minded patriots in Washington.**

Our work is far from over. My friend, Congressman Kevin Hern, and the House Conservatives are OUR LAST LINE of defense against the radical left until we retake the Senate and the White House! **[**You can chip in to support here. >>**](http://links.houseconservatives.org/u/click?_t=a828c22267f2452d9c778060a3aea04e&_m=eac292bedc3448a5a35ffeebd7d448c9&_e=t73LUvYuR5vwWeJYslx9U4a-GPVt8WLNhV2ARfhqt9j2zOejRQhrKI8xc7ZQNz8dWk4nEQelbUrHcLA1dLg4aMV67mMCcd_dHKM712hUulrWGLLNbe6iQAkupR6dBDzAT3_D2hcPyQB3EujlCzwSUfXCB0ZWECmKSFlgaCh_nugSmw2KBUyUwSNmJDrdkOqC4ZRra52-Mo-mBQs2GYemcGF6oKJAdnEEKBWUzqXknupOPtCGREMzUe49WMPvpFEB-f8ZQjoila7NwV3PBCpW5N4-tDIul-UeC97jhSRTHqpJhlyFqilru9cXwFn0kDdWLpQEZ1Vi-0AqyM6nKs7hVg%3D%3D)**

**[If you're committed to putting America First again, if you're committed to standing up to the Woke Left's Socialist Agenda, and you're focused on protecting your freedoms and conservative values, then chip in here!](http://links.houseconservatives.org/u/click?_t=a828c22267f2452d9c778060a3aea04e&_m=eac292bedc3448a5a35ffeebd7d448c9&_e=t73LUvYuR5vwWeJYslx9U4a-GPVt8WLNhV2ARfhqt9j2zOejRQhrKI8xc7ZQNz8dWk4nEQelbUrHcLA1dLg4aMV67mMCcd_dHKM712hUulrWGLLNbe6iQAkupR6dBDzAT3_D2hcPyQB3EujlCzwSUQRqPL7tZHhPFz8ZWUbJeYhS7XBse0SKHnbAfPmkL1Wpe7o18sXayKj2I423RiA7WrzUMFoOVzFL7RItcgZzWoe2vB6k5tyX3wklUZ2L3VRySpb3_XgB6jqzmgIIMy1hdV8T6cjSYuYmlFu70Y7seWpxsJ-lwOXXYlEpBM2eWHkzuWeTXXLLDeRJf-oypLG2Ew%3D%3D)**

Sincerely,

JD Vance

subject: Reflecting on our historic victory
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Becca Balint for Vermont
body:
I never dreamed that I would see myself represented in Congress, let alone actually be a member of Congress.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67893834/421212450/966991095?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM0MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MjlhMDY5Yy1hZDM3LWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=dmeL1K-bJSMJKpTrbkrz-nTDe1b_s1WJDxCl1gjcTnQ=&emci=2e68f6bd-9637-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=929a069c-ad37-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=43402272) | Peter, This week holds a special place in my heart: **One year ago yesterday, I was honored to become Vermont’s Democratic nominee for Congress.** Even now, a year later, I am astonished and moved by our victory and that I am now your congresswoman! [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67893835/421212451/699142743?&refcode=E3694-20230810-Primary1Year-Image-Anniversary&amount=27&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM0MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MjlhMDY5Yy1hZDM3LWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=dmeL1K-bJSMJKpTrbkrz-nTDe1b_s1WJDxCl1gjcTnQ=) While we’re gearing up for another competitive primary, far-right Republicans are attacking me for calling them out. I’m working hard for Vermonters, but [_**I need your help to ensure I can continue fighting for our communities in Congress. Will you support my re-election campaign with a contribution today?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67893836/421212452/936901168?&refcode=E3694-20230810-Primary1Year-SL-Anniversary&amount=27&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM0MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MjlhMDY5Yy1hZDM3LWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=dmeL1K-bJSMJKpTrbkrz-nTDe1b_s1WJDxCl1gjcTnQ=) I am a former school teacher from Brattleboro, Vermont. I am the grandchild of a Holocaust victim, the child of working-class parents, the mother of two amazing children Abe and Sarah, and a wife to my wonderful partner, Elizabeth. I never dreamed that I would see myself represented in Congress, let alone actually be a member of Congress. But at every turn, this team has given me hope beyond measure, affirming my core belief that **change IS possible**. This victory wasn’t easy, and as we head into another election year, we’re going to face more uphill battles. When we turn towards each other with love and hope in our hearts, **we can do anything. We can change the way we do politics. And we can change our country.** _**This team is proof of that.**_ Peter, as I reflect on our victory a year ago, I’m filled with gratitude for your support, your time, your donations, your vote, and your trust that have gotten me to where I am today. clean_body: I never dreamed that I would see myself represented in Congress, let alone actually be a member of Congress. | | Peter, This week holds a special place in my heart: One year ago yesterday, I was honored to become Vermont’s Democratic nominee for Congress. Even now, a year later, I am astonished and moved by our victory and that I am now your congresswoman! = While we’re gearing up for another competitive primary, far-right Republicans are attacking me for calling them out. I’m working hard for Vermonters, but = I am a former school teacher from Brattleboro, Vermont. I am the grandchild of a Holocaust victim, the child of working-class parents, the mother of two amazing children Abe and Sarah, and a wife to my wonderful partner, Elizabeth. I never dreamed that I would see myself represented in Congress, let alone actually be a member of Congress. But at every turn, this team has given me hope beyond measure, affirming my core belief that change IS possible. This victory wasn’t easy, and as we head into another election year, we’re going to face more uphill battles. When we turn towards each other with love and hope in our hearts, we can do anything. We can change the way we do politics. And we can change our country. This team is proof of that. Peter, as I reflect on our victory a year ago, I’m filled with gratitude for your support, your time, your donations, your vote, and your trust that have gotten me to where I am today. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | = ---|--- = | = = | = We’ve created so much change already, but there’s still work to do, and I’m not done yet. Thank you, Becca Balint If you were impacted by the floods in Vermont and would like to take a break from campaign email updates, = If you'd like to receive fewer emails and only see our most important updates, **If you'd rather not stay up to date with Becca's work, you can . If you prefer to contribute by check, you are welcome to send a contribution to the campaign at the address below. To comply with Federal law, we must use our best efforts to obtain, maintain and submit the name, mailing address, occupation and name of employer of individuals whose contributions exceed $200 per election cycle. Thank you in advance for including that information along with your check. | Paid for by Becca Balint for Vermont Becca for Vermont P.O. Box 291 Burlington, VT 05302 United States

**The California GOP recently announced that Donald Trump will be the headline speaker at their convention taking place right here in Orange County next month.**

We need to send Republicans a message -- from our likely opponent Scott Baugh to Trump himself -- that their MAGA agenda has no place in Orange County.

**[Will you join the call with a $3 donation to our campaign today? It’s no secret that our race is one of the most closely-watched in California and the country. **This wide-open seat will prove to be the tipping point for either party -- which explains Trump’s interest in coming to Orange County to flip CA-47 red.**

➡️ In 2022, Katie Porter only narrowly won this seat. A few thousand votes separated Orange County residents between a MAGA representative and someone who cares for their community.

➡️ 2024 is shaping up to be another tough matchup. Scott Baugh, the same Republican who lost to Rep. Porter, is making another run for it. That’s why we’re starting the hard work now to fight against GOP extremism and keep CA-47 blue.

**But Trump coming to town puts a wrinkle in our plans. California Republicans are going to use his visit as a springboard to bring in dark money to stop us.**

**[We’re not going to back down from this challenge, and we hope we can count on you to stand with us. clean_body: | = Did you catch this news, Peter? The California GOP recently announced that Donald Trump will be the headline speaker at their convention taking place right here in Orange County next month. We need to send Republicans a message -- from our likely opponent Scott Baugh to Trump himself -- that their MAGA agenda has no place in Orange County. = | **= It’s no secret that our race is one of the most closely-watched in California and the country. This wide-open seat will prove to be the tipping point for either party -- which explains Trump’s interest in coming to Orange County to flip CA-47 red. ➡️ In 2022, Katie Porter only narrowly won this seat. A few thousand votes separated Orange County residents between a MAGA representative and someone who cares for their community. ➡️ 2024 is shaping up to be another tough matchup. Scott Baugh, the same Republican who lost to Rep. Porter, is making another run for it. That’s why we’re starting the hard work now to fight against GOP extremism and keep CA-47 blue. But Trump coming to town puts a wrinkle in our plans. California Republicans are going to use his visit as a springboard to bring in dark money to stop us. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = ---|--- = | = = | =** Thanks, Joanna Weiss HQ | Joanna's campaign doesn't take a dime from corporate PACs and completely relies on grassroots supporters like you! \--SPECIAL EDITION--
Please forward this email to all of your contacts.
This is a special edition with commentary by Beth Weddle, a volunteer for Robertson for Congress.
Can An Honest Man Be Elected in America?
I'm supporting Mark Robertson to be our Representative in Congress.
Mark has hundreds of supporters who have contributed their time, talents, and means to his campaign. Mark didn't have to pay any of these people. They have spent countless hours of their own time to join Mark in the fight to be our Representative in Washington! I'm one of these people. I'm a retiree on Social Security who is very concerned about the direction of our Country. For the past 16 months, I've spent 10-15 hours per week supporting Mark's campaign. I see in him the values and principles that make America great. Mark is a hard worker who will do the right thing for the right reason.
Mark has a set of principles from which he will not deviate. He won't do it.
Here is a partial list of people who support Mark. Some of these are pillars in our community, but most are regular people like you and me. The list includes teachers, first responders, veterans, parents, business owners, blue-collar workers, five former Police Chiefs, current and former members of Congress, retirees, and patriots concerned for our country.
I hope you will add your name to this list. You can support electing an honest man by forwarding this email to as many people as possible.

| | Friend,

---
I just found out that Crooked Joe’s weaponized Department of InJustice obtained a search warrant to secretly gain access to my Twitter account and my private data.

---
The deranged and vengeful Biden-appointed prosecutor also DEMANDED that Twitter keep it a SECRET for 6 months._
_
---
And when Twitter at first did not comply by handing over my private data, they were FINED $350,000 – _by a judge appointed by Barack Obama_.

---
This is the Deep State – a giant, interconnected network of corruption that abuses its power to crush dissent and attack its opposition.

---
As I’ve said before, when you begin to drain the swamp, you expose the monstrous entities that had been lurking at the bottom.

---
**_What else will we find out has been taking place behind closed doors to infringe upon my rights and interfere in the 2024 election?_**_
_
---
_In Crooked Joe’s America, you no longer have constitutional _rights._
_
---
Our God-given rights to freedom of speech, privacy, and proper due process have been ripped to shreds._
_
---
These are dark days for our country, but I promise you this: _I am not deterred in the slightest.__
_
---
**_The more I hear these horror stories of how viciously these Deep State thugs have been violating my rights, the more committed I become to saving our country._**_
_
---
_Because this simply cannot go on. We cannot let the freest and greatest Republic in history fall to the dark forces of tyranny._ _
_
---
If you’re doing poorly due to the very sinister people in charge of America right now, then ignore what I’m about to ask you._
_

| | Hello there! I've had the chance to hit the campaign trail with Will over the last few weeks, and he's working so hard. Will has been 100% committed to giving his all to this race since day one, and it has meant long days and long nights, living out of hotels, and _**a lot**_ of early flights on SouthWest Airlines.
---
[](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=34d89e461aaa44c78b8907f4a4a14a11&_m=e1355dbd691d468dba51f440059fd266&_e=4zzu5SVcMw2uIBiwcedtSRDf7twelOGQ2Q-AURA1E0mjtmpFD4V4wL5coWSu8sNEVYF4rD1ZIxA-53U9toVsk3lJbPNrEEOzthfciJLmDJwAq4hfx5Tgds5TnrWIapc0kwhIjjeSFXWHIxtGRqH7kWmMokARgobplTIzvTUPnvZEc8Cfc8nPN5Azpz4d5X57scPdb2B7jHn06EVVvZ3oC1m4smuz7gv2EyMvnsVU83f0isF-bWEZEiztG5HcaiYh5bfbmziOYACEkRVgzAh9oO_P4V-ovKnvkX-yHJW3JRR_Mxzgy8RWLQZ1dpZHvxsypYZtXTsKzRIUIP0DHoY2sO3kY9P-Lh2Zm8mZ9GKEsgym1kv7t-2B4KJNHsX6wsDTsK_vDPy2URCp8PdgZ8eq-A%3D%3D)

He tells me that bringing hope to disenfranchised voters and people who are tired of the toxic rhetoric and negative politics is worth it. I recently accompanied him on his trip to New Hampshire, and I can tell that his movement is growing. More people are stopping him to ask questions and hear what he has to say. Now we're focused on getting him on the debate stage. **[Will you give your first $1 donation and help my husband share his vision at the first Republican debate?](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=34d89e461aaa44c78b8907f4a4a14a11&_m=e1355dbd691d468dba51f440059fd266&_e=4zzu5SVcMw2uIBiwcedtSRDf7twelOGQ2Q-AURA1E0mjtmpFD4V4wL5coWSu8sNEVYF4rD1ZIxA-53U9toVsk3lJbPNrEEOzthfciJLmDJwAq4hfx5Tgds5TnrWIapc0kwhIjjeSFXWHIxtGRqH7kWmMokARgobplTIzvTUPnvZEc8Cfc8nPN5Azpz4d5X57scPdb2B7jHn06EVVvZ3oC1m4smuz7gv2EyMvnsVU83f0isF-bWEZEiztG5HcaiYhUQF_4NmVVgc1cpNjJfpbJxjmDUfb2xPl8-2z3_64P3fTTC9ZBGh8ioNWtg2GP8mfVaAuJAO6xFYK8Tx9s2q71HhU4PufgIXmsV8Q5c1Aikx6SBuO4O6pzQBkxo_eiR_oAaviHF7NnKlzVPys-vockQ%3D%3D)** I know that with your help, we can continue to grow this movement and make his vision a reality. The last time Pennsylvania had elections for critical school board and judge races, _**more than 60% of Republicans failed to show up.**_ If we don't have better numbers this year, we could be looking at victories for far-left Democrats who will bring their radical ideologies into classrooms and courtrooms throughout our commonwealth.

---

---
| **Our only shot at stopping the radical Left in PA is to beat them at their own game** , and that's exactly what we're doing. Our volunteers are working every day to get traditionally low-turnout Republicans to vote early using mail-in ballots, giving us a fighting chance. _**But we can't reach everyone we need to unless we hit our fundraising goals.**_

subject: Exciting updates from America First Legal...
body:
| | [](http://xykkk.mjt.lu/lnk/AUYAACGJ_PgAAAAP1xQAAEcY2LAAAAABL9MAAGV0ABg1MgBk1TXZgFvIUwzLTcmuT00lCKJPzAAXqZI/1/tRl5R8TJMOX3cH5leZWGmw/aHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUud2lucmVkLmNvbS9hbWVyaWNhLWZpcnN0LWxlZ2FsLWZvdW5kYXRpb24vd2Vla2x5LWRvbm9yLWVtYWlsLXBhZ2U_dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1FLUhvdXNlRmlsZSZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249QUZMX3dlZWtseS1kb25vcl8yMDIzMDcyMCZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPUVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PXdlZWtseS1kb25vciZ1dG1fYWdlbmN5PVBH)
---
Fellow Patriot, I am excited to share some new updates to our government oversight portal, the [_Woke Wagon_](http://xykkk.mjt.lu/lnk/AUYAACGJ_PgAAAAP1xQAAEcY2LAAAAABL9MAAGV0ABg1MgBk1TXZgFvIUwzLTcmuT00lCKJPzAAXqZI/2/e3q5XiLsk8-2QmpaJwMDHQ/aHR0cHM6Ly93b2tld2Fnb24uYWZsZWdhbC5vcmcvP19nYT0yLjEwNDgyMDM1Mi4xMjI5NTc0MjQyLjE2OTE2MTg0NTUtMTgyNzI1OTk1Ny4xNjY5MDU2OTU2).These updates have made the [_Woke Wagon_](http://xykkk.mjt.lu/lnk/AUYAACGJ_PgAAAAP1xQAAEcY2LAAAAABL9MAAGV0ABg1MgBk1TXZgFvIUwzLTcmuT00lCKJPzAAXqZI/3/-byHP8OzG0YdsvC1XWIuVg/aHR0cHM6Ly93b2tld2Fnb24uYWZsZWdhbC5vcmcvP19nYT0yLjEwNDgyMDM1Mi4xMjI5NTc0MjQyLjE2OTE2MTg0NTUtMTgyNzI1OTk1Ny4xNjY5MDU2OTU2) an even more invaluable and user-friendly resource to the public and policymakers-shining a bright light on the radical activists behind the Biden Administration’s policies and allowing for more thorough vetting of the Biden Administration’s nominees for high-level government and judicial positions. As you may know, the Woke Wagon is a comprehensive and searchable repository of information about the radical staffers proliferating the federal government during the Biden Administration. This information was acquired through a multitude of FOIA requests and lawsuits against various recalcitrant federal agencies. Through AFL’s dogged effort, we have the names, resumes, and salaries of most Biden Administration officials.The new functions make the Woke Wagon more user-friendly. Documents are now fully text-searchable, meaning that the public and policymakers can easily sort which Biden Administration officials previously worked for the ACLU, the Obama Administration, or the radical Center for American Progress. Moreover, we've implemented filters that allow you to narrow down your search results based on relevance, name, or salary. These features will enable users to extract insights and information more efficiently, providing a more comprehensive understanding of the activists who hold significant positions within our federal government.[__I invite you to visit the updated Woke Wagon today to explore these new and improved features firsthand >>__](http://xykkk.mjt.lu/lnk/AUYAACGJ_PgAAAAP1xQAAEcY2LAAAAABL9MAAGV0ABg1MgBk1TXZgFvIUwzLTcmuT00lCKJPzAAXqZI/4/9ssHe7oxnsmkSWSyap__Uw/aHR0cHM6Ly93b2tld2Fnb24uYWZsZWdhbC5vcmcvP19nYT0yLjEwNDgyMDM1Mi4xMjI5NTc0MjQyLjE2OTE2MTg0NTUtMTgyNzI1OTk1Ny4xNjY5MDU2OTU2)This week has been one of the most action-packed in AFL’s history. In case you missed it, here is a brief run-down of our work from this week alone:
* AFL filed a lawsuit against Target and its Board of Directors on behalf of a Target shareholder for betraying Target’s shareholders with misleading representations about its ESG and DEI mandates and causing them to lose billions of dollars.
* AFL filed a groundbreaking brief at the Fifth Circuit Court of Appeals in Missouri v. Biden, representing Congressman Jim Jordan and 11 other members of Congress. The Biden Administration’s misuse of government authority to stifle dissenting viewpoints is extremely dangerous and has eroded Americans’ First Amendment rights.
* AFL’s Center For Legal Equality filed a federal civil rights complaint with the U.S. Equal Employment Opportunity Commission (EEOC) against the Kellogg’s Company for engaging in illegal, race-based discrimination concerning employment and job training opportunities.
* AFL and co-counsel Jonathan F. Mitchell filed a brief in the U.S. Court of Appeals for the Fifth Circuit in Braidwood Management v. Becerra et al. to challenge unconstitutional Obamacare provisions allowing unaccountable bureaucrats to dictate the preventive care that private health insurers must cover.

_Your continued support makes all of this possible. As always, thank you for your invaluable support._ For Freedom,Mary Thomas

clean_body: | | Fellow Patriot, I am excited to share some new updates to our government oversight portal, the updates have made the an even more invaluable and user-friendly resource to the public and policymakers-shining a bright light on the radical activists behind the Biden Administration’s policies and allowing for more thorough vetting of the Biden Administration’s nominees for high-level government and judicial positions. As you may know, the Woke Wagon is a comprehensive and searchable repository of information about the radical staffers proliferating the federal government during the Biden Administration. This information was acquired through a multitude of FOIA requests and lawsuits against various recalcitrant federal agencies. Through AFL’s dogged effort, we have the names, resumes, and salaries of most Biden Administration officials.The new functions make the Woke Wagon more user-friendly. Documents are now fully text-searchable, meaning that the public and policymakers can easily sort which Biden Administration officials previously worked for the ACLU, the Obama Administration, or the radical Center for American Progress. Moreover, we've implemented filters that allow you to narrow down your search results based on relevance, name, or salary. These features will enable users to extract insights and information more efficiently, providing a more comprehensive understanding of the activists who hold significant positions within our federal government. week has been one of the most action-packed in AFL’s history. In case you missed it, here is a brief run-down of our work from this week alone: AFL filed a lawsuit against Target and its Board of Directors on behalf of a Target shareholder for betraying Target’s shareholders with misleading representations about its ESG and DEI mandates and causing them to lose billions of dollars. AFL filed a groundbreaking brief at the Fifth Circuit Court of Appeals in Missouri v. Biden, representing Congressman Jim Jordan and 11 other members of Congress. The Biden Administration’s misuse of government authority to stifle dissenting viewpoints is extremely dangerous and has eroded Americans’ First Amendment rights. AFL’s Center For Legal Equality filed a federal civil rights complaint with the U.S. Equal Employment Opportunity Commission (EEOC) against the Kellogg’s Company for engaging in illegal, race-based discrimination concerning employment and job training opportunities. AFL and co-counsel Jonathan F. Mitchell filed a brief in the U.S. Court of Appeals for the Fifth Circuit in Braidwood Management v. Becerra et al. to challenge unconstitutional Obamacare provisions allowing unaccountable bureaucrats to dictate the preventive care that private health insurers must cover. Your continued support makes all of this possible. As always, thank you for your invaluable support. For Freedom,Mary Thomas | America First Legal Foundation is an IRS-approved section 501(c)(3) public charity. Introducing myself [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/67895210/421217510/2323912?&refcode=E3667-20230810-AndyKim-Header-Surrogate&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzg1MzMzIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjY5YWI3YTVjLWIyMzctZWUxMS1hM2YxLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=DGaBzaca_wzN30tgJMygkCWaVsSbCd5CaN49_-9DhOM=) Hi Peter, It’s Congressman Andy Kim - and I proudly represent New Jersey’s 3rd district, one of the most competitive races in the country. [**Today I’m asking you to split a donation between me and Future Forum PAC. Here’s why:**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/67895211/421217511/2323912?&refcode=E3667-20230810-AndyKim-SL-Surrogate&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzg1MzMzIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjY5YWI3YTVjLWIyMzctZWUxMS1hM2YxLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=DGaBzaca_wzN30tgJMygkCWaVsSbCd5CaN49_-9DhOM=)
* My race will decide control of Congress next year. If we want to take back the Speaker’s gavel from MAGA extremists like Kevin McCarthy and Marjorie Taylor Greene, we have to win my seat plus five more.

* I’m the first Democratic member of Congress of Korean descent. I’m extremely proud of my AAPI heritage and the work I’ve done to stand up against xenophobia and discrimination against the AAPI community.

* I’m a dad of two and that’s why I helped launch the new Congressional Dads Caucus to advocate for policies that help kids and working families. We’re fighting for things like paid family leave, access to baby formula, and affordable childcare.

* I’m proud to be a Future Forum member because we’re the next generation of Democrats who ran for Congress to get things done and bridge the divides in our politics!

clean_body: Introducing myself = Hi Peter, It’s Congressman Andy Kim - and I proudly represent New Jersey’s 3rd district, one of the most competitive races in the country. = My race will decide control of Congress next year. If we want to take back the Speaker’s gavel from MAGA extremists like Kevin McCarthy and Marjorie Taylor Greene, we have to win my seat plus five more. I’m the first Democratic member of Congress of Korean descent. I’m extremely proud of my AAPI heritage and the work I’ve done to stand up against xenophobia and discrimination against the AAPI community. I’m a dad of two and that’s why I helped launch the new Congressional Dads Caucus to advocate for policies that help kids and working families. We’re fighting for things like paid family leave, access to baby formula, and affordable childcare. I’m proud to be a Future Forum member because we’re the next generation of Democrats who ran for Congress to get things done and bridge the divides in our politics! = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | = ---|--- = | = = | = We can’t do this without you! \- Rep. Andy Kim Future Forum PAC is a coalition of young democratic members of Congress focused on issues and opportunities for the next generation. =** = =

subject: Tell Republicans: hands off the Inflation Reduction Act!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Wexton for Congress
body:
They’re threatening to shut down the government if they can’t repeal key provisions.

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67895630/421218854/-772585877?refcode=EM_PET_230809GOP_N_PT_FULL_6_G_N_Logo&fn=&ln=&em=dpwillis67@gmail.com&add1=&ci=Cresco&st=PA&pc=18326&oc=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZmYzOTU1Mi1iNDM3LWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OQq9E5uQ5FSSW7JTy0zghzcL6hVEMl2HgMSdMCphJ2w=)
---
The American people expect their leaders to focus on finding solutions that will create more jobs, lower the cost of living, and ensure that our country’s air and water are there for the next generation.

Yet _this_ is the type of headline folks are seeing this summer: [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67895631/421218855/478067236?ms=EM_PET_230809GOP_N_PT_FULL_6_G_N_P1&refcode=EM_PET_230809GOP_N_PT_FULL_6_G_N_P1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZmYzOTU1Mi1iNDM3LWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OQq9E5uQ5FSSW7JTy0zghzcL6hVEMl2HgMSdMCphJ2w=&emci=d0a5cf62-f336-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=2ff39552-b437-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=32654120) Jennifer proudly stood with fellow Democrats one year ago to pass landmark legislation that will create clean energy jobs, reduce carbon emissions, and lower the price of prescription drugs. **So naturally, MAGA Republicans and their special interest allies are hard at work trying to roll it back.**

The GOP is making use of its new House majority to threaten a government shutdown this fall if key provisions of the Inflation Reduction Act aren’t repealed. And Big Pharma recently _sued_ the Biden Administration in a desperate bid to keep their price-gouging policies in place.

[**We need to show the far right that they’re up against a BIG majority when they try to dismantle the Inflation Reduction Act. Will you stand with Jennifer and add your name to stand by this landmark legislation?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67895632/421218856/478067236?ms=EM_PET_230809GOP_N_PT_FULL_6_G_N_L1&refcode=EM_PET_230809GOP_N_PT_FULL_6_G_N_L1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZmYzOTU1Mi1iNDM3LWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OQq9E5uQ5FSSW7JTy0zghzcL6hVEMl2HgMSdMCphJ2w=&emci=d0a5cf62-f336-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=2ff39552-b437-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=32654120) [Add Your Name ➞](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67895633/421218857/478067236?ms=EM_PET_230809GOP_N_PT_FULL_6_G_N_B1&refcode=EM_PET_230809GOP_N_PT_FULL_6_G_N_B1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZmYzOTU1Mi1iNDM3LWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OQq9E5uQ5FSSW7JTy0zghzcL6hVEMl2HgMSdMCphJ2w=&emci=d0a5cf62-f336-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=2ff39552-b437-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=32654120) Together, we’ll send a clear message that the American people won’t stand for legislative games aimed at rolling back legislation that’s improving their lives.

Thank you,

Team Wexton | **Rep. Jennifer Wexton proudly serves the 10th District of Virginia. She's fighting to create a strong economy, ensure equality for all, and invest in a better future for America.** ****[CONTRIBUTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67895634/421218858/-772585877?refcode=EM_PET_230809GOP_N_PT_FULL_6_G_N_Biobox&fn=&ln=&em=dpwillis67@gmail.com&add1=&ci=Cresco&st=PA&pc=18326&oc=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZmYzOTU1Mi1iNDM3LWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OQq9E5uQ5FSSW7JTy0zghzcL6hVEMl2HgMSdMCphJ2w=)****

subject: we can't let Katie Porter win
body:
We can win this election and flip CA-47 red. |
---
| |
---
| |
---
| Peter, Democrat Katie Porter abandoned her seat in California's 47th District to run for Senate in 2024** _...

...but did you know Porter's handpicked liberal protégé Democrat Dave Min is running to replace her?_**

In fact, when Porter endorsed Dave Min, Porter declared she had **_"every confidence"_** that **Min will be a reliable vote for her radical, liberal agenda in Congress.**
[**_> >> Chip in $50 or $100 today to make sure that doesn't happen!! Let's turn CA-47 RED!_**](https://maxforoc.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0d5d4fbfb4ace920581f6c90d&id=9e93065a7c&e=86e91e802d)
We can't let Katie Porter/Dave Min win this race. Make no mistake, a vote for Dave Min is a vote for two more years of Katie Porter 2.0 in Congress.

Another rubber stamp vote for higher taxes, insane energy policies, trillion dollar spending bills, open borders, and burdensome regulations.

I am running for Congress to be a strong conservative, independent voice that won't shy away from a fight on the issues that matter.

_Cutting spending...Reducing the debt...Securing our borders...Getting fentanyl off our streets....Boosting our energy supply...Erasing wokeness out of our schools..._

I'll be honest: it's going to be a tough fight to defeat Katie Porter's protégé and the millions of dollars the Democrats will pour into this race.

[_**But with your support, we can win this election and flip CA-47 red.**_](https://maxforoc.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0d5d4fbfb4ace920581f6c90d&id=77da943d19&e=86e91e802d)

Thank you,

Max Ukropina

name: Ro Khanna
subject: My grandfather, the freedom fighter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ro for Congress
body:
https://rokhanna.com [https://rokhanna.com]

Friend,

Right now I’m in India, leading a bipartisan congressional delegation to celebrate India’s Independence Day at the Red Fort on August 15, an event that my grandfather, Amarnath Vidyalankar, sacrificed so much of his life for.

My grandfather was a freedom fighter, [https://www.usatoday.com/story/news/politics/2023/08/09/ro-khanna-india-independence-day/70528662007/] a tireless champion for Indian independence. For several years during World War II, he was imprisoned alongside Gandhi for demanding an end to British rule. Even behind bars, Amarnath stayed strong, and after independence, he joined India’s first parliament.

Please take a moment to read about the trip in USA Today. [https://www.usatoday.com/story/news/politics/2023/08/09/ro-khanna-india-independence-day/70528662007/]

My grandfather died when I was nine, but the stories I heard about him while I was growing up sparked my imagination and inspired me to go into public service.

But this trip is more than just a celebration; it’s about building relationships with the largest democracy and growing economic force in the world. We have the opportunity to have a balanced economic relationship with India—one that will create jobs in America and increase our exports.

If my grandfather were alive today, I believe he would want a partnership based on our shared founding values of democracy, freedom of the press and assembly, and human rights with an added focus on tackling the climate crisis, combating global poverty, empowering women, and bolstering education. And that’s my focus as well.

Onward,
Ro

name: George Whitesides HQ
subject: BREAKING: GOP super PAC announces $100 million project to defeat George and Democrats like him.
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67895842/421219725/1224595648?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE1MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNTYwNDJmMS1iNTM3LWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KItATsKhNVbDXArj2uAXdckqKU0wB39vu-xHrR-IEAI=)
Peter, we’re coming to you today with a concerning update:

The Congressional Leadership Fund, Kevin McCarthy’s super PAC, just announced their **“Blue States Project”** \-- a hundred million-dollar effort to defeat Democratic challengers in blue states like California and New York.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67895843/421219726/-1766409733?refcode=em-8.10.23-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE1MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNTYwNDJmMS1iNTM3LWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KItATsKhNVbDXArj2uAXdckqKU0wB39vu-xHrR-IEAI=)
According to an internal memo, McCarthy’s path to keeping the House rests in key swing districts like CA-27. He’s calling on his biggest GOP donors to funnel MILLIONS into his super PAC to target top Democratic challengers like George.

[**We need every ounce of support we can muster to keep pace with McCarthy’s super PAC and push back against national Republican interference in our race. Will you step up with a $3 donation to elect George Whitesides in CA-27?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67895844/421219727/-1766409733?refcode=em-8.10.23-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE1MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNTYwNDJmMS1iNTM3LWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KItATsKhNVbDXArj2uAXdckqKU0wB39vu-xHrR-IEAI=)
| ****[Donate $3](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67895845/421219728/-1766409733?refcode=em-8.10.23-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE1MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNTYwNDJmMS1iNTM3LWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KItATsKhNVbDXArj2uAXdckqKU0wB39vu-xHrR-IEAI=)****
---

Here’s the truth:

Republicans know that Mike Garcia is one of the most vulnerable Republican incumbents in the country, but instead of trying to win over voters, they’re going to unleash a barrage of attacks against us to try and sink our campaign.

Mike Garcia has already received nearly $180,000 from McCarthy this year alone!

We’ve been expecting this, and we can now confirm that Garcia will have substantial war chest lined up behind him. But we have one thing he and McCarthy never will: **_Your support._

We don’t need to match this super PAC dollar for dollar, but we do need the funds to run our campaign _the right way_. You’ve been incredible so far. Right now, we need all hands on deck to maintain our momentum!**

[**This is a golden opportunity to make your first $3 donation toward George’s campaign. Can we count on you to chip in today as we fight back against the GOP attacks coming our way?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67895846/421219729/-1766409733?refcode=em-8.10.23-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE1MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNTYwNDJmMS1iNTM3LWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KItATsKhNVbDXArj2uAXdckqKU0wB39vu-xHrR-IEAI=)

name: Indiana Republican Party HQ
subject: New education policies benefiting Hoosier students and families
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE INDIANA
body:
96https://secure.winred.com/indiana-republican-party/e_schoolisback?utm_
source=E-HouseFile&utm_campaign=INGOP_PG-e-now-that-school-is-back-in-se
ssion-petition-yy9-20230724-a-Issue-Local-Pos_20230728&utm_medium=Email&
utm_content=PG-e-now-that-school-is-back-in-session-petition-yy9-2023072
4-a-Issue-Local-Pos&utm_agency=PG Friend,

It’s back to school
time.

And this past legislative session, Republican-led efforts led
to the passage of multiple education policies that will benefit Hoosier
students and families.

Here’s what’s new, and what will be
implemented over the next two school years:

✅ No more textbook or
curriculum fees

✅ A focus on the “science of reading” to improve
literacy

✅ An expansion of work-based, apprenticeship, and
internship opportunities

✅ More STEM opportunities in classrooms
across the state

✅ New “school report cards” to provide additional
transparency in school performance

✅ Full funding for dyslexia
screeners for K-2 students

These new policies will help our students
achieve their full potential, improving the lives of all Hoosiers for
decades to come.

name: Jason Crow
subject: Time and time again
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BENNET FOR COLORADO
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bennet-crow-split?refcode=X_081023_PACTAct_act [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bennet-crow-split?refcode=X_081023_PACTAct_act]
Team,
Exactly one year ago today, President Biden signed the PACT Act into law.
This was a historic step toward supporting our servicemembers. The PACT Act marks the largest expansion of benefits and services for veterans exposed to toxins in more than 30 years — which the DOD says could help as many as 3.5 million people .
I have seen the effects of being exposed to burn pits and toxic chemicals. Soldiers I served alongside in Iraq and Afghanistan need care — which is why I pushed hard to pass this legislation.
Unfortunately, not everyone agrees.
Extremist Republicans, including Lauren Boebert and Marjorie Taylor Greene, refused to vote for the PACT Act — even while they praise our veterans on Twitter.
It’s not just this legislation either, friend. MAGA Republicans have shown time and time again that they’re willing to put party over people — even at the expense of our veterans.
Donald Trump calling servicemembers who’ve died in war “suckers'' and “losers.” House Republicans hijacking a bipartisan defense bill to insert their right-wing agenda.
Our servicemembers deserve better than to be used as political pawns.
I'm ready to continue working with Michael Bennet to give our fellow veterans the respect, care, and benefits they fought for. Will you split $10 between our campaigns to help us continue this work in Congress? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bennet-crow-split?refcode=X_081023_PACTAct_act]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation to Jason Crow and Michael Bennet will go through immediately:

clean_body: [] Team, Exactly one year ago today, President Biden signed the PACT Act into law. This was a historic step toward supporting our servicemembers. The PACT Act marks the largest expansion of benefits and services for veterans exposed to toxins in more than 30 years — which the DOD says could help as many as 3.5 million people . I have seen the effects of being exposed to burn pits and toxic chemicals. Soldiers I served alongside in Iraq and Afghanistan need care — which is why I pushed hard to pass this legislation. Unfortunately, not everyone agrees. Extremist Republicans, including Lauren Boebert and Marjorie Taylor Greene, refused to vote for the PACT Act — even while they praise our veterans on Twitter. It’s not just this legislation either, friend. MAGA Republicans have shown time and time again that they’re willing to put party over people — even at the expense of our veterans. Donald Trump calling servicemembers who’ve died in war “suckers'' and “losers.” House Republicans hijacking a bipartisan defense bill to insert their right-wing agenda. Our servicemembers deserve better than to be used as political pawns. I'm ready to continue working with Michael Bennet to give our fellow veterans the respect, care, and benefits they fought for. Will you split $10 between our campaigns to help us continue this work in Congress? [] If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation to Jason Crow and Michael Bennet will go through immediately: DONATE $10 [] DONATE $25 [] DONATE $50 [] DONATE $100 [] DONATE $250 [] OTHER AMOUNT [] DONATE $10 [] DONATE $25 [] DONATE $50 [] DONATE $100 [] DONATE $250 [] OTHER AMOUNT [] It is our solemn responsibility to care for our country’s servicemembers. I will never stop fighting for those who served our country, because they never stopped fighting for us. Thank you, — Jason Crow Bennet for Colorado PO Box 3078 Denver, CO 80201 United States WWW.MICHAELBENNET.COM [] | INFO@MICHAELBENNET.COM [info@michaelbennet.com] | PRIVACY POLICY [] PAID FOR BY BENNET FOR COLORADO CLICK HERE TO RECEIVE FEWER EMAILS FROM OUR CAMPAIGN [] By clicking the links above, you certify that you are responsible for paying all charges incurred in using the debit or credit card to be charged, and that your personal funds will be the true source of the contribution.

Peter: For over 100 years, women and advocates have been fighting to pass the Equal Rights Amendment (ERA), and we're closer than ever to succeeding.
Back in 1923, trailblazers first introduced the ERA in Congress in an effort to prevent all kinds of gender-based discrimination – and today, we can't wait any longer to certify it: **We urgently need to pass this Constitutional amendment to help fight back against abortion bans, address sexual harassment and stop anti-LGBTQ+ legislation.**
After years of advocacy, we've convinced enough states to ratify this amendment and add it to the Constitution. There's just _one_ arbitrary deadline standing in our way, and Democrats are working to get rid of it by passing a new law!
This is history in the making, and I'm so proud to work with my Democratic colleagues to make sure our Constitution finally supports equality for all people, regardless of gender. **As the voice of Washington state in the U.S. Senate, I promise you I'll never stop fighting for gender equality.**
**[_I know you care deeply about our fight for progress, so I'm asking: Will you donate $5 now to help me defend our Democratic Senate majority, certify the ERA, restore the right to abortion, and more?_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67896964/421225422/657691562?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&refcode=jtk99-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4YjAzMzgzNS1iOTM3LWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vGOETSFWnLe3lAo0_nl2huwITvQmHC7YQg-ijpbwYDQ=)**
| | [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67896965/421225423/657691562?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk99-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4YjAzMzgzNS1iOTM3LWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vGOETSFWnLe3lAo0_nl2huwITvQmHC7YQg-ijpbwYDQ=)

name: Team Tina
subject: “Credit has to be given where credit is due”
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Tina Kotek
body:
|
#
---
Peter, When Tina became Governor, she vowed to be a Governor for ALL Oregonians. It’s what drives her. It’s why she’s determined to visit every county in the state in her first year in office — she wants to hear from folks about what she can do to make life a little better. Visiting every county in the state means she’ll even visit some places that didn’t vote for her last November – but that’s sort of the point. Tina’s committed to listening to and learning from **everyone,** no matter their political affiliation. Her dedication isn’t going unnoticed, either. A recent editorial in the _East Oregonian_ praised Governor Kotek for coming through their part of the state and listening. The author wrote: “When someone actually makes the effort to visit our towns and cities and listens, **credit has to be given where credit is due**.” Tina will never turn her back on those who disagree with her. Her administration is about collaboration and problem-solving, and that’s the way it’s going to stay. clean_body: | Peter, When Tina became Governor, she vowed to be a Governor for ALL Oregonians. It’s what drives her. It’s why she’s determined to visit every county in the state in her first year in office — she wants to hear from folks about what she can do to make life a little better. Visiting every county in the state means she’ll even visit some places that didn’t vote for her last November – but that’s sort of the point. Tina’s committed to listening to and learning from everyone, no matter their political affiliation. Her dedication isn’t going unnoticed, either. A recent editorial in the East Oregonian praised Governor Kotek for coming through their part of the state and listening. The author wrote: “When someone actually makes the effort to visit our towns and cities and listens, credit has to be given where credit is due.” Tina will never turn her back on those who disagree with her. Her administration is about collaboration and problem-solving, and that’s the way it’s going to stay. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = Thanks for supporting Tina through it all, Team Tina Tina for Oregon PO Box 42307 Portland, OR 97242 | mailto:info@tinafororegon.com | Paid for by Friends of Tina Kotek

Looping Peter in... |

| | Peter, did you see Wendy Davis's email?

She reached out personally to ask you to donate to EMILYs List because she knows it has never been more important to elect Democratic pro-choice women. **[Can you take a moment to read her message and then donate to help women WIN everywhere?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/67897327/421227297/1714615580?sourceid=1051696&refcode=20230810_WendyDavisKicker&refcode2=WTEFE825&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNGJlYzM5Yi1iYjM3LWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=uI0hIuQHK66jvAppkI0DMrJl-rb5Lz04724cqe_JGAk=)** Thanks,

the EMILYs List Team
_\----------Original Message---------
From: **Wendy Davis**_
_Date: Fri., Aug 4, 2023
To: dpwillis67@gmail.com_ [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/67897328/421227298/1714615580?sourceid=1051696&refcode=20230810_WendyDavisKicker&refcode2=WTEFE825&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNGJlYzM5Yi1iYjM3LWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=uI0hIuQHK66jvAppkI0DMrJl-rb5Lz04724cqe_JGAk=) Hey y'all, it's Wendy Davis.

Barbie has been in the news lately, so I wanted to reach out. When I ran for Texas governor in 2014, Greg Abbott and his right-wing defenders nicknamed me "Abortion Barbie" — _and I'll never let them forget it_. That nickname was purposefully inflammatory and out of touch — and Republicans thought I would be embarrassed to be called out for my pro-choice views. _They were wrong_. **Let's not forget that back when I was running for Texas governor, kids playing with Barbies had more reproductive rights than they do right now as adults.**

If the GOP had their way, women would be just like Barbie: plastic, idealized stereotypes with a superficial place in a male-dominated world. _**That's why I'm asking you to donate to EMILYs List today**_. **Peter, we need to elect Democratic pro-choice women up and down the ballot who can protect abortion rights. EMILYs List is the team that can help make it happen. Can you make a donation of any amount to EMILYs List today?** _If you have saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your contribution will go through immediately._ | [DONATE $15](https://click.everyaction.com/k/67897329/421227299/1714615580?amount=15&expresslane=true&sourceid=1051696&refcode=20230810_WendyDavisKicker&refcode2=WTEFE825&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNGJlYzM5Yi1iYjM3LWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=uI0hIuQHK66jvAppkI0DMrJl-rb5Lz04724cqe_JGAk=) | [DONATE $35](https://click.everyaction.com/k/67897330/421227300/1714615580?amount=35&expresslane=true&sourceid=1051696&refcode=20230810_WendyDavisKicker&refcode2=WTEFE825&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNGJlYzM5Yi1iYjM3LWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=uI0hIuQHK66jvAppkI0DMrJl-rb5Lz04724cqe_JGAk=)

As someone who has been fighting for Texans for nearly 25 years, I know how important it is to protect and expand reproductive rights in every state. That means codifying _Roe v. clean_body: Looping Peter in... | | | Peter, did you see Wendy Davis's email? She reached out personally to ask you to donate to EMILYs List because she knows it has never been more important to elect Democratic pro-choice women. = Thanks, the EMILYs List Team \----------Original Message--------- From: Wendy Davis Date: Fri., Aug 4, 2023 To: dpwillis67@gmail.com = Hey y'all, it's Wendy Davis. Barbie has been in the news lately, so I wanted to reach out. When I ran for Texas governor in 2014, Greg Abbott and his right-wing defenders nicknamed me "Abortion Barbie" — and I'll never let them forget it. That nickname was purposefully inflammatory and out of touch — and Republicans thought I would be embarrassed to be called out for my pro-choice views. They were wrong. Let's not forget that back when I was running for Texas governor, kids playing with Barbies had more reproductive rights than they do right now as adults. If the GOP had their way, women would be just like Barbie: plastic, idealized stereotypes with a superficial place in a male-dominated world. That's why I'm asking you to donate to EMILYs List today. Peter, we need to elect Democratic pro-choice women up and down the ballot who can protect abortion rights. EMILYs List is the team that can help make it happen. Can you make a donation of any amount to EMILYs List today? If you have saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your contribution will go through immediately. | = | = ---|--- = | = = | = As someone who has been fighting for Texans for nearly 25 years, I know how important it is to protect and expand reproductive rights in every state. That means codifying Roe v. Wade into law, expanding health care options nationwide, and electing pro-choice champions to state, local, and federal offices. ****Y'all, we are in the fight of our lives for abortion rights. It has never been more important to elect pro-choice champions to every level of office, so I'm personally reaching out to ask: Can you donate any amount to EMILYs List to help women WIN today? =** Thank you for joining me in the fight — Wendy Davis = = EMILYs List is a community of over five million members that helps elect Democratic pro-choice women to office. name: JusticeDemocrats.com
subject: AIPAC is coming for the Squad
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter,

AIPAC is coming after our incumbents. It’s been reported this week that
AIPAC is recruiting and supporting challengers to our incumbents Jamaal
Bowman, Summer Lee, and Ilhan Omar.

While AIPAC recruits against our progressive incumbents the DCCC and the
establishment have been silent. This is absolutely hypocritical because
after AOC won her primary election in 2017, the DCCC enacted a “blacklist”
to protect corporate incumbents from primary challengers.

AIPAC has millions of dollars at its disposal to attack us and our
candidates, so we need to take this news seriously and get prepared for
the fights ahead.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/136910?refcode=em20230810-30312&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1001&akid=30312%2E1203867%2EF-bVmy ]Peter, will
you rush a contribution of $3 right now to help us fight
back against AIPAC as they recruit and support challengers to our
progressive champions in Congress?

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/136910?refcode=em20230810-30312&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1020&akid=30312%2E1203867%2EF-bVmy ]Donate $3

AIPAC also just received a cool $1 million from a major GOP billionaire. A
Republican billionaire is tipping the scales to try and stop our movement
to transform the Democratic Party to actually represent the people – not
corporate interests.

We target corporate incumbents and replace them with multiracial
working-class champions... AIPAC is targeting multiracial working-class
champions to replace them with candidates beholden to corporate donors.

We’re sounding the alarm,
Peter. We need your support to
ensure we have the resources to protect our incumbents from AIPAC’s
millions of dollars and potential challengers.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/136910?refcode=em20230810-30312&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1021&akid=30312%2E1203867%2EF-bVmy ]Please, make your
first donation of $3 right now.

Thank you so much,

Justice Democrats

Do not worry if you cannot afford to make a contribution — we understand that
this is a difficult time. If you’re struggling, you can find a food bank
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/28883?t=1022&akid=30312%2E1203867%2EF-bVmy ]here. We appreciate everything you do to keep our movement strong.

Please stay informed and follow the most up-to-date recommendations from the
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/24438?t=1023&akid=30312%2E1203867%2EF-bVmy ]Centers for Disease Control and your state public health department.

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20230810-30312-footer&t=1024&refcode2=30312_1203867_F-bVmy&akid=30312%2E1203867%2EF-bVmy

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1025&akid=30312%2E1203867%2EF-bVmy

PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.
JusticeDemocrats.com
10629 Hardin Valley Rd, #226
Knoxville, TN 37932
Email us: us@justicedemocrats.com

body:
Derek – I believe Pennsylvania is always worth fighting for. In my first few months as Governor, I’m proud of what we’ve accomplished together – like rebuilding I-95 in just days, or making the largest increase in basic education funding in Pennsylvania’s history. **But future generations of Pennsylvanians are counting on us to continue the fight.** Our work is just getting started, Derek. [_**Will you chip in $10 to help me continue supporting and advocating for hard-working Pennsylvania families?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67898119/421230144/223969246?refcode=email_080923_Future-generations-B&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NTY5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YzI2OTU1OC1iZjM3LWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DzhDSpju6EOZi5YzbPyVZY0MN_QiosCtgA2biy3RUlU=) | | [Donate →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67898120/421230145/223969246?refcode=email_080923_Future-generations-B&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NTY5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YzI2OTU1OC1iZjM3LWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DzhDSpju6EOZi5YzbPyVZY0MN_QiosCtgA2biy3RUlU=)

I don’t know what Pennsylvania will look like decades from now – **but I do know that our actions today will have a profound impact on the future of our Commonwealth.**
Whether it's confronting climate change, protecting the right to choose, or supporting small businesses, I’m working day and night for a future where all Pennsylvanians can thrive.
Unfortunately, the far-right would love nothing more than to halt our progress in its tracks. **That’s why I have to ask:**
[_**Will you donate $10 or more to help my team and I continue the fight for real freedom and real opportunity in Pennsylvania? name: =?utf-8?Q?Kevin=20Dellicker?=
subject: You Can't Make This Stuff Up
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY KEVIN DELLICKER FOR CONGRESS
body:
Susan Wild's $280 billion CHIPS Act is subsidizing a local warehouse |
---
| |
---
| | Dear Friends and Neighbors,

Yesterday, Susan Wild sent out a congressional bulletin touting the _CHIPS and Science Act, _which is Joe Biden’s $280 billion program to boost the American semiconductor industry. Yet like so many of her big-government, big-spending plans, Susan Wild’s latest efforts aren’t quite working out as planned.

Susan Wild claims that the CHIPS Act has spurred $300 million in semiconductor and electronics investments in Pennsylvania.

**But none of those investments are in our district.**

Susan Wild claims that the CHIPS Act has encouraged $231 billion in private semiconductor investments across the country.

**None of those investments are in our district either.**

Susan Wild identified a **_single local project_** derived from the **_$280 billion of taxpayer funding_**. She claims the CHIPS Act incentivized Swiss manufacturing company ABB to create skilled manufacturing jobs for people in our community.

**But those aren’t manufacturing jobs and they aren’t in a state-of-the-art factory. They are warehouse jobs in ABB’s new warehouse in Palmer Township, Northampton County. **

**[ABB's new state-of-the-art factory opened last year...in China.](https://dellickerforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2bced6f51ed1caf3f5b731ec5&id=fa732b30d9&e=1090c5c412)**

**Susan Wild's $280 billion _CHIPS and Science Act_ – which costs $1,700 per taxpayer – is subsidizing a local warehouse.**

You can’t make this stuff up.

Inauthentic. Ineffective. Out-of-touch.

This is how career politicians act. The people of our district deserve better.

I’m a husband and father who has lived in the Lehigh Valley for 35 years, a 28-year veteran of the U.S. Armed Forces and the founder of a successful technology company. **In Congress, I'll work to create real high-tech jobs right here in the Lehigh Valley, without wasting your money.**

Keep America Free!

---
|
---
| Get involved with Kevin Dellicker for Congress and help Keep America Free!

---

---

**Learn more about Kevin's campaign at[www.dellickerforcongress.com](https://dellickerforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2bced6f51ed1caf3f5b731ec5&id=45b0d10078&e=1090c5c412). **

Thank you!
