subject: 52 weeks to go.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Terán for Congress
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upliftteran?refcode=X_081023_oneyearreup&amount=32 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upliftteran?refcode=X_081023_oneyearreup&amount=32]
Hola Peter,
This past Sunday marked one year from election day for the Democratic nomination to represent Arizona’s 3rd Congressional district. To get there, we’re going to need your support.
We only have one year to tell voters about our fight for:
- Bold action on the climate crisis
- Access to abortion and health care
- Good jobs and higher wages
- Affordable housing
- Civil rights
- Comprehensive Immigration Reform
- Representation for our community in Congress by electing the state’s first Latina Congresswoman
But to do that, we will need the resources to make our voices heard. We’ll need to:
- Hire organizers to help us reach voters on the phone, on the doors, and in our community
- Open campaign offices for volunteers and voters to gather
- Create advertisements lifting up the stories of our community and letting voters know where we stand
- Host events for our supporters and listening sessions in the community
And that’s not all!
And we can’t afford to wait to start. If there’s one thing we’ve learned watching Raquel help organize our movement over nearly 20 years, it’s that it takes time to build the kind of coalition we’ll need to win.
That’s why your donation of just $32 or more today is crucial to our campaign – and will have an even greater impact now than if you wait. So can you please rush in a contribution now, and help us continue to build a bold, unapologetic progressive movement to elect our state’s first Latina member of Congress? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upliftteran?refcode=X_081023_oneyearreup&amount=32]
DONATE $1 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upliftteran?refcode=X_081023_oneyearreup&amount=1]
DONATE $10 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upliftteran?refcode=X_081023_oneyearreup&amount=10]
DONATE $100 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upliftteran?refcode=X_081023_oneyearreup&amount=100]
We have a unique opportunity here in Arizona to send a progressive fighter to Congress who has a record of winning. No other candidate can say the same, so let’s not miss this shot.
A ganar,
Team Terán
P.S. If you’re able make a recurring contribution, it would really help our team budget for the future and make sure we can execute on our campaign plan. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upliftteran?refcode=X_081023_oneyearreup&amount=1&recurring=1]
[https://d15k2d11r6t6rl.cloudfront.net/public/users/Integrators/04eaa6b2-88f4-43b4-b978-7bb0708f5838/655A566A4D6351583942505531424E6A756B655939795555664E6B68692F6D746E713875657771364A42586E5A654649766D373776636D324B436851376D3643/editor_images/RT%20Bio%20Picture.png] Raquel Terán is running to represent Arizona's 3rd Congressional District as the first Latina congresswoman from Arizona.
For nearly 20 years, she's been fighting for higher wages for workers, healthcare for all, and better schools for our children.
She's helped build broad and diverse coalitions that have beaten Republicans like Donald Trump, Joe Arpaio, and Kari Lake.
Now she's ready to take the fight to Congress, but we'll need your support to win. Chip in today! [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upliftteran?refcode=x_subheader]
Terán for Congress
PO Box 1041
Glendale, AZ 85311
United States
Paid for by Terán for Congress
If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/quHjdOlmTESlm5aDEC5Smg2?unsubscribedata=EJ6aqWQ8SyI4y5AhMLF2bv%2BTtiDTRKXkcn3lOOOa%2F%2Bo3cSPzqAP8YrzXThtzeRKlzG3%2FOeaopnfeMymYmDC0qbRz30teNLCTAtH4Wjys2w0EoUXkDn3W6YxV9WNrbNdjCPY6ZIW0Fx1RjGXpAHbp9Vys3X72pZzrOZsg9Vdab5pfdzPRURYhlaaj3sMWT0GJp5njLoF8F5alHjo5ZMjq7v35DliDLhYvstM01zhpLnqo3KenCJJHhVdqq0bFdF90YyEKLGlSSxcRQbqeW9V%2FCsj%2F5A1skYut0MlqDECsiSffJusbdvQxpy%2BcTLNINta5pMvbOaFAy9stS%2FArjVTKT%2B1g4ZucVx8xV3VbMGu9hSeH3qOJQX1AxjG2LL9RBMB9OOlaai4CwZt3dnTagIIZko9MUJnlFk3MA1256ho4nC4sYCTXiEeU2JJqlCETkSrG .

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67898470/421231969/-1787004069?refcode=header&amount=25&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS8xMDAzNTUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYThkYTllZjQtYzAzNy1lZTExLWEzZjEtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=3cLSgU36qNcaz1_4Cy_lHm0Vs2KLwRytVp5THPWsBH8=) | Our democracy is under attack from deceptive tactics and false claims that threaten to erode the very core of our electoral system. **The recent indictment of former President Donald Trump highlights the urgent need to confront disinformation head-on.** As we approach the critical 2024 election, we must take a stand against those who seek to undermine the integrity of our elections. Donald Trump's indictment alleges a calculated effort to spread falsehoods and sow doubt about the legitimacy of our democratic processes - while actively interfering with the ratification of a presidential election. My job as Secretary of State is to correct the record and to lead with the truth, but I need your help. Your support is essential in this fight to protect our democracy from erosion-by-deceit. [**I’m committed to ensuring that the voices of the people are heard, and that means correcting the record and leading with the truth. We need 250 supporters to join us this week. name: Pramila Jayapal
subject: We won’t be fooled
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
We won’t be fooled. No Labels will take votes away from Biden and virtually guarantee a Trump victory.
#
Peter, there is an insidious plan to put Trump back in office that you need to know about.
The corporate-backed group No Labels is launching a plan to add a moderate third party line to ballots across the country in 2024 — and it could easily cost President Biden re-election. **This is a crisis for Democrats everywhere.**
Let’s be clear: Corporate-backed spoilers like No Labels serve only to hinder progressive policies and undermine President Biden. No Labels say their third ballot line could maybe slow Trump. **We won’t be fooled. They will take votes away from Biden — virtually guaranteeing a Trump victory.**
Peter, we need to call out this corporate power grab for what it is, and stop this plan right in its tracks before it’s too late. **[If you stand with our movement, please contribute to fight back against No Label’s insidious plan to undermine President Biden.](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/44058?refcode=em20230810-2792&t=1&akid=2792%2E420207%2E0YOdMM)**
**[Chip in ››](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/44058?refcode=em20230810-2792&t=20&akid=2792%2E420207%2E0YOdMM)**
No Labels’ own polling has found that in the event of a Biden-Trump tie, **Trump would end up with a 5-point advantage in a three way race.**
Democrats across the political spectrum are working to build public pressure against No Labels. We need to do everything we can to amplify these efforts and ensure that our Democratic party has a real fighting chance — without corporate interference.
We cannot afford to let big corporations help Republicans find their way into another victory by skewing the truth. We must fight back and ensure that our Democratic candidates have the undivided support they need ahead of 2024. **[If you stand with us, please chip in to power our fight and continue amplifying our Democratic bench.](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/44058?refcode=em20230810-2792&t=21&akid=2792%2E420207%2E0YOdMM)**
Together,
Pramila Jayapal

**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20230810-2792-footer&t=22&refcode2=2792_420207_0YOdMM&akid=2792%2E420207%2E0YOdMM)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/pramila.jayapal) | [](https://twitter.com/pramilajayapal) | [](https://www.instagram.com/pramilajayapal/)
Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, and small-dollar contributions sustain our movement for transformative change. To contribute by check, please address to Pramila for Congress, PO Box 21912, Seattle, WA 98111.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/did-your-info-change/?t=23&akid=2792%2E420207%2E0YOdMM)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=24&akid=2792%2E420207%2E0YOdMM)

Paid for by Pramila for Congress

name: Friends of the Earth
subject: Your Signature Is Needed: Tell Biden to revoke Formosa Plastics’ permit
body:
| | | | | [](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1923090?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---|---|---

| | **URGENT ACTION NEEDED: Don’t let Formosa Plastics build a destructive petrochemical plant in Cancer Alley!** [**Take action now! >>**](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1923091?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==) Along the iconic Mississippi River, there is a toxic stretch of industrial complexes that not only ruins the beautiful natural setting but also severely harms the nearby _**people, wildlife, AND ecosystems.**_ Overrun by Big Plastic and a whopping **200+ petrochemical factories and refineries**, this stretch of industrial activity releases so much toxic pollution that it’s known as __**CANCER ALLEY. **__ Now, _**Formosa Plastics**_ wants to build **MASSIVE 2,400-acre industrial complex** , so dangerous that it’s not allowed to operate in Taiwan — _where Formosa’s own headquarters are located!_ We can still STOP this _**catastrophic corporate megaproject**_ from moving forward — but only if we can persuade President Biden to _**REVOKE**_ the factory’s construction permit. Please, Friend, it’s going to take at least **3,912 more activists** to speak up by **11:59 P.M. TONIGHT** to build enough public pressure on time. **[Will you add your name right away before it’s too late?](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1923092?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)** | [SIGN THE PETITION](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1923093?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
Friend, it’s no secret how much harm the **PLASTIC CRISIS** is already having on our planet. Plastic waste is not only overwhelming our oceans and **KILLING** valuable marine life, but toxic microplastics are **CONTAMINATING** everything from _**the water we drink, the food we eat, and the air we breathe.**_
Meanwhile, the production of plastic itself is terrible for people and the planet. The manufacturing process burns through large amounts of _fossil fuels_ and releases _global-warming emissions_ that _exacerbate the climate crisis._ These destructive production facilities, which are predominantly located in low-wealth communities and communities of color, spew out **dirty petrochemical pollution** that’s been linked to _**cancer, respiratory damage, brain problems, and heart issues. **_
But Formosa Plastics is willing to put public health and our planet at risk — all for the sake of profit. _**Will you sit by and let Big Plastic further harm the people, wildlife, and ecosystems of Louisiana, Friend?**_ _**Or will you speak up today to ensure that this disastrous megaproject is stopped before it’s too late?**_ [**SIGN NOW: Tell President Biden to REVOKE Formosa Plastics’ permit and STOP the construction of this monstrous petrochemical plant! >>**](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1923094?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
[SIGN THE PETITION](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1923093?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
**Thanks for your urgent action,
Friends of the Earth**
|

name: Rick Scott
subject: I'll be watching - will you?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rick Scott for Florida
body:
| | | Peter, **I am looking forward to watching the first Republican Presidential Debate.**

I’m excited to see what the candidates have to say, and I’m looking forward to seeing fellow conservatives on stage giving their ideas for how to move our country forward.

**Now, I want to know what YOU’RE hoping to see during the debate.**

name: Team Engel
subject: the DCCC's leaked memo
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Engel for Arizona
body:
https://www.engelforarizona.com/ [https://www.engelforarizona.com/]
There are eighteen House Republicans in office right now who represent districts that President Biden won in 2020.
Our district is one of them.
Here's what that means: we know that our district has the votes to flip this seat blue. It will be incredibly tight and every vote will matter, but we can do it. Kirsten Engel is the right choice for AZ-06, and with the right support, she will win.
Being one of these targeted districts also means that this race is about to get a lot more attention.
The good news is that major Democratic groups are already targeting our opponent [https://www.washingtonpost.com/opinions/2023/08/07/dccc-memo-strategy-2024/?pwapi_token=eyJ0eXAiOiJKV1QiLCJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9.eyJyZWFzb24iOiJnaWZ0IiwibmJmIjoxNjkxMzgwODAwLCJpc3MiOiJzdWJzY3JpcHRpb25zIiwiZXhwIjoxNjkyNzYzMTk5LCJpYXQiOjE2OTEzODA4MDAsImp0aSI6ImY5MThhYmYxLTM1OWUtNDZhOS05ZjgzLTNiZWY4ZDFmYzM4NiIsInVybCI6Imh0dHBzOi8vd3d3Lndhc2hpbmd0b25wb3N0LmNvbS9vcGluaW9ucy8yMDIzLzA4LzA3L2RjY2MtbWVtby1zdHJhdGVneS0yMDI0LyJ9.lbbPnNhbR5aDvEME9vpt3awcyfVvMELBMte4EOCs3EM&emci=8115015a-9c37-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=ea000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000001&ceid=] . The DCCC is calling him out for claiming to be a moderate Republican when in reality, he has voted in lockstep with MAGA extremists to attack abortion rights, cut funding for veterans, and take away manufacturing jobs.
The bad news is that we're also going to get a lot of Republican PACs and special interests coming after our campaign.
We need your grassroots support to fight back. Can we count on you to donate now and help Kirsten flip AZ-06 blue? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/engel2024_foundingdonor?refcode=X_081023_DCCCMemo_act]
DONATE NOW [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/engel2024_foundingdonor?refcode=X_081023_DCCCMemo_act]
DONATE NOW [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/engel2024_foundingdonor?refcode=X_081023_DCCCMemo_act]
Thank you so much!
— Team Engel
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/engel2024_foundingdonor?refcode=X_081023_DCCCMemo_act [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/engel2024_foundingdonor?refcode=X_081023_DCCCMemo_act] Kirsten is a mom, an environmental attorney, and a former State Legislator who has spent the past six years fighting to restore funding to public schools, protect Arizona's natural resources, and make our communities safer.
She’s ready to take that fight to Washington to find common-sense solutions to the challenges we’re facing here in Arizona's Sixth Congressional District.
In 2022, Kirsten lost her race by one of the smallest margins in the country. Will you make sure she can build a winning campaign early by chipping in now? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/engel2024_foundingdonor?refcode=X_081023_DCCCMemo_act]

Here's what that means: we know that our district has the votes to flip this seat blue. It will be incredibly tight and every vote will matter, but we can do it. Kirsten Engel is the right choice for AZ-06, and with the right support, she will win. Being one of these targeted districts also means that this race is about to get a lot more attention. The good news is that major Democratic groups are already targeting our opponent [=] . The DCCC is calling him out for claiming to be a moderate Republican when in reality, he has voted in lockstep with MAGA extremists to attack abortion rights, cut funding for veterans, and take away manufacturing jobs. The bad news is that we're also going to get a lot of Republican PACs and special interests coming after our campaign. We need your grassroots support to fight back. Can we count on you to donate now and help Kirsten flip AZ-06 blue? [] DONATE NOW [] DONATE NOW [] Thank you so much! — Team Engel [] Kirsten is a mom, an environmental attorney, and a former State Legislator who has spent the past six years fighting to restore funding to public schools, protect Arizona's natural resources, and make our communities safer. She’s ready to take that fight to Washington to find common-sense solutions to the challenges we’re facing here in Arizona's Sixth Congressional District. In 2022, Kirsten lost her race by one of the smallest margins in the country. Will you make sure she can build a winning campaign early by chipping in now? [] [] [] [] [] Paid for by Engel for Arizona Engel for Arizona PO Box 40721 Tucson, AZ 85717 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please

| Hi there,

There are a lot of flashy politicians out there who play games and pull stunts. Me, I am a mother of two who has no time for games or stunts. I get down to business and focus on results. You won’t see me on the front page of the newspaper every day of the week making inflammatory comments about the political games of my opponents.

**My number one priority is delivering results for the people of West Michigan.** Whether that be lowering healthcare costs, securing reproductive freedom, or fighting for LGBTQ rights, I will focus all of my energy on results.

Being a representative isn’t about performing.[_**If you believe in my mission of making the lives of real people better, I hope you will support my re-election campaign so I can continue fighting for our community and never waste our valuable time with games and stunts.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67899309/421234911/1237824078?refcode=BLU-HSC-20230810-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTY0MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MzhlMjMyOC1jMzM3LWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8058WqutTL3_CruGE8ZPi6hCmKI_JG_dMAHPa09F11k=)

name: Working Families Party
subject: Frivolous lawsuits and billionaire Super PACswon’t stop our movement
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Working Families Party National PAC (77 Sands St
body:
In a desperate attempt to stop our movement, Republicans have mounted a spurious legal challenge against Kendra Brooks and Nicolas O’Rourke, our two candidates running for the Philadelphia City Council on the Working Families Party ballot line. | | | Peter —
Republicans have mounted a spurious legal challenge against Kendra Brooks and Nicolas O’Rourke, our two candidates running for Philadelphia City Council on the Working Families Party ballot line, in a desperate attempt to stop our movement.1 For years, Republicans have benefited from a requirement that two members on the Philadelphia City Council come from a minority party. That is until 2019 when Kendra Brooks was elected to the City Council on the WFP line. Now she’s running for re-election along with Nicolas — and Republicans are terrified. This frivolous legal challenge came on the same day that billionaire Jeffrey Yass launched a Super PAC in an attempt to flood the airwaves with dark money smears against Kendra and Nicolas. As the richest man in PA, Yass has previously funneled millions to stop progressive candidates in Philadelphia including bankrolling the attempt to impeach Philadelphia DA Larry Krasner. Now he’s back again to try and defeat us. **But we won’t back down.****[Will you split a donation of $10 between Kendra and Nicolas' campaigns to fight back against Republican attacks, and the billionaire donors who are financing them?](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953y7GAgFm2l_POJ-qqyOE1Nqjy2iXKIj_cTLqB1wDqFC5qZjtTT7fhDzuGvxq8-Zg35s4try6H19P_vd8vf8yg8VrSHPEXYHhpXMVlxv5Km012MMk9OK-yv-W3SxX01wqXn99pJhIOYX-dMg4sf_Txq20dUqkgZt74RISNCexHqp6S-4-X-Q_sAaLo5Zj_Y6q7oYYM4KR1Sd9A9vj71Lh4OOyvP6ykgES1FEdgRUKsmOXM9KCxEJ1Sc3FuS8A0oHVMEXI_TOjF6xIyBn3Gwa0A8ZVNmrDqzz5zVePZoxrNFe58LZptwg9JugBKo_kuil_ITjnLA0NP-ZHXLzf_3mNqhR0-vp0NsD1S8C78JCp6wx8Onq18RD3iXwWtg01QG_FB9mMRveN8Wh03RiYFWqECzc/3ym/lFQLOGQOS56ASUUCduSN3A/h0/aC8ZIMnYNgsqWJ3tH_LB1VFXzVAXGe30hQ9V7IeXaDA)** **[Contribute $10 »](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953y7GAgFm2l_POJ-qqyOE1Nqjy2iXKIj_cTLqB1wDqFC5qZjtTT7fhDzuGvxq8-Zg37CY_PMIMmDS0lBQePs4vPszp3SIm1J_F4Llk2SIeGOwVBM3dwT1Pm4l9HiIpX0F4SS1lwjQkksjZz0-fVM2ZUdI-8bXxWs6zpHlR2mG0SYpaH4HrZfxdswX0SlO5T6p9fj2K607bpIjtEBXrZZ8gAurbZ6imSxnsOQ9yAE05zAV_v4EEzP1qObncWxUCB1LQue1bEXTg8jX_pK0dsiOodUZvqvh4Ka41sxxIf-FOAV-ibxpddDCOrfMtarLVEEW4-pkRf7pg6QvT3OL5w0QR2JAn0xFEvMzRIkwdcqJlI9PFmXd-drKVvsJ4ZTB2d9jT760TIsch4QA_kR4Js9XIhK/3ym/lFQLOGQOS56ASUUCduSN3A/h1/vDn5nNxis6GaSZ5d42j3cInqsW60SPsiHBY2OwHwU1g)** These attacks on Kendra and Nicolas are no surprise. Republicans and their billionaire backers are terrified of two Black, working-class progressives like Kendra and Nicolas who threaten the status quo. Their hope is to stop Kendra and Nic from qualifying for the ballot because they know they can’t win amongst voters. **This lawsuit might be frivolous, but the legal costs to fight it won’t be. Kendra and Nicolas will now have to fight twice as hard to defeat this claim in court, and fight back against Yass’ Super PAC.** But we know we have the people on our side. Just last week we delivered more than 21,000 petition signatures — three times the legal amount needed to qualify for the ballot. And with your support Kendra and Nicolas can launch a massive voter outreach campaign to counteract these attacks and win in November. **[Will you split a $10 donation between Kendra and Nicolas' campaigns to help them fight back against Republican attacks and the billionaires bankrolling them?](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953y7GAgFm2l_POJ-qqyOE1Nqjy2iXKIj_cTLqB1wDqFC5qZjtTT7fhDzuGvxq8-Zg35s4try6H19P_vd8vf8yg8V-D7RgKB7HOraYFbrGZiZkLv34nD86sHvj99wTRrCWPdFOoWBsws19dkhJamxf1W6iiE1kpJHeQldleE2OpMOVrxUgHvYRD1q4VavXsyHqcZXfR5ne-2dacfciKGNHiNedjK9-qnEAeAjQfiJtE07S0-K-i6eGuag43_OKKNZCkYbOAKq14Dqw9TdB3fmT47Z2wfGx8uw_lg_eLqfSlhMshvufgi1fwd6FD02CQzewwo3oaMWR32LvjjXJipevdMwMAv8VD2i-tnKf0fu0byhgy7VhfC08NfPgFUFtM2mMNjQuC1elkhLk42o8pWy2WeF/3ym/lFQLOGQOS56ASUUCduSN3A/h2/ruy8GAH_Z-aFv3B8-_k2qhnUhC6XdNYRRt2FrRFMjYY)** In solidarity, Working Families Party Source:

clean_body: In a desperate attempt to stop our movement, Republicans have mounted a spurious legal challenge against Kendra Brooks and Nicolas O’Rourke, our two candidates running for the Philadelphia City Council on the Working Families Party ballot line. | | | Peter — Republicans have mounted a spurious legal challenge against Kendra Brooks and Nicolas O’Rourke, our two candidates running for Philadelphia City Council on the Working Families Party ballot line, in a desperate attempt to stop our movement.1 For years, Republicans have benefited from a requirement that two members on the Philadelphia City Council come from a minority party. That is until 2019 when Kendra Brooks was elected to the City Council on the WFP line. Now she’s running for re-election along with Nicolas — and Republicans are terrified. This frivolous legal challenge came on the same day that billionaire Jeffrey Yass launched a Super PAC in an attempt to flood the airwaves with dark money smears against Kendra and Nicolas. As the richest man in PA, Yass has previously funneled millions to stop progressive candidates in Philadelphia including bankrolling the attempt to impeach Philadelphia DA Larry Krasner. Now he’s back again to try and defeat us. But we won’t back down. These attacks on Kendra and Nicolas are no surprise. Republicans and their billionaire backers are terrified of two Black, working-class progressives like Kendra and Nicolas who threaten the status quo. Their hope is to stop Kendra and Nic from qualifying for the ballot because they know they can’t win amongst voters. This lawsuit might be frivolous, but the legal costs to fight it won’t be. Kendra and Nicolas will now have to fight twice as hard to defeat this claim in court, and fight back against Yass’ Super PAC. But we know we have the people on our side. Just last week we delivered more than 21,000 petition signatures — three times the legal amount needed to qualify for the ballot. And with your support Kendra and Nicolas can launch a massive voter outreach campaign to counteract these attacks and win in November. In solidarity, Working Families Party Source: 1\. , The Philadelphia Inquirer, Aug 9, 2023. Thoughts? Feedback? We want to hear it. Reply directly to this email and let us know. This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you received this email as a forward and want to get the latest updates from the Working Families Party directly, The Working Families Party is the party of the multiracial working class, fighting for a nation that cares for all of us. Wanna learn more? And if you need to update your contact information, Other political groups have corporate donors. But we can pool our resources too. Paid for by Working Families Party National PAC (77 Sands St. #6, Brooklyn, NY, 11201). | | Sent via . name: Katie Porter HQ
subject: Concerned about this month’s fundraising
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Senate
body:
We just wrapped up our weekly fundraising meeting...
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/14558?t=1&akid=27983%2E3422442%2E8HNoDV)
Hi Derek,
We just wrapped up our weekly fundraising meeting at Katie Porter HQ, and we wanted to bring you two concerning updates:
1. Campaign fundraising always slows down over the summer, but this year is particularly tough— _we’re projecting to fall short of our August fundraising goal._
2. We have to account for a big drop in donations at the end of the month due to Labor Day weekend!

For a people-powered campaign like ours, we can’t afford to fall behind if we want to stay competitive in this primary.
[**Since we’re falling short, we have to ask: would you be able to make your first donation today to help close the gap, Derek?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20230810-2?refcode=EMAK10_2_SUM_20230810_V1_F&refcode2=27983_3422442_8HNoDV&akid=27983%2E3422442%2E8HNoDV)
[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20230810-2?refcode=EMAK10_2_SUM_20230810_V1_F&refcode2=27983_3422442_8HNoDV&akid=27983%2E3422442%2E8HNoDV)
Our campaign’s fundraising operates in a unique way, because Katie Porter is not just another career politician in Washington. She’s a single working mom who grabbed her whiteboard and ran for office when Trump came to power. Now, she’s runnning to shake up the status quo, hold corporations accountable, and deliver for families in the U.S. Senate.
Derek, we know we can bring our fundraising back up to speed and make up for the summer slowdown if enough folks take action today. **[Please donate $5 or any amount you can spare today to give us the boost we need to win this race.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20230810-2?amount=5&refcode=EMAK10_2_SUM_20230810_V1_F&refcode2=27983_3422442_8HNoDV&akid=27983%2E3422442%2E8HNoDV)**
Thank you for your support,
Katie Porter HQ

Katie is running for the U.S. Senate because Californians deserve a warrior fighting for them in Washington. Our campaign is people-powered, we don’t take a dime from corporate PACs, federal lobbyists, or executives from Big Oil or Big Pharma. **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-footer?refcode=EMAK10_2_SUM_20230810_V1_F&t=2&refcode2=27983_3422442_8HNoDV&akid=27983%2E3422442%2E8HNoDV)**
---

To give by check:
Katie Porter for Senate

Irvine, CA 92616

name: GOP Senate Takeover
subject: Déjà vu…
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY DOLAN FOR OHIO
body:
Most Important Deadline Missed

| [](http://links.dolanforsenate.com/u/click?_t=879ec3883fbb432d91bdf6fa5c9b36c6&_m=9f5536f2da7d484e8fba039fc4ddbce0&_e=9CzwL-k_PVn9vR2Nc5qR_Fz_FajOYeHqcbA_m6jlZxk7x4k1_HhB92U1Xl0PIenQwAoGx3Yk9kRu0ZbUK3qN_aaLGnczF0qd2DSeN2rib_X74YutascXp-h1R9PlQTD_ihS3O8TTWq_I8I9N8IhmatHIs-iic1sLEAOqtjEx6L4UDE-5iFerfMWHTXOPskCGLtdU02SjPp0ODooHZNoaIY9Voq62Vn3gZBIVjwUAaKh2FsWcx2rhCXSJOrz2oNfgJ8KWYXwdliZdFc5b4VU_hkauE7U8q1zIEa0CSeESOLE%3D)
---
Peter,

We held off hitting the send button on this email all morning because we didn't want to disappoint YOU. We know we've sent you SO SO many emails just like this before, but it keeps happening!

_**Another missed deadline - D eja vu...**_

Except for this time, it was the **MOST IMPORTANT** Deadline OF THE YEAR. We won't get into the nitty-gritty of it, but we missed by a good bit and need to catch up. clean_body: Most Important Deadline Missed | Peter, We held off hitting the send button on this email all morning because we didn't want to disappoint YOU. We know we've sent you SO SO many emails just like this before, but it keeps happening! Another missed deadline - D eja vu... Except for this time, it was the MOST IMPORTANT Deadline OF THE YEAR. We won't get into the nitty-gritty of it, but we missed by a good bit and need to catch up. 1600% MATCHING ALL DONATIONS: With your help, we can turn this around before it's too late. Thanks so much, GOP Senate Takeover | PAID FOR BY DOLAN FOR OHIO Not authorized by any other candidate.

name: Tim Sheehy, Navy SEAL
subject: Response needed by COB
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TIM SHEEHY FOR MONTANA
body:
I could never have imagined that perhaps the toughest mission of my life wouldn’t be as a Navy SEAL but rather as a combat veteran preparing to run for the United States Senate. | [Unsubscribe](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_s=3990f8834d9a4adf978322ab640b3c7d&_t=lX4t344Fz9eqj2vuRo269NEGqjdx_Ru4Z_fCsNStHV9-m--PkwyBWANc0CsiuhhsqeuCHsBp-s5kWvUHcr9hlrhDAQOg5Bap3PyjaSH1q0A%3D) | [Mark as Junk](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_s=3990f8834d9a4adf978322ab640b3c7d&_t=lX4t344Fz9eqj2vuRo269NEGqjdx_Ru4Z_fCsNStHV9-m--PkwyBWANc0CsiuhhsqeuCHsBp-s5kWvUHcr9hlrhDAQOg5Bap3PyjaSH1q0A%3D)
---
[](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=3990f8834d9a4adf978322ab640b3c7d&_e=C6aJlmcYCbHLcuvqm7GE71r2sfz2MWTsfv1J4GO2oIucDoMM0gHbBBwksC_O-C-wH9NZ95gughMSv2qyMFE8BUjS44XpEwzEymqXe3ia6maZkD_E11SRtVFQXEKRYxgh4Dar8Ldw3_d8fEBL77ywIECzvQ0Xpb_d9hFkTAyWOJwcoa-MR6DdBq465k9CxpvB3Gdlb65nU_44I3xjY9F6VqoHFpUR2xaQ9I0MNDuzFMNE_JkyKFpwTyR38Z7Eyjx-Hq9NVQjVvNTdFgg-_yxurW_Nhldb4DHxHXCANFngahCdXRM84aOWdGm3LUvgkXfEqdO7qsJ4kZeylr6AP7P0eiWNGwRK-uRDzcS6NOBpY-jkhcUf9Vq6qW7JzxMi5Tuv0LpDqfsRAsD5dv0B4Q2D6Q%3D%3D)

Fellow Conservative,

I’ve always known that I was meant to live a life of service, but I could never have imagined that perhaps **the toughest mission of my life wouldn’t be as a Navy SEAL but rather as a combat veteran preparing to run for the United States Senate.**

[**Today, I’m reaching out to ask you to personally endorse my campaign to become the next U.S. Senator from Montana.**](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=3990f8834d9a4adf978322ab640b3c7d&_e=C6aJlmcYCbHLcuvqm7GE71r2sfz2MWTsfv1J4GO2oIucDoMM0gHbBBwksC_O-C-wH9NZ95gughMSv2qyMFE8BUjS44XpEwzEymqXe3ia6maZkD_E11SRtVFQXEKRYxgh4Dar8Ldw3_d8fEBL77ywIECzvQ0Xpb_d9hFkTAyWOJwcoa-MR6DdBq465k9CxpvB3Gdlb65nU_44I3xjY9F6VqoHFpUR2xaQ9I0MNDuzFMNE_JkyKFpwTyR38Z7Eyjx-BznIfn6UefdCSUgJPAKWrspuuo1qcoTVt0DI95b-PVEq7pAtUima78kEfPbdTeHDyQ9zghNpBSXQxdLmrMNsCM3lfHE1-haMQWZB4g1trrFiYjoj6sAHAFLLBTNC_NUppaSGNAV9c_TSYpWKzLZaUw%3D%3D)

Fellow Conservative, I am under no illusions that you will back my campaign the first time you hear from me. But my life experiences have taught me that **anything worth having requires working tirelessly, breaking down walls, and moving mountains to get it.**

**I hope you will allow me to earn your support today by reading my entire message - I promise, it’s worth the read.**

In the Navy, finding yourself between a rock and a hard place is easy. This rings especially true for the individuals who have earned the honor of serving in the elite task force that is the Navy SEALs, a group of highly trained combat warriors – a brotherhood – in which I earned a spot following my graduation from the United States Naval Academy at Annapolis.

[**ENDORSE FMR. SEAL TIM SHEEHY TODAY** ](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=3990f8834d9a4adf978322ab640b3c7d&_e=C6aJlmcYCbHLcuvqm7GE71r2sfz2MWTsfv1J4GO2oIucDoMM0gHbBBwksC_O-C-wH9NZ95gughMSv2qyMFE8BUjS44XpEwzEymqXe3ia6maZkD_E11SRtVFQXEKRYxgh4Dar8Ldw3_d8fEBL77ywIECzvQ0Xpb_d9hFkTAyWOJwcoa-MR6DdBq465k9CxpvB3Gdlb65nU_44I3xjY9F6VqoHFpUR2xaQ9I0MNDuzFMNE_JkyKFpwTyR38Z7Eyjx-035lEAaPRsilme_cH8HBrPPLTElw7XU_aI1hlG2kJbrPbFA1FcoZ3mE6GNIjAxgFUTcEH3Pehsnrt8QhfE20XXYll69V8wspOO7xF5ioYOfXJM3y8816zbkYcjpYUczts1NZDT0DETIX52-5IYe8fw%3D%3D)

Being a SEAL isn’t a one-man job; it takes teamwork, problem-solving, and coming to a consensus. **When you’re on missions in the harshest environments known to man, you must act as a unit and recognize you’re only as strong as the weakest among you.**

I’ve deployed to Iraq, Afghanistan, South America, and the Pacific during my time as a SEAL, and I have been involved in dozens of engagements with enemy forces and survived to tell the tales. _And believe me, there are some tales._

**I’ve seen the world’s dangers and stood up for freedom in the face of terrorism.** I know the strength it takes to stand up and fight for what is right – which is why [**I am determined to take on the anti-American, radical Left in Washington as Montana’s next U.S. Senator.**](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=3990f8834d9a4adf978322ab640b3c7d&_e=C6aJlmcYCbHLcuvqm7GE71r2sfz2MWTsfv1J4GO2oIucDoMM0gHbBBwksC_O-C-wH9NZ95gughMSv2qyMFE8BUjS44XpEwzEymqXe3ia6maZkD_E11SRtVFQXEKRYxgh4Dar8Ldw3_d8fEBL77ywIECzvQ0Xpb_d9hFkTAyWOJwcoa-MR6DdBq465k9CxpvB3Gdlb65nU_44I3xjY9F6VqoHFpUR2xaQ9I0MNDuzFMNE_JkyKFpwTyR38Z7Eyjx-PUt3Okh00D5pZSbMjS6J5SuOE-DL78N8TtU5EVru9ikxExfjhg1gOI6hwl3cgSLQINWh0h9OJDm6_4oCe5WB2itnZADTokBDKhgtDGbEDWA-CCpzKFMG2cvNhIL4E4sNyjlD8NBYV-pkJeHz7HVLdg%3D%3D)

[**ENDORSE FMR. SEAL TIM SHEEHY TODAY** ](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=3990f8834d9a4adf978322ab640b3c7d&_e=C6aJlmcYCbHLcuvqm7GE71r2sfz2MWTsfv1J4GO2oIucDoMM0gHbBBwksC_O-C-wH9NZ95gughMSv2qyMFE8BUjS44XpEwzEymqXe3ia6maZkD_E11SRtVFQXEKRYxgh4Dar8Ldw3_d8fEBL77ywIECzvQ0Xpb_d9hFkTAyWOJwcoa-MR6DdBq465k9CxpvB3Gdlb65nU_44I3xjY9F6VqoHFpUR2xaQ9I0MNDuzFMNE_JkyKFpwTyR38Z7Eyjx-XsifnP4O_em7JxZGhpkIWpMi9PBMEI9ViAea2YEgDfRii9WBB1QdCb07yQcp8Glzjn1IdXGJNU19xXiAEEG8KIGQ_9MsTzH2DX7YibuL4Evq4GeslBCiIsO-g57r51BHXHWBjueeGzYQh7BGL32QpQ%3D%3D)

Our homeland is in danger. Not from overseas terrorists but Washington’s radical Democrats who want to fundamentally alter the fabric of this GREAT nation. This FAR-LEFT liberal agenda is assaulting our society, communities, and the American Dream.

**The Democrats’ grip on power is seriously undermining our freedom, prosperity, and security.**

clean_body: I could never have imagined that perhaps the toughest mission of my life wouldn’t be as a Navy SEAL but rather as a combat veteran preparing to run for the United States Senate. | | Fellow Conservative, I’ve always known that I was meant to live a life of service, but I could never have imagined that perhaps the toughest mission of my life wouldn’t be as a Navy SEAL but rather as a combat veteran preparing to run for the United States Senate. Fellow Conservative, I am under no illusions that you will back my campaign the first time you hear from me. But my life experiences have taught me that anything worth having requires working tirelessly, breaking down walls, and moving mountains to get it. I hope you will allow me to earn your support today by reading my entire message - I promise, it’s worth the read. In the Navy, finding yourself between a rock and a hard place is easy. This rings especially true for the individuals who have earned the honor of serving in the elite task force that is the Navy SEALs, a group of highly trained combat warriors – a brotherhood – in which I earned a spot following my graduation from the United States Naval Academy at Annapolis. Being a SEAL isn’t a one-man job; it takes teamwork, problem-solving, and coming to a consensus. When you’re on missions in the harshest environments known to man, you must act as a unit and recognize you’re only as strong as the weakest among you. I’ve deployed to Iraq, Afghanistan, South America, and the Pacific during my time as a SEAL, and I have been involved in dozens of engagements with enemy forces and survived to tell the tales. And believe me, there are some tales. I’ve seen the world’s dangers and stood up for freedom in the face of terrorism. I know the strength it takes to stand up and fight for what is right – which is why Our homeland is in danger. Not from overseas terrorists but Washington’s radical Democrats who want to fundamentally alter the fabric of this GREAT nation. This FAR-LEFT liberal agenda is assaulting our society, communities, and the American Dream. The Democrats’ grip on power is seriously undermining our freedom, prosperity, and security. The only way to pull America out of this leftist tailspin is by taking back the Senate in 2024, and our path to the Majority runs through this race in Montana. Over the days and weeks ahead, you’ll receive emails from me and my team as we build our campaign. While I don’t want you to feel obligated to interact with each piece of content you receive in your inbox, I kindly ask you to refrain from unsubscribing from our contact list. The only way to flip the Senate next year is to nominate a strong Republican candidate who can defeat a Democrat in the General Election. *If we fail to flip this Montana seat RED next November, we lose our best chance at a Senate Majority for the next DECADE due to the election map at play. WHETHER IT WAS IN WAR OR BUSINESS, I SEE PROBLEMS AND SOLVE THEM. AMERICA NEEDS CONSERVATIVE LEADERS WHO LOVE OUR COUNTRY. name: CaucusRoom
subject: Proof He Wants to Destroy America
body:
What you need to know today. No images? [Click here](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-e-agsdy-trhiujldw-e/) [](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-agsdy-trhiujldw-r/)
## **Happy Thursday!**
**Threatening Livelihoods** A Utah rancher is speaking out against Biden's devastating climate change and conservation efforts**[as his family's livelihood could be upended](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-agsdy-trhiujldw-y/) **due to Biden's national monument designation. **[New England fishermen](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-agsdy-trhiujldw-j/)** are also sounding the alarm. _Who will stop this nonsense???_ **Biden Wants to Destroy America** **[Biden said that he"wanted to stop all drilling,"](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-agsdy-trhiujldw-t/) **but could not do so after losing legal battles challenging his administration's authority. **[He also has falsely claimed](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-agsdy-trhiujldw-i/)** he has declared a national emergency on climate change. **Isn't That Interesting?** Hunter Biden told Ukrainian energy firm Burisma to**[remove a picture of then-VP Joe Biden](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-agsdy-trhiujldw-d/) **and Burisma board member Devon Archer from its website. By the way, **[Biden knows](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-agsdy-trhiujldw-h/)** who brought cocaine into the White House. **Follow The Money** The House Oversight Committee released bank records showing**[Hunter Biden took millions of dollars worth of payments](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-agsdy-trhiujldw-k/) **from Russian, Ukrainian and Kazakh oligarchs.

**A Hit on Trumps Civil Rights** Special counsel Jack Smith**[obtained a search warrant for former President Donald Trump's Twitter account](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-agsdy-trhiujldw-u/) **in January, newly released court documents reveal. **Let****'s [have a good laugh](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-agsdy-trhiujldw-p/)!**
* This is **[the best](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-agsdy-trhiujldw-x/)**.
* **[Lil Dude](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-agsdy-trhiujldw-m/)**.
* Or, **[we could just not](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-agsdy-trhiujldw-c/)** with this stuff.
* Debbie's **[little brother](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-agsdy-trhiujldw-q/)**.

Another round of fundraising reports was just released to the public, and once again Bob Ferguson failed to disclose the donors behind _more than $1 million in contributions to his campaign for Governor._

[I believe Ferguson needs to follow the same disclosure rules as everyone else – and _The Seattle Times_ agrees with me – so I’m asking you to sign my petition calling on Ferguson to reveal his secret donors »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67899674/421236692/345146823?contactdata=mPqg4vCb5Y2VMg3McSE296BF+k0naFLpk3n79vJL9XTL4uZ/2nvuKUa8J+a/DuZdKT8Owwi95wqw9dT7sin3okgf691TbfrymIE6Eud0kMKSJLSP3EnuWtbuhR5v4iDY9uS/bolzFepvzzWIzRq3YA==&source=MM_EM_PT_90DO_230810_1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MzAxMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYmZkNDIxNC1jNTM3LWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=l1uz9C3jISXW0jelUJLJBGBfBys7oJmO9KwXjWlcQCQ=&emci=8d5d478f-bc37-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=cbfd4214-c537-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=45626167) | | **[ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67899675/421236693/345146823?contactdata=mPqg4vCb5Y2VMg3McSE296BF+k0naFLpk3n79vJL9XTL4uZ/2nvuKUa8J+a/DuZdKT8Owwi95wqw9dT7sin3okgf691TbfrymIE6Eud0kMKSJLSP3EnuWtbuhR5v4iDY9uS/bolzFepvzzWIzRq3YA==&source=MM_EM_PT_90DO_230810_1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MzAxMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYmZkNDIxNC1jNTM3LWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=l1uz9C3jISXW0jelUJLJBGBfBys7oJmO9KwXjWlcQCQ=&emci=8d5d478f-bc37-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=cbfd4214-c537-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=45626167)**
---
This isn’t inside baseball nit-picking.

**Contribution limits keep elections fair, and I firmly believe our democracy depends on voters knowing exactly who their elected officials might be beholden to.**

So it’s more than a little concerning when a candidate for Governor knowingly bypasses both contribution limits and campaign disclosure rules.

__I’m committed to disclosing our campaign donors and respecting our campaign finance rules.__

A formal complaint has already been filed so Washingtonians learn who is funding Ferguson’s campaign, so I need to know that you stand with us in demanding transparency.

[Add your name here »:](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67899676/421236694/345146823?contactdata=mPqg4vCb5Y2VMg3McSE296BF+k0naFLpk3n79vJL9XTL4uZ/2nvuKUa8J+a/DuZdKT8Owwi95wqw9dT7sin3okgf691TbfrymIE6Eud0kMKSJLSP3EnuWtbuhR5v4iDY9uS/bolzFepvzzWIzRq3YA==&source=MM_EM_PT_90DO_230810_1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MzAxMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYmZkNDIxNC1jNTM3LWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=l1uz9C3jISXW0jelUJLJBGBfBys7oJmO9KwXjWlcQCQ=&emci=8d5d478f-bc37-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=cbfd4214-c537-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=45626167) [https://secure.ngpvan.com/I7-oCMni90itSKOUOVX4Qg2](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67899677/421236695/345146823?contactdata=mPqg4vCb5Y2VMg3McSE296BF+k0naFLpk3n79vJL9XTL4uZ/2nvuKUa8J+a/DuZdKT8Owwi95wqw9dT7sin3okgf691TbfrymIE6Eud0kMKSJLSP3EnuWtbuhR5v4iDY9uS/bolzFepvzzWIzRq3YA==&source=MM_EM_PT_90DO_230810_1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MzAxMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYmZkNDIxNC1jNTM3LWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=l1uz9C3jISXW0jelUJLJBGBfBys7oJmO9KwXjWlcQCQ=&emci=8d5d478f-bc37-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=cbfd4214-c537-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=45626167)

clean_body: | | Another round of fundraising reports was just released to the public, and once again Bob Ferguson failed to disclose the donors behind more than $1 million in contributions to his campaign for Governor. | | This isn’t inside baseball nit-picking. Contribution limits keep elections fair, and I firmly believe our democracy depends on voters knowing exactly who their elected officials might be beholden to. So it’s more than a little concerning when a candidate for Governor knowingly bypasses both contribution limits and campaign disclosure rules. I’m committed to disclosing our campaign donors and respecting our campaign finance rules. A formal complaint has already been filed so Washingtonians learn who is funding Ferguson’s campaign, so I need to know that you stand with us in demanding transparency. Thanks for being with us, Mark | Mark Mullet is running for Governor to make Washington safe, affordable and prosperous. | | ---|---|--- | = ** Paid for by Elect Mark Mullet Elect Mark Mullet 401 2nd Ave S Ste 303 Seattle, WA 98104 United States

subject: Former City of Auburn Mayor Pete Lewis endorses Carmen Goers
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Carmen for Congress]( "Paid for by Carmen for Congress")
body:
“I know she will work hard to bring back common sense to DC.” | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/3ad4aa059cc8/im-announcing-my-run-for-us-congress-in-the-8th-congressional-district-13564647?e=0e51d1e991)
---
| | [ ](https://mcshanellc.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ac7c5348d309f6a3d3cffd39b&id=6cc73259ef&e=0e51d1e991)
---
| | Peter,
---
| **I’m delighted to announce that Former City of Auburn Mayor Pete Lewis has endorsed my campaign to serve Washington’s 8th Congressional District!**

Pete served his community as a banker and Auburn Area Chamber of Commerce President before seeking a vote to represent the people of his community as an elected official, and the wisdom and understanding from working in the private sector are more of what we need to overcome the disastrous effects of Big Government on our economy!
---
| [ ](https://mcshanellc.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ac7c5348d309f6a3d3cffd39b&id=ae37fb374b&e=0e51d1e991)
---
| **Pete shared the following statement:**

_“I am pleased to endorse Carmen Goers for Congress in the 8th Congressional District. As a commercial banker, Carmen has seen firsthand the challenges that the business community is facing. I know she will work hard to bring back common sense to DC. She will work to cut regulations and taxes, both of which are harming our small businesses and our pocketbooks."_

_**Pete’s endorsement means the world to me**_ as he comes from the same community banking and volunteer background that I do.

The way we approach government spending and the regulation of small businesses _desperately needs a change in direction_ , but we have too many politicians who are out-of-touch with how the status quo is making it extremely difficult for constituents to survive, let alone prosper!

**Big Government is NOT the answer, the economic freedom of individuals IS. **

[**Peter, let’s not leave it to chance that those who got us in this out-of-control spending spree of our tax dollars are going to change their ways!**](https://mcshanellc.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ac7c5348d309f6a3d3cffd39b&id=d8422703c3&e=0e51d1e991) [**Your support of my campaign is CRUCIAL to end the fiscal insanity and put us back on the track to American prosperity.**](https://mcshanellc.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ac7c5348d309f6a3d3cffd39b&id=cf780fdd87&e=0e51d1e991)
---

---
| For Washington,

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67900066/421237303/227139380?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMGRmMTA1Zi1jNTM3LWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HrQOnXgu-g5Dqcykef-2HK58FkDZQfLdgAIdatcrcVs=&emci=c097cc1e-9937-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=00df105f-c537-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=43566853)

| | Hey, it’s Brandon Presley with a critical update. Tuesday was primary night, and now we’re heading into the General Election. It’s game time.

My opponent is Tate Reeves – the most unpopular Republican governor in the nation, and a corrupt politician who prioritizes special interests and his wealthy allies over the hardworking families of Mississippi. [**_If you already know what’s at stake, please chip in a gift of $15 or whatever you can right now to be split between my campaign and the Democratic Party of Georgia. If not, please read on._**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67900067/421237305/-180861650?refcode=20230810.2_BP_8S&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMGRmMTA1Zi1jNTM3LWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HrQOnXgu-g5Dqcykef-2HK58FkDZQfLdgAIdatcrcVs=)

Peter, we’ve got a code red situation on our hands. Reeves and his big-money friends are putting everything they have into this race because they know just how vulnerable he is. **_Nearly every poll shows this is a neck-and-neck race!_** And now that the primary is over, Reeves and his big-money allies are laser-focused on keeping Mississippi red.

They’re desperate to send Tate Reeves back to the governor’s office by any means necessary, and they’ll use every trick in their playbook to do it. I know that, together, we can remove this failed governor, put an end to his corruption, and reclaim power for the people. But to make that happen, we need to go all out. [**_So I’m asking: Will you invest $15 right now before our critical deadline and have your donation split between my campaign and the Democratic Party of Georgia?_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67900068/421237306/-180861650?refcode=20230810.2_BP_8S&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMGRmMTA1Zi1jNTM3LWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HrQOnXgu-g5Dqcykef-2HK58FkDZQfLdgAIdatcrcVs=) | _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be split between Brandon Presley's campaign and the Democratic Party of Georgia:_

[Donate another amount >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67900075/421237312/-180861650?refcode=20230810.2_BP_8S&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMGRmMTA1Zi1jNTM3LWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HrQOnXgu-g5Dqcykef-2HK58FkDZQfLdgAIdatcrcVs=)
Peter, I have a deep love for Mississippi. I was raised by a single mama in a blue-collar family outside of Tupelo who inspired me to dedicate my life to public service.

Meanwhile, Reeves has spent years cozying up to lobbyists and becoming neck-deep in the biggest corruption scandal in our state’s history. And bombshell reporting says millions of taxpayer dollars were diverted to his personal trainer and celebrity friends – instead of fully funding our schools or keeping the lights on in our struggling hospitals.

**Enough is enough. Mississippians deserve a leader who puts them first.**

I’m running for Governor to do just that. To fight corruption, not embrace it. To serve working people and families, not special interests. And to lead with strength, courage, and real backbone. So, here's my humble request: [**_will you split a donation of $15 between my campaign and the GA Dems? This is a big opportunity to show our grassroots strength. I’m counting on you to donate whatever you can spare._**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67900076/421237313/-180861650?refcode=20230810.2_BP_8S&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMGRmMTA1Zi1jNTM3LWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HrQOnXgu-g5Dqcykef-2HK58FkDZQfLdgAIdatcrcVs=)

Thank you so much for having my back and believing in a better future for Mississippi.

With gratitude,

Brandon Presley

My opponent is Tate Reeves – the most unpopular Republican governor in the nation, and a corrupt politician who prioritizes special interests and his wealthy allies over the hardworking families of Mississippi. = Peter, we’ve got a code red situation on our hands. Reeves and his big-money friends are putting everything they have into this race because they know just how vulnerable he is. Nearly every poll shows this is a neck-and-neck race! And now that the primary is over, Reeves and his big-money allies are laser-focused on keeping Mississippi red. They’re desperate to send Tate Reeves back to the governor’s office by any means necessary, and they’ll use every trick in their playbook to do it. I know that, together, we can remove this failed governor, put an end to his corruption, and reclaim power for the people. But to make that happen, we need to go all out. = | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be split between Brandon Presley's campaign and the Democratic Party of Georgia: = = = = = = Peter, I have a deep love for Mississippi. I was raised by a single mama in a blue-collar family outside of Tupelo who inspired me to dedicate my life to public service. Meanwhile, Reeves has spent years cozying up to lobbyists and becoming neck-deep in the biggest corruption scandal in our state’s history. And bombshell reporting says millions of taxpayer dollars were diverted to his personal trainer and celebrity friends – instead of fully funding our schools or keeping the lights on in our struggling hospitals. Enough is enough. Mississippians deserve a leader who puts them first. I’m running for Governor to do just that. To fight corruption, not embrace it. To serve working people and families, not special interests. And to lead with strength, courage, and real backbone. So, here's my humble request: = = Thank you so much for having my back and believing in a better future for Mississippi. With gratitude, Brandon Presley | | Paid for by the Democratic Party of Georgia. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. www.georgiademocrat.org | Democratic Party of Georgia P.O. BOX 89202 Atlanta, GA 30312 United States

body:

| | **BREAKING: Congressional Republicans Attack DC Sovereignty as Democrats Renew Push for Statehood**
---
The MAGA GOP knows that DC Statehood would almost certainly mean TWO more Democratic Senators, so they’re doing everything in their power to KILL the bill!

If we’re going to have any chance of fighting back, we need to demonstrate MASSIVE grassroots support for DC Statehood! **Please, respond now:**

[**Do you support DC Statehood?**](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/DCStatehoodPoll_v2/?source=VPP_20230810_EMPOLL_E3_T0_AC_RS&t=6&akid=9813%2E878179%2EtZWslJ)

* * *
Listen, not only would DC Statehood give hundreds of thousands of people much-needed representation in Congress, _it could SAVE our slim Senate majority!_

Republicans are TERRIFIED — so they’re launching vicious attacks to shut down any chance we have of making DC Statehood a reality.

name: Ruben Gallego for Arizona
subject: Not Great.
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Gallego for Arizona
body:
First, the good news...
#

**First the good news:**

Our campaign is funded by a record number of individual donations made by people from all backgrounds and from all communities — almost all of these donations coming from working people united in their desire for change.

Meanwhile, poll after poll shows us leading against Senator Sinema and Kari Lake — winning in a 2 person race or three person race.

**Now, the bad news:**

The average donation to our campaign has slipped from $40, to $30, now all the way down to $21 this month. It’s a refreshing change for people sick of the role money plays in politics, but we haven’t had the number of donations so far in August to reach our goals. Not great.

So we have two options:

First, either we need lots and lots of donations to help us reach our goals. Or, we need people to chip in just a bit more than they normally would.

Normally we ask people who haven’t given to our Senate campaign to contribute $3

But today, we need to ask you to do a bit more, if you can. Will you? For Ruben? For this race? For a good vote in the Senate for the next six years?

[**Can you please contribute $10 to Ruben Gallego’s campaign for Senate in Arizona? Our goals are not arbitrary, they are set to reach what we need to win this race.**](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-aug23.NWxa9e&refcode=em230810-2-f&t=1&akid=912%2E734936%2EjO9JSK)

_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_ | | | **[CONTRIBUTE $10](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1044?c0=ruben-em-aug23.91DAaM&amount=10&refcode=em230810-2-f&t=2&akid=912%2E734936%2EjO9JSK)**
---
****
| **[CONTRIBUTE OTHER](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1044?c0=ruben-em-aug23.91DAaM&refcode=em230810-2-f&t=3&akid=912%2E734936%2EjO9JSK)**
---
Thank you. We don’t have any billionaires waiting in the wings to fund this campaign. It’s up to us. Together.

For Arizona. For America.

Ruben Gallego for Arizona

Emails like this are a critical tool for our campaign's fundraising and organizing efforts, but if you need to, you can [unsubscribe here](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=4&akid=912%2E734936%2EjO9JSK). If you would like to support Ruben's campaign for Senate, please consider [making a donation today.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ruben-em-footer?refcode=em-footer&t=5&refcode2=912_734936_jO9JSK&akid=912%2E734936%2EjO9JSK)
clean_body: First, the good news... First the good news: Our campaign is funded by a record number of individual donations made by people from all backgrounds and from all communities — almost all of these donations coming from working people united in their desire for change. Meanwhile, poll after poll shows us leading against Senator Sinema and Kari Lake — winning in a 2 person race or three person race. Now, the bad news: The average donation to our campaign has slipped from $40, to $30, now all the way down to $21 this month. It’s a refreshing change for people sick of the role money plays in politics, but we haven’t had the number of donations so far in August to reach our goals. Not great. So we have two options: First, either we need lots and lots of donations to help us reach our goals. Or, we need people to chip in just a bit more than they normally would. Normally we ask people who haven’t given to our Senate campaign to contribute $3 But today, we need to ask you to do a bit more, if you can. Will you? For Ruben? For this race? For a good vote in the Senate for the next six years? If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly: | | | ** | ** Thank you. We don’t have any billionaires waiting in the wings to fund this campaign. It’s up to us. Together. For Arizona. For America. Ruben Gallego for Arizona Paid For By Gallego for Arizona Use of military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform do not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.

BREAKING NEWS, Peter!

Apparently, Adam Schiff is a censorship hitman.

When Schiff’s own Los Angeles County instituted one of the nation’s most oppressive COVID lockdowns on individuals, schools, and businesses in the nation – which included one of the strictest lockdown and mask mandates – county officials turned to corrupt Adam Schiff to help them quell dissent and disobedience.

It has just been revealed in court filings that Schiff used his political influence to help Los Angeles County officials bully Twitter, Facebook, and Instagram into **censoring opposition** to their COVID tyranny, which oppressed millions of people in the County.

**The lockdowns and mask mandates – and the corresponding censorship and demonization by the government toward anyone who would not conform – will go down as among the grossest abuses of government power and overreach in history.**

_Adam Schiff was right at the heart of it._

[** Help Eric DEFEAT Adam Schiff » **](http://links.ericearly.com/u/click?_t=ad21af4bbba74273abaf5a1183f945ac&_m=4ca7e7ad0c744337b56ee7d2d5be7d4b&_e=K_5XDOKpP_VaM3H_MQ62luCqKewxrNGfot-6y4RQztydQH0xR-ge0Sp6h8vCRD90MjFDcrZcdlNAzRajqPAXmLsSJw8Mqz_IEWkg4fNxY2EZOfViJHcYQ1X5FflCrWBJjDzjLIt84m-nQ3OUdzOaKCOvIkHaJwAFk6EEtMpb8l4t5OUXz52drISQ-zh8Vx2nWqwV1OfVNGs0ngywFUP-xl_Ucd5myMzb9FtqTePTPfAow40xX1KplesVMxRmzTVzbj79wa470A5DOj_AoYeM0qtSo4GFo2a7femr-DfL6mbbEhPACUkyQdhURJ_HyOmKU0QhHrV3siOrmEUlINMMHbWNvTC1nqH48ZgU1072xYE_wvoe9oUxdVqlc5UedNJY)
As a textbook liar, who now remarkably claims he is running to protect Democracy, Schiff works overtime to redirect guilt toward and discredit his opposition in order to get away with his corrupt dealings. He oppresses all Americans, and the positions he takes make it very clear that his version of “protecting Democracy” is to turn America into one-party rule like the tyrants to whom he appears to adore, like Chairman Xi.

And, _clearly_ , he’s available as a mercenary for other like-minded, power hungry and corrupt government officials.

Always hungry for more power, **Adam Schiff is now running to become a Senator, and I’m the conservative Republican standing in his way.[I need your help to defeat him.](http://links.ericearly.com/u/click?_t=ad21af4bbba74273abaf5a1183f945ac&_m=4ca7e7ad0c744337b56ee7d2d5be7d4b&_e=K_5XDOKpP_VaM3H_MQ62luCqKewxrNGfot-6y4RQztydQH0xR-ge0Sp6h8vCRD90MjFDcrZcdlNAzRajqPAXmLsSJw8Mqz_IEWkg4fNxY2EZOfViJHcYQ1X5FflCrWBJjDzjLIt84m-nQ3OUdzOaKCOvIkHaJwAFk6EEtMpb8l4t5OUXz52drISQ-zh8Vx2nWqwV1OfVNGs0ngywFUP-xl_Ucd5myMzb9FtqTePTPfCYZoaZz8on06KmBqmWS7n68KWaFVrhzMetr9G2ga3adU2sD7h3rSkRIAjX5UINKw97h_WtSPOsJ-KXfDBWdzERJbTRqCm__u6_ylUl5P_Gf-cKOd753_3uOPdRKnf1nOrw9lHOyWVBcCjb2eU2AEx6)**

Adam Schiff is quite possibly the most corrupt politician in America and a national disgrace. We can’t allow him to reach the ranks of the Senate. I am fighting this battle of good versus evil for all Americans who know that things have gone way too far... but I can’t do it without your support.

I need your help to continue building momentum and maintain the early lead polls have shown us having in this race against Schiff.

[**We can’t let Schiff’s corruption continue in the Senate. Will you step up and help me kick lying, corrupt Adam Schiff out of Congress for good with a donation of $10, $25, $50 or more to my campaign.**](http://links.ericearly.com/u/click?_t=ad21af4bbba74273abaf5a1183f945ac&_m=4ca7e7ad0c744337b56ee7d2d5be7d4b&_e=K_5XDOKpP_VaM3H_MQ62luCqKewxrNGfot-6y4RQztydQH0xR-ge0Sp6h8vCRD90MjFDcrZcdlNAzRajqPAXmLsSJw8Mqz_IEWkg4fNxY2EZOfViJHcYQ1X5FflCrWBJjDzjLIt84m-nQ3OUdzOaKCOvIkHaJwAFk6EEtMpb8l4t5OUXz52drISQ-zh8Vx2nWqwV1OfVNGs0ngywFUP-xl_Ucd5myMzb9FtqTePTPfD2zX7WmmB1wHvEDcLIiuH5Ta2y3gGyXoy1P1UFQ8WrMhEEQ4DCdHdNSnsrW3UAkDdk3SrHhXrEi5o1KvNre1W0faRJzo4hCtLuaB5bRNyi4f2mkeVm1HwBr8-2VP_Kf_1BgWn1HstLTlyC6TahS8Gs)

Eric Early
Republican for Senate

---
Eric Early is a husband, father, attorney, businessman and son of a Marine. **Not a career politician.** Eric was raised to believe in America’s founding principles of limited government and free markets. He believes that every American should be given the opportunity to fulfill their American Dream, and his parents inspired Eric to achieve his personal goals. clean_body: | | | | | | | Dear Friend: 💥 We need 882 people to donate $34 to reach our goal! 💥 An average candidate spends 25 hours a week working on their campaign – that's almost a full-time job. While corporate-backed politicians have aid and support from paid phone bankers and plenty of time on their hands to do their own calling and fundraising, grassroots candidates like David have full-time jobs and don't have the paid support or unrestricted time to make fundraising calls, or do photo opps. That’s why we are relying on you to help raise funds for our campaign. We need your help! 🤝🌟 | | We can't do this without your support. We are counting on friends and family like you to help us make a difference. By contributing to our campaign, you are directly helping spread our message, engage with constituents, and create meaningful connections that can drive the change we need. Every donation, no matter the size, takes us one step closer to achieving our goal. A contribution of just $34 from each of the 882 individuals would propel us toward making a real impact. Please consider making a contribution by ! name: David Hogg
subject: Time to fix the system

body:
| | If you want to help The Collective PAC build Black political power up and down the ballot, and across the country, then you’re in the right place. If you'd like to unsubscribe [click here.](https://an.collectivepac.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnl7NBjmTZL5F5oqdT0MFW4GJFfovgZaqyhL6oVedQTvxqf62j1-674ssdeYZmJRYBzWSHitiKSzbPsrpv-_hwFxmusDClMi_fBQryOBnrEe8U1AGAUyHgZmon2ebsveodJ7c1jv23ykCHuLjbbUhnXigMtumuolLnozLtP_fpESmJ2XZzxh-p__hgHDUo6E9FVdiaPQAhsCHw_qa3yKct5S7-cgHdFsYrpi5cuDn-O3TruYbmX9I8jjlR3jNr_p1IPNW2blJBnf8FdhKhYSQlJmpwC51TxZ0l36UT9e8romwNTp1S_dvwNQf_E9sfmu4-vC_tRnOZBXYEkeec-Fg-Qt4uwNP3adptDpHTf-cHtqNb-VI9hbJ_ES4bFyKcnSTo80qWP-GHIxBe1Qi17bnTwO/3ym/Y8eedlQgRbWR291Y_tiaIA/h0/nMn_GaoVc6F8MQHk16r0Ua0y9vEEYo_88utUFXRy-Us) | | [](https://an.collectivepac.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xXVYKa6mzuP4rslwapSs_0NyM1-xjxtM1FS4r0L7mDSFL7388yo6Tj87uVZ9fRAPrmLz9i_CGiQn5D1wS7UATvxPSP52MmelPpvxZEGyLox0KxRsDSmtkl0yqmUwtz_zHK8czjbRn3oTONYBkZmYV3Lo1_BYz4AiS6gIyGgGMaeM3RQbsJIPFaNhsMsKPdh7tNTfBEUiM_gnE6GiganHXM66-uFSRSyQryfsT40ExYh5uK_Jz4KURKyV7pzDcbLjOPX-TpID-cB-i-LusUqevvICz8x-qWjh16Fg_wTTu-k5tTRj7mXzevoXZ7kNzldiLw7vYuHJDGtVQzTPHVrET1KeDnLWmiDS5Zxql8ypaeGQ/3ym/Y8eedlQgRbWR291Y_tiaIA/h1/pNHvomVG0nPxiPkCC-CmN8WY6UdN4r_9TKBx4QhxfRU)
Hey Peter, it’s David Hogg, gun safety advocate and co-founder of March For Our Lives.

Many of our elected officials can be described as one word: **_Cowards._**

Our kids, our planet, our freedoms, our democracy — are all under attack by far-right extremists, from the State House to the U.S. Senate, who are willing to let children be slaughtered at school and watch our planet burn for their own personal gain.

**We refuse to back down.**

There were many who said after Parkland that we couldn’t change anything because we were just a “bunch of kids.” But we proved them wrong — **we passed gun laws in a state owned by the NRA.**

There were many who said young people would never vote. But we proved them wrong in 2018 — _defeating more NRA backed politicians than ever before in U.S. history._ Then, in 2020, we defeated NRA puppet Donald Trump. **Both of these victories enabled us to pass the first federal gun law in 30 years.**

There were many who said Maxwell Frost, March For Our Lives' first National Organizing Director, could never be the first Gen Z Member of Congress. **But we proved them wrong, again.**

Badass young people have a habit of being underestimated — and I have a habit of scaring the shit out of Republicans by proving that, while we might be young, we are _powerful._

**That is why today, myself and Kevin Lata, Maxwell Frost’s Campaign Manager and 2022 Campaign Manager of the Year, are launching Leaders We Deserve** — a grassroots organization dedicated to electing young leaders to Congress, and especially our State Legislatures, across the country to help defeat the far-right’s agenda and advance a progressive vision for the future. Leaders We Deserve will work in partnership with a stacked Advisory Board, including Maxwell Frost, Justin Jones, and other influential leaders.

[Are you in? Split a donation between Leaders We Deserve and The Collective PAC so we can win back our country and advance a progressive agenda.](https://an.collectivepac.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xXVYKa6mzuP4rslwapSs_0NyM1-xjxtM1FS4r0L7mDSFL7388yo6Tj87uVZ9fRAPrmLz9i_CGiQn5D1wS7UATvxPSP52MmelPpvxZEGyLox0KxRsDSmtkl0yqmUwtz_zHK8czjbRn3oTONYBkZmYV3Lo1_BYz4AiS6gIyGgGMaeCp4hVd_XpqUiOIkWuJ18ZddH-502nriYsatvPG-jCG3dAxWLtSG6egrRvDlDzuE8dZFZvdMGa1DCp_RYjUZKK-EPqGIWZ5uTalubIqfICUAX16Ma7wanHzE_wJeu9ggYDAY7ZuSQxUO6aJf4gY2G1zZbDztNHeWlIdcJfkn5cJGVMIhE4T4AcKG2bsvQrEAXA/3ym/Y8eedlQgRbWR291Y_tiaIA/h2/rINVKFyolUGNkcbsFX5XjwGb5v5cPwx3xE4vQtoT7Do)

| [Donate >>](https://an.collectivepac.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xXVYKa6mzuP4rslwapSs_0LUS11P5mDZ3ulllowlbPAay0wm0hVAmAd-l969E4hQ4RO-R5Xhdxr-U007vpGrHhOkrcLK0gWAFqPrUdDTgj77NyaN2tX3fcvaOh-gHBQkevniOeum4wzYJmHsd4IVshNuEGMgPe5QUv2cT4DDCH7Q7oy_mD-WjG9OvGb9J-v_PQNTch2PuKFJSduVNFS_5YJQQFGnbXPS2Ht0YfgqJFvh5Xe8cxDEr4hJF_OfwDSktsgiSPTAN44_MpLRNfQL0HA7X5mxg61bDVSFiaFNydRh4hQD6RzjMWmlIXho7C8i3Kf6WnW2idDZZrkuwYMQZCGkY7L4RBx3rhW6B5STXVzQ/3ym/Y8eedlQgRbWR291Y_tiaIA/h3/2pOm9mDc2w_TzDNKuejYy_nAZYR5way8OpoPqVo2Qrs)
---
Why is this important?

**Despite making up 45% of the electorate, Gen Z and Millennials only hold 21% of State Legislature seats.**

Conversely, Republicans have made significant investments in down-ballot races, leading to the absolute assault on our rights and freedoms that we’re seeing happen across states — from abortion bans to taking away LGBTQ+ rights to repealing life-saving common sense gun laws put into place after the Parkland shooting.

Our political system is stacked against us, but incredible young leaders have fought back and beat the odds to get elected to office. It’s time to take more young people from movements like March For Our Lives and elect them to office to be the leaders we deserve. **But grassroots support is what moves the needle, and it’s what we need from you today.**

[Join us by splitting a donation of any amount between Leaders We Deserve and The Collective PAC today. ](https://an.collectivepac.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xXVYKa6mzuP4rslwapSs_0NyM1-xjxtM1FS4r0L7mDSFL7388yo6Tj87uVZ9fRAPrmLz9i_CGiQn5D1wS7UATvxPSP52MmelPpvxZEGyLox0KxRsDSmtkl0yqmUwtz_zHK8czjbRn3oTONYBkZmYV3Lo1_BYz4AiS6gIyGgGMaeJmOTioy-KlCcDen2rjM1510jKl0NmSjMF6aUEMKNCJhRlIy3VRV5gI-dTacvp_06oIG-oCrksG32uE6MwjdeEmt_NR2dZU2He80c6pgDJzKS2LAxXUyRIQDfL-syZkD-lRzrx-EuRJDUeRDzP_ZAQfaIwNgyNacCKyEfJD1DDCTDLzj0bwtZy3GntA4GwC0Jg/3ym/Y8eedlQgRbWR291Y_tiaIA/h4/Pe84atceji184kOHAiZS60GtOl5uXt3s0dhxsTS8zB4)

So how are we going to fight back against the 50-year chess game conservative special interest groups have been manipulating?

**Leaders We Deserve will invest in young people, knock down barriers, and elect more young people to office. We’re doing this by:**
1. **Recruitment** : Identifying candidates who will have the biggest impact on their states (that's where the real work is happening).
2. **Providing Day-to-Day Support** : We’re helping campaigns build from the ground up and will work with them directly on fundraising, messaging, coalition building, voter contact, and volunteer recruitment.
3. **Volunteer Network** : Our grassroots volunteer army (that’s you, Peter) will have person-to-person conversations with voters all across a candidate’s district, advocating on their behalf.
4. **Running Paid Media Campaigns** : We’ll run well-funded independent expenditure programs.

But there’s a reason our political system favors those who are older, wealthier, and white — _running for office takes serious resources._

Which is one of the reasons I’m reaching out today. Young candidates aren’t seen as viable and often struggle to raise money. They have lower personal wealth and smaller donor networks.

[So I’m asking: Will you join our movement by splitting a donation between Leaders We Deserve and The Collective PAC today?](https://an.collectivepac.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xXVYKa6mzuP4rslwapSs_0NyM1-xjxtM1FS4r0L7mDSFL7388yo6Tj87uVZ9fRAPrmLz9i_CGiQn5D1wS7UATvxPSP52MmelPpvxZEGyLox0KxRsDSmtkl0yqmUwtz_zHK8czjbRn3oTONYBkZmYV3Lo1_BYz4AiS6gIyGgGMaeJgUeXaRkdksCL44CjMmOub0HJAdAB0CnU1NjTdZvwyy9pGFGBN29k0QlXrS0IO03fVmTQuWoBKnXEy5tThEW422eoF-n_-Xy5x2mIs-fwZ7C3Le8OTOqE4VflENX7q7sETeLJ-qUyYQ41irAWSRFYhIF6p2p31FRJntyAErUMkBtyTwxnXWpeKr-7lzDWTp_A/3ym/Y8eedlQgRbWR291Y_tiaIA/h5/Lu5VcIR0y-Ft0ahKuJ3QZWFjVZQLpev_8Q5mQGQKe4g)

[Donate >>](https://an.collectivepac.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xXVYKa6mzuP4rslwapSs_0LUS11P5mDZ3ulllowlbPAay0wm0hVAmAd-l969E4hQ4RO-R5Xhdxr-U007vpGrHhOkrcLK0gWAFqPrUdDTgj77NyaN2tX3fcvaOh-gHBQkevniOeum4wzYJmHsd4IVshNuEGMgPe5QUv2cT4DDCH7XI1pFUKCqsLE2F9A7qKlKo5A7i6SeqyDOc48Qp-0Cbc6sqU_YrSY9dFhvpRFoOQMIs-Q2jML8rnZsO0e7L8nR7nCgDqn2kjCLGcQlFz3vF8rz9rqKHb5ThAaja-RkH8EfBjGbGxksVQMyeHx9whEp-qH5VlVAvCZaD2NkVnSI6TsKPi384BGcr3inYU6tNRaw/3ym/Y8eedlQgRbWR291Y_tiaIA/h6/VmbUkYc3sSDkAjl_duRjvtCGmqGImrMKtO-23O9BwN0)
---
There’s so much more I could say, Peter, but I’ll end with this — **we absolutely cannot do this work without you.**

[So I’m asking: Will you join our movement by splitting a donation between Leaders We Deserve and The Collective PAC today?](https://an.collectivepac.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xXVYKa6mzuP4rslwapSs_0LUS11P5mDZ3ulllowlbPAay0wm0hVAmAd-l969E4hQ4RO-R5Xhdxr-U007vpGrHhOkrcLK0gWAFqPrUdDTgj77NyaN2tX3fcvaOh-gHBQkevniOeum4wzYJmHsd4IVshNuEGMgPe5QUv2cT4DDCH7fyGkBcS1ZjXfWyPQHC74OBAaBn8AC2fHmGs2kgJ6QAwvQMRUKIwGEqIKbChXR6uVcmjuaAHWVP-99J2kCmMRHxdTxONYWFYWlsDyf8f1vY9dw_vQB4pDh5aiMv5KhZmQxM9DEIUxEP6S1Dh9ReJwfCCI1QtxvzDXVOi-iPgl0udJDBcUf3g34YS7qUCsClzLg/3ym/Y8eedlQgRbWR291Y_tiaIA/h7/WhU3-22tptIXTBgOUyZkn6m8Ls3bALgnAtgIvZKYHAY)

More soon,

David Hogg
Co-founder
Leaders We Deserve

[](https://an.collectivepac.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953w5O3Wwmdygae0W-34efSvb_hfX51xtIkq_nCgr0tl8iRqUTOndcJRC4vm20WcsKLhZEOaIUig-pRoc5u8CW3DO9dg29GAH1zJGUVKTe1jReXWXjPRPwIRFQppMge4Ux_pntjwjeyCXj_QYeL0jMBMD292eC5KKKW_-R1CwTtSxD77OPOR-LskmiMhR5TzBk4-gYJhe8bwD-b2ixZ4rcqLYQqTJGazF6DgLRFUQXQP0-bQmpLHydB__Np9phl3sGtidI-kqp8XjAtjJx8NI4I9Y7DwhUYGSd3fj2JzDMghSNS3fXyfJr0_kX_dRHZunU0BJMrx9xJRKmQANtLFGtbN04TtTIsds6RlFRcH7wQppTA/3ym/Y8eedlQgRbWR291Y_tiaIA/h8/c6SHzmCQITQYWF3dEd5yif_GEDLUBnlboesyicOu2b0) The Collective PAC is strategically focused on creating a truly equitable democracy where our nation’s local, state and federal governments have diverse and talented elected leadership and Black people are fully represented in positions of power to create the policies necessary to progress our communities forward. Since our inception in 2016, we have helped 110 candidates win general elections at the local, state and federal levels. We strive to support the next wave of progressive and unapologetic Black candidates who will usher in a sea of change in our political system while helping America fulfill its promise of democracy by creating a government that will truly be for the people and of the people.
