clean_body: | | If you want to help The Collective PAC build Black political power up and down the ballot, and across the country, then you’re in the right place. If you'd like to unsubscribe | | Hey Peter, it’s David Hogg, gun safety advocate and co-founder of March For Our Lives. Many of our elected officials can be described as one word: Cowards. Our kids, our planet, our freedoms, our democracy — are all under attack by far-right extremists, from the State House to the U.S. Senate, who are willing to let children be slaughtered at school and watch our planet burn for their own personal gain. We refuse to back down. There were many who said after Parkland that we couldn’t change anything because we were just a “bunch of kids.” But we proved them wrong — we passed gun laws in a state owned by the NRA. There were many who said young people would never vote. But we proved them wrong in 2018 — defeating more NRA backed politicians than ever before in U.S. history. Then, in 2020, we defeated NRA puppet Donald Trump. Both of these victories enabled us to pass the first federal gun law in 30 years. There were many who said Maxwell Frost, March For Our Lives' first National Organizing Director, could never be the first Gen Z Member of Congress. But we proved them wrong, again. Badass young people have a habit of being underestimated — and I have a habit of scaring the shit out of Republicans by proving that, while we might be young, we are powerful. That is why today, myself and Kevin Lata, Maxwell Frost’s Campaign Manager and 2022 Campaign Manager of the Year, are launching Leaders We Deserve — a grassroots organization dedicated to electing young leaders to Congress, and especially our State Legislatures, across the country to help defeat the far-right’s agenda and advance a progressive vision for the future. Leaders We Deserve will work in partnership with a stacked Advisory Board, including Maxwell Frost, Justin Jones, and other influential leaders. | Why is this important? Despite making up 45% of the electorate, Gen Z and Millennials only hold 21% of State Legislature seats. Conversely, Republicans have made significant investments in down-ballot races, leading to the absolute assault on our rights and freedoms that we’re seeing happen across states — from abortion bans to taking away LGBTQ+ rights to repealing life-saving common sense gun laws put into place after the Parkland shooting. Our political system is stacked against us, but incredible young leaders have fought back and beat the odds to get elected to office. It’s time to take more young people from movements like March For Our Lives and elect them to office to be the leaders we deserve. But grassroots support is what moves the needle, and it’s what we need from you today. So how are we going to fight back against the 50-year chess game conservative special interest groups have been manipulating? Leaders We Deserve will invest in young people, knock down barriers, and elect more young people to office. We’re doing this by: 1. Recruitment : Identifying candidates who will have the biggest impact on their states (that's where the real work is happening). 2. Providing Day-to-Day Support : We’re helping campaigns build from the ground up and will work with them directly on fundraising, messaging, coalition building, voter contact, and volunteer recruitment. 3. Volunteer Network : Our grassroots volunteer army (that’s you, Peter) will have person-to-person conversations with voters all across a candidate’s district, advocating on their behalf. 4. Running Paid Media Campaigns : We’ll run well-funded independent expenditure programs. But there’s a reason our political system favors those who are older, wealthier, and white — running for office takes serious resources. Which is one of the reasons I’m reaching out today. Young candidates aren’t seen as viable and often struggle to raise money. They have lower personal wealth and smaller donor networks. There’s so much more I could say, Peter, but I’ll end with this — we absolutely cannot do this work without you. More soon, David Hogg Co-founder Leaders We Deserve The Collective PAC is strategically focused on creating a truly equitable democracy where our nation’s local, state and federal governments have diverse and talented elected leadership and Black people are fully represented in positions of power to create the policies necessary to progress our communities forward. Since our inception in 2016, we have helped 110 candidates win general elections at the local, state and federal levels. We strive to support the next wave of progressive and unapologetic Black candidates who will usher in a sea of change in our political system while helping America fulfill its promise of democracy by creating a government that will truly be for the people and of the people. To Donate by Check: PO Box 15320, DC 20003 Paid for by the Collective PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. ** | | Sent via . To update your email address, change your name or address, or to stop receiving emails from The Collective PAC, please .

body:
| This is incredible news, Peter! Ohioans came out strong in Tuesday's special election to STOP an anti-democratic amendment and clear special interest power grab – which would’ve made it harder for us to enshrine reproductive rights in our state constitution this November.

Seeing Ohio voters turn out to the polls and decisively reject the GOP's proposal has me feeling more hopeful than ever about our ability to protect women’s health care.

This massive victory also makes clear that momentum is on our side heading into 2024 when I’ll be on the ballot. disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kaptur for Congress **[marcykaptur
body:
Ohioans sent a clear message. | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67900815/421239936/1333415586?refcode=EM_FR_230810Issue1Victory_MK_90DO_4_NG_N_Logo&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTY1NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZjlhYjM0NC1jOTM3LWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=RLil2cuQGlsbBdDTLoDa30BHZ1eRGBjA-3_nVyBfWDo=)

Ohioans sent a clear message in the August 8 special election: **one person, one vote must remain a bedrock principle in a representative democracy.**

I was proud to stand against outside interests and extremists in the Ohio legislature in their cynical attempt to undermine the rights of each and every Ohioan - just as they did with the criminal bailout of First Energy, as they did in passing illegally gerrymandered districts to enshrine their rule, and now again in this attempt to silence citizen-led initiatives.

But our work is not done yet. **With a critical election this November, and control of Congress on the line in 2024, we can’t take this moment for granted.**

**[Will you help me and the Democrats fighting to protect democracy right here in Ohio and from Congress by contributing $5 today? I was proud to stand against outside interests and extremists in the Ohio legislature in their cynical attempt to undermine the rights of each and every Ohioan - just as they did with the criminal bailout of First Energy, as they did in passing illegally gerrymandered districts to enshrine their rule, and now again in this attempt to silence citizen-led initiatives. a

highlighted
the
importance
of

in

legislation
to

in

so
that
families
and

in

Kansas
can

jobs:

announced
that
Kansas’

district
has

more
clean

jobs
than
any

district
nationwide,

the
Inflation

Sharice
was

member
of
Kansas’

delegation
to
vote
for
this
critical
legislation
to
create
jobs,
lower
costs,
and

the
climate
crisis.
*
*
Bipartisan
wins
for
Kansas:
Sharice
wrote
a
guest
column
in
the
Kansas
City
Star
to
highlight
the
accomplishments
of
the
bipartisan
Federal
Aviation
Administration
reauthorization,

two
of
Sharice’s
amendments
which
will

and

in

control
towers.

Sharice’s

here.
[https://www.kansascity.com/opinion/readers-opinion/guest-commentary/article277486728.html]
*
*

for

This

name: Urgent Message (via DLCC.org)
subject: Can you help us fight extremism in your state? →
body:
Michelle and Barack Obama know the critical importance of coming together to create change – now they’re calling on you | | |
---
| | **The GOP has spent decades building state power, gerrymandering districts, and propelling their anti-American agenda across the country. From gutting abortion access to infringing on LGBTQ+ rights, state Republicans have become a one-stop shop for advancing the far-right agenda.** But state Democrats are right on their heels. They’re doing everything in their power to ensure these extremist policies don’t come to fruition. Even the Obamas have sounded the alarm: [](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zuyS4eKwwkxoMC1O7i3AUZ4znX1V30AzyoPQGNX0DNOlFdwF2p3Y2aBh0o8mEVfldulYu4Dq0z7udEIM5ONGQRlfUpBC2TDLkzpJzP7of70osAEOGWM3kaHZHJlEG6g9MWWjQXgtjHXFxkAzyAjFus4IR9MZ1SXfhviDvCNTwPupnORaaDINwcuaiJRg9X04Cu4O5L7o3-TPGTQevqsgvugozqf1pUFrN73V1UAiLeOSpfXkYGmvsK8QZYykTADMKFar7QS7_jWQqaKx88v-5Ydkxjtw4syzNqsisDL_tL4MV-vrLTj4Dsm-F5zSRCxOBW5fK70oGaOWfMb8p934ny4T-M421LjcKSVBWie8HH_DYfwONgPfvIDatX58UZTbyKrhrWXE5o2BWZUbFWJjVyPDUBhu6qbHmOB9aoyEXc9IyX-x2rnK3y62v0t70b36-9LQzSn6D0ZShGCXYYB1hSv77DxBe1rc-8woQ8hQZMvHydUkILBR5wVbxcCE8-8YXfwi-VS9wFY_FSMHDzG3xn_A8iCAsfzg7xzN5Q1NTcjCSP_dSudGcySLIS6pue_RSyigIn4LafNIk15Aa4rhVDAEMK8WNPw8PO7_qFUfxOj4xM2lLUpkDJWn3FvRmGfAhhsh8IT2pw5WaCd8n60edb7dD7n09djRuW8bBruLAca-33N54T9GH5mQA4AXfzu0Y/3ym/B4M6CFcjQ2qa_Kq__8mwuw/h0/XnyFlUeEtfuYoqud2yArS5LsH5SOyoItC3uvMjV4E9w) Former President Barack Obama and former First Lady Michelle Obama know just how critical coming together right now to rally behind Democrats is. That’s why they’re calling on members of this community – yes, you! – to help fight Republican extremism across the country. clean_body: Michelle and Barack Obama know the critical importance of coming together to create change – now they’re calling on you | | | | | The GOP has spent decades building state power, gerrymandering districts, and propelling their anti-American agenda across the country. From gutting abortion access to infringing on LGBTQ+ rights, state Republicans have become a one-stop shop for advancing the far-right agenda. But state Democrats are right on their heels. They’re doing everything in their power to ensure these extremist policies don’t come to fruition. Even the Obamas have sounded the alarm: Former President Barack Obama and former First Lady Michelle Obama know just how critical coming together right now to rally behind Democrats is. That’s why they’re calling on members of this community – yes, you! – to help fight Republican extremism across the country. | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately. | | | | | GOP lawmakers have already started to propose dangerous legislation like: The death penalty for women who have abortions Infringing on LGBTQ+ rights Enacting execution by firing squad And so much more! We can’t afford to have anyone sit on the sidelines if we want to expand Democratic power. Thank you, Team DLCC ** | Democratic Legislative Campaign Committee 1225 Eye Street NW Suite 1250, Washington, DC 20005 Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. You read that right. Prominent elections expert Dave Wasserman is labeling our race as a ‘ticking time bomb’ for Ken Calvert and the GOP.
_Why?_ CA-41 has zero appetite for Calvert’s extremism, which is why voters are turning their backs on him in droves.**Just look at the data:**
**→ CA-41 is home to one of the largest LGBTQ+ communities in the nation. Meanwhile, Calvert has a decades-long record of anti-LGBTQ+ discrimination.** He most recently rejected funding of over $3 million for projects aimed at serving the LGBTQ+ community.

**→ Redistricting added thousands of new Democratic voters in the Inland Empire and desert communities like Palm Springs to CA-41.** In past elections, Ken Calvert enjoyed a strong Republican edge. Now, Democrats hold a +3,000 registration advantage.

**→ Will was the __only__ __ Democratic challenger in California to win the majority of Independents in 2022.** In a time of unprecedented polarization, Will’s power to unify voters is critical when it comes to flipping this seat.

clean_body: | = = | = = You read that right. Prominent elections expert Dave Wasserman is labeling our race as a ‘ticking time bomb’ for Ken Calvert and the GOP. Why? CA-41 has zero appetite for Calvert’s extremism, which is why voters are turning their backs on him in droves.Just look at the data: → CA-41 is home to one of the largest LGBTQ+ communities in the nation. Meanwhile, Calvert has a decades-long record of anti-LGBTQ+ discrimination. He most recently rejected funding of over $3 million for projects aimed at serving the LGBTQ+ community. → Redistricting added thousands of new Democratic voters in the Inland Empire and desert communities like Palm Springs to CA-41. In past elections, Ken Calvert enjoyed a strong Republican edge. Now, Democrats hold a +3,000 registration advantage. → Will was the only Democratic challenger in California to win the majority of Independents in 2022. body:
| | | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/67901753/421243224/-1986725773?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1285-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkVNUi8xLzgxMzIxIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjZlM2MxNjVjLWNiMzctZWUxMS1hM2YxLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=nImLWF-COV10AgVDYx3FCrkxxcFMn92kcKUhM01wFY0=)

Peter, we’ve said from the start that the fights to protect abortion access _and_ our democratic institutions go hand in hand. Just look at the special election in Ohio this week.
Once again, Republican officials attempted to suppress the will of our communities. Their goal? To make it even harder to pass a constitutional amendment that would protect abortion statewide. **Ohioans turned out and said NO.

But the fight is not over. **
**Our****communities in Republican-controlled states are still facing constant attacks on their right to be heard. **Republican politicians are using every trick in the book from restricting access to the ballot box to rigging election maps in their favor. In Florida, Gov. Ron DeSantis just suspended _another_ democratically elected prosecutor ignoring the will of his own constituents! We urgently need to break their grip on the levers of power. **That’s why Emerge’s work to empower Democratic women to lead is crucial to the direction of our democracy. **
**We’re ramping up our programs to recruit and train more Democratic women to join this fight. But right now we’re falling $1,214 short of our midnight fundraising goal, and we need your help to close the gap. [Our rights are on the ballot this year, Peter: Will you give $5 or more to Emerge now to empower Democratic women to run and win in every state?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/67901758/421243228/-1986725773?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1285-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkVNUi8xLzgxMzIxIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjZlM2MxNjVjLWNiMzctZWUxMS1hM2YxLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=nImLWF-COV10AgVDYx3FCrkxxcFMn92kcKUhM01wFY0=)**

With voters demanding protection of our essential rights, we need leaders who will listen – and those leaders are Emerge women. We have over 1,200 alums in office right now, pushing back against Republican officials' anti-democratic tactics. But we must expand our ranks by building a strong pipeline of Democratic women to ensure every voice is heard and every vote is fairly counted. **That’s how we protect abortion access and defeat Republicans’ extremist agenda. **
**But it takes a movement to transform politics, and we need you with us, Peter. We have the chance to add over 200 more Emerge women to our ranks in the November elections, and we can’t afford to slow down now.[So please: Will you chip in $5 or more now, as much as you can before midnight tonight, to empower Democratic women to run, win, and continue our fight in every state?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/67901780/421243253/-1986725773?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1285-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkVNUi8xLzgxMzIxIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjZlM2MxNjVjLWNiMzctZWUxMS1hM2YxLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=nImLWF-COV10AgVDYx3FCrkxxcFMn92kcKUhM01wFY0=)**
Thank you for stepping up today,

Team Emerge

name: NDRC Breaking News Alert
subject: POLITICO: “Abortion rights won big in Ohio.”
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the National Democratic Redistricting Committee, John Bisognano, President
body:
|
---

**We have huge news, team:** On Tuesday, Ohio voters soundly rejected the GOP’s anti-democratic plan to try to restrict reproductive freedom. | **FIRST:** Republicans were _terrified_ that voters will approve a ballot measure protecting the right to choose in Ohio’s constitution.

**SO:** The Ohio GOP tried to raise the threshold to amend the constitution from a simple majority to 60% of the vote. Republicans scheduled a vote in August, hoping the measure would quietly pass in a low-turnout election.

**BUT THEN:** Ohio voters saw right through the scheme and showed up in full force to reject the GOP’s effort to change the rules. The proposal failed _by a double-digit margin_.

****NOW:** We need to build on this momentum so we can continue defeating GOP efforts to win unearned power across the country by weakening our democracy!**
| [DONATE TO THE NDRC’S WORK NATIONWIDE](https://click.everyaction.com/k/67901794/421243274/-644827789?amount=30&refcode=EM_RTI_20230810_FR_8L_redlight922_527&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjcxM2MxNjVjLWNiMzctZWUxMS1hM2YxLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=njIEe9tDhZfBCKiwDMuy9xwb6q9YwxpKIYXIoeJAtJg=)

Derek, we’re proud to run a grassroots-funded campaign because it speaks to the values that drive Chris. Our campaign is people-powered because Chris believes that the power of working people _can change the world._

**But National Republicans are counting on our grassroots support dwindling during August.** They know the only way they can defeat Chris and take back PA-17 is if folks like you give up on our fight for our common good. [**Can you help us prove that our team is here to stay?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67901917/421243774/-235809255?refcode=em_fr_2023.08.10_b2_td_all&amount=1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMWU1ODJhMS1jYzM3LWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TWO1R3hih_ZY_FGa4Wg5PnmthrO3dd4B1h7Gldbwyrs=)

name: Team Finstad
subject: Fighting for Minnesotans includes fighting for our farmers
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Finstad for Congress
body:
| | | [](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=0a899ad0193f48d399298a3556652e7c&_m=d8cf5106de26458cbf936c17ae1a62af&_e=TZQqT0XjcVK2_4kfkGrt1gwHGZOGmDcsQUM-bZobxL5ldB85br-4NfJ9DWMMl1lsRYyRvGpwagPR7Oqz-c9uF17mR-CCri26Gpu4leDPpfNC_N2gpRfnCRbnG2LLf_ZlIyCc2Pb3m933MQXxMjaytotLYYntMOPs9M6EwH3rn2hCYyX9AbmvgxvT_lnrrgwstk8EuciGK1Wk0UhPTLNBdSbDtyfkZRyUh2p1-3WYhhozBA9XlM95zXCza2uF59rakmPiDkZp-0FMnFe6sjM-XQ%3D%3D)
---
| | We're only a couple of weeks from one of our favorite events of the year: **the Minnesota State Fair!** **"The Great Minnesota Get-Together"** is an incredible opportunity for Minnesotans from across the state to share with each other what makes our state great and show off how Minnesotans are helping feed America. As one of the largest state fairs in the country, it also highlights why Minnesotans take farming and agricultural issues seriously. Policies made in Washington can have a lasting impact on small rural businesses and affect the success of family farms. **[Brad Finstad is fighting to make sure that doesn't happen.](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=0a899ad0193f48d399298a3556652e7c&_m=d8cf5106de26458cbf936c17ae1a62af&_e=TZQqT0XjcVK2_4kfkGrt1gwHGZOGmDcsQUM-bZobxL5ldB85br-4NfJ9DWMMl1lsRYyRvGpwagPR7Oqz-c9uF17mR-CCri26Gpu4leDPpfNC_N2gpRfnCRbnG2LLf_ZlfLE-wYVrkZPHmNQeCQZ9ps7qrk0TXc-4VYB4h1ntOnrZXSlf4pbyLeunhrb8gd8YhVW2lwoZ-i5cQZT6vqdF2dR-oszfrjmURTX5AMuFz-O_47otoNu2XNd1cFubVAZimWOWzJf0_GjXILqyS_DlQg%3D%3D)** He's been meeting with farmers and speaking with them directly about what he can do to fight for them in Congress. He also wants to hear from you, my friend. **[Will you take our 2-min survey and share your thoughts with Brad on Joe Biden and his agricultural policies?](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=0a899ad0193f48d399298a3556652e7c&_m=d8cf5106de26458cbf936c17ae1a62af&_e=TZQqT0XjcVK2_4kfkGrt1gwHGZOGmDcsQUM-bZobxL5ldB85br-4NfJ9DWMMl1lsRYyRvGpwagPR7Oqz-c9uF17mR-CCri26Gpu4leDPpfNC_N2gpRfnCRbnG2LLf_ZlWogUOCL__d2_dX1GOnghrU06A-vWS-OpPtb9sXv0NtFfBVseasoXCbPdiFitzH0ty2qLquTq2iaJpqOc_LZ7z8BjXh3aAd-xMDua3QxS6IPLlX7pZPbgi0dsyIyMpDX08abwXjW40SZv0amNhIL7mw%3D%3D)**
---
[**CLICK HERE >> Take Our Survey**](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=0a899ad0193f48d399298a3556652e7c&_m=d8cf5106de26458cbf936c17ae1a62af&_e=TZQqT0XjcVK2_4kfkGrt1gwHGZOGmDcsQUM-bZobxL5ldB85br-4NfJ9DWMMl1lsRYyRvGpwagPR7Oqz-c9uF17mR-CCri26Gpu4leDPpfNC_N2gpRfnCRbnG2LLf_Zle6SdAYRxQnkCRc7w4hgtuBA7Sq0OKGQ6iCFaFFc3YAmecELyfE6YRJPTQcZRK-K_puXfgnOIqwoXVxMb5ul5IuFzi_fX49Rd43RcvTgDY3t76kN4tgcoGNhi_FUVozXZ3zENe97WIUc-RFuO1yh1bw%3D%3D)

Thank you,**Team Finstad**

clean_body: | | | | | We're only a couple of weeks from one of our favorite events of the year: the Minnesota State Fair! "The Great Minnesota Get-Together" is an incredible opportunity for Minnesotans from across the state to share with each other what makes our state great and show off how Minnesotans are helping feed America. As one of the largest state fairs in the country, it also highlights why Minnesotans take farming and agricultural issues seriously. Policies made in Washington can have a lasting impact on small rural businesses and affect the success of family farms. He's been meeting with farmers and speaking with them directly about what he can do to fight for them in Congress. He also wants to hear from you, my friend. Thank you,Team Finstad | | | | | Paid for by Finstad for Congress | | | ---|---|---

[](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=d64aff71164f48918f0e56b053426bd0&_e=quJzg2zu2hgQX7FB0FOTPNEkWEQV76b0yNyYzkeaJxesaaloOjqViB3eCQ1lBBcaPX2Id7OV7fkIF0Ow-6z_sQyzgcDWl4wBxia7e5bUApBfLeAhIT4d7qt-LxBBVUuxuC94OQJlxiaoPY8eBDKZLgCGn_9gJkmL-fiXV_Khd_EuVXIXGX0gIjIUYxhRfOLqLymudtGIrpG3v3N-BUwfQ0YwfFvNl5Csms5YbFwW5IcuNHo0OPlVsz0FoHyZw347kV1dgCAveVdaq--wTTwSPXU1Zp-K-_3cyhZVm3mFvqaBpoJXtVtVVyeOh09bDDovrvCRzI2Apf0MVGsc1dj6tc8zaoh3XOMxaGSUriUT_0aJvjLmPN-uC_qADw5_skcFaDyuidxrlk345tUmbpJmKw%3D%3D)

Fellow Conservative,

I’ve always known that I was meant to live a life of service, but I could never have imagined that perhaps **the toughest mission of my life wouldn’t be as a Navy SEAL but rather as a combat veteran preparing to run for the United States Senate.**

[**Today, I’m reaching out to ask you to personally endorse my campaign to become the next U.S. Senator from Montana.**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=d64aff71164f48918f0e56b053426bd0&_e=quJzg2zu2hgQX7FB0FOTPNEkWEQV76b0yNyYzkeaJxesaaloOjqViB3eCQ1lBBcaPX2Id7OV7fkIF0Ow-6z_sQyzgcDWl4wBxia7e5bUApBfLeAhIT4d7qt-LxBBVUuxuC94OQJlxiaoPY8eBDKZLgCGn_9gJkmL-fiXV_Khd_EuVXIXGX0gIjIUYxhRfOLqLymudtGIrpG3v3N-BUwfQ0YwfFvNl5Csms5YbFwW5IcuNHo0OPlVsz0FoHyZw347w0hbKqWy_IS03-RjvkOdcrMQiwV4ktDAu-dZ4GXWy2X-LdaFlQ6WJBck3kDJX5cYdBAwXSN8VBJ-EzkQVWyH_jf_TvEKDWgHOUzUijNeFYqZG3Pd5Alt1o3wKUUhHK7f6pcohp-83bfVf3sl2G57jQ%3D%3D)

Fellow Conservative, I am under no illusions that you will back my campaign the first time you hear from me. But my life experiences have taught me that **anything worth having requires working tirelessly, breaking down walls, and moving mountains to get it.**

**I hope you will allow me to earn your support today by reading my entire message - I promise, it’s worth the read.**

In the Navy, finding yourself between a rock and a hard place is easy. This rings especially true for the individuals who have earned the honor of serving in the elite task force that is the Navy SEALs, a group of highly trained combat warriors – a brotherhood – in which I earned a spot following my graduation from the United States Naval Academy at Annapolis.

[**ENDORSE FMR. SEAL TIM SHEEHY TODAY** ](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=d64aff71164f48918f0e56b053426bd0&_e=quJzg2zu2hgQX7FB0FOTPNEkWEQV76b0yNyYzkeaJxesaaloOjqViB3eCQ1lBBcaPX2Id7OV7fkIF0Ow-6z_sQyzgcDWl4wBxia7e5bUApBfLeAhIT4d7qt-LxBBVUuxuC94OQJlxiaoPY8eBDKZLgCGn_9gJkmL-fiXV_Khd_EuVXIXGX0gIjIUYxhRfOLqLymudtGIrpG3v3N-BUwfQ0YwfFvNl5Csms5YbFwW5IcuNHo0OPlVsz0FoHyZw347_TLYx4NJSFVf4kQ9YwBxkoyNj4l-LzlSdMeiStoLtZ6YQGRUZ2UmsNVs_Fz_mexcuQ-mf9mbDvAtb0dCNIDJVRb_06feFjq5Ue2SLRa36fCd6fl8rzqhoeQjKZBvRSdYQ6tDBq_YXvNPspjN10eH6w%3D%3D)

Being a SEAL isn’t a one-man job; it takes teamwork, problem-solving, and coming to a consensus. **When you’re on missions in the harshest environments known to man, you must act as a unit and recognize you’re only as strong as the weakest among you.**

I’ve deployed to Iraq, Afghanistan, South America, and the Pacific during my time as a SEAL, and I have been involved in dozens of engagements with enemy forces and survived to tell the tales. _And believe me, there are some tales._

**I’ve seen the world’s dangers and stood up for freedom in the face of terrorism.** I know the strength it takes to stand up and fight for what is right – which is why [**I am determined to take on the anti-American, radical Left in Washington as Montana’s next U.S. Senator.**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=d64aff71164f48918f0e56b053426bd0&_e=quJzg2zu2hgQX7FB0FOTPNEkWEQV76b0yNyYzkeaJxesaaloOjqViB3eCQ1lBBcaPX2Id7OV7fkIF0Ow-6z_sQyzgcDWl4wBxia7e5bUApBfLeAhIT4d7qt-LxBBVUuxuC94OQJlxiaoPY8eBDKZLgCGn_9gJkmL-fiXV_Khd_EuVXIXGX0gIjIUYxhRfOLqLymudtGIrpG3v3N-BUwfQ0YwfFvNl5Csms5YbFwW5IcuNHo0OPlVsz0FoHyZw347fgxnM4JAeM_b_EmoRXSo3kq43Ga3HT-JYzHPKvVmWibgYUMvEarjvQc22iGW0bDjpeGx0QR-90SxVtwBIfEe3Xiyz-u8PRUbwWKpm1maw6VM1s2Xu7FdBa_A2IHwXVc8vTuX8D7tWfkbd-z1oziSbg%3D%3D)

[**ENDORSE FMR. SEAL TIM SHEEHY TODAY** ](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=d64aff71164f48918f0e56b053426bd0&_e=quJzg2zu2hgQX7FB0FOTPNEkWEQV76b0yNyYzkeaJxesaaloOjqViB3eCQ1lBBcaPX2Id7OV7fkIF0Ow-6z_sQyzgcDWl4wBxia7e5bUApBfLeAhIT4d7qt-LxBBVUuxuC94OQJlxiaoPY8eBDKZLgCGn_9gJkmL-fiXV_Khd_EuVXIXGX0gIjIUYxhRfOLqLymudtGIrpG3v3N-BUwfQ0YwfFvNl5Csms5YbFwW5IcuNHo0OPlVsz0FoHyZw347SUf-f7AX_7JIaZmu7p3HBSM6oWEqHOWJh4JRXviiLN0vN31G2d0u2uAAZ78trx4qB-7lTC7xbeSmKszX72xvhQb_KilkDj-JFqUti03v0LSrHeaWhlGgdgO4GzhYjAPjI_rq5uXAVOS_dUakBQeNmA%3D%3D)

Our homeland is in danger. Not from overseas terrorists but Washington’s radical Democrats who want to fundamentally alter the fabric of this GREAT nation. This FAR-LEFT liberal agenda is assaulting our society, communities, and the American Dream.

**The Democrats’ grip on power is seriously undermining our freedom, prosperity, and security.**

**The only way to pull America out of this leftist tailspin is by taking back the Senate in 2024, and our path to the Majority runs through this race in Montana.**

[**We need a proven warrior to take back this Senate seat and take on the Democrats in Washington. I hope hearing my story proves I am the man for the job.**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=d64aff71164f48918f0e56b053426bd0&_e=quJzg2zu2hgQX7FB0FOTPNEkWEQV76b0yNyYzkeaJxesaaloOjqViB3eCQ1lBBcaPX2Id7OV7fkIF0Ow-6z_sQyzgcDWl4wBxia7e5bUApBfLeAhIT4d7qt-LxBBVUuxuC94OQJlxiaoPY8eBDKZLgCGn_9gJkmL-fiXV_Khd_EuVXIXGX0gIjIUYxhRfOLqLymudtGIrpG3v3N-BUwfQ0YwfFvNl5Csms5YbFwW5IcuNHo0OPlVsz0FoHyZw347P27sAdTowcdPQrX3YpJkvvBU0hd-zo7OLZSW_3PZU9rJzQR_C6XkG1dQyFNjsn--JMNGGNam7ZsNqST-9xZqERP8G7_ZxRF83ceF0uVZAI_-5oJVb1ZJ3jaCqTWsM2ddy0LZu1WOdNJTni2oFMhzxQ%3D%3D)

[**ENDORSE FMR. SEAL TIM SHEEHY TODAY** ](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=d64aff71164f48918f0e56b053426bd0&_e=quJzg2zu2hgQX7FB0FOTPNEkWEQV76b0yNyYzkeaJxesaaloOjqViB3eCQ1lBBcaPX2Id7OV7fkIF0Ow-6z_sQyzgcDWl4wBxia7e5bUApBfLeAhIT4d7qt-LxBBVUuxuC94OQJlxiaoPY8eBDKZLgCGn_9gJkmL-fiXV_Khd_EuVXIXGX0gIjIUYxhRfOLqLymudtGIrpG3v3N-BUwfQ0YwfFvNl5Csms5YbFwW5IcuNHo0OPlVsz0FoHyZw347B913u2TfIl0cwEkugCAMVR03fh6t1EgTDQXSemN94M94AB46bIWcTFGajHEnVhZe8h9vyJc2dlWuLMkSArWi54VNNhlT31zGBZ24xXwG-3LkftmgXTILg4201-9sbwlBpb2vut36-H0gr_OQjqyEdQ%3D%3D)

Over the days and weeks ahead, you’ll receive emails from me and my team as we build our campaign. While I don’t want you to feel obligated to interact with each piece of content you receive in your inbox, **I kindly ask you to refrain from unsubscribing from our contact list.** The only way to flip the Senate next year is to nominate a strong Republican candidate who can defeat a Democrat in the General Election.

_***If we fail to flip this Montana seat RED next November, we lose our best chance at a Senate Majority for the next DECADE due to the election map at play.***_

This is my most critical mission to date, and [**I am counting on you to enlist in the fight.**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=d64aff71164f48918f0e56b053426bd0&_e=quJzg2zu2hgQX7FB0FOTPNEkWEQV76b0yNyYzkeaJxesaaloOjqViB3eCQ1lBBcaPX2Id7OV7fkIF0Ow-6z_sQyzgcDWl4wBxia7e5bUApBfLeAhIT4d7qt-LxBBVUuxuC94OQJlxiaoPY8eBDKZLgCGn_9gJkmL-fiXV_Khd_EuVXIXGX0gIjIUYxhRfOLqLymudtGIrpG3v3N-BUwfQ0YwfFvNl5Csms5YbFwW5IcuNHo0OPlVsz0FoHyZw347OiOJjMFF3KkivIkSB14C4t4gDsZZPxEGpq9LtrJjPKxa_epO4S4h6iZpx0ACgBYnI0kXq3H8HSQhof-X8qXUCgo0zzLyLYZZywBvCvK-mz4_BwzRbGYqSTBf33iTwMHPo4qiOwHUXxDY8M43rgMsMw%3D%3D)

Thank you,

Tim Sheehy
Former Navy SEAL
Republican Candidate for U.S. Senate

name: Sen. Tammy Duckworth
subject: One year of the PACT Act
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Biden for President
body:
One year ago today, President Biden signed the PACT Act into law. | | |
---
Peter, One year ago today, President Biden signed the PACT Act into law -- and I couldn’t be more grateful for the work we did together to make that possible.
**The PACT Act is the biggest expansion of VA health care and benefits in decades, and helps millions of Veterans who may have been exposed to harmful toxins gain access to life-saving health care services and benefits.** It wasn’t easy to get this bipartisan legislation over the finish line in the Senate and onto the president’s desk. But I’m so glad we got this done -- because our Veterans deserve nothing less. As a combat Veteran myself who still uses the VA for my own health care, I know firsthand how essential the VA is in providing health care and resources to those who have served and sacrificed for our country. The PACT Act ensures that millions of Veterans returning home with serious health conditions have access to the care they need. **You can learn more about this legislation -- and, if you’re a Veteran, apply for benefits -- by clicking here:**
| | | [LEARN MORE](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/atcYNHk4Eh2YdGnwBh-YDEfYzPgzymHs1jlh4xgBosma20BOMwqd6vIL2MzkfAgwcOB_FVDB7f9l8ZKYnHXFDJ4t4NqJZ1TNOyffXAjPAt3-46XyCqYU2FRtIIW4t_3SQ4C-k6Ueysj9f8rmL3KXqEtyrqwYIsMshx-Fa8LuJuz5h7h4XEN0lyi484gzGBownzYpAZaMuOvQD0PgrNP2gOhweBXSTYmSozWIX_QPVLVNtrizC0zmboduW9vJZTMYJgmrd4q5EkHKQDcJ1xhZaGr4RE7utd3omzxMyK9Dbx5U3Rb-M7Wbq1Ryv5SBmMPWa0UBAM8dmfc4NL-y1-m10XqfiXbQaqoQQZKzPUSrhLy1WJVc9Oj-6qPG6bKxsBy_vWYBJGUo-8Lzw5va3OosdhtOdN2vBpNefz6Y-6OrJBpNBoa-F3vQPpcgySr9Hacv/3ym/isxNPl3YT7ekXCabEYmbSw/h0/zkOe8Cw2L7HQlJnMuyp1ZcCPkbgb_hH_6Vqsu3UqHWM)

name: Sara Rodriguez
subject: I raised the alarm myself
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sara Rodriguez for Wisconsin
body:
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP06/1/84281/images/sara%20email%20nurse%20pic.png]
As a nurse, epidemiologist with the CDC, and healthcare administrator, the arrival of COVID in America horrified me.
I knew immediate action was needed to stop a national outbreak. But I watched in anger as Republican elected officials in Wisconsin did nothing ; the GOP-led legislature didn’t meet for 8 months.
So I decided to run against my State Assemblyman, and raise the alarm myself.
Political insiders said it was a noble, but lost, cause.
But I hit the pavement and talked to as many voters as possible. I flipped the seat blue by just 735 votes.
When I took office, Republicans had let it get so bad that on average a Wisconsinite was being diagnosed with COVID every minute.
We had to work fast to combat misinformation and introduce an economic recovery package that could get Wisconsin back on its feet.
Then, I was asked to run for Lieutenant Governor.
I’ll admit I was nervous. This would be the toughest race of my life — Trump had won Wisconsin just a few years previously.
But I knew what was at stake - everything from reproductive rights, to the foundations of our democracy.
So I ran. And this time, I won with 51.15% of the vote.
Tight races like mine for Lieutenant Governor have a big impact on states, but we don’t get nearly as much attention or funding as other races. That’s why I need to ask for your help, friends. Can you split a $10 donation between my campaign and the Democratic Lieutenant Governors Association before our upcoming mid-month fundraising deadline? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dlga-rodriguez?refcode=20230811rodriguez_l1&amount=10]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation
will go through immediately:
DONATE $10 >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dlga-rodriguez?refcode=20230811rodriguez_l1&amount=10]
OTHER AMOUNT >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dlga-rodriguez?refcode=20230811rodriguez_abxother]
Races like mine are often overlooked, but they shouldn’t be. Lieutenant Governors often lead statewide departments, cast tie-breaking votes, or even decide what legislation can be voted on.
We have 27 seats to flip, and many more, like mine, to protect. Anything you can chip in helps.
In gratitude,
Sara Rodriguez
Lieutenant Governor of Wisconsin
Email is an important way for us to keep supporters like you informed about our work and build a strong people-focused campaign. But if you'd still like to unsubscribe you can unsubscribe: https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/bSK0S2TpB06fE82_CF0vSg2?unsubscribedata=Q2gTLVzKZ9mfseh33RpXyykx0as8e9LyKwFMlKQ%2Bh6sXPmzoBOMBH6U6hI5lMFPUGvhMiVqB7nrhs6Z0jl74QTCdGsduHjYBNT7XCbTnqN5Pu0MNaHKsY80MBazSmYHEkH6LU0Sigao4%2FoqLlG4oCScOBYYbNo3mlmT0DKAWkfb46zMPY1W9XjjAqY5ZttlbGqWMjqu6az%2FNr2K%2FI3z5thoWhgLm96Llkn5%2BLmkMiy7QaVOpIXLVoqTd54W3Sj2YpVuW3z0%2FEJpv2WIDdYSgTQ9VMC78Ajs%2FaNY4QE7%2FN7Ko7PbMSS781HjqaVoeuli45MxWAoBCvPhxK10trrdLk3QrTQnj94qtLkIxwOj18pbWFBH575KfYiQ%2Bkd0WIfB%2BTYiLw2%2FQP8v6ETdjuYP5d9NtVCdZMdModMp7Gc5v%2FDX0GSbyDn3OicS%2BPTrJDEvE .

name: Team Gottheimer
subject: the fight is far from over
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JOSH GOTTHEIMER FOR CONGRESS
body:
---
| | This month marks 58 years since President Lyndon B. Johnson signed the Voting Rights Act into law.

At the core of this act is the belief that every American should be able to make their voice heard in elections and exercise the fundamental right to vote. But since the Supreme Court gutted this act in _Shelby vs Holder_ , extremists have been working tirelessly to attack and disenfranchise so many Americans across the country.

[Will you stand with Josh in the fight to protect every American’s right to vote, both in New Jersey and across the country?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67902489/421245444/-1481530142?source=EM_NBI_JG_20230810_pt_VRA_0_1MO_TeamGottheimer_NA_NA_VRA&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MDczNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyM2UzZmRiZC1jZjM3LWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6WbGLJu5pHJqD_H5NB7rzlV9irY2c4NvdDSBE4Bgiyo=&emci=ef9c92b5-cf37-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=23e3fdbd-cf37-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=37438246) | [ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67902490/421245445/-1481530142?source=EM_NBI_JG_20230810_pt_VRA_0_1MO_TeamGottheimer_NA_NA_VRA&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MDczNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyM2UzZmRiZC1jZjM3LWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6WbGLJu5pHJqD_H5NB7rzlV9irY2c4NvdDSBE4Bgiyo=&emci=ef9c92b5-cf37-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=23e3fdbd-cf37-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=37438246)

clean_body: | | This month marks 58 years since President Lyndon B. Johnson signed the Voting Rights Act into law. At the core of this act is the belief that every American should be able to make their voice heard in elections and exercise the fundamental right to vote. But since the Supreme Court gutted this act in Shelby vs Holder , extremists have been working tirelessly to attack and disenfranchise so many Americans across the country. | The ongoing attacks against voting rights are a danger to our democracy. That’s why we need to work across the aisle to combat extremist attacks and protect the right to vote here in New Jersey and across the country. This fight is far from over, and Josh needs you to stand with him as he works to make sure every NJ Resident and every American can exercise their constitutional right. Thank you, Team Gottheimer | Josh Gottheimer represents New Jersey’s Fifth Congressional District. Josh is in Congress to fight for lower taxes and Jersey Values. He’s working across the aisle to find real solutions for New Jersey families and is actively fighting against the ideological gridlock in Washington. If you'd like to support his campaign =, if you'd like to unsubscribe Thank you for being on Team Gottheimer. | | = | = | Prefer to donate by mail?** Make checks payable to Josh Gottheimer for Congress PO Box 584 Ridgewood, NJ 07451 PAID FOR BY JOSH GOTTHEIMER FOR CONGRESS Josh Gottheimer for Congress PO Box 584 Ridgewood, NJ 07451 United States

body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/serve-riley [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/serve-riley]
Friends,
Hey, it’s Adam Schiff. I’m reaching out to you personally because I want you to join me in supporting Democrat Josh Riley and Serve America. [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/serve-riley]
If you have been following my work, then you know that I am deeply concerned about the future of our Democracy and our country. We cannot allow right-wing extremists to hijack our Democracy, and undermine the values and ideals that make us who we are as Americans. We just can’t.
That’s why electing pro-Democracy, pro-Rule of Law candidates like Josh Riley to maintain our House Democratic Majority is so critical.
Friend, Josh’s race in Upstate New York is among the most competitive in the entire country. The Hill has named it one of seven races that could determine control of the House, and the Cook Political Report is naming it a TOSS-UP.
This is a monumental opportunity for Josh’s people-powered movement to prove its strength before the election. Can I count on you to split $25 between Josh’s campaign and Serve America today? [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/serve-riley]
Thank you for stepping up at this critical moment,
Congressman Adam Schiff

name: Team Tina
subject: Slowing down
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota
body:
There’s one thing on our minds right now that has us a little worried: the “summer slowdown.” |
#
Folks — We’re proud to be able to say that our work is powered by supporters like you pitching in what they can, when they can, to emails like this one. But there’s one thing on our minds right now that has us a little worried: the **_“summer slowdown.”_** When the weather is warm and folks are spending more time offline enjoying the great outdoors, fewer people open these messages — and even fewer pitch in. **We’ll be honest, the timing isn’t great. Democrats are defending 23 seats next year, and Republicans only need to flip 2 of them to take back the majority.** Mitch McConnell and MAGA Republicans are prepared to spend millions attacking vulnerable Democrats across the country, so we can’t afford to risk slipping behind. **[We need your help to catch up on our fundraising efforts during the summer slowdown. Peter, I want to thank you again—as a grassroots supporter you are the most important part of this campaign. It’s thanks to your hard work that we are starting the general election in such a strong position. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67902573/421245839/1217261785?refcode=ea.548f1b40-d037-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ms=ea.548f1b40-d037-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDMzMTAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNTQ4ZjFiNDAtZDAzNy1lZTExLWEzZjEtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=-tV-smaIElvS_5oYb08__kZ5rUoxsVNSySVifUvTXMA=) We both know this race isn’t going to be easy. But mark my words, the movement that we’ve built—made up of working Mississippians from all walks of life—CAN defeat Tate Reeves in November. **And we will.**

Imagine a better future for Mississippi: Corruption? We'll crush it. Rural hospitals? We’ll keep them open. Grocery tax and car tag fees? We’ll cut them. Better opportunities for working families? You bet we’ll make it happen.

But we can't slow down now.

**That’s why we’re launching our Official Democratic Nominee Fund! We set an ambitious goal to raise $30,000 by the end of the week.** [Every dollar will help get our message out & fund critical voter outreach programs through Election Day. clean_body: This election is about you — the people. | = Peter, I want to thank you again—as a grassroots supporter you are the most important part of this campaign. It’s thanks to your hard work that we are starting the general election in such a strong position. = We both know this race isn’t going to be easy. But mark my words, the movement that we’ve built—made up of working Mississippians from all walks of life—CAN defeat Tate Reeves in November. And we will. Imagine a better future for Mississippi: Corruption? We'll crush it. Rural hospitals? We’ll keep them open. Grocery tax and car tag fees? We’ll cut them. Better opportunities for working families? You bet we’ll make it happen. But we can't slow down now. That’s why we’re launching our Official Democratic Nominee Fund! We set an ambitious goal to raise $30,000 by the end of the week. = | = | = | = ---|---|--- = | = | = Thank you for everything. name: JohnFetterman.com
subject: re: a concerning trend

body:
#
Derek,
We’re reaching out to ask if you'll step up in a big way by **[making your first-ever $5 donation to John Fetterman today.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20230810-1?refcode=em20230810-1-8500&refcode2=8500_434096_qtqcnu&akid=8500%2E434096%2Eqtqcnu)**
**We've seen a little bit of a slowdown in our fundraising.** Here's a behind-the-scenes look at our numbers from ActBlue:
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20230810-1?refcode=em20230810-1-8500&refcode2=8500_434096_qtqcnu&akid=8500%2E434096%2Eqtqcnu)
It can be notoriously difficult to raise money over the summer. Why? Because a lot of folks go on vacation or are generally less plugged in with political news. We get it — most folks want to take advantage of the warmer weather.
_But the truth is that seeing a dip in our fundraising like this — even during the summer — can set us back._
We're leaning on folks like you to make your first contribution to fill the gap in our summer budget.
John is up for this fight, but he needs each of us in his corner. **[Would you be willing to contribute $5 to John Fetterman today? It’ll help us immensely and we’ll be able to get ahead of the summer slump!](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20230810-1?refcode=em20230810-1-8500&refcode2=8500_434096_qtqcnu&akid=8500%2E434096%2Eqtqcnu)**
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20230810-1?amount=5&refcode=em20230810-8500&refcode2=8500_434096_qtqcnu&akid=8500%2E434096%2Eqtqcnu)**
Thank you for being such an important part of Team Fetterman. 💙
– Team Fetterman

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20230810-8500-footer&t=1&refcode2=8500_434096_qtqcnu&akid=8500%2E434096%2Eqtqcnu)**

Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.

Peter,

**TRUTH.** There's only one. Not yours, not mine. Just pure TRUTH. In today's bureaucratic political climate where spin is all the Administrative state knows how to do, we stand by cold-hard facts. I'm not afraid to say them:

|
**God** is real.
There are **two** genders.
Human flourishing requires **fossil fuels**.
**Reverse racism** is racism.
An open border is **no border**.
**Parents** determine the education of their children.
The **nuclear family** is the greatest form of governance known to mankind.
**Capitalism** lifts people up from poverty.
There are three branches of the U.S. government, **not four**.
The **U.S. Constitution** is the strongest guarantor of freedoms in history.

---

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

[ ** STAND WITH VIVEK ➞ **](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=54630afaa28b45f1812425c6062dd221&_e=29-anGXn79GHgpfDnAxDsiGuFXH3C5pKlnRDMcil1wd3JuuNQr18pSSbAISbqcY5-FBrY3K7pQXBO0whrt5SsH_pNRvAVzLUrqzkdARajuEd8APJL81mY6lMgvDyR1bjlF2Ba81GDjn6KDwOb-qlb39vholNUclW3YKPQD6ePVKuJKsUVNXD3VdVluGPH40VIIQ2nR-6Tmm1jW96aBXr9czNT6h80tDyWx0ZqrqZhThJ_XZ0g8r3D4dg-3zwKt-U7j4KW6mQh48ko_8vgK9-A0DVa-kzzYZnuXLj0GT_0udki7LktUesTYDZVkTlvkhJr8LPbYzf-swm9QM0YIlRtJIRRhC21lCFV0R6iy04nsFAj0C1vE5F_1TmhScAhmj5WmZmmGn9vRrU2UWBfnTbXw%3D%3D)

Thanks, Vivek Ramaswamy GET TO KNOW VIVEK: Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam , along with his second book, Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence. He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution. Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved. In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics. | | | ---|---|--- | Paid for by Vivek 2024 Contributions to Vivek 2024 are not deductible as charitable contributions for Federal income tax purposes. Funds received in response to this solicitation are subject to federal contribution limits. Contributions from corporations, labor unions, foreign nationals without green cards, and federal government contractors are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer for individuals whose contributions exceed $200 in an election cycle.

Dear Friend,

Over decades, undercover investigative journalists have exposed the foul underbelly of corporate America, government, politics, and society.

We few undercover journalists have instigated change, and rapidly.

One of the first extensive investigations I started, focused on voter fraud across America. Journalists I trained were offered ballots of everyone from Tom Brady to former Attorney General Eric Holder. It was a massive embarrassment to many governments, and the result was something I would have never imagined!

Seventeen states took positive action and instituted Voter ID Laws. Others, like the governor of Maine, issued arrest warrants for me and my investigators - let's just say I didn't travel to Maine for a while.

Now, it was never my job to advocate for the solutions to the problems I exposed. I show the world the truth - on video - and let the chips fall where they may.

And my job is just starting with my new organization, O'Keefe Media Group (OMG). **[I'm requesting your support to fund our investigations and keep my elite team of undercover journalists on the job.](http://email.email.a1warroom.com/c/eJxMjrFupDAQhp9m6EBm8NpsQXF3K66IlD5pImMG1gmz9togtG8fGa2iNFN8_zczv-GwuOnRgf4LiFc3JkCE5g8g3t92jtsnv_wv39W9vKtXPuUQ_wHi-gj0Yz6PVMTGLZnqSzF2RpmJxoK6Wp1rLdqTlMW100ZKg2rS9WS1xhPKVmErBmsGktNgC9ehwEa0dZ6IdYWNFm07CaW1VUqeQYrjUWXq3cToPVfWc7F013UN6WjUA_aJ7BapMjca_ZoNwN5_EU3ENDozR7-FjHguU_C35GPJQ-kZmn5b-SP5LVqC5vJLAFQ5yvsbH9GTWMPBuPkGzYWHJ1spZmePdRG7MexuWVxSGqSYj_bW83cAAAD__-GyeAM)**

In just the first few months of operations for OMG, we've exposed the sickness of greed within the financial leviathan, BlackRock. I'm not easily shocked, but this one made me rethink the true powers around the world. If you watched it, you'd know what I mean.

That BlackRock investigation started with one tip, pursued by one undercover journalist with dogged determination and courage. And I have a team of folks like her who need your continued support to keep exposing the truth. **[Will you help fund them?](http://email.email.a1warroom.com/c/eJxMjrFupDAQhp9m6EBm8NpsQXF3K66IlD5pImMG1gmz9togtG8fGa2iNFN8_zczv-GwuOnRgf4LiFc3JkCE5g8g3t92jtsnv_wv39W9vKtXPuUQ_wHi-gj0Yz6PVMTGLZnqSzF2RpmJxoK6Wp1rLdqTlMW100ZKg2rS9WS1xhPKVmErBmsGktNgC9ehwEa0dZ6IdYWNFm07CaW1VUqeQYrjUWXq3cToPVfWc7F013UN6WjUA_aJ7BapMjca_ZoNwN5_EU3ENDozR7-FjHguU_C35GPJQ-kZmn5b-SP5LVqC5vJLAFQ5yvsbH9GTWMPBuPkGzYWHJ1spZmePdRG7MexuWVxSGqSYj_bW83cAAAD__-GyeAM)**

You can sponsor as a journalist just once or make it **[ongoing support by joining OMG as a sponsor for $20 a month](http://email.email.a1warroom.com/c/eJxMjrFupDAQhp9m6EBm8NpsQXF3K66IlD5pImMG1gmz9togtG8fGa2iNFN8_zczv-GwuOnRgf4LiFc3JkCE5g8g3t92jtsnv_wv39W9vKtXPuUQ_wHi-gj0Yz6PVMTGLZnqSzF2RpmJxoK6Wp1rLdqTlMW100ZKg2rS9WS1xhPKVmErBmsGktNgC9ehwEa0dZ6IdYWNFm07CaW1VUqeQYrjUWXq3cToPVfWc7F013UN6WjUA_aJ7BapMjca_ZoNwN5_EU3ENDozR7-FjHguU_C35GPJQ-kZmn5b-SP5LVqC5vJLAFQ5yvsbH9GTWMPBuPkGzYWHJ1spZmePdRG7MexuWVxSGqSYj_bW83cAAAD__-GyeAM). [Any help for these brave folks is greatly appreciated](http://email.email.a1warroom.com/c/eJxMjrFupDAQhp9m6EBm8NpsQXF3K66IlD5pImMG1gmz9togtG8fGa2iNFN8_zczv-GwuOnRgf4LiFc3JkCE5g8g3t92jtsnv_wv39W9vKtXPuUQ_wHi-gj0Yz6PVMTGLZnqSzF2RpmJxoK6Wp1rLdqTlMW100ZKg2rS9WS1xhPKVmErBmsGktNgC9ehwEa0dZ6IdYWNFm07CaW1VUqeQYrjUWXq3cToPVfWc7F013UN6WjUA_aJ7BapMjca_ZoNwN5_EU3ENDozR7-FjHguU_C35GPJQ-kZmn5b-SP5LVqC5vJLAFQ5yvsbH9GTWMPBuPkGzYWHJ1spZmePdRG7MexuWVxSGqSYj_bW83cAAAD__-GyeAM).**

I scrambled to build OMG so that I could get back to work and wouldn't lose a team of elite journalists to the corporate media. **And I have to tell you, that was EXPENSIVE.** Dozens of laptops, cameras, editing hardware, and software cost enormous amounts of money just to get started.

Now, **[I must ensure my team can continue to work](http://email.email.a1warroom.com/c/eJxMjrFupDAQhp9m6EBm8NpsQXF3K66IlD5pImMG1gmz9togtG8fGa2iNFN8_zczv-GwuOnRgf4LiFc3JkCE5g8g3t92jtsnv_wv39W9vKtXPuUQ_wHi-gj0Yz6PVMTGLZnqSzF2RpmJxoK6Wp1rLdqTlMW100ZKg2rS9WS1xhPKVmErBmsGktNgC9ehwEa0dZ6IdYWNFm07CaW1VUqeQYrjUWXq3cToPVfWc7F013UN6WjUA_aJ7BapMjca_ZoNwN5_EU3ENDozR7-FjHguU_C35GPJQ-kZmn5b-SP5LVqC5vJLAFQ5yvsbH9GTWMPBuPkGzYWHJ1spZmePdRG7MexuWVxSGqSYj_bW83cAAAD__-GyeAM)** , and I am eager to lead them.

Please give OMG a hand as we start, and strongly support our operations and journalists. You have my sincere thanks for all that you do.

With respect and gratitude,

James O'Keefe
Founder and CEO
O'Keefe Media Group

---

108 S Washington St. Suite 300
Alexandria, VA 22314
clean_body: Over decades, undercover investigative journalists have exposed the foul underbelly of corporate America, government, politics, and society. | | Dear Friend, Over decades, undercover investigative journalists have exposed the foul underbelly of corporate America, government, politics, and society. We few undercover journalists have instigated change, and rapidly. One of the first extensive investigations I started, focused on voter fraud across America. Journalists I trained were offered ballots of everyone from Tom Brady to former Attorney General Eric Holder. It was a massive embarrassment to many governments, and the result was something I would have never imagined! Seventeen states took positive action and instituted Voter ID Laws. Others, like the governor of Maine, issued arrest warrants for me and my investigators - let's just say I didn't travel to Maine for a while. Now, it was never my job to advocate for the solutions to the problems I exposed. I show the world the truth - on video - and let the chips fall where they may. name: Lucas Kunce
subject: Josh Hawley wants to control every aspect of our lives.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lucas Kunce for Missouri
body:
It’s weird, it’s creepy, and I just don’t understand it.
#
Peter,
Josh Hawley wants to control what happens in your bedroom, in your doctor’s office, and what you do with your own body. He’s obsessed with telling all of us that the only way to be a man is to be exactly like him — and he's even got a whole book about it!
**It’s weird, it’s creepy, and I just don’t understand it.**

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67903335/421248799/872526041?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjIxNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5OWFmMWI5My1kMzM3LWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FUejvXuQllmmHQFYBuG5iqxNFhBneMdLB6mDJrEhR-8=&emci=52c1e115-d337-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=99af1b93-d337-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=19445147)
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67903336/421248801/872526041?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjIxNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5OWFmMWI5My1kMzM3LWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FUejvXuQllmmHQFYBuG5iqxNFhBneMdLB6mDJrEhR-8=&emci=52c1e115-d337-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=99af1b93-d337-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=19445147)
Hello,
In 2022, no one gave my husband Adam Frisch a chance against Lauren Boebert.
Everywhere you looked, the political pundits were calling Colorado’s 3rd congressional district “Safe Republican” or “Solid R.”
Nate Silver’s FiveThirtyEight only gave Adam a 3% chance of defeating Boebert. They projected he’d lose by over 45,000 votes!
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67903337/421248802/1610638071?refcode=em20230810pm-nd&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C35%2C50%2C100%2C250&refcode2=99af1b93-d337-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjIxNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5OWFmMWI5My1kMzM3LWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FUejvXuQllmmHQFYBuG5iqxNFhBneMdLB6mDJrEhR-8=)
In the end, though, the race went to a recount. **Lauren Boebert won by just 546 votes, and Adam lost the closest race in the entire country.**
Because here’s what their “models” and “forecasts” didn’t factor in: Adam put in the work. He traveled 24,000 miles in our red pickup truck to every corner of the district. He met thousands and thousands of voters – and he _listened_.
Now, my husband’s running again, and I’ll be honest: The first campaign was hard. But defeating Lauren Boebert is just too important to sit this out. **Adam’s all-in to finish the job in 2024. I’m all-in. Can we count on you?**
[**Please, if you can afford to, will you chip in $5 or more right now to Adam’s campaign and help him defeat Lauren Boebert? We were outspent in 2022 and just barely lost. Whatever you can afford to give today will help us invest early and win.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67903338/421248803/1610638071?refcode=em20230810pm-nd&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C35%2C50%2C100%2C250&refcode2=99af1b93-d337-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjIxNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5OWFmMWI5My1kMzM3LWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FUejvXuQllmmHQFYBuG5iqxNFhBneMdLB6mDJrEhR-8=)

clean_body: In 2022, no one gave my husband Adam Frisch a chance against Lauren Boebert. Nate Silver’s FiveThirtyEight only gave Adam a 3% chance of defeating Boebert. They projected he’d lose by over 45,000 votes! Hello, In 2022, no one gave my husband Adam Frisch a chance against Lauren Boebert. Everywhere you looked, the political pundits were calling Colorado’s 3rd congressional district “Safe Republican” or “Solid R.” Nate Silver’s FiveThirtyEight only gave Adam a 3% chance of defeating Boebert. They projected he’d lose by over 45,000 votes! = In the end, though, the race went to a recount. Lauren Boebert won by just 546 votes, and Adam lost the closest race in the entire country. Because here’s what their “models” and “forecasts” didn’t factor in: Adam put in the work. He traveled 24,000 miles in our red pickup truck to every corner of the district. He met thousands and thousands of voters – and he listened. Now, my husband’s running again, and I’ll be honest: The first campaign was hard. But defeating Lauren Boebert is just too important to sit this out. Adam’s all-in to finish the job in 2024. I’m all-in. Can we count on you? = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = This is a journey we’re making again because so many people like you reached out and encouraged Adam to run one more time. I know it means a lot to Adam that you have his back. Thank you, Katy ** Paid for by Adam for Colorado. Adam for Colorado PO Box 1240 Glenwood Springs, CO 81602 United States Contributions or gifts to Adam for Colorado are not tax deductible.

Chris Christie's interview on MSNBC made one thing clear: It doesn't matter if you have an R or a D next to your name, the “New Establishment” all share the same things:
* Pro-war in Ukraine
* Fine with political opponents getting arrested
* Anti-free speech
* Bought & paid for by Super PACs
* Pretends to be anti-establishment

It's laughable that MSNBC will trot out someone like Chris Christie to bash me so they can feign “bipartisanship” while still totally hiding from direct debate with me.

I won't ever back down from speaking the TRUTH, even if it's not popular with the mainstream media. That's why I am looking forward to the first Republican Presidential Debate later this month, but I need your help to secure a center spot on stage.

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

Fellow American, they can preach to their far-left audiences all they want, it's not going to stop me from speaking the TRUTH the D.C. Establishment doesn't want you to hear. Their name-calling won't stop me. Chris Christie's interview on MSNBC made one thing clear: It doesn't matter if you have an R or a D next to your name, the “New Establishment” all share the same things: Pro-war in Ukraine Fine with political opponents getting arrested Anti-free speech Bought & paid for by Super PACs Pretends to be anti-establishment It's laughable that MSNBC will trot out someone like Chris Christie to bash me so they can feign “bipartisanship” while still totally hiding from direct debate with me. I won't ever back down from speaking the TRUTH, even if it's not popular with the mainstream media. That's why I am looking forward to the first Republican Presidential Debate later this month, but I need your help to secure a center spot on stage. | | | ---|---|--- | | Thanks, Vivek Ramaswamy GET TO KNOW VIVEK: Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam , along with his second book, Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence**. He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution. Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved. In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics. | | | ---|---|--- | Paid for by Vivek 2024 Contributions to Vivek 2024 are not deductible as charitable contributions for Federal income tax purposes. Funds received in response to this solicitation are subject to federal contribution limits. Contributions from corporations, labor unions, foreign nationals without green cards, and federal government contractors are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer for individuals whose contributions exceed $200 in an election cycle.

name: OcasioCortez.com
subject: Wildfires in Hawaii
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
The wildfires have left at least 36 people dead, and are not slowing down. Here’s how you can help:
#
Fueled by drought conditions and winds from Hurricane Dora, catastrophic wildfires in Hawaii have left thousands homeless and claimed at least 36 lives, with much of the devastation on the island of Maui.
We’re asking for you to join us in supporting 5 organizations working around the clock to provide emergency housing and relief services to displaced families and refugees across Maui.
[Will you join us today and make a $5 contribution to help the Maui Community Power Recovery Fund as they provide relief to Maui residents who were most impacted by this deadly wildfire?](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20230810-maui.wQt5PS&refcode=em20230810-4785-P_FND_CHA_DIR&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=4785%2E2526796%2EeY0bEK)
**_100% of your contribution will directly benefit the Maui Community Power Recovery Fund and their grassroots partners providing relief in Hawaii._**
**[Contribute $5](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20230810-maui.wQt5PS&refcode=em20230810-4785-P_FND_CHA_DIR&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&akid=4785%2E2526796%2EeY0bEK)**
The **Maui Community Power Recovery Fund** supports immediate relief efforts to house, feed and support displaced families, as well as dedicating resources for long-term efforts to rebuild and advance structural change in Maui and Hawaii. Partners of the Fund include:
• **Our Hawai’i** is organizing a grassroots political movement to create a Hawai‘i that puts local working kama‘āina and Kānaka Maoli families — not big money interests — first.
• **‘Āina Momona** is a community organization dedicated to achieving environmental health and sustainability through social justice and restoring Hawaiian sovereignty.
• **Hawai‘i Funder Hui** partners community organizations with philanthropists to deliver equitable, community-led funding of non-profits in Hawai’i.
• **Kākoʻo Maui** is a Native Hawaiian led relief effort directing 100% of funds to Maui organizations, hosted by the Council for Native Hawaiian Advancement which enhances the cultural, economic, political, and community development of Native Hawaiians.
• **Onipa‘a Maui** works to ensure that local elected officials work on behalf of Maui’s people and environment, not special interest lobbies.
[You can make a major difference right now by splitting a $5 contribution between these organizations providing direct, on-the-ground relief. Can we count on your $5 contribution now?](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20230810-maui.wQt5PS&refcode=em20230810-4785-P_FND_CHA_DIR&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=4785%2E2526796%2EeY0bEK)
Our hearts are with those who lost loved ones in the fires, and all those affected.
Together, we will help this community make it out of this stronger.
Thank you,
Team AOC

[](https://www.facebook.com/OcasioCortez/?t=22&akid=4785%2E2526796%2EeY0bEK) | [](https://twitter.com/AOC?t=23&akid=4785%2E2526796%2EeY0bEK) | [](https://www.instagram.com/aoc/?t=24&akid=4785%2E2526796%2EeY0bEK)
---|---|---
Email us: [speak@ocasiocortez.com](mailto: speak@ocasiocortez.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, PO Box 680080, Corona, NY 11368.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/signup/did-your-information-change/?t=25&akid=4785%2E2526796%2EeY0bEK)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=26&akid=4785%2E2526796%2EeY0bEK)

Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress

[](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=758868e2920f4fe28d6e0ecba7abe0a3&_e=-pHi2KGaPz9bXinkxFvesUzpyRJe3OQLXhlBKdrcrlTCYFtaZ_GheqHx3yST8iTB6DthcivoXwUoQoaqGjgBsbBad-mTKPEUYnqWLIiyOEwofZTfXWs_qqIHaiKReKxq2uFniUdGP9BROXV7mOQuIrM34VXK-2Hv_-cL_jfPOdtj4GIdlvBb1yc34vDFTQ9m6euUVjrA1sR4Nrp1FWFttd4lY73-yCuq6qbRDSs0gt-g2AKT-jdnizuCmIoATyZYNELS_c9lHECr_lr_Xxdo3Qkf1br8qmzBRsRxfLLzBbTfdsUGBQHIFHmqF2kNNmNnYRMoJ5PHMB5mrX2j1cO35MC24kjE5uUR0JL5iQ-64wcNAWh2Zqnq-YkDAaFuvpRFdWEvt41yhTtk-wipT3s-gw%3D%3D)

Peter,

I’ve always known that I was meant to live a life of service, but I could never have imagined that perhaps **the toughest mission of my life wouldn’t be as a Navy SEAL but rather as a combat veteran preparing to run for the United States Senate.**

[**Today, I’m reaching out to ask you to personally endorse my campaign to become the next U.S. Senator from Montana.**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=758868e2920f4fe28d6e0ecba7abe0a3&_e=-pHi2KGaPz9bXinkxFvesUzpyRJe3OQLXhlBKdrcrlTCYFtaZ_GheqHx3yST8iTB6DthcivoXwUoQoaqGjgBsbBad-mTKPEUYnqWLIiyOEwofZTfXWs_qqIHaiKReKxq2uFniUdGP9BROXV7mOQuIrM34VXK-2Hv_-cL_jfPOdtj4GIdlvBb1yc34vDFTQ9m6euUVjrA1sR4Nrp1FWFttd4lY73-yCuq6qbRDSs0gt-g2AKT-jdnizuCmIoATyZYpR5E-BSfoGTPV3QcoDcmQIXvILAP3PKzi2ydD5vYzvKBv38GB1Uh19xE9q7_HD-F6fglEpdcu7jeI7UjTSTGeCp47jSuhfaTyspcDWWx46RAv7xEOkB4HmuSRf2ogim8OU_U3gzQBqy3EbqXGEAkrw%3D%3D)

Peter, I am under no illusions that you will back my campaign the first time you hear from me. But my life experiences have taught me that **anything worth having requires working tirelessly, breaking down walls, and moving mountains to get it.**

**I hope you will allow me to earn your support today by reading my entire message - I promise, it’s worth the read.**

In the Navy, finding yourself between a rock and a hard place is easy. This rings especially true for the individuals who have earned the honor of serving in the elite task force that is the Navy SEALs, a group of highly trained combat warriors – a brotherhood – in which I earned a spot following my graduation from the United States Naval Academy at Annapolis.

[**ENDORSE FMR. SEAL TIM SHEEHY TODAY** ](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=758868e2920f4fe28d6e0ecba7abe0a3&_e=-pHi2KGaPz9bXinkxFvesUzpyRJe3OQLXhlBKdrcrlTCYFtaZ_GheqHx3yST8iTB6DthcivoXwUoQoaqGjgBsbBad-mTKPEUYnqWLIiyOEwofZTfXWs_qqIHaiKReKxq2uFniUdGP9BROXV7mOQuIrM34VXK-2Hv_-cL_jfPOdtj4GIdlvBb1yc34vDFTQ9m6euUVjrA1sR4Nrp1FWFttd4lY73-yCuq6qbRDSs0gt-g2AKT-jdnizuCmIoATyZYK9FvT-_SGocjJYR6b-JnPzW3liqi5rQlpQngHaqrC9UMfrBX1hWcnVGTbfarJ9H_n2H-EFpXxJ01PVoiGVNhCM56O6F6GshoZTvHMVrM9bU3KjgxZTA5obn69F7ezZ_EJGo3PGagTireYMZJnCvOnw%3D%3D)

Being a SEAL isn’t a one-man job; it takes teamwork, problem-solving, and coming to a consensus. **When you’re on missions in the harshest environments known to man, you must act as a unit and recognize you’re only as strong as the weakest among you.**

I’ve deployed to Iraq, Afghanistan, South America, and the Pacific during my time as a SEAL, and I have been involved in dozens of engagements with enemy forces and survived to tell the tales. _And believe me, there are some tales._

**I’ve seen the world’s dangers and stood up for freedom in the face of terrorism.** I know the strength it takes to stand up and fight for what is right – which is why [**I am determined to take on the anti-American, radical Left in Washington as Montana’s next U.S. Senator.**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=758868e2920f4fe28d6e0ecba7abe0a3&_e=-pHi2KGaPz9bXinkxFvesUzpyRJe3OQLXhlBKdrcrlTCYFtaZ_GheqHx3yST8iTB6DthcivoXwUoQoaqGjgBsbBad-mTKPEUYnqWLIiyOEwofZTfXWs_qqIHaiKReKxq2uFniUdGP9BROXV7mOQuIrM34VXK-2Hv_-cL_jfPOdtj4GIdlvBb1yc34vDFTQ9m6euUVjrA1sR4Nrp1FWFttd4lY73-yCuq6qbRDSs0gt-g2AKT-jdnizuCmIoATyZY5uNUKNbXMkTku6YGsA7E5ZwLZ0ryNfrjnZnVXJbRGecBCeuxhaKrBTzhF-JhsFbScBjbrjpCSLyYgxM8kDYVgc8vWyJWic56Bagp4i5pcahxTWSu0-VWKNyCN6cwhJkXp1A5h_ZblXBndEyKuXTbuw%3D%3D)

[**ENDORSE FMR. SEAL TIM SHEEHY TODAY** ](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=758868e2920f4fe28d6e0ecba7abe0a3&_e=-pHi2KGaPz9bXinkxFvesUzpyRJe3OQLXhlBKdrcrlTCYFtaZ_GheqHx3yST8iTB6DthcivoXwUoQoaqGjgBsbBad-mTKPEUYnqWLIiyOEwofZTfXWs_qqIHaiKReKxq2uFniUdGP9BROXV7mOQuIrM34VXK-2Hv_-cL_jfPOdtj4GIdlvBb1yc34vDFTQ9m6euUVjrA1sR4Nrp1FWFttd4lY73-yCuq6qbRDSs0gt-g2AKT-jdnizuCmIoATyZYOkYkCa-7Xy-ytDZ_Ha_5uvNwc-E_01mgUiqGw_U_brW7am8FGMv5GMw69Thfy088zSqOFi8rHBjjtYt0TtAGzjF2PKYVjentTDWm9wJubZd9AQOETUSsf-4y0506p--hO_3oSzbAuzri7OmbG92NOg%3D%3D)

Our homeland is in danger. Not from overseas terrorists but Washington’s radical Democrats who want to fundamentally alter the fabric of this GREAT nation. This FAR-LEFT liberal agenda is assaulting our society, communities, and the American Dream.

**The Democrats’ grip on power is seriously undermining our freedom, prosperity, and security.**

**The only way to pull America out of this leftist tailspin is by taking back the Senate in 2024, and our path to the Majority runs through this race in Montana.**

[**We need a proven warrior to take back this Senate seat and take on the Democrats in Washington, Peter. I hope hearing my story proves I am the man for the job.**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=758868e2920f4fe28d6e0ecba7abe0a3&_e=-pHi2KGaPz9bXinkxFvesUzpyRJe3OQLXhlBKdrcrlTCYFtaZ_GheqHx3yST8iTB6DthcivoXwUoQoaqGjgBsbBad-mTKPEUYnqWLIiyOEwofZTfXWs_qqIHaiKReKxq2uFniUdGP9BROXV7mOQuIrM34VXK-2Hv_-cL_jfPOdtj4GIdlvBb1yc34vDFTQ9m6euUVjrA1sR4Nrp1FWFttd4lY73-yCuq6qbRDSs0gt-g2AKT-jdnizuCmIoATyZYw8t3K96VLopknUoBGeEgUez_4nFLwFIuElNPBumH1Ah741xQg6fiWwG0yKae9Ajt2imqjRoooZE75SegYgzgvXrQys4KkCy_G-suueioUk2wJk8x_oHsiwhWr9SEyDbyNfwX-MORwpe-mqsXWAV8QQ%3D%3D)

[**ENDORSE FMR. SEAL TIM SHEEHY TODAY** ](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=758868e2920f4fe28d6e0ecba7abe0a3&_e=-pHi2KGaPz9bXinkxFvesUzpyRJe3OQLXhlBKdrcrlTCYFtaZ_GheqHx3yST8iTB6DthcivoXwUoQoaqGjgBsbBad-mTKPEUYnqWLIiyOEwofZTfXWs_qqIHaiKReKxq2uFniUdGP9BROXV7mOQuIrM34VXK-2Hv_-cL_jfPOdtj4GIdlvBb1yc34vDFTQ9m6euUVjrA1sR4Nrp1FWFttd4lY73-yCuq6qbRDSs0gt-g2AKT-jdnizuCmIoATyZYWsGdlZaQPOUrCAVcjpEJLRWxMZDUHTu1n8Isw-SRZGiYcNtIc2k_CB3IKdQi0DvloGq9ZjKyUbCM6mzS4LrA38JxE_1QsSm-IUPdLvdw-PwxvMB-hYYAJYZasLd00i-Q3qWcYrzkVMCbK_6oIlaBjg%3D%3D)

Over the days and weeks ahead, you’ll receive emails from me and my team as we build our campaign. While I don’t want you to feel obligated to interact with each piece of content you receive in your inbox, **I kindly ask you to refrain from unsubscribing from our contact list.** The only way to flip the Senate next year is to nominate a strong Republican candidate who can defeat a Democrat in the General Election.

_***If we fail to flip this Montana seat RED next November, we lose our best chance at a Senate Majority for the next DECADE due to the election map at play.***_

This is my most critical mission to date, and [**I am counting on you to enlist in the fight, Peter.**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=758868e2920f4fe28d6e0ecba7abe0a3&_e=-pHi2KGaPz9bXinkxFvesUzpyRJe3OQLXhlBKdrcrlTCYFtaZ_GheqHx3yST8iTB6DthcivoXwUoQoaqGjgBsbBad-mTKPEUYnqWLIiyOEwofZTfXWs_qqIHaiKReKxq2uFniUdGP9BROXV7mOQuIrM34VXK-2Hv_-cL_jfPOdtj4GIdlvBb1yc34vDFTQ9m6euUVjrA1sR4Nrp1FWFttd4lY73-yCuq6qbRDSs0gt-g2AKT-jdnizuCmIoATyZYjYfWKwYahFGEX6TH5tvoHvDO_EI-p7aWCxgeox4QQ2dNcGxE5qbcZBeYUnpKI-r79T2-yDhP8345VNR09S-old9oWpKFi4alMWW8fPf16qGSAWKo9E2_3yTnMMH0wbsDm_3o2owAWf9FdHkeJNy0Dw%3D%3D)

Tim Sheehy
Former Navy SEAL
Republican Candidate for U.S. Senate

body:
| | | Hi there, it’s Diana, the Research Director here at the DSCC.

I'm reaching out because polls show President Biden statistically tied with Donald Trump -- but we’re _still_ missing your response to our presidential approval poll!

The president’s standing among voters like you is a key driver of voter turnout patterns, so it’s _**critical**_ that we have accurate data to help us make necessary strategic decisions.

Unfortunately, we’re still 103 answers short in Pennsylvania, and without your response, we will NOT be able to reach statistical significance for our poll to take on the GOP!

**Our Live Poll is closing at 11:59 P.M.,_so please answer immediately:_**

[](https://go.dscc.org/go/13653?ask=5&t=5&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20230810-Diana-DianaBidenApprovalPostAnnouncementRFV1-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20230810-Diana-DianaBidenApprovalPostAnnouncementRFV1-Pros-sl1&akid=11586%2E9716520%2Ezw-UFx)
