Peter Willis —

Ron DeSantis just showed that he’s willing to be as anti-democratic as Donald Trump and weaponize the government to subvert democracy and target his enemies.

DeSantis removed FL State Attorney Monique Worrell — an Our Revolution endorsed candidate who’s a leader in the criminal justice reform movement — from elected office.

This is an affront to democracy and the rule of law — and it’s a clear indication that DeSantis will be another Trump who is willing to trample on the constitution and rule as an autocrat.

Monique described DeSantis best in her response to being kicked out of her elected office — which she won with 67% of the vote!!

2023 is a _major_ year for Virginia elections.

All 100 seats in the Virginia House of Delegates are up for election. In districts in every corner of our Commonwealth, Democratic candidates have stepped up to run on policies that are good for people, communities, and our economy. They’ve stepped up to keep politics out of women's private healthcare choices. And they’ve stepped up to ensure your values and priorities are at the forefront of this fight.

I know firsthand what it takes to win a fiercely competitive race – a race where we have to give our all to defend against intense outside pressure and investment.

This year, the whole country is watching Virginia. National Republican groups, out-of-state mega-donors, and right-wing special interests are gearing up to pour money into competitive districts. In fact, the GOP has named Virginia a top target this year, which means these investments will lead to countless attack ads online, on TV, and on billboards.

**Democrats have to make sure we can fight back and cut through the noise to focus on running the strategic, issues-focused campaigns we need to win.

[_I’m committed to making sure we elect candidates who are ready to roll up their sleeves and do the work to move Virginia forward. name: Rose Huerta
subject: Peter, can you please read this email?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY WILSON FOR LOUISIANA
body:
I just need 30 seconds of your time.

Hi Peter – My name is Rose, and I’m Shawn Wilson’s finance director. Like many of you, I was inspired by the work Shawn has done on behalf of Louisianans, and when he asked me to join the campaign, I couldn’t say no. For the past 25 years, Shawn’s worked hard in state government — under governors from both parties — to cut through the noise and get things done for Louisiana. As Secretary of Transportation and Development, he kept projects running like clockwork and turned a budget deficit into a budget _surplus_ by the end of his tenure. That’s why I know he’ll be exactly the type of governor our state needs: a leader who will work with any and all stakeholders to deliver _results._ **But Shawn can’t win without grassroots-level support — without _your_ support, Peter!** **_[So please, chip in anything you can to help our campaign spread Shawn’s message, beat the GOP, and secure the governorship this November. subject: Planning for our worsening climate change effects

body:
With worsening climate change effects, Hilary has worked tirelessly to ensure DNR is looking ahead.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67903706/421250290/-165497492?refcode=BLU-HFFG-20230810-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDA1NzQiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZWMwMzY5MDYtZDgzNy1lZTExLWEzZjEtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=kvgYIUTdPyQa2tIQaGgbzcZwSDu0NTXdTthj68MzwH0=)

| Peter,

Hilary knows how to make an action plan. She's proven it time and time again as commissioner of public lands over the last seven years.

The Washington Department of Natural Resources just released its three-year update to its Plan for Climate Resiliency, and it's extensive. **With worsening climate change effects, Hilary has worked tirelessly to ensure DNR is looking ahead.**

By 2040, Hilary and the DNR's plan calls for more equitable tree canopy coverage on every street in every neighborhood in Washington and treating, conserving, and reforesting more than 3 million acres of land to help lower carbon emissions and power our economy.

That's just a fraction of the plan Hilary helped plan to take steps toward our climate goals. _**Now, she's running for governor to continue delivering progress for every Washingtonian.**_ [_**So, Peter, will you help Hilary continue making a plan for our future as our next governor and become a Founding Donor to our campaign by contributing $10 right now?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67903707/421250291/-165497492?refcode=BLU-HFFG-20230810-1-EM&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDA1NzQiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZWMwMzY5MDYtZDgzNy1lZTExLWEzZjEtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=kvgYIUTdPyQa2tIQaGgbzcZwSDu0NTXdTthj68MzwH0=)

subject: It’s not just roads and bridges
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BUILD ALASKA'S FUTURE ACTION FUND
body:
As we invest more in connecting Alaskans, we will create jobs, advance our state’s economy, and build Alaska’s future.

| | | [ ](https://click.everyaction.com/k/67903876/421251167/1859846009?amount=25&utm_campaign=em_2308010_connected&utm_source=em&utm_medium=em&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzEwMjc1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZmU0NzgzMC1kOTM3LWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=eRCC3m6mxhTKaaQVaq8S5slghcTqATRLBB_JZpdm3hM=&emci=e201621d-d737-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=0fe47830-d937-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=9512399)
---
| | | Friend — People often ask why infrastructure investment is such a big deal to us. The answer is simple: _because it’s a big deal to Alaska._ Infrastructure isn’t just roads and bridges — though roads and bridges are big part of it. It’s also about the ability to make and store energy, to distribute clean water to homes, to have reliable broadband access, to navigate waterways, and to move people via train, plane, or automobile. **In short,_infrastructure is what connects us._ It makes everything else possible.** Health care, education, child care, job creation, vital emergency services — they all require infrastructure to bring people together. We know that investing in infrastructure is fundamental to a region’s success. Nowhere is that more true than here in Alaska — the largest state with the most challenging terrain and the most geographically dispersed population. **As we invest more in connecting Alaskans, we will create jobs, advance our state’s economy, and build Alaska’s future.** [**Please help us continue to advocate for infrastructure investments by making a contribution today. Together, we can connect Alaskans and bring people together →**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/67903877/421251168/1859846009?refcode=E3699-20230810-Connected-SL-Infrastructure&amount=25&utm_campaign=em_2308010_connected&utm_source=em&utm_medium=em&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzEwMjc1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZmU0NzgzMC1kOTM3LWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=eRCC3m6mxhTKaaQVaq8S5slghcTqATRLBB_JZpdm3hM=&emci=e201621d-d737-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=0fe47830-d937-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=9512399) | | [DONATE $5 »](https://click.everyaction.com/k/67903878/421251169/1859846009?refcode=E3699-20230810-Connected-SB-Infrastructure&amount=5&utm_campaign=em_2308010_connected&utm_source=em&utm_medium=em&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzEwMjc1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZmU0NzgzMC1kOTM3LWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=eRCC3m6mxhTKaaQVaq8S5slghcTqATRLBB_JZpdm3hM=&emci=e201621d-d737-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=0fe47830-d937-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=9512399)

PAID FOR BY BUILD ALASKA'S FUTURE ACTION FUND
clean_body: As we invest more in connecting Alaskans, we will create jobs, advance our state’s economy, and build Alaska’s future. | | | | | | Friend — People often ask why infrastructure investment is such a big deal to us. The answer is simple: because it’s a big deal to Alaska. Infrastructure isn’t just roads and bridges — though roads and bridges are big part of it. It’s also about the ability to make and store energy, to distribute clean water to homes, to have reliable broadband access, to navigate waterways, and to move people via train, plane, or automobile. In short,infrastructure is what connects us. It makes everything else possible. Health care, education, child care, job creation, vital emergency services — they all require infrastructure to bring people together. We know that investing in infrastructure is fundamental to a region’s success. Nowhere is that more true than here in Alaska — the largest state with the most challenging terrain and the most geographically dispersed population. As we invest more in connecting Alaskans, we will create jobs, advance our state’s economy, and build Alaska’s future. | | | | Thanks for being part of our mission, friend! – Build Alaska’s Future Action Fund | | Help us continue to build Alaska's future by to support our work. | | | Copyright © 2022 Build Alaska's Future Action Fund, All rights reserved.
